[CB008124-HA] Irrespective of the UE DRX state, a UE with an active Configured Grant Type2, is expected to transmit UL data in the slot corresponding to the CG occasion configured by higher layers to the UE. Hence, 5G-L2-PS shall send to 5G-L1-UL, request for PUSCH decode every CG occasion.

If UE request class is cgModification or (UE request class is cgDeactivation and CG state is CG-WaitForDeactivationOrder) and the DRX related requirement in 5G_UP_ALG_1872_replaced([11111200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpLBnfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), that maximize the confidence that DRX state machine is aligned to UE’s DRX state machine, is not fullfilled (note that it’s preferable to refer to 5G_UP_ALG_1872_replaced([11111200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpLBnfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) rather than duplicating the DRX statement for maintainability reasons) then:

\- UE’s request class shall be set to the next highest priority other than cgModification or cgDeactivation, if there is some, otherwise UE is not considered for scheduling in the current slot. [End CB008124-HA]

[For the UEs, when PsUser_UserModifyReq is received and contains the ‘measGapConfig’ structure, IE 'measGapConfigStatus' is set to 'setup' and DRX release configuration is also included in the same message, if the relevant RRC Reconfiguration Complete (PsUser_RrcReconfCompletedReq) hasn't yet been received from CP-RT, L2-PS shall consider both Measurement Gaps and DRX are active in this period. That is, such a UE can become candidate for dynamic packet scheduling only in slots that are not interrupted by gaps and when the DRX status is active.

---

### 3.30.3.0-10 UL Pre-Scheduling Reception of PsUser_UserStopReq (ID: 11194949)

**3.30.3.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11194954`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Upon reception of PsUser_UserStopReq, UL Prescheduler shall, for the designated UE:

  * remove the UE from:

  * UL pre-scheduler candidate set, if present.

  * declare the UE ineligible for scheduling and prevent the UE from being added to:

  * UL pre-scheduler candidate set




This is handled by considering the status of the UE (suspended/stopped or not) when the UL Prescheduler checks if a UE can be included in the

  * UL pre-scheduler candidate list.



By the upcoming PsUser_UserDeleteReq (common to both these scenarios) the UL HARQ processes related to the still pending retransmissions are released, including the corresponding UL HARQ buffer indices (absoluteHarqProcessIndex).

If the numOfSCellToStop in the PsUser_UserStopReq is zero, L2-PS shall follow the procedure described above. Otherwise, L2-PS shall mark the SCells in the scellToStopList as stopped. By the upcoming PsUser_UserModifyReq, the UL HARQ processes related to the still pending retransmissions are released, including the corresponding UL HARQ buffer indices (absoluteHarqProcessIndex).

UL Prescheduler shall, for the designated UE:

\- Declare UE is ineligible for scheduling on target SCell

\- stop scheduling further HARQ re-transmissions for target serving cell.

The start/end notification of SCell release procedure is received from C-Plane (see 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_3116_replaced([11315870](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tr41kPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the transient phase handling shall be started when the start notification of SCell release procedure is received.

---

### 3.30.3.0-11 UL Pre-Scheduling Beam Selection for Analog Beamforming in FR2 (ID: 11194959)

**3.30.3.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `11194963`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Overview

---

**3.30.3.0-11.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194966`)

UL Pre-Scheduling For analog beamforming, in FR2, if NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.actHighNumberOfUes = TRUE and rdActEnhBeamSelection = TRUE (see 5G_UP_ALG_27553_replaced([11193947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvxY0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UL pre-scheduler shall perform beam selection based on UEs in pre-scheduler candidate set during the UE selection for CS1 (5G_UP_ALG_4825_replaced([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.actHighNumberOfUes = FALSE or rdActEnhBeamSelection = FALSE, then beam selection shall not be performed in the UL Pre-scheduler but in UL TD scheduler considering the UEs in UL candidate set 1 (CS1) as described in 5G_UP_ALG_22375_replaced([11196368](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCemfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**3.30.3.0-11.0-2**  (ID: `11194972`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Beam Selection Based on UEs in Pre-Scheduler Candidate Set

---

**3.30.3.0-11.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11194978`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Beam Selection

---

**3.30.3.0-11.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194983`)

UL Pre-Scheduling In FR2, If NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.actHighNumberOfUes = TRUE and rdActEnhBeamSelection = TRUE (see 5G_UP_ALG_27553_replaced([11193947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvxY0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), before selecting UEs to the candidate set 1 from the UL pre-scheduler candidate set as described in see 5G_UP_ALG_4825_replaced([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), UL Pre-scheduler shall initialize the below:

  * beam for the slot n, namely selectedBeam(n), = undefined (beam not set)
  * current best nonGBR beam for the slot n, namely currBestNonGbrBeam(n) = undefined (beam not set)



Then, when a UE/Tx belonging to high prio traffic (all traffic priorities above drbTraffic) is added to CS1, the beam for the slot, namely selectedBeam(n), shall be set to the beam of the UE/Tx. Then, further UEs (inlcuding UEs belonging to drbTraffic) are added to CS1 only if their beam is same as selectedBeam(n) as stated in 5G_UP_ALG_4825_replaced([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If no high Prio UE present in CS1 (i.e.selectedBeam is not set) and a UE belonging to drbTraffic class satisfies all conditions stated in 5G_UP_ALG_4825_replaced([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to be added to CS1:

  * If currBestNonGbrBeam is not yet set:
  * UE shall be added to CS1 and currBestNonGbrBeam shall be set to the beam of the UE.
  * Else
  * If beam of the UE is same as currBestNonGbrBeam, UE shall be added to CS1
  * Else If the priority of beam of the UE < priority of the currBestNonGbrBeam (see 5G_UP_ALG_27617_replaced([11194986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then UE shall be excluded from CS1.
  * Else (i.e. beam priority of the UE > priority of the currBestNonGbrBeam), then CS1 list shall be flushed and UE shall be added to CS1 and currBestNonGbrBeam shall be set to the beam of the UE.



Once the CS1 list is created successfully with all eligible UEs, if no high prio UE is present in CS1 (i.e. selectedBeam is not set), then currentBestNonGbrBeam shall be considered as the beam for the slot and selectedBeam shall be set to currentBestNonGbrBeam for the slot.

In FR2, If NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.actHighNumberOfUes = TRUE and rdActEnhBeamSelection = TRUE (see 5G_UP_ALG_27553_replaced([11193947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvxY0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), analog beam selection is also performed together with UE selection for CS1 as below:

  * Beam selection for all traffic except drbTraffic: When a UE/Tx belonging to the traffic class except drbTraffic is the first UE eligible to be added to CS1 from UL pre-scheduler candidate set as per conditions in 5G_UP_ALG_4825_replaced([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then the beam for the slot, namely selectedBeam(n), shall be set to the beam of the corresponding UE/Tx.
  * Beam selection for drbTraffic class: When a UE/Tx belonging to drbTraffic class is the first UE eligible to be added to CS1 from UL pre-scheduler candidate set as per conditions in 5G_UP_ALG_4825_replaced([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then, the beam selection shall be performed based on UEs in drbTraffic class as below:
  * The beam for the slot, namely selectionBeam(n), shall be set to the beam with the highest priority (see 5G_UP_ALG_27617_replaced([11194986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) among all the beams which have atleast one UE belonging to drbTraffic eligible to be added to CS1.



Once the beam for the slot is determined, namely selectionBeam(n), then, further UEs shall be added to CS1 only if their beam is same as selectedBeam(n) as stated in 5G_UP_ALG_4825_replaced([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.30.3.0-11.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11194986`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Beam Priorities for NonGBR Traffic

---

**3.30.3.0-11.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11194992`)

UL Pre-Scheduling UL pre-scheduler shall prioritize the beams for the beam selection of nonGBR traffic as below.

  * The higher the value of beamMetric (see 5G_UP_ALG_27619_replaced([11194997](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the higher is the priority of the beam.
  * If two beams have same value of beam metric, then the beam with higher value of beamWeight shall be considered to have more priority.

---

**3.30.3.0-11.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11194997`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Beam Metric Computation for NonGBR Traffic

---

**3.30.3.0-11.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11195010`)

UL Pre-Scheduling 11195010: UL Pre-Scheduling For a given beam i, its beam metric, namely beamMetric(i), shall be determined as below

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is: beamMetricᵢ = beamWeightᵢ / rrmAvgBeamSchedRateᵢ[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15135.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

where:

  * beamWeight(i) = sum of the scheduling weights (NRBTS/NRDRB.schedulWeight) of all nonGBR bearers with non-empty buffer configured for the UEs in the beam i. In the beamWeight calculation, only the nonGBR bearers of UE(s) which are eligible to be scheduled in the slot n (i.e. UEs which are considered in UL pre-scheduler candidate set) shall be considered.
  * rrmAvgBeamSchedRate(i) shall represent the percentage of slots that the beam gets selected for scheduling nonGBR bearers. It shall be calculated via an IIR filter as below



[image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation defines `rrmAvgBeamSchedRate(t)` in terms of previous values and a coefficient. The equation is: `rrmAvgBeamSchedRate(t) = (1 - rdBeamSelectionFilterCoeff) * rrmAvgBeamSchedRate(t-1) + rdBeamSelectionFilterCoeff * instBeamSchedRate(t)`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15135.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]

where:

  * rdBeamSelectionFilterCoeff is the R&D parameter described in 5G_UP_ALG_27558_replaced([11193957](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvxY1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * rrmAvgBeamSchedRate(i) for every beam i calculated via an IIR filter shall be updated every UL slot 't' with the instantaneous value, namely instBeamSchedRate(i). In a given UL slot, instBeamSchedRate(i) of beam i shall be 1 if the corresponding beam i is selected for scheduling in the slot, otherwise, it shall be 0. At the beginning, rrmAvgBeamSchedRate for all beams shall be initialised to 1/n where n is the number of SSB beams configured in the cell. The slots without UL data scheduling shall be excluded in the rrmAvgBeamSchedRate calculation.



Note: This requirement states the functional perspective of the beamMetric, beamWeight and rrmAvgBeamSchedRate calculation. However, it shall be further described in detail in L2 EFS on how these parameters are efficiently computed for performance reasons.

---

### 3.30.3.0-12 UL Pre-Scheduling Selecting high TD metric and high buffer UEs to CS1 list (ID: 12550646)

**3.30.3.0-12.0-1**  (ID: `12550658`)

UL Pre-Scheduling **[CB014044-L]**

If [Before CB014044-L-UPD004] NRCELL.actBestNList [CB014044-L-UPD004] NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.actBestNList [End CB014044-L-UPD004] is set to UL or DL_UL, follow below algorithm to create CS1 list;

**Configuration Parameters**

  * Max NK UEs = BestNKListRatio × maxCS1ListSize (instantaneous value of maxCS1ListSize per OLC) (see [11216193](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxX7VfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9),[12550702](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gu2NoSQtEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
  * Max K UEs = max(1, BestKRatio × Max NK)
  * [CB014044-L-UPD004] Activating BestKList (UL): NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.actBestKList is set to UL or DL_UL. [End CB014044-L-UPD004]
  * BestNKListRatio (UL): [Before CB014044-L-UPD004] NRCELL.ulBestNListRatio [CB014044-L-UPD004] NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.ulBestNListRatio [End CB014044-L-UPD004]
  * BestKRatio (UL): [Before CB014044-L-UPD004] rdUlHighBuffBestKRatio (see[12548725](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Klaw0CQLEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [CB014044-L-UPD004] NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.ulBestKListRatio [End CB014044-L-UPD004]



**Step 0: Clean Up Best NK List**

  * Remove UEs from the Best NK List (proposed in previous slot) if they fail prescheduling checks (as per [11194813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv3fdvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
  * If a non-GBR UE was added due to newTx and transitions to reTx, remove it.
  * DRX Off state, measurement gap UEs are not allowed to be in the best NK List.
  * The resulting size is referred to as BestNKListSize (UL)
  * If Best NK List becomes empty, fall back to legacy CS1 creation (as per [11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and skip steps below.



Step 1: Add High-Priority UEs

  * Add UEs with priority higher than drbTraffic, and UEs within drbTraffic class that are marked as prioritized (e.g., prioritized NBR). (as per [11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))



**Step 2: Add High Buffer (K) UEs**

  * From the remaining Best NK List, add up to (Max K-1) UEs with the highest buffer.
  * Ensure at least one slot remains for a future RR UE (from Step 4), i.e., do not fill all available CS1 list entries here.
  * Deduplication: UEs added in this step must be tracked so that they are excluded in subsequent steps.
  * [Before CB014044-L-UPD004] Selection of high buffer K UEs within the Non-GBR priority class is based solely on buffer size, without considering token bucket status or service type.[End CB014044-L-UPD004]
  * Do not exceed maxCs1ListSize.



**Step 3: Add High TD-Metric (N) UEs**

  * From the remaining Best NK List, add up to (min(BestNKListSize (UL), Max NK) - actual_K_added) UEs with highest TD metric to CS1 list.
  * Exclude any UEs already added/reserved in Step 2 .
  * Do not exceed maxCs1ListSize.



**Step 4: Add Remaining UEs via Round Robin (RR)**

  * Among Non-GBR UEs, ensure at least one RR UE is selected if not already done in previous steps.
  * From UEs with drbTraffic or lower priority class, add UEs via Round Robin. (as per [11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
  * Ensure at least one UE is added via RR if no such UE has been added so far (to prevent starvation of new UEs).
  * Exclude all UEs already present in CS1 list.
  * Continue until CS1 list reaches maxCs1ListSize.



**Deduplication Enforcement**

  * At each step, UEs already added to the CS1 list in earlier steps must be excluded from selection.



**Note: From the algorithm, ensure that among the Non-GBR UEs in the CS1 list:**

  * [At least one RR UE is included, if applicable.]
  * If only two Non-GBR UEs are allowed, select one K UE and one RR UE (Do not select two K UEs).
  * If three Non-GBR UEs are allowed, select one K UE, one RR UE, and one N UE.



**[End CB014044-L]**

---

### 3.30.3.0-13 UL Pre-Scheduling Selection of "Friend" users in CS1 (ID: 13343345)

**3.30.3.0-13.0-1**  (ID: `13367017`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Overload control actions

---

**3.30.3.0-13.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13367018`)

UL Pre-Scheduling If the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G_UP_ALG_31301_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the value set for the**activation threshold of** rdFriendListDeactOlcUlPerCent ([13365961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fZe_8PahEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) then gNB-DU shall suspend the below actions specified in [13343346](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lsDNUt7_EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [13343348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lsDNU97_EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).****

If the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G_UP_ALG_31301_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is below than the value set for the**deactivation threshold of** rdFriendListDeactOlcUlPerCent ([13365961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fZe_8PahEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) then gNB-DU shall suspend the below actions specified in [13343346](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lsDNUt7_EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [13343348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lsDNU97_EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).****

---

**3.30.3.0-13.0-2**  (ID: `13343346`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Without High TD metric and High buffer users prioritization in CS1 list

---

**3.30.3.0-13.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13426604`)

UL Pre-Scheduling If NRCELL.actBundlePreviousPairedUes is set to 'disabled' or 'DL' the following procedure shall be skipped.

During the procedure for UE selection to CS1 list ([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), gNB-DU shall decide for a slot, maxNumFriendUsersInCs1 which is the maximum number of friends that can be selected for the already selected users from the drbTraffic class as described below:

maxNumFriendUsersInCs1 = max((numRemainSeatsInCs1 – numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr),0)

where:

numRemainSeatsInCs1: (cs1ListMaxSize - numUEsInCs1), which shall give the number of remaining seats still available in the CS1 list, where the numUEsInCs1 is the number of users already selected in the CS1 list and cs1ListMaxSize is the maximum CS1 size list for the slot.

numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr: rdPerForRrResForNonGbrUl * numRemainSeatsInCs1, which shall give the percentage of users that must be reserved through round-robin selection process. See [13345188:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_virIgeCREfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for rdPerForRrResForNonGbrUl.

Note: gNB-DU shall also select the friends of those MU users that are selected into the CS1 list from a higher traffic class (if applicable, for e.g the harqRetransDrb traffic class, [CB014699-E]but criticalHarqRetransDrb and criticalDrbTraffic are excluded for tradeoff to complexity [End CB014699-E]). It is likely that these users could have friends in the drbTraffic class. gNB-DU shall ensure that all the users from the higher priority traffic classes [CB014699-E](excluding criticalHarqRetransDrb and criticalDrbTraffic) [End CB014699-E] are selected before picking the respective friends into the CS1 list to avoid the friends reserving seats in the CS1 list ahead of the higher priority traffic class users. A simple approach could be that, gNB-DU keeps track of the number for their friends and once numUEsInCs1 users are selected, gNB-DU shall pick the respective friends satisfying the condition described above.

---

**3.30.3.0-13.0-3**  (ID: `13343348`)

UL Pre-Scheduling With High TD metric and High buffer users users prioritization in CS1 list

---

**3.30.3.0-13.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13343349`)

UL Pre-Scheduling If NRCELL.actBundlePreviousPairedUes is set to 'disabled' or 'DL' the following procedure shall be skipped.

During the procedure for UE selection to CS1 list ([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)):

  * gNB-DU shall decide for the slot, maxNumBestNKUsersInCs1 which is the maximum number of high buffer and high TD metric users that can be added to the CS1 list as described below:
  * gNB-DU shall decide the maximum number of users under high buffer and high TD metric users:

    * If NRBTS/NRCELL/bestNK.actBestKList is set to DL or DL_UL as follows:
    * maxNumBestNKUsersInCs1 = BestNKListRatio × cs1ListMaxSize, where BestNKListRatio (UL) is given by NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.ulBestNListRatio.
    * Please refer to [12550646](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9DJRESQqEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for selection procedure of users in the above categories.
    * If NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.actBestKList is disabled and NRCELL.actLargeBufferUe is equal to DL or ULAndDL, then
    * maxNumBestNKUsersInCs1 = maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer + (BestNKListRatio × cs1ListMaxSize). For maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer see [11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
  * gNB-DU shall add the users as described above to the CS1 list such that it shall satisfy the below equation.

  * maxNumBestNKUsersInCs1 = max((numRemainSeatsInCs1 - numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr),0)

  * gNB-DU shall decide for a slot, maxNumFriendUsersInCs1 which is the maximum number of friends that can be selected for the already selected users from the drbTaffic class.

  * maxNumFriendUsersInCs1 = max((numRemainSeatsInCs1 – numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr),0)

  * For friends of users from a higher traffic class see [13343345](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lsDNVN7_EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).




where:

numRemainSeatsInCs1: (cs1ListMaxSize - numUEsInCs1), which shall give the number of remaining seats still available in the CS1 list, where the numUEsInCs1 is the number of users already selected in the CS1 list and cs1ListMaxSize is the maximum CS1 size list for the slot.

numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr: rdPerForRrResForNonGbrUl * numRemainSeatsInCs1, which shall give the percentage of users that must be reserved through round-robin selection process. See [13345188:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_virIgeCREfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for rdPerForRrResForNonGbrUl.

---

### 3.30.3.0-14 UL Pre-Scheduling UEs selection for CS1 (ID: 11195013)

**3.30.3.0-14.0-9**  (ID: `13404768`)

UL Pre-Scheduling The pre-scheduler shall select schedulingCapacity (5G_L2_3702_replaced([11182963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27fs-fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) UEs from the UL pre-scheduler candidate set which form the UL candidate set 1 (CS1), where schedulingCapacity is determined in 5G_L2_1833_replaced([11212618](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrWvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L2_1846_replaced([11212907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-ogjPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The UEs for CS1 are selected as follows:

 The candidate set 1 shall be initialized as an empty set

 Each UE should be assigned to one priority class as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10506_replaced([11194320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv0cIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall determine whether the UE is a candidate for a priority class according to 5G_UP_ALG_23913_replaced([11195051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv5UpvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If the UE is candidate for several priority classes, it shall be assigned only to the one with the highest priority out of them.

 The pre-scheduler shall skip UEs in their MG interrupted slots when selecting CS1 UEs, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4806_replaced([11194836](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv3fevvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for detail. For those UEs skipped scheduling by MG, when the interrupted slots end, 5G-L2-PS shall add them back. 

 Starting with the highest priority class, all classes are handled in decreasing priority order:

\- If the number of UEs in this class is less than or equal to (rdMaxNumUeTdUl - number of UEs already in UL CS1 (5G_L2_3702_replaced([11182963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27fs-fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))), assign all UEs from this class to the UL CS1

\- else choose (rdMaxNumUeTdUl - number of UEs already in UL CS1 (5G_L2_3702_replaced([11182963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27fs-fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) UEs from this class.

[CB014699-F]For the criticalDrbTraffic request class, the UEs eligible for CS1 are chosen in a round robin manner. [End CB014699-F]

For the DRB class, the UEs are chosen in a round robin manner. **The round-robin selection within drbTraffic request class shall be based on NBR category, large buffer non-GBR category and then normal non-GBR category.**

\- If NRCELL.actLargeBufferUe is equal to UL or ULAndDL, if not all UEs can be added to the CS1, then gNB shall apply round robin mechanism for up to maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer UEs from "Large buffer non-GBR Category" (5G_UP_ALG_4794_replaced([11194709](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv24YfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in "drbTraffic class" (5G_UP_ALG_4794_replaced([11194709](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv24YfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and then apply the round-robin mechanism for the normal non-GBR queue,

where maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer = max(rdMaxNumLargeBufferUesPerSlotUl, round(numUesLargeBuffer / (numUesNonGbr + numUesLargeBuffer) * numAvailableSeats)),

\- numUesLargeBuffer is the number of UEs present in the large-buffer UE queue,

\- numUesNonGbr is the number of UEs present in the normal non-GBR queue,

\- numAvailableSeats is equal to (maximum size of CS1 after overload control - number of UEs already added to CS1),

\- rdMaxNumLargeBufferUesPerSlotUl is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_33234_replaced([11209808](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw1v3fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If the number of UEs with normal non-GBR traffic is greater than 0, and the calculated maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer is greater than 1 and equal to numAvailableSeats, reduce maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer by one to allow at least one normal non-GBR UE to be added to CS1. The maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer shall be less than or equal to numUesLargeBuffer.

Note: If NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.actBestKList and NRBTS.NRCELL.actTdHighBufUePrio are enabled, then NRCELL.actLargeBufferUe shall be disabled.

\- Select all the friends if applicable (from all the Friend Lists) for each selected user from the above category (only applicable for large buffer non-GBR category and then normal non-GBR category). See [13343345](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lsDNVN7_EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for the selection procedure. 

\- In FR2, When NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.actHighNumberOfUes = TRUE and rdActEnhBeamSelection = TRUE (see 5G_UP_ALG_27553_replaced([11193947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvxY0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if beam is already selected in the slot, namely selectedBeam (see 5G_UP_ALG_27615_replaced([11194978](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the UE shall be added to CS1 only if UE's beam is same as selected beam. 

\- In FR2, if NACK flood is active(refer to [11138143: Handling of CRC NACK flood in UL OLLA](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krdglfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), the UE shall be included in the CS1 list only when a re-transmission is pending.

When MAC layer monitoring is initiated (see 5G_UP_ALG_31674_replaced([11153894](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) during RRC procedure, the UE shall not be included for both SRB/DRB traffic in UL CS1, except when RACH is attempted UE shall be considered to complete the contention resolution ([12478833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX__-PUUQ6hEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ))

When MAC layer monitoring is initiated during an RRC procedure, the UE shall not be included for DRB traffic using dynamic grant (DG) in UL CS1 until Mac layer monitoring and during RRC processing delay duration, the UE shall not be included for SRB/DRB grants (see 5G_UP_ALG_29060_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * If "UE Power Saving DCI based SSSG Switching” is activated by higher layers configuring searchSpaceGroupIdList-r17 (5G_UP_ALG_31041_replaced([11168736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktx0y_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then the CS1 list shall be updated according to SSSG configuration. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_31890_replaced([11168897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzC7_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).



If there are less than rdMaxNumUeTdUl (5G_L2_3702_replaced([11182963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27fs-fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) UEs in the UL pre-scheduler candidate set, all eligible UEs shall be selected for UL CS1.

This limited candidate set is used as basis for the subsequent TD scheduling steps.

---

### 3.30.3.0-15 UL Pre-Scheduling Is UE a candidate for a priority class under slice aware scheduler (ID: 11195051)

**3.30.3.0-15.0-2**  (ID: `11195063`)

UL Pre-Scheduling In general, slice aware scheduler controls resources assigned to the traffic of low priority request classes as specified in 5G_UP_ALG_23916_replaced([11206759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If the UE is a candidate for drbTraffic and every nonGBR DRB of the UE that is contained in an LCG with data in buffer (see 5G_UP_ALG_5118_replaced([11203660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the mapping between DRB and LCG, and the determination of data in buffer for an LCG) belongs to an RG with zero RG weight (see 5G_UP_ALG_23167_replaced([11207350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the UE shall not be considered as a candidate for drbTraffic.

If the UE is a candidate for deprioritizedGbr and every deprioritized GBR[CB008600-F]/DC-GBR[End CB008600-F] DRB of the UE that is contained in an LCG with data in buffer (see 5G_UP_ALG_5118_replaced([11203660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the mapping between DRB and LCG, and the determination of data in buffer for an LCG) belongs to an RG with zero RG weight, then the UE shall not be considered as candidate for deprioritizedGbr.

If the UE is not candidate for any request class, then the UE is removed from the pre-scheduler candidate set.

Note, UE is removed from pre-scheduler candidate set if it has only low priority traffic (drbTraffic and deprioritizedGbr) and each of its DRBs has either RG weight 0 or empty buffer, yet such UE can still get PRBs from CG2 which makes related RGs further exceed their maximum quotas.

---

### 3.30.3.0-16 UL Pre-Scheduling Excluding UE from UL Pre-Scheduler Candidate Set (ID: 11195069)

**3.30.3.0-16.0-9**  (ID: `13445466`)

UL Pre-Scheduling UL Pre-Scheduler shall exclude a UE from pre-scheduler candidate set **on an UL serving cell (P(S)cell or Scell)**

1\. **When the DL-DCCH is triggered and monitored by the RRC layer (where the new configurations are available after DL-xCCH procedure completion indication from the RRC layer),during the reconfiguration transient phase, i.e. between the reception of PsUser_UserModifyReq and PsUser_UserReconfCompletedReq, if any of the following conditions is fulfilled:**

  * if UL PUSCH slot **is overlapped with P(S)Cell beam report during Scell addition/release for FR1 TDD CA with update of _appliedBeamRefinementP2 ([11112003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),_**

  * if PCell's UL PUSCH slot **is overlapped with beam report for PCell/SCell during step-wise SCell Addition / Upgrade for FR1 TDD CA with update of** _appliedBeamRefinementP2 ([11112003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),_

  * if the periodic CSI report configuration of a UE is reconfigured and the PUSCH would fall into a slot with the occurrence of such an affected CSI report considering the new and the old configuration. The UE shall be excluded from UL pre-scheduler for both, CSI reports related to channel acquisition and CSI reports related to beam reports.




Rationale is that gNB doesn't know when exactly the UE will apply the new configuration and hence, for simplicity the multiplexing of an ambiguous periodic CSI into PUSCH is prevented during the short transient phase.

An exceptional case is: if timer rdAvoidSchTimer ([11160704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktPpTPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) has been started ([11159141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktHtdPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after the expiry of rdAvoidSchTimer ([11160704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktPpTPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), UE shall NOT be excluded from pre-scheduler candidate set due to overlapping between PUSCH and pCSI report: in the slots where pCSI report is expected according to the original pCSI report configuration, gNB shall assume no pCSI report will be multiplexed on PUSCH; in the slots where pCSI report is expected according to the new pCSI report configuration, gNB shall assume pCSI report will be multiplexed on PUSCH.

2\. During the reconfiguration transient phase triggered by number of UCI bits change in the CSI report for channel acquisition or beam report. Refer to ([11159253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and ([11159183](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktHtfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if any of the following conditions is fulfilled:

  * if UL PUSCH slot is overlapped with P(S)Cell CSI report with uncertain number of UCI bits,

  * if PCell's UL PUSCH slot is overlapped with CSI report for PCell/SCell with uncertain number of UCI bits during step-wise SCell Addition / Upgrade .




3\. For UL Tx switching UE with FDD PCell (including FDD DSS PCell) and TDD UL SCell, if FDD PCell decide to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH), DCI format 0_0 for the transient phase, but current slot can not provide startSymbolAndLength the same as any item of pusch-TimeDomainAllocationList provided in PUSCH-ConfigCommon. Note: when FDD PCell decide to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH, DCI format 0_0), UL buffer split is stopped, the reasons startSymbolAndLength is not provided in PUSCH-ConfigCommon are due to the impact the TDD P-SRS **or TDD UL slot according to ([11122476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

For UL CA UE with FDD DSS PCell and TDD UL SCell, if FDD DSS PCell decide to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH), DCI format 0_0 for the transient phase, but current slot conflicts with TDD P-SRS.

4\. For UE configured with FR1 inter-band 2CC UL CA with 3Tx, if FDD PCell decides to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH), DCI format 0_0 for the transient phase, but current slot can’t provide startSymbolAndLength the same as any item of pusch-TimeDomainAllocationList provided in PUSCH-ConfigCommon.

5\. If

  * UE is already configured with FDD PCell and TDD DL+UL SCell, and step-wise SCell Addition procedure for another SCell is ongoing, OR

  * UE is already configured with FDD PCell and DL-only SCell, and SCell Upgrade procedure of existing SCell to DL&UL SCell is ongoing




accompanied by:

 periodic-SRS reconfiguration in the retained / new TDD DL+UL SCell ([11154017](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqacPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and

 recalculation of dedicated PUSCH TDRA list for FDD PCell ([11115928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpzTt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and

 FDD PCell PUSCH slot overlaps with TDD DL+UL SCell periodic-SRS slots

UE shall not be scheduled in FDD PCell in this overlapped PUSCH slot.

6\. For:  
\- TDD FR1 + TDD FR1 intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)  
UL CA UE with the dedicated TDRA list specified in 5G_UP_ALG_29277_replaced ([11116009](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpz6zfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) on PCell, if PCell decides to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH), DCI format 0_0 for the transient phase, but current slot can not provide the startSymbolAndLength to avoid overlapping with A-SRS on SCell for the UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) or achieve the same start PUSCH symbol and PUSCH symbol length on PCell and SCell for the UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) in the TDRA list of PUSCH-ConfigCommon on PCell. Note: UL buffer split is stopped, the reasons that startSymbolAndLength is not provided in PUSCH-ConfigCommon are due to message delay from PCell to SCell or retransmission on SCell (see 5G_UP_ALG_5016_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))).

[CB014067-C]

  1. For UL Tx switching UE with TDD PCell and FDD/TDD UL SCell(s), if TDD PCell decides to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH), DCI format 0_0 for the transient phase, but current slot cannot provide startSymbolAndLength the same as any item of pusch-TimeDomainAllocationList provided in PUSCH-ConfigCommon.



Note: When TDD PCell decides to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH, DCI format 0_0), UL buffer split is stopped. The reasons startSymbolAndLength is not provided in PUSCH-ConfigCommon are due to the impact of:

  * FDD SCell P-SRS, or
  * TDD SCell P-SRS, or
  * TX switching timing constraints preventing valid startSymbolAndLength selection from pusch-TimeDomainAllocationList provided in PUSCH-ConfigCommon



[End CB014067-C]

---

### 3.30.3.0-17 UL Pre-Scheduling Excluding UE from UL Pre-Scheduler Candidate Set due to SCell release (ID: 11195102)

**3.30.3.0-17.0-1**  (ID: `11195108`)

UL Pre-Scheduling UL Pre-Scheduler shall exclude a UE from pre-scheduler candidate set on an UL serving cell (P(S)cell or Scell) during the reconfiguration transient phase of SCell release, i.e. between N DPA scheduling cycle after the start notification of SCell release (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2689_replaced([11120617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqSb7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) until end notification of SCell release (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2692_replaced([11120624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqSb8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if at least one of the following conditions is fulfilled:

  1. if cellConfigurationForModification.appliedBeamRefinementP2 is being reconfigured and UL PUSCH slot overlaps with the P(S)Cell CSI report for beam management.

  2. if P(S)Cell's CSI-RS resource upgrade (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3495_replaced([11159253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Scenario 1) and UL PUSCH slot overlaps with P(S)Cell CSI report for channel acquisition.

  3. if UL PUSCH slot overlaps with releasing SCell CSI report for channel acquisition or beam management (if configured). i.e: from 3CC to 2CC, only handle PUSCH conflicting with SCell-2 periodic CSI report which is released.




Note:

The overall handling is to avoid PUSCH multiplexing with periodic CSI report if the UCI bits may change.

---

### 3.30.3.0-18 UL Pre-Scheduling Excluding UE from UL Pre-Scheduler Candidate Set due to A-CSI scheduling with large k2 timing (ID: 11195113)

**3.30.3.0-18.0-1**  (ID: `11195119`)

UL Pre-Scheduling Considering the UL scheduler started for UL DCI time N and considering k2 associated to the slot N:

For every UE’ that was previously scheduled for A-CSI transmission at DCI time N’ with k2aCsi’ (see 5G_UP_ALG_4869_replaced([11196426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCeoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_5069_replaced([11202276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwcHOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

\- If N+k2 <= N’+k2aCsi’:

o Remove the scheduling eligibility for UE’.

### 3.30.3.0-19 UL Pre-Scheduling Excluding UE from UL Pre-Scheduler Candidate Set on Scell due to reconfiguration (ID: 11195124)

**3.30.3.0-19.0-3**  (ID: `11195140`)

UL Pre-Scheduling UL Pre-Scheduler shall exclude a UE from pre-scheduler candidate set on the Scell

  * during the reconfiguration transient phase from CP-OFDM to DFT-s-OFDM or from DFT-s-OFDM to CP-OFDM on Scell.
  * or during the reconfiguration transient phase from any mcs-table change in UL on the Scell



Rationale: [CB013742-A]When NRBTS.actEnhRrcReconfUlPrbRandom is set to disable, [End CB013742-A] It's for reducing complexity as only DCI0_0 is applicable during the reconfiguration transient phase. DCI0_0 is not supported on Scell, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9585_replaced([11198778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwKabPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
