 None of DRB of UE associated with any DRB priority PUG profiles.

 Timing

 rrmDrbPriorityInterval (interval timer):

 rrmDrbPriorityInterval = NRBTS.NRDRB_PRIO_PUG. drbPriorityPugPeriodicity which profile is associated to UE DRB and selected according to priorityLevel.

 rrmDrbPriorityDuration (duration timer):

 rrmDrbPriorityDuration = NRBTS.NRDRB_PRIO_PUG.drbPriorityPugDuration which profile is associated to UE DRB and selected according to priorityLevel. This value is zero means infinite.

 Payload Size

Payload Size = NRBTS/NRDRB_PRIO_PUG.drbPriorityPugPayloadSize which profile is associated to UE DRB and selected according to priorityLevel. 

Notes:

  * For CA case, DRB Proactive Grant scheduling is only applied on PCell, it is NOT applied on any SCell.
  * Interpretation of NRBTS/NRDRB_PRIO_PUG.drbPriorityPugPeriodicity:



\- This parameter is in units of ms.

\- For FDD, the parameter value is used at L2-PS is the closest to 1ms. This will involve a rounddown or roundup as needed for a suitable value.

Note 1 - The UE's Proactive Grant Type is sent to L2-PS at user setup / user modify via the ulProGrantType field in the PsUser_UserSetupReq / PsUser_UserModifyReq message.

---

#### 3.30.3.3.0-3 DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling UE Eligibility Checks for DRB priority PUG (ID: 11195585)

**3.30.3.3.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13407767`)

DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling UE Eligibility check for DRB priority PUG

 States

 Ineligible: In this state, a UE shall not be scheduled with DRB priority PUG. All UEs are ineligible for DRB priority PUG until one of DRB is configured with DRB priority PUG profile and the UE dedicated configuration is activated(refer to [11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_2reQwPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When UE state changed from Eligible to Ineligible, L2PS shall stop the duration timer and interval timer for DRB priority PUG if it is still running, and remove the pending DRB Priority PUG which has not be sent out( that is, L2-PS shall update the UL buffer housekeeping variables follow 5G_UP_ALG_32052_replaced([11204049](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwi05PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 Eligible: In this state, a UE shall be considered for scheduling with timing and scheduling considerations defined by:

 5G_UP_ALG_30973_replaced([11195595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv9mEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for Timing and 5G_UP_ALG_30970_replaced([11195605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv9mFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for Scheduling

 Transition triggers:

 Ineligible-to-Eligible: Trigger occurs if all of the following are true:

 Cell is Pcell

 UE context setup finished and at least one of DRB is configured with DRB priority PUG profile established.

 UE is successfully Rached:

 For CBRA connection setup:

 If successful reception of MSG3 with SRB0, then successful reception of MSG5 and the UE dedicated configuration is activated(refer to [11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_2reQwPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 Else: User Context is setup and successful reception of MSG3 and the UE dedicated configuration is activated(refer to [11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_2reQwPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 For CFRA setup:

 For MSG3: Received with CRC OK or all of its HARQ transmissions completed

 no 5QI-1/65/66 DRB(s) [CB014699-E] and no critical 5QI-1/65/66 DRB(s) [End CB014699-E] present

 If UE is configured with Configured Grant but it's not in a CG activated state (see 5G_UP_ALG_15099_replaced([11172972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 UE’s SR periodicity is greater than or equal to drbPriroityPugPeriodicity of DRB priority PUG which is selected according to DRB priorityLevel.

 If Scheduling Request Handling is enabled (NRCELL.actAdaptiveSr = true) the UE’s SR periodicity can change while the UE is connected. The UE’s DRB priority PUG eligibility will be determined based on the UE’s newly configured SR periodicity.

 If UE not works in LTE-only split work mode, that is, UE in UlSplitWorkMode not equal to LteOnly. The UlSplit_workmode check is valid only when UL dynamic switch feature is enabled, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3354_replaced([11151714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksbJ6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 

 Eligible-to-Ineligible: Trigger occurs if any of the following are true

 UE context setup finished and none of DRB is configured with DRB priority PUG profile.

 5QI-1/65/66 DRB(s) DRB [CB014699-E] and/or Critical 5QI-1/65/66 DRBs [End CB014699-E] is/are added.

 UE is configured with Configured Grant and it's in a CG activated state (see 5G_UP_ALG_15099_replaced([11172972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 UE’s SR periodicity is less than drbPriroityPugPeriodicity of DRB priority PUG which is selected according to DRB priorityLevel.

 If Scheduling Request Handling is enabled (NRCELL.actAdaptiveSr = true) the UE’s SR periodicity can change while the UE is connected. The UE’s DRB priority PUG eligibility will be determined based on the UE’s newly configured SR periodicity.

 If UE works in LTE-only split work mode, that is, UE in UlSplitWorkMode equal to LteOnly(no matter NRCELL.actProactGrantsUlLteOnlyMode is true or false). The UlSplit_workmode check is valid only when UL dynamic switch feature is enabled, refer to refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3354_replaced([11151714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksbJ6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 3.30.3.3.0-4 DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling DRB Priority Proactive Grants: Timing (ID: 11195595)

**3.30.3.3.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11195600`)

DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling L2 PS shall control the timing of DRB Priority Proactive UL Grants as shown below, when the UE is in a DRB PUG Eligible state as per 5G_UP_ALG_30337_replaced([11195585](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_DvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

A. When L2PS receive BSR from UE ( no matter from DRB priority PUG or other UL grants):

• If BSR for any LCG is NOT equal to zero

• Stop rrmDrbPriorityDuration timer if it is running.

• Stop rrmDrbPriorityInterval timer if it is running.

• L2-PS shall update the UL buffer housekeeping variables follow 5G_UP_ALG_32052_replaced([11204049](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwi05PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if it has already scheduled a DRB priority PUG before.

• If all BSR for all LCG(s) are zero

• Go to step B below

B. When [before PR823561]sum of all BSRs for all LCG(s) is zero[PR823561]UE UL buffer become zero, that is, the first time L2PS receives the sum of all BSRs for all LCG(s) is zero after L2PS received UE PUSCH data(excluding MACCE), or L2PS receives the sum of all BSRs for all LCG(s) is zero together with UE PUSCH data(excluding MACCE) [End PR823561]:

  1. Start/Restart duration timer defined by rrmDrbPriorityDuration (see 5G_UP_ALG_31175_replaced([11195572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_DPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if it is not infinite

  2. Start/Restart interval timer defined by rrmDrbPriorityInterval(see 5G_UP_ALG_31175_replaced([11195572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_DPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  3. when rrmDrbPriorityInterval expiration:




• If UE's rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr (see 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ~~must be~~ is greater than NRBTS/NRDRB_PRIO_PUG.drbPriorityPugSinrThreshold of the selected DRB priority PUG profile, and

• If the UE is a DRX UE and UE in DRX active status or UE is not a DRX UE

• Consider scheduling of a DRB priority PUG per 5G_UP_ALG_30970_replaced([11195605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv9mFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

• Go to step B.2 above (restart interval timer)

  1. when rrmDrbPriorityDuration expiration if it is not infinite:



• stop rrmDrbPriorityInterval if it is running.

**Notes:**

• DRB Priority Proactive Grant Type for UE is defined per 5G_UP_ALG_30332_replaced([11195558](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_CfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

#### 3.30.3.3.0-5 DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling DRB Priority Proactive Grants: Scheduling (ID: 11195605)

**3.30.3.3.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12824610`)

DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling L2 PS shall consider scheduling a new DRB priority PUG as defined below, when the UE is in a DRB priority PUG Eligible state as per 5G_UP_ALG_4835_replaced([11195251](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv6izfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Pre-Scheduling:

 For Grant Type = **Skippable-Dynamic or** Skippable-Dynamic-Enhanced or Not-Skippable :****

 If pending buffered bytes for UE is not zero (Not Null) [PR852816] or there is pending DRB priority PUG in the buffer or ((UE in SR_pending or UE in SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT) when NRCELL.actServiceAwareSRPrioritization is TRUE) or (UE is in SR pending(that is, L2PS received positive SR and still not scheduled a SRResp grant for it) when NRCELL.actServiceAwareSRPrioritization is FALSE) [End PR852816]: 

 L2-PS shall NOT update the UL buffer housekeeping variables.

 Else, 

 L2-PS shall update the UL buffer housekeeping variables follow 5G_UP_ALG_32052_replaced([11204049](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwi05PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 3.30.3.3.0-6 DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling DRB priority PUG Processing For Skippable Grant Capable UEs (ID: 11195615)

**3.30.3.3.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11195619`)

DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling When DRB priority proactive grants are sent to UEs with skippable grant capability the following special handling shall be performed:

 DTX handling: When a UE’s Proactive Grant type = Skippable-Dynamic or Skippable-Dynamic-Enhanced (see Note 1), and DTX is detected for an initial transmission associated with a Drb Priority proactive UL grant special handling is required. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_16415_replaced([11195380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7w7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for details.

 Overlap with CSI/HARQ-ACK slot: When a UE’s Proactive Grant type = Skippable-Dynamic (see Note 1), DRB priority proactive grants shall not be scheduled in the same slot with overlapping CSI/HARQ-ACK transmissions on PUCCH. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9232_replaced([11195320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7J3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for details.

Note 1 - The UE's Proactive Grant Type is sent to L2-PS at user setup / user modify via the ulProGrantType field in the PsUser_UserSetupReq / PsUser_UserModifyReq message.

---

#### 3.30.3.3.0-7 DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling DRB priority PUG Interaction With Other Types Of Proactive Grants (ID: 11195625)

**3.30.3.3.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11195631`)

DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling To ensure that proactive grants are used in an efficient manner when multiple types of proactive uplink grants (PUGs) are active the UL scheduler shall do the following:

 VoNR PUGs - If a UE has a 5QI-1/65/66 bearer, DRB priority PUG procedure shall not be performed for this UE, so the VoNR PUGs and the DRB priority PUG shall be exclusive from each other by nature.

 Low Priority Periodic PUGs - Low priority PUGs shall be stopped for a UE while the UE is configured with a DRB priority PUG and UE is eligible for DRB priority PUG scheduling(refer to 5G_UP_ALG_30337_replaced([11195585](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_DvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 TCP boost PUGs - TCP boost PUGs shall be stopped for a UE while the UE is configured with a DRB priority PUG(refer to 5G_UP_ALG_30332_replaced([11195558](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_CfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 RLC Status PDU, SRB, Ping PUGs and Time alignment PUGs - RLC Status PDU PUGs (see 5G_UP_ALG_6188_replaced([11225322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kyMavPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), SRB PUGs (see 5G_UP_ALG_26555_replaced([11153913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), Ping PUGs (see 5G_UP_ALG_6191_replaced([11225342](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kyMawPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and Time Alignment PUGs (see 5G_UP_ALG_4844_replaced([11195652](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv9mHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall continue independent of the DRB priority PUGs.

---

#### 3.30.3.3.0-8 DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling DRB priority PUGs: PUSCH Response (ID: 11195636)

**3.30.3.3.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11195641`)

DRB priority Proactive Grant Scheduling L2 PS shall process a PUSCH decode corresponding to a DRB priority PUG as defined below.

For HARQ Tx number = 1:

 For PUSCH decode = DTX:

 For Grant Type = Skippable-Dynamic or Skippable-Dynamic-Enhanced (see 5G_UP_ALG_4839_replaced([11195286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7J1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) :

 Process DTX per 5G_UP_ALG_16415_replaced([11195380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7w7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 For Proactive Grant type = Not Skippable:

 Normal HARQ processing per 5G_UP_ALG_5073_replaced([11202321](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwcuQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 For PUSCH decode is Not DTX ( CRC Not Ok or CRC OK)

Normal HARQ processing per 5G_UP_ALG_5073_replaced([11202321](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwcuQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Notes:

 For Grant Type = Skippable-Dynamic or Skippable-Dynamic-Enhanced:

 Assumption for CRC Not OK is that UE did not skip DRB Priority PUG and bad CRC is due to RF

 Assumption for DTX is that UE skipped the DRB PUG and therefore DTX should be ignored by all functions which make use of it.

---

### 3.30.3.4 TA Grant Scheduling

### 3.30.3.4-1 TA Grant Scheduling

#### 3.30.3.4-1.0-1 TA Grant Scheduling When ulUeAmbr is configured by higher layers for UEs, UEs with buffer greater than 0 for non-GBR data bearers fulfilling all of the following conditions shall be excluded from the pre-scheduler candidate set. Computed average AMBR (Refer 5G_UP_ALG_19975_replaced( 11205514 )) is greater than uplink AMBR per slot (5G_UP_ALG_19982_replaced( 11205488 )) Accumulated UE AMBR (Refer 5G_UP_ALG_20154_replaced( 11205502 )) is less than minimum recommended TBS Where minimum recommended TBS is calculated based on minimum PRB allowed (minSupportedNumPrbsUl), MCS proposed by link adaptation (rrmUlProposedMcs) and number of layer as 1. There are no traffic on request class (5G_UP_ALG_4772_replaced( 11194367 )) higher than drb traffic. [CB008234-D] 4. UE is not scheduled for configure grant type 2 or proactive scheduling in the slot. [End CB008234-D] (ID: 11195764)

### 3.30.3.4-2 TA Grant Scheduling

#### 3.30.3.4-2.0-2 TA Grant Scheduling [Before PR873539-26R2] ; The 5G-L2-PS must remove from the CS1 list or must not add in the CS1 list, the TC-RNTI and C-RNTI without UE dedicated configuration activated if the Type1 PDCCH is not available in the slot, from the formula detailed in the requirement 5G_UP_ALG_14386_replaced( 11174884 ), [Before CNI-137616-B] when the rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter (5G_L2_9066_replaced( 11182501 )) is set to true. The rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter (5G_L2_9066_replaced( 11182501 )) is set to true [End CNI-137616-B] for DSS configurations or when the small RRC setup is activated (NRCELL.actSmallestRRCSetup set to true). [PR873539-26R2] ; The 5G-L2-PS must remove from the CS1 list or must not add in the CS1 list, the TC-RNTI and C-RNTI without UE dedicated configuration activated if the Type1 PDCCH is not available in the slot, from the formula detailed in the requirement 5G_UP_ALG_14386_replaced( 11174884 ), when the rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter (5G_L2_9066_replaced( 11182501 )) is set to true. The rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter (5G_L2_9066_replaced( 11182501 )) is set to true for DSS configurations and when the small RRC setup is activated (NRCELL.actSmallestRRCSetup set to true). [End PR873539-26R2] Otherwise, it is a Contention Based Random Access procedure and the check is done with the Type1 search space in the initial BWP, if configured in this BWP (cell depType SA or SA+NSA) or in a dedicated BWP with a Type1 search space configured (NSA cell only). When the RA-Msg3 contains a MAC Control Element C-RNTI, the UE is no more a TC-RNTI, but if the UE has no dedicated configuration (NRCELL.actSmallestRRCSetup set to true or RRC reestablishment or RRC Resume procedures), the Type1-PDCCH is still used (as it is configured in the SIB1. The C-RNTI without UE dedicated configuration activated are using only the Type1-PDCCH (only search space configured in SIB1 for a C-RNTI before the full configuration). Therefore, the 5G-L2-PS does not add them in the CS1 list when the Type1-PDCCH is not configured in the slot for the UE active BWP (the call setup with a small RRC setup must always be done in a BWP with the Type1-PDCCH). (ID: 12659670)

### 3.30.3.4-3 TA Grant Scheduling

#### 3.30.3.4-3.0-1 TA Grant Scheduling The gNB-DU removes any C-RNTI from the CS1 list for which the one following condition is met: ·    When the UE active Search Space Set Group (SSSG) is confirmed (see 11168840 ), the PDCCH slot pattern for the candidate slot does not allow UL grant capability in at least one search space associated to its UE active SSSG (default or ueSssgId(&gt;0)). ·    When the UE active Search Space Set Group is not confirmed yet (see 11168840 ), the PDCCH slot pattern for the candidate slot does not allow UL grant capability in at least one search space associated to its common switching search space (see 12709882 ) (ID: 12714425)

### 3.30.3.4-4 TA Grant Scheduling

#### 3.30.3.4-4.0-1 TA Grant Scheduling [PR873539-26R2] ; When rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter ( 11182501: rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH ) is set to true [End PR873539-26R2], the 5G-L2-PS must remove from the CS1 list or must not add in the CS1 list, the C-RNTI with UE dedicated configuration activated and requesting a DCI Format 0_0 in a common search space, if the Type 3 PDCCH is not configured in the slot, from the formula detailed in the requirement 13396967 (C-RNTI with dedicated configuration filtering according to Type 3 search space configuration) . (ID: 13397649)

#### 3.30.3.4.0-1 TA Grant Scheduling UL TA Grant Scheduling (ID: 11195652)

**3.30.3.4.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `13456950`)

TA Grant Scheduling 13456950: TA Grant Scheduling If the activation flag NRBTS.actTimeAlignExtension is set to true, TA grant scheduling shall be started for a UE or for FR1 UL CA UE over PCell only once the following conditions are satisfied:

When dedicated RA-Preamble is received for the UE (5G_UP_ALG_3381_replaced([11152328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksfbVvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

\- PUSCH granted by RAR (RA msg2) received a harq ACK or the final NACK(after all its retransmissions).

Otherwise:

\- RACH contention resolution (5G_UP_ALG_17999_replaced([11153112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kskT0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) has been successful and the BWP switch delay if any (see 5G_UP_ALG_9266_replaced([11111072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpJzf_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) has also expired for the UE.

[Before CB010737-C]

Once the above conditions are satisfied, UL TA grant shall be requested for UEs **when all following conditions are satisfied:**

1\. Without PUSCH transmission for an extended period of time to get periodically new ST TO estimations from PUSCH. For this purpose, L2-PS shall capture the time when the UE is scheduled lastly on PUSCH and shall consider the UE eligible for TA grant scheduling from PUSCH point of view if the UE isn’t scheduled in UL for

FR1: 

If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 milliseconds, else rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 milliseconds

FR2: [image-0][image_desc](1 / rdNumUITransForTaFr2) × 1000[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15257.002.png[/image_path][/image-0] milliseconds.

2\. If rrmPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed (see 5G_UP_ALG_3313_replaced([11150163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksSnAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is True and gNB does **NOT receive a nonDTX format 3 PUCCH for an extended period of time to get periodically new ST TO estimations from format 3 PUCCH. For this purpose, gNB-DU shall capture the time for the latest reception of nonDTX format 3 PUCCH and shall consider the UE eligible for TA grant scheduling from PUCCH format 3 point of view if no nonDTX format 3 PUCCH is received for**

FR1: If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 milliseconds, else rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 milliseconds

FR2: [image-1][image_desc](1 / rdNumUITransForTaFr2) × 1000[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15257.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] milliseconds.

If rrmPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed (see 5G_UP_ALG_3313_replaced([11150163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksSnAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is False, this condition is not applicable, that is gNB-DU shall always consider the UE eligible for TA grant scheduling from PUCCH format 3 point of view.

The R&D parameters rdNumUlTransForTaFr1 and rdNumUlTransForTaFr2 are defined in 5G_L2_3718_replaced([11182992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27fs__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L2_3719_replaced([11183004](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27gUAfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The R&D parameters rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 and rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 are defined in 5G_UP_ALG_29796_replaced([11209568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_29800_replaced([11209581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) respectively.

[CB010737-C]

Once the above conditions are satisfied, UL TA grant shall be requested for UEs when all following conditions are satisfied:

1\. Without PUSCH transmission for an extended period of time to get periodically new ST TO estimations from PUSCH. For this purpose, L2-PS shall capture the time when the UE is scheduled lastly on PUSCH and shall consider the UE eligible for TA grant scheduling from PUSCH point of view if the UE isn’t scheduled in UL for rrmTaTimer (milliseconds)

FR1: 

If NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList contains "Mixed PUSCH" and UE is identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf")),

If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

rrmTaTimer = min (rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 ([11209568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rdFoeGrantPeriod ([13456956: rdFoeGrantPeriod](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qgHRQi13EfGxldjOZQLezQ))) ,

Else 

rrmTaTimer = max (rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 ([11209581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rdFoeGrantPeriod[(13456956: rdFoeGrantPeriod](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qgHRQi13EfGxldjOZQLezQ)))

Endif

Else

If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

rrmTaTimer = rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 ([11209568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ,

Else 

rrmTaTimer = rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 ([11209581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Endif

Endif 

FR2: 

rrmTaTimer = 1/rdNumUlTransForTaFr2 ([11183004](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27gUAfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) * 1000

2\. If rrmPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed (see 5G_UP_ALG_3313_replaced([11150163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksSnAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is True and gNB does NOT receive a nonDTX format 3 PUCCH for an extended period of time to get periodically new ST TO estimations from format 3 PUCCH. For this purpose, gNB-DU shall capture the time for the latest reception of nonDTX format 3 PUCCH and shall consider the UE eligible for TA grant scheduling from PUCCH format 3 point of view if no nonDTX format 3 PUCCH is received for rrmTaTimer (milliseconds)

FR1: 

If NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList contains "Mixed PUSCH" and UE is identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf")),

If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

rrmTaTimer = min (rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 ([11209568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rdFoeGrantPeriod ([13456956: rdFoeGrantPeriod](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qgHRQi13EfGxldjOZQLezQ))) ,

Else 

rrmTaTimer = max (rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 ([11209581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rdFoeGrantPeriod ([13456956: rdFoeGrantPeriod](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qgHRQi13EfGxldjOZQLezQ)))

Endif

Else

If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

rrmTaTimer = rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 ([11209568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

Else 

rrmTaTimer = rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 ([11209581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Endif

Endif 

FR2: 

rrmTaTimer = 1/rdNumUlTransForTaFr2 ([11183004](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27gUAfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) * 1000 

If rrmPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed (see 5G_UP_ALG_3313_replaced([11150163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksSnAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is False, this condition is not applicable, that is gNB-DU shall always consider the UE eligible for TA grant scheduling from PUCCH format 3 point of view.

[End CB010737-C] 

gNB-DU shall consider the UE eligible for TA grant scheduling when it is eligible from both PUSCH point of view and PUCCH format 3 point if have.

The request for the scheduling of TA grants shall be repeated periodically in the same period even if the previous TA grant can be received correctly by the gNB.

[CB010737-C]

If NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList contains "Mixed PUSCH" and UE is identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconfiguration%2f9&componenturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2frm-projects%2f_euvego3ree-rl47x_rccmw%2fcomponents%2f_evmaio3ree-rl47x_rccmw")), then TA grant shall be scheduled with pusch-symbolAllocation-index mapping to type B and SLIV 41 (13 symbol length), and UL TA grant shall be also requested for FOE (frequency offset estimation) purpose if PUSCH with pusch-symbolAllocation-index mapping to typeB and SLIV 41 (13 symbol length) is not scheduled in previous rrmTaTimer milliseconds

[End CB010737-C]

The R&D PM counter TA_GRANT_NOT_SCH (see 5G_UP_ALG_6272_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of the UE's PCell shall be incremented if the TA grant request can’t be scheduled due to lack of resources and the subsequent TA grant is requested (see 5G_UP_ALG_4845_replaced([11195726](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv-NIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If the UE is scheduled by an ordinary PUSCH transmission before the requested TA grant is scheduled, the R&D PM counter TA_GRANT_NOT_SCH shall not be increased.

If rrmPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed (see 5G_UP_ALG_3313_replaced([11150163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksSnAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is True and gNB receives a nonDTX format 3 PUCCH before the requested TA grant is scheduled, the R&D PM counter TA_GRANT_NOT_SCH shall not be increased.

---

#### 3.30.3.4.0-2 TA Grant Scheduling UL TA Grant Scheduling (Implementation Proposal) (ID: 11195726)

**3.30.3.4.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `13465108`)

TA Grant Scheduling **UL TA Grant Scheduling (Implementation Proposal)**

If NRBTS.actTimeAlignExtension flag is enabled for a UE, L2-PS shall start a periodic timer for the scheduling of UL TA grants once the conditions in 5G_UP_ALG_4844_replaced([11195652](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv9mHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are satisfied.

The periodicity of the UL TA grants timer shall be taTimer milliseconds.

where,

[Before CB010737-C]

For FR1: taTimer = rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1, If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), else rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1

For FR2: taTimer = (1000/rdNumUlTransForTaFr2)

[CB010737-C]

For FR1: 

If NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList contains "Mixed PUSCH" and UE is identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf")),

If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

rrmTaTimer = min (rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 ([11209568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rdFoeGrantPeriod ([13456956: rdFoeGrantPeriod](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qgHRQi13EfGxldjOZQLezQ))) ,

Else 

rrmTaTimer = max (rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 ([11209581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rdFoeGrantPeriod[(13456956: rdFoeGrantPeriod](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qgHRQi13EfGxldjOZQLezQ)))

Endif

Else

If UE is not eligible for pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

rrmTaTimer = rdTaTimerForHighAccuracyFr1 ([11209568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ,

Else 

rrmTaTimer = rdTaTimerForLowAccuracyFr1 ([11209581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0huvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Endif

Endif 

For FR2: 

rrmTaTimer = 1000/rdNumUlTransForTaFr2 ([11183004](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27gUAfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CB010737-C]

Upon the UL TA grant timer expiry:

If the UE has changed its eligibility status w.r.t. pCSI periodicity enlargement (see 5G_UP_ALG_29639_replaced([11159298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktIUj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) since the start of timer and the timer needs to be extended considering its new status, the timer shall be extended for the remaining period.

Else, it shall be considered that UE has a pending TA grant and the UE shall be made eligible for ulTaGrant request class scheduling (see 5G_UP_ALG_4807_replaced([11194840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv3fe_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_4773_replaced([11194371](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv0cKfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[Before CB010737-C]

Whenever the UE is scheduled PUSCH (any requestClass) **or (a format 3 PUCCH is received (nonDTX) and rrmPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed (see 5G_UP_ALG_3313_replaced([11150163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksSnAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is True):**

  * UL TA grant timer shall be restarted for the UE provided that it is already running.
  * If the UE has a pending TA grant, it shall be considered scheduled.



[CB010737-C]

If NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList contains "Mixed PUSCH", and UE is identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf")),

whenever UE is scheduled type B PUSCH (with SLIV 41):

  * UL TA grant timer shall be restarted for the UE provided that it is already running.
  * If the UE has a pending TA grant, it shall be considered scheduled.



Else // If NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList does not contain "Mixed PUSCH", or UE is not identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf")),

[End B010737-C]

Whenever the UE is scheduled PUSCH (any requestClass) or (a format 3 PUCCH is received (nonDTX) and rrmPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed (see 5G_UP_ALG_3313_replaced([11150163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksSnAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is True):

  * UL TA grant timer shall be restarted for the UE provided that it is already running.
  * If the UE has a pending TA grant, it shall be considered scheduled.



[CB010737-C]

Endif

[End B010737-C]

When the PsUser_UserStopReq is received for a UE, L2-PS shall stop the UL TA grant timer for the corresponding UE.

Note for NRBTS.actPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed information:

When NRBTS.actPucchF3BasedTaGrantsRed is activated, to restart UL TA grant timer upon **reception of PUSCH is more consistent than existing upon** scheduling PUSCH. And, for the sub-priorities of request class ulTaGrant (5G_UP_ALG_4801_replaced([11194799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv3fc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), respecting to the last time of **reception of PUSCH/PUCCH format 3 is better than existing respecting to the last time of** scheduling PUSCH. However, the behavior regarding PUSCH and request class ulTaGrant is not changed with follow reasons:**_*_** *

1\. CNI-90881 is activated be default. Hence, it is better to keep the existing behavior to avoid unpredictable KPI impact.

2\. By default, the periodicity of the UL TA grants is 333ms for FR1, while the CSI reporting (PUCCH format 3) periodicity (NIDD parameter NRCELL.periodicCsiAcquisition.csiReportPeriodicity) max value is 160ms. This implies that PUCCH format 3 periodicity is shorter than the periodicity of the UL TA grants. The existing behavior does not generate any issue in this condition.

---

#### 3.30.3.4.0-3 TA Grant Scheduling Not-scheduled UL TA Grants PM R&amp;D Counter (Implementation Proposal) M55308CRD52001, aka not-scheduled UL TA Grants PM R&amp;D Counter of class 'NR Cell utilization' (see 5G_UP_ALG_6272_replaced( 11230269 )) indicates the number of UL TA grants which could not be scheduled in the related cell due to lack of resources. Upon the expiry of the UL TA Grant timer for a UE (see 5G_UP_ALG_4845_replaced( 11195726 )), not-scheduled UL TA Grants counter of the UE's PCell shall be incremented if the following condition is satisfied. UE already has UL TA grant pending to be scheduled. (ID: 11195753)

## 3.30.4 UL Time Domain Scheduling

### 3.30.4.1 Time domain scheduling for traffic prioritization - Overview

#### 3.30.4.1.0-1 Time domain scheduling for traffic prioritization - Overview Overview (ID: 11195789)

**3.30.4.1.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11195804`)

Time domain scheduling for traffic prioritization - Overview The determination of candidate set 2 by the UL TD scheduler shall be done by:

If current k2 is not same as srsSlotOffset from SRS-ResourceSet in 38.331 determined in 5G_UP_ALG_31545_replaced([11201972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_27958_replaced([11163627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CB013305-BC], 5G_UP_ALG_30161_replaced([11163658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoaPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB013305-BC], L2-PS shall skip UEs from CS2 list which meet all conditions as below:

  * Data transmission for priority class with (no greater than drbTrafic) or (srResp). (see 5G_UP_ALG_10506_replaced([11194320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv0cIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * Rank of next initial transmission is 1.

  * The value of SRS report aged flag is 1.

  * For analog beamforming, first Beam Selection (step 1 in 5G_UP_ALG_4766_replaced([11194284](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvz1GfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), specified in 5G_UP_ALG_22375_replaced([11196368](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCemfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and subsequently

  * UE Selection (step 2 in 5G_UP_ALG_4766_replaced([11194284](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvz1GfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), specified in 5G_UP_ALG_10563_replaced([11196411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCenfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).



Procedures shall take the traffic prioritization and sub-prioritization concept of UE traffic into account.

---

#### 3.30.4.2 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL

##### 3.30.4.2.0-1 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Definition of per UE and per carrier scheduling metric for UL (ID: 11195815)

**3.30.4.2.0-1.0-9**  (ID: `13416688`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL 13416688: Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL The proportional fair (PF) scheduling metric per UE and per carrier shall be applied in the time domain scheduling for the prioritization of the 5G UEs in Candidate Set 1.

For analog beamforming, this metric shall be applied in addition for the selection of the x-pol beam.

Individual PF scheduling metrics shall be calculated per configured subcell a 5G UE is allowed to allocate if NRCELL.actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is set to false or if NRCELL.actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is set to true (FR1 only). The current UL data rate or rather the downgraded UL data rate (FR1 only) of the 5G UE i related to carrier j (5G_UP_ALG_4856_replaced([11195916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the average UL data rate of the 5G UE i (5G_UP_ALG_4859_replaced([11195975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the sum of combined weight of all non-GBR bearer [CB014699-F] and critical non-GBR bearer [End CB014699-F] k of the 5G UE i with user data in transmission buffer **determine the PF term.** If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the combined weight of non-GBR bearer [CB014699-F] and critical non-GBR bearer [End CB014699-F] k is equal to the product of the schedulWeight (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2209_replaced([11281916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpbXbPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the RG weight (5G_UP_ALG_23167_replaced([11207350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of bearer k; otherwise, the combined weight of a non-GBR bearer k is equal to the schedulWeight of bearer k. Due to the clustering of the UL non-GBR bearers within LCGs, the housekeeping doesn’t allow the bearer individual evaluation of the buffer utilization. Whenever the housekeeping indicates user data for a LCG, it is assumed that user data is available for all non-GBR bearers, which are assigned to the LCG. The following equations describe the calculation rules.****

If enhanced slice aware scheduler is deactivated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or if the UE is waiting for SR response grant with DRB priority, i.e. UE has the SR response scheduling status SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[image-0][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-04111439.png[/image_path][/image-0]

ELSE

[image-1][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-04111440.png[/image_path][/image-1]

The equations defined above are only valid if NRCELL.actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is set to false. If NRCELL.actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is set to true, the gNG-DU shall calculate the scheduling metric per carrier by means of the downgraded UL data rate and shall apply the equations defined below (only applicable for FR1).

If enhanced slice aware scheduler is deactivated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or if the UE is waiting for SR response grant with DRB priority, i.e. UE has the SR response scheduling status SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[image-2][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is: $$ \text{rrmUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier}[i, j, t] = \frac{(\text{rrmDowngradedUlUeDataRate}_{\text{BytesPerSlot}}[i, j, t])^{\alpha_{\text{UL}}}}{\text{rrmAvgUlUeDataRate}}[i, j, t - 1] \times \sum_{k} W[i, k, t] $$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-09101103.png[/image_path][/image-2]

ELSE

[image-3][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is: $$ \text{rrmUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier}[i, j, t] = \frac{(\text{rrmDowngradedUlUeDataRate}_{\text{BytesPerSlot}}[i, j, t])^{\alpha_{UL}}}{\text{rrmAvgUlUeDataRate}[i, j, t-1]} \times \sum_{k} (W[i, k, t] \times \text{rrmRGWeight}_{\text{RG}}[i, j, k](t)) $$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-09101104.png[/image_path][/image-3]

with:

i: Index of the 5G UE

j: Index of the carrier

k: Index of the non-GBR bearer [CB014699-F] or critical non-GBR bearer [End CB014699-F] or NBR bearer **used in W[i,k,t]**

t: NR slot the calculation relates to

W[i,k,t]: schedWeightFactor of NBR or non-GBR bearer [CB014699-F] or critical non-GBR bearer [End CB014699-F] k for 5G UE i at slot t with data in buffer of corresponding LCG as per 5G_UP_ALG_22269_replaced([11195869](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv-0OfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

**rrmRGWeight_RG[i,j,k](t)**: At slot t, the RG weight of the RG to which DRB k (of UE i related to carrier j) belongs. See 5G_UP_ALG_23167_replaced([11207350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the computation of RG weight and 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12122_replaced([11288167](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RcPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the mapping between DRB and RG. [CB014699-D] if bearer k identified as critical non-GBR traffic (criticalDrbTraffic, see [13399502](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_rOoVAAsFEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), the rrmRGWeight_RG shall be assigned with calculated maximum value (see [13415253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jKWJdROgEfG3gf_qmG8Vww?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) to ensures that critical non-GBR can obtain a larger share of resources independent of the configured slice target share or quota [End CB014699-D]****

rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t]: The current UL data rate of the 5G UE i related to carrier j in bytes per slot (see 5G_UP_ALG_4859_replaced([11195975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot_alpha[i,j,t]: The current UL data rate of the 5G UE i related to carrier j in bytes per slot with exponentiation of alpha (see 5G_UP_ALG_4859_replaced([11195975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  
rrmDowngradedUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t]: The current UL data rate which might be downgraded in case of low buffer utilization of the 5G UE i related to carrier j in bytes per slot (see [12549822](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xSpfgCQfEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))  
[image-4][image_desc]The image contains the Greek letter alpha ($\alpha$) followed by the letters 'v' and 'L' in subscript. The text is blurry and appears to be in a sans-serif font.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-09101107.png[/image_path][/image-4]: Configurable TD metric for UL defined by NIDD parameter NRCELL.ulsPfAlpha

For the Friend users the TD metric shall be modified as described in [13343526:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-eomEN8TEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

For a FR2 UE:

 gNB shall boost its PF metric on a carrier (rrmUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier[i, j, t]) to max until UE is scheduled twice on that carrier.

o max method: MAX{rrmUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier[i’, j, t] of UE[i’] in CS1 in slot[t]} + delta. where: delta is a positive value with very small magnitude compared to normal PF metric.

 The number of scheduling shall be counted separate for each carrier.

 The number of scheduling shall be initiated to 0.

 when a SCell[j] is activated, the number of scheduling of SCell[j] shall be reset to 0.

 After UL LA SINR timer for serving cell[j] expires (5G_UP_ALG_17315_replaced([11132149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGFPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the number of scheduling of SCell[j] shall be reset to 0.

Rationale for FR2:

 FDM is not supported in FR2 cell, up to 1 UE can be scheduled per slot, to ensure a UE could get scheduling opportunity in a new serving cell, its PF metric must be set to the maximum PF metric of UEs in CS1, otherwise it will be very difficult for such UE to get any scheduling opportunity in a testing with the maximum number of UEs + full buffer + ULCA + all in good radio condition.

 In current implementation, ILLA is not performed before FDM. Hence, the real MCS determined from UL measuremnt is available since the second scheduling. This is reason to require “twice”. Further reading at 5G_UP_ALG_17280_replaced([11131696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 3.30.4.2.0-2 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Scheduling weight factor switch for NBR and non-GBR bearer (ID: 11195869)

**3.30.4.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11195873`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL If UE i belongs to the NBR category within drbTraffic Class (see 5G_UP_ALG_4794_replaced([11194709](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv24YfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

schedWeightFactor[i,k,t]: nbrUl[i,k], where k is the index of NBR configured non-GBR bearer with data in buffer at slot t with rrmNbrTokenBucket[i,k,t] > 0 of corresponding LCG for UE i

Else

schedWeightFactor[i,k,t]: schedulWeight[i,k], where k is the index of non-GBR bearer with data in buffer at slot t of corresponding LCG for UE i

where,

nbrUl[i,k] is given by the NRBTS/NRDRB_MAC.nbrUl of each NBR configured nonGBR bearer within the LCG.

schedulWeight is given by NRBTS/NRDRB.schedulWeight of non-GBR bearer k for UE i

---

##### 3.30.4.2.0-4 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Definition of per UE scheduling metric for UL with A-CSI (ID: 11195887)

**3.30.4.2.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `13136346`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL In case that the UE is A-CSI eligible according to 5G_UP_ALG_3512_replaced([11159392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktJiofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), an additional weight component WUL,A-CSI priority is introduced:

_rrmUlUeSchedMetricPerSubCell[i,j,t] = W_ UL,A-CSI priority * _rrmUlUeSchedMetricPerSubCell[i,j,t]_ **

i: index of the considered UE

j: index of the data radio bearer

t: NR slot the calculation relates to

where WUL,A-CSI priority. equals to::

[Before CNI-137616-C] If _rdACsiCheckDlLoad (5G_L2_3755_replaced([11187517](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28B4cvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to false:_

\- 1

Else: [End CNI-137616-C]

\- WUL,A-CSI priority high if UE is A-CSI eligible due to condition 7.a in 5G_UP_ALG_3512_replaced([11159392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktJiofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

o WUL,A-CSI priority high shall be defined as R&D parameter with default value 1.6, range [1…2], step 0.1 (see R&D parameter rdAperCsiHighPriorityPfMetricWeight in 5G_L2_3767_replaced([11183038](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27gUCPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

\- WUL,A-CSI priority medium if UE is A-CSI eligible due to condition 7.b in 5G_UP_ALG_3512_replaced([11159392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktJiofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

o WUL,A-CSI priority medium shall be defined as R&D parameter with default value 1.3, range [1…2], step 0.1 (see R&D parameter rdAperCsiMiddlePriorityPfMetricWeight in 5G_L2_3768_replaced([11183048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27gUCvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

\- WUL,A-CSI priority low if UE is A-CSI eligible due to condition 7.c in 5G_UP_ALG_3512_replaced([11159392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktJiofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

o WUL,A-CSI priority low shall be defined as R&D parameter with default value 1, range [1…2], step 0.1 (see R&D parameter rdAperCsiLowPriorityPfMetricWeight in 5G_L2_3769_replaced([11183058](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27gUDPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

In case that UE is scheduled in UCI only mode (see 5G_UP_ALG_4812_replaced([11194863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4GgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the components of the formula in _rrmUlUeSchedMetricPerSubCell[i,j,t] shall be computed as follows:_

\- Sum (W[i,k,t]) = maximum schedulWeight among all the non-GBR bearers (it shall be computed at UE setup/modify time and it shall be kept in UE context).

\-  _rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize = rdUciOnlyPayloadRefForSchedMetricCalculation, where_

o rdUciOnlyPayloadRefForSchedMetricCalculation shall be defined as software parameter with default value 20 bytes, range [10 …40] step 5.

Additionally, _rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize shall be slightly boosted by additionally adding a Csi age component as follows:_

\-  _rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize =_ rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize _\+ (MIN(csiAge,160) % 16), where_ **

o csiAge represent the CSI age as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3515_replaced([11159409](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktJipPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 3.30.4.2.0-5 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Definition of per UE scheduling metric for FR1 UL CA allow-list UE (ID: 11195898)

**3.30.4.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11195903`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL For the FR1 UL CA UEs in allow-list (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_25211_replaced([11208913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kww3UvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it is important to increase the probability of scheduling such UEs in TDD PCell, because otherwise the PUCCH may multiplexed into FDD SCell.

For this purpose, weighting factor is introduced for FR1 UL CA UEs in allow-list in TDD PCell for a target UL slot.

The weighting factor WUL, CA allowlist shall increase the UE’s PF metric for new transmission in the time domain scheduler by pre-defined scaling factor, and only in target slots (based on k2 but not k2aCsi) it was selected into allow-list.

The actual value of WUL, CA allowlist shall be an R&D configurable parameter rdUlCaAllowListPfWeight, defined in 5G_UP_ALG_25318_replaced([11209518](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0hsPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For UEs which is not in allow-list, WUL, CA allowlist = 1 shall be assumed.

---

##### 3.30.4.2.0-7 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Definition of the current 5G UE UL Data Rate (ID: 11195916)

**3.30.4.2.0-7.0-6**  (ID: `11195969`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL 11195969: Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL The current UL data rate of a 5G UE, rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot, which is valid in NR slot t for the carrier j, shall be evaluated based on the 5G UEs’ current MCS (rrmUlMcs[i, j, t] provided by the link adaptation and hence the MCS before MCS downgrade) and the maximum number of PRBs (rrmMaxNumPrbUl[i, j, t]) that can be allocated for the 5G UE. Furthermore, the rank of the UL transmission shall be taken into account for the evaluation of the current UL data rate. Corresponding to the MCS, the number of PRBs, and the rank of the UL transmission the transport block size shall be computed with the transport block size table defined in 5G_UP_ALG_4635_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) using nb_symb=14, nb_cdm_no_data = the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data which is decided with current MCS according to 5G_UP_ALG_3098_replaced([11137832](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krbravvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is TRUE and **NRCELL/NRULMUMIMO.ulMaxMuMimoLayer > 4, before L2PS decide the final front loaded DMRS symbol length according to the number of UL MU-MIMO layer (5G_UP_ALG_28014_replaced([11147480](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksHA0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the number of FL DMRS symbols is always equal to one and the number of additional DMRS symbol is decided in PsUser_SetupReq or PsUser_UserModifyReq; else **nb_dmrs_symb shall be determined from additional DMRS configuration which is derived from the latest PsUser_SetupReq or PsUser_UserModifyReq message.**** [image-0][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15294.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot_alpha[i,j,t] )=rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t]^αUL αUL is configurable TD metric alpha for UL, defined by NRBTS/NRCELL.ulsPfAlpha, default value is 1 which means to disable configurable TD metric alpha by default. It allows operator flexibility to favor cell edge or cell center users. αUL > 1 favors scheduling of UEs with good channel conditions (like in cell center) at the expense of others, scheduler becomes more and more a maximum rate scheduler with a higher value set. αUL < 1, favors scheduling of UEs with bad channel conditions (like in cell edge)at the expense of others, scheduler becomes more and more a rate fair scheduler with a lower value set. αUL = 1 set as a default value, which means to disable configurable TD metric alpha by default. Rationale: This requirement modifies the PF term “rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot” to “rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot_alpha”. The form “rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot” assumes UL alpha αUL = 1, while the form “rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t]^αUL” allows UL alpha to either remain 1 or be set to some other value. This feature allows UL alpha to be modified for UL PF calculation based on the configurable TD metric alpha. It is left to implementation to optimize the rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t]^αUL exponentiation calculation, lookup table or other better approach can be considered. When NRBTS.actUlAmbr is configured to "SA" if avgAmbrPerUlSlot (5G_UP_ALG_19975_replaced([11205514](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJpPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) not exceeded ulAmbrPerSlot (5G_UP_ALG_19982_replaced([11205488](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t] = min(ulUeAmbr, rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t) else rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t] = min(accumulatedAmbr, rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t]) Rationale: In order to maintain the current uplink UE data rate within the AMBR limit, per slot allocation shall not exceed the configured maximum bit rate. If allocation exceeds the ulUeAmbr, then containment of AMBR may not be possible or might take longer duration. with: i: Index of the 5G UE j: Index of the carrier t: NR slot the calculation relates to accumulatedAmbr: AMBR accumulated since last scheduling of initial transmission (Refer 5G_UP_ALG_20154_replaced([11205502](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ulUeAmbr : AMBR limit configured by higher layers (Refer 5G_UP_ALG_19973_replaced([11205469](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwpimPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) The current 5G UE UL data rate shall be provided in bytes per NR slot. Maximum number of PRBs set to the full BW (see 5G_UP_ALG_1795_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Exception: For UEs with MCS0, the maximum number of PRBs set to the number of PRBs provided by ATB (see 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). If long PUCCH is selected, the PUSCH area is decreased by PUCCH PRBs. The maximum number of PRBs in UL (rrmMaxNumPrbUl) shall be corrected by the PUCCH PRBs so that only the PUSCH PRBs are count. For FR1 TDD and FR1 FDD cells, If NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc is 'true', the PUSCH area is variable from slot to slot depending on the number of pCSI PUCCH PRB left unused in the slot and adjacent to the PUSCH region. Thus the maximum number of PRBs in UL (rrmMaxNumPrbUl) shall be corrected at every slot by adding the unused PUCCH pCSI PRBs adjacent to the PUSCH area. [Before CB013152-A-UPD004] If NRCELL.actDynUlResAllocPhase2 is 'true' [CB013152-A] for TDD and if NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt is 'true' in FDD [END CB013152-A], the maximum number of PRBs in UL (rrmMaxNumPrbUl) shall be corrected at every slot by adding the unused PUCCH PRBs adjacent to the PUSCH area, and the PUSCH region can be extended to the full cell BW, if all the PUCCH PRBs in a slot are not used by PUCCH. [CB013152-A-UPD004] If NRCELL.actDynUlResAllocPhase2 is 'true', for TDD as well as for FDD, the maximum number of PRBs in UL (rrmMaxNumPrbUl) shall be corrected at every slot by adding the unused PUCCH PRBs adjacent to the PUSCH area, and the PUSCH region can be extended to the full cell BW, if all the PUCCH PRBs in a slot are not used by PUCCH. [End CB013152-A-UPD004] If the uplink link adaptation extension for ducting is activated for a TDD FR1 cell (NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE.actRimMitigationExtend is set to TRUE) and RIM UL mitigation extension is triggered (see 5G_UP_ALG_27175_replaced([11163444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktZaQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the current UL data rate of a 5G UE (rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot) shall be evaluated based on the 5G UEs’ current MCS belonging to the 2nd UL slot. For the first time slot after the R&D parameter rdPeriodUlScheduling timer defined in 5G_UP_ALG_4892_replaced([11197752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwH-JvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) expires the current UL data rate of a 5G UE, rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t] while j is any carrier which has been paused in scheduling before , shall be re-initialized according to 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), i.e., rrmUlMcs[i, j, t] is the default MCS (ullaIniMcs), rrmMaxNumPrbUl[i, j, t]) is minSupportedNumPrbsUl, rrmUlRank[i,j,t] is the Rank1 initial transmissions in UL.

---

##### 3.30.4.2.0-8 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Definition of the instantaneous UL Data Rate (ID: 12557455)

**3.30.4.2.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12557456`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL 12557456: Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL [CB014044-M]

The instantaneous UL data rate of a 5G UE i, namely instUlUeDataRate[i,j,t], in bytes per slot, which is valid in NR slot t for the carrier j, shall be evaluated as function of 5G current UE data rate along with the FD scheduling cost and/or TD scheduling cost due to the scheduling of the UE in the slot. In the slot when the UE is not scheduled, it shall be 0.

For the calculation of (instUlUeDataRate[i,j,t]):

When NRBTS/NRCELL/actTdPfMetricOpt = (UL or DL_UL)

[Before PR864769]

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in an italicized font. The equation is: `instUlUeDataRate[i, j, t] = max(currentUlUeDataRateWithTdCost [i, j, t], currentUlUeDataRateWithFdCost[i,j,t])`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-05041700.png[/image_path][/image-0]

[PR864769]

[image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is: `instUlUeDataRate[i, j, t] = max(currentUlUeDataRateWithTdCost[i, j, t], currentUlUeDataRateWithFdCost[i, j, t], rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize[i, j, t])` The equation defines `instUlUeDataRate[i, j, t]` as the maximum of three terms: 1\. `currentUlUeDataRateWithTdCost[i, j, t]` 2\. `currentUlUeDataRateWithFdCost[i, j, t]` 3\. `rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize[i, j, t]` The indices `[i, j, t]` suggest that these variables are dependent on three parameters, possibly representing user equipment (UE), a cell or sector, and time.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-01140821.png[/image_path][/image-1]

[End PR864769]

with

currentUlUeDataRateWithTdCost[i,j,t] is the cost of scheduling the UE i in TD scheduler on carrier j in NR slot t calculated as: [Before PR864769]

[image-2][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is: currentUlUeDataRateWithTdCost[i, j, t] = $\frac{\text{rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot_alpha[i, j, t]}}{\text{rrmMaxNumUesFdmUl[j,t]}}$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-05191602.png[/image_path][/image-2]

[PR864769]

[image-3][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation is: `currentUlUe Data RateWithTdCost[i, j,t] = rrmCurrentUlUeData Rate Bytes Per Slot[i,j,t]/rrm MaxNumUesFdmUl[j,t]` The equation appears to be related to data rates and costs in a system, possibly a telecommunications or network system, given the terms like "Data Rate", "Cost", "Bytes Per Slot", and "MaxNumUesFdmUl". The indices `[i, j, t]` suggest that these variables are dependent on multiple parameters, likely representing different users, cells, or time slots.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/04ae7222-679f-4f77-a03e-c7dc1d5451e7.png[/image_path][/image-3]

[End PR864769]

currentUlUeDataRateWithFdCost[i,j,t] is the cost of scheduling the UE i in FD scheduler on carrier j in NR slot t calculated as:[Before PR864769]

[image-4][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a sans-serif font. The formula is: currentUlUeDataRateWithFdCost[i, j, t] = (rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot_alpha[i, j, t] * allocFdResources[i, j, t]) / useableFdResources[j, t][/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-05041704.png[/image_path][/image-4]

[PR864769]

[image-5][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation is: `currentUlUeDataRateWithFdCost[i, j,t] = rrmCurrentUlUeDataRateBytesPerSlot[i, j, t] * allocFdResources[i, j,t]/usableFdResources[j,t]`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/4025365a-f2bb-47f9-a299-e75134457d7b.png[/image_path][/image-5]

rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i,j,t] is the current UL data rate of the 5G UE i related to carrier j in slot t in bytes per slot as described in [11195916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

[End PR864769]

[Before PR864769]rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot_alpha[i,j,t] is the current UL data rate of the 5G UE i related to carrier j in slot t in bytes per slot as described in [11195916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [End PR864769]

allocFdResources[i,j,t] is the number of allocated PUSCH FD resources for the UE i in the carrier j in NR slot t

usableFdResources[i,j,t] is the maximum number of available PUSCH FD resources in the carrier j in NR slot t

rrmMaxNumUesFdmUl[j,t] is the maximum number of allowed PUSCH allocation/grants in the slot t considering the BBRM pooling and overload control limitations on the cell/carrier j as described in [11199273](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwMPmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

[End CB014044-M]

---

##### 3.30.4.2.0-9 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Calculation of the average 5G UE UL Data Rate (ID: 11195975)

**3.30.4.2.0-9.0-3**  (ID: `12557464`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL 12557464: Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL The average data rate of the 5G UE in UL shall be calculated per NR slot based on the size of the granted transport blocks as long as the 5G UE is part of the Candidate Set 1, either on a per UE basis (5G_UP_ALG_4859_replaced([11195975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-1) or on a per carrier basis (5G_UP_ALG_4859_replaced([11195975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-2). The number of slot since last scheduling during which the UE was included in pre-scheduling candidate set shall be counted in rrmNumSlotSinceLastUlSched. An exponential filter shall calculate the average TBS in byte per NR slot, rrmAvgUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot, by means of the following equation.

[image-0][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15297.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

[image-1][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-04102218.png[/image_path][/image-1]

(5G_UP_ALG_4859_replaced([11195975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-1)

[Before CB014044-M]

[image-2][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-04102220.png[/image_path][/image-2]

(5G_UP_ALG_4859_replaced([11195975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-2)

[CB014044-M] The calculation rule of the average 5G UE date rate depends on the setting of the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actTdPfMetricOpt. If NRCELL.actTdPfMetricOpt is neither set to UL_Only nor DL_UL, the average data rate is calculated by

[image-3][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation defines `rrmAvgUlUeDataRate[i, j, t]` as a function of previous values of itself and `rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize[i, j, t]`. The equation is: `rrmAvgUlUeDataRate[i, j, t] = (1 - 1/β)^n × rrmAvgUlUeDataRate[i, j, t-n] + 1/β × rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize[i, j, t]`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-05041714.png[/image_path][/image-3]

and if NRCELL.actUlTdPfMetricOpt is set to UL_Only or DL_UL:

{

[image-4][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is: $rrmAvgUlUeDataRate[i, j, t] = (1 - \frac{1}{\beta})^n \times rrmAvgUlUeDataRate[i, j, t - n] + \frac{1}{\beta} instUlUeDataRate[i, j, t]$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-05041713.png[/image_path][/image-4]

[CB014044-M-UPD003]  
[image-5][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation is: `rrm AvgUlUe Data Rate[i, j,t] = max (avgUlUe Data Rate Lower Threshold[i,j,t], rrmAvgUlUe Data Rate[i, j, t])`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/1e244f7f-edc3-4ad4-9833-57855e766e57.png[/image_path][/image-5]

**[End CB014044-M-UPD003]**

}

[End CB014044-M]

[CB014044-M-UPD003] Rationale for introducing lower limit on rrmAvgUlUeDataRate: With the fast decaying filter coefficient used for averaging UE data rate, the UE average data rate reaches quite lower values within a shorter period and possibly due to DRX state of UEs, it might be needed to decay the UE data rate for more than 100 ms which introduces higher fluctuation in the cell average metric. So, it was agreed that introducing a lower limit on the UE average data rate which can reduce the fluctuation in cell average metric leading to better comparision of new incoming UEs. [End CB014044-M-UPD003]

with:

i: Index of the 5G UE

t: NR slot the calculation relates to (note t is the time elapsed from the initialization which means initialization at the UE setup or reinitialization)

n: rrmNumSlotSinceLastUlSched

β: rdAvgUlUeDataRateFilterConst

rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize(i,j,k): represents the aggregated traffic volume in bytes for all the 1st transmission transport blocks that are scheduled for the 5G UE with index i on carrier j during the NR slot t as long as the 5G UE is in Candidate Set 1.

[CB014044-M] instUlUeDataRate[i,j,t]: The instantaneous UL UE data rate of the UE i on carrier j during the NR slot t calculated as described in [12557455](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_7BmcoCj3EfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CB014044-M]

[CB014044-M-UPD003]

avgUlUeDataRateLowerThreshold[i,j,t]: The lower bound on the avgDataRate in UL for the UE i in carrier j in slot t. It shall be calculated as rdMinExpectedBwSharePerUe * rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot_alpha[i,j,t]. Please refer to [12811470: rdMinExpectedBwSharePerUe](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_E6Q9oKQ4EfCBvZf8dodgmQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for rdMinExpectedBwSharePerUe and [11195916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) for rrmCurrentUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot_alpha definition.

[End CB014044-M-UPD003]

The parameter rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize represents the aggregated traffic volume in bytes for all the 1st transmission transport blocks that are scheduled for the 5G UE with index i during the NR slot t as long as the 5G UE is in Candidate Set 1.

[Before CB014044-M] The filter constant shall be implemented by an R&D parameter (rdAvgUlUeDataRateFilterConst: range of 100, 101, …, 10000 with default 1000 – see 5G_L2_1024_replaced([11182943](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27fs9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB014044-M]  
The filter constant rdAvgUlUeDataRateFilterConst defined by the formulas above shall correspond to  
\- For an FDD cell, it shall be rdAvgUlUeDataRateFilterConstFdd, see [12552792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_cBJS4iTyEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)  
\- For a TDD FR1 cell, it shall be rdAvgUlUeDataRateFilterConstTddFr1, see [12555241](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_B0Tn8CW1EfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)  
\- For a TDD FR2 cell, it shall be rdAvgUlUeDataRateFilterConst see 5G_L2_1024_replaced([11182943](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27fs9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
[End CB014044-M]

For the initialization of the exponential filter, the average data rate shall be derived from the scheduling conditions in the previous NR slot in carrier j as per 5G_UP_ALG_4863_replaced([11196008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The exponential filter shall be initialized the 1st time that the PF metric has to be computed after the UE setup.

The exponential filter shall be re-initialized in the following cases:

  * when the UE re-enters the pre-scheduler candidate set with new data in DRB buffer (coming back from nullBuffer state) after staying out for longer than NRCELL.avgDataRateReinitProhibitTimer; Reinitialization is done at most only once after the UE returns to nonNullBuffer state from nullBuffer state.

  * when the UE is scheduled from SR priority class while it had non null DRB buffer and was not scheduled for longer than rdAvgDataRateReinitProhibitTimer ms (5G_L2_1205_replaced([11183368](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27iwTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

  * with each change in the set of the non-GBR bearers and hence with each change of the overall schedulWeight.

  * after each FR1 SCell activation for SCell with UL configured according to 5G_UP_ ALG_2698.

---

##### 3.30.4.2.0-10 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Calculation of the average UE UL Data Rate for UEs with carrier aggregation (ID: 11195997)

**3.30.4.2.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11196003`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL In case of carrier aggregation, the average UL data rate rrmAvgUlUeDataRate_BytesPerSlot[i, t] of the UE shall be calculated per slot in the same way as specified by 5G_UP_ALG_4859_replaced([11195975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The parameter rrmUlSumOfTransportBlockSize represents the aggregated traffic volume in bytes for all transport blocks that are scheduled over all the configured subcells for the UE with index i during the slot t as long as the UE is in Candidate Set 1 for FR2 CA UE, and the aggregated traffic volume in bytes for transport block scheduled over current configured carrier(Note: the average UE DL data rate is calculated per carrier so with local scheduling PF metric calculation) for the UE with index i during the slot t as long as the UE is in Candidate Set 1 for FR1 CA UE.

The exponential filter shall be initialized based on the rule, which is specified in 5G_UP_ALG_4863_replaced([11196008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 3.30.4.2.0-11 Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL Initialization of the average 5G UE UL Data Rate (ID: 11196008)

**3.30.4.2.0-11.0-3**  (ID: `12737744`)

Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL 12737744: Definition of per UE and per subcell / carrier scheduling metric for UL For the initialization of the average data rate shall be derived from the scheduling conditions in the previous NR slot in carrier j as follows If NRCELL.actPfMetricReinitSchedUes = false { The average PF metric (see 5G_UP_ALG_4851_replaced([11195815](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv-0NPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) among all the 5G UEs in Candidate Set 1 served by carrier j shall be calculated where the 5G UE i is configured: initUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier[j, t] = 1/ N * sum[i, for all UE i in candidate set 1]{rrmUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier[i, j, t-1]} * WUL, FR1_SCell_Activation } Else { **[CB014044-UPD002]** If NRBTS/NRCELL/actTdPfMetricOpt =(UL or DL_UL) { [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in an italicized font. The formula is: initUlUeSched Metric PerCarrier[j, t] = (1-rdPfMetricReinitFilterConst) × initUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier[j, t -1] +rdPfMetricReinit FilterConst × $\sum_{i \in S} \frac{rrmUlUeSched MetricPerCarrier ExclVar Factors[i, j, t − 1]}{sizeof (S)}$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/490d909a-c2bf-466a-8464-9a899d505dbf.png[/image_path][/image-0] } Else **[End CB014044-UPD002]** { [image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a sans-serif font. The formula is presented in two lines. The first line defines a variable `initUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier[j,t]` and sets it equal to an expression. The expression is `(1-rdPfMetricReinitFilterConst) x initUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier[j,t-1]) + rdPfMetricReinitFilterConst`. The second line continues the definition, multiplying the previous expression by a fraction. The numerator of the fraction is `ΣιειrrmUlUeSchedMetricPerCarrier[i,j,t-1]`, and the denominator is `Number of Scheduled UL UEs of DRB priority class in slot (t-1)`. The formula appears to be related to a telecommunications or network scheduling context, given the variable names and terms like "UE", "Carrier", "Scheduled", "DRB priority class", and "slot".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15301.001.png[/image_path][/image-1] } [Before PR863926] rdPfMetricReinitFilterConst: R&D parameter.
