If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (NRCELL.actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) and if the amount of resources is not available to schedule the retransmission UE, gNB-DU shall consider the UE differently in scheduling depending on the setting of the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRescheduleBlockedRetx. If NRCELL.actRescheduleBlockedRetx **is set to 0 the respective UE shall not be scheduled in the dedicated BWP even if some data is pending for an initial transmission. If is set to 1 the respective UE is not removed from CS2 list but still considered in the CS2 list with lowest priority.**

  * If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (NRCELL.actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) the needed amount of PRB for retransmission is given by 5G_UP_ALG_11945_replaced([11202437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwdVWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * If adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated with slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and if the amount of required PRBs for retransmission, given by 5G_UP_ALG_11945_replaced([11202437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwdVWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), is not available in UL for the retransmission (5G_UP_ALG_4876_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**, the re-transmitting UE(s) shall not be added to the list and the retransmission shall be skipped and HARQ process is freed.**

  * If adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated with slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE, (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) the amount of required layer PRBs for retransmission shall not exceed the remaining available layer PRBs in a slot (**rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot; refer 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The number of layer PRBs used for the required PRB allocation (given by 5G_UP_ALG_11945_replaced([11202437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwdVWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) can be calculated as **numReqLayerPrb mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In case the required number of layer PRBs are not available in the current slot, the retransmission shall be skipped and retried in a later slot.****




However, if the required number of layer PRBs for the retransmission are greater than the maximum number of available layer PRBs per slot during a pooling period (refer rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the retransmission shall be skipped and the HARQ process is freed

  * For msg5: As indicated in 5G_UP_ALG_3455_replaced([11153560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksnXIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * For retransmissions (dedicated BWP) & msg5 in dedicated BWP, including the retransmissions overwriting a Configured Grant, if decided by 5G_UP_ALG_15617_replaced([11198720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwKaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the needed resources need to be less than or equal to the resources in at least one of the available PUSCH subareas as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_4879_replaced([11196950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGwCPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * For a UE requiring the Configured Grant (CG) overwriting with an initial transmission of a Dynamic Grant (DG) and on more PRBs than allocated to CG (see 5G_UP_ALG_15617_replaced([11198720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwKaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the minimum number of PRBs that is requested is MAX{1+number of PRBs allocated to CG (see 5G_UP_ALG_14664_replaced([11172802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **or 5G_UP_ALG_15651_replaced([11172853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), X} in at least one of the available PUSCH subarea. **If target PUSCH requires UCI multiplexing, X = the minimum number of PRBs for UCI multiplexing with PUSCH as requested by 5G_UP_ALG_11447_replaced([11196591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDsuvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), otherwise X =0.****




\- If NRCELL.actFdmSchedulingInitialBWP is set to False then only 1 UE in transient phase (see 5G_UP_ALG_4816_replaced([11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4GhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is scheduled per slot. It can also only be scheduled if the first X PRBs in the dedicated BW not used (X is the size of initial BWP-nbrOfBlankedPRBsLowEdge if PRB blanking enabled). If NRCELL.lteNrDssMode !=0, X is 6 PRB.

  * **The remaining resources in case of long PUCCH and NRCELL.lteNrDssMode = 0 (no DSS) are defined in 5G_UP_ALG_4974_replaced([11199486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwOEw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**



The adaptive retransmission scheme and the use of reserved MCS shall not be applicable to initial BWP UEs.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-5 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Sufficient PDCCH resources are available (ID: 11196565)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11196575`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 There is a free PDCCH candidate for transmitting the DCI as determined by 5G_UP_ALG_4433_replaced([11170857](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuAeTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB008124-B] In the free PDCCH candidate identification procedure called above, when the transmission is addressed to CS-RNTI, C-RNTI shall always be used for evaluation (CS-RNTI is only used for DCI CRC scrambling).

Note that for a UE with configured grant (CG) type2, the need of PDCCH allocation is evaluated in accordance to the scheduler decision for CG UE, as documented in 5G_UP_ALG_15166_replaced([11196787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwFh4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB008124-B]

If A-CSI is activated at cell level and if 5G_UP_ALG_4869_replaced([11196426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCeoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) was triggered in current slot (i.e. A-CSI scheduling was performed with k2aCsi timing), L2-PS shall consider the potentially already consumed PDCCH tokens due to 5G_UP_ALG_4869_replaced([11196426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCeoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Note that, in this case A-CSI scheduling was already performed with k2aCsi timing.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-6 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 UE is not in overheating status (ID: 11196580)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11196585`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 The UE is not in overheating status for current Scell for CA UE according to 5G_UP_ALG_2874_replaced([11123313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiThPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In case current scheduling for the UE over current carrier is related to retransmission but UE is in overheating status at current carrier according to 5G_UP_ALG_2871_replaced([11123293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiTgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the related HARQ process and dlHarqBufferIndex shall be freed.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-7 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Sufficient FD resources must be available to multiplex UCI on PUSCH transmission (ID: 11196591)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11196594`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Multiplexing of UCI on PUSCH – Basic concept

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11196615`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 If long PUCCH is configured (NRCELL.pucchModeSelect is 'longPucch') and the UE in PUSCH scheduling set has a PUCCH resource in the same slot or if the UE is A-CSI eligible (UE is eligible for A-CSI triggering, see 5G_UP_ALG_3512_replaced([11159392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktJiofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and the PUSCH scheduling conditions in 5G_UP_ALG_3506_replaced([11159352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktI7mPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are all fulfilled) then the UCI would be multiplexed on PUSCH. Depending on the type of the UCI (HARQ A/N, CSI Part1 or/and CSI Part2) and the number of UCI bits, the number of PRBs allocated for initial PUSCH transmission and adaptive retransmission shall not be less than [Before CB013204-A]MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci(5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A] if PUSCH is scheduled without qam64LowSE table, [Before CB013204-A]where minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci is derived from 5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB013204-A] and hence, a sufficiently large PUSCH subarea has to be available to schedule the UE with consideration for the active BWP of the UE as expressed in 5G_UP_ALG_4879_replaced([11196950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGwCPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[Before CB013204-A]The R&D parameter minSupportedNumPrbsUl is defined in 5G_L2_1136_replaced([11183158](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27hiIfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End CB013204-A]

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall determine the number of layer PRBs consumed by the FD resources required for an initial PUSCH transmission or an adaptive retransmission which has UCI multiplexed on it and use it to ensure that the constraint related to layer PRBs mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_26661_replaced([11214618](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOxYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is maintained. In case allocating the required resources to a UE breaks the constraint, the UE shall be skipped.

It is not expected that Msg3 or Msg5 contain UCI.

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11196619`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Restriction of UCI multiplexing on PUSCH if the ATB restricts the PRB allocation

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11196630`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 If the ATB procedure (see 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) requests a smaller PRB allocation than defined in 5G_UP_ALG_23283_replaced([11196594](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDsvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the PUSCH transmission shall be skipped if the UCI relates to a pCSI w/ or w/o HARQ A/N. If the UCI relates to HARQ A/N only the UE shall be scheduled in UL even if the ATB shrinks the PRB allocation below the defined minimum allocation size.

[CB008124-D] For users who have been configured with a Configured Grant in UL as per the rules defined in 5G_UP_5893_replaced([11348488](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubWBFPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for an initial CG PUSCH transmission, the rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15123_replaced([11173014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_15125_replaced([11173036](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuQV4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are followed for PUSCH transmission. [End CB008124-D]

If the ATB procedure (see 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) requests a smaller PRB allocation than minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (see 5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the PUSCH shall be scheduled without triggering the multiplexing of an A-CSI report.

If for an A-CSI in UCI only mode, the ATB procedure (see 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) requests a smaller PRB allocation than minNumOfPrbsForEntireUciInUciOnlyMode (which is the requested allocation in UCI only mode - see 5G_UP_ALG_3559_replaced([11159589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKww_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the A-CSI request for UCI only on PUSCH shall not be triggered.

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-3**  (ID: `11196634`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Multiplexing of UCI on PUSCH retransmissions

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `11196656`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 If a UCI carrying a pCSI w/ or w/o HARQ A/N needs to be multiplexed to a PUSCH retransmission and the granted number of PRBs is smaller than [Before CB013204-A]MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A]PRBs the PUSCH retransmission shall be skipped in scheduling.

For VoNR users with active 5QI-1 bearer for voice service, if NRCELL.actUlMinTbsForVoNR is set to TRUE to ensure a TBS that is greater than or equal to the configured UL minimum TBS given by NRCELL.ulMinTbsForVoNR as per the rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15554_replaced([11203613](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the number of PRBs shall not exceed the value given by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR. In such case, if the UCI carrying a pCSI w/ or w/o HARQ A/N needs to be multiplexed to a PUSCH retransmission and the required number of PRBs is smaller than NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR the PUSCH retransmission shall be skipped in scheduling.

The PRBs allocated in the above scenario can exceed the value defined by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR, in case the number of PRBs given by [Before CB013204-A]MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A] exceed NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR, then in such case, if the UCI carrying a pCSI w/ or w/o HARQ A/N needs to be multiplexed to a PUSCH retransmission and the required number of PRBs is smaller than [Before CB013204-A]MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A] the PUSCH retransmission shall be skipped in scheduling. Independent of how many PRBs are required to the PUSCH retransmission, the PUSCH retransmission shall be scheduled if a UCI carrying HARQ A/N only needs to be multiplexed with a PUSCH retransmission.

For users who have been configured with a Configured Grant in UL as per the rules defined in 5G_UP_5893_replaced([11348488](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubWBFPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for an initial CG PUSCH transmission, the rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15123_replaced([11173014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_15125_replaced([11173036](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuQV4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are followed for PUSCH retransmission.

[Before CB013204-A]

Details to the parameter can be found in 5G_L2_1136_replaced([11183158](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27hiIfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for minSupportedNumPrbsUl and in 5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci.

[End CB013204-A]

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-4**  (ID: `11196661`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 UCI Multiplexing on PUSCH in SCell for UEs configured with UL CA

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11196676`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 For an FR1 UL CA UE, which is in power split mode according to 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and the current cell is PCell and the current slot is an Ul overlapping slot defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the UL Scheduler shall carry out the PUSCH scheduling conditionally.

 If for initial PUSCH transmission, the UCI would be multiplexed on PUSCH and maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10883_replaced([11119896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is smaller than [Before CB013204-A] MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPushPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPushPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A] the PUSCH transmission shall be skipped to allow the UCI transfer via PUCCH.

 If for initial PUSCH transmission, maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10883_replaced([11119896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is smaller than minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci, the PUSCH shall be scheduled without triggering the multiplexing of an A-CSI report.

 If for an A-CSI in UCI only mode, maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10883_replaced([11119896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is smaller than minNumOfPrbsForEntireUciInUciOnlyMode (which is the requested allocation in UCI only mode - see 5G_UP_ALG_3559_replaced([11159589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKww_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the A-CSI request for UCI only on PUSCH shall not be triggered.

For VoNR users with active 5QI-1 bearer for voice service, if NRCELL.actUlMinTbsForVoNR is set to TRUE to ensure a TBS that is greater than or equal to the configured UL minimum TBS given by NRCELL.ulMinTbsForVoNR as per the rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15554_replaced([11203613](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the number of PRBs shall not exceed the value given by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR.

 The PRBs allocated in the above scenario can exceed the value defined by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR, in case the number of PRBs given by [Before CB013204-A] MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPushPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPushPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A] exceed NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR. In such case, if the maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower defined is smaller than [Before CB013204-A] MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPushPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPushPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A], the PUSCH transmission shall be skipped to allow the UCI transfer via PUCCH.

 In case the current cell is PCell and current slot is an Ul overlapping slot defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if for initial PUSCH transmission, maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10883_replaced([11119896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is smaller than the actual number of PRBs required to achieve the NRCELL.ulMinTbsForVoNR during the FD scheduling, then the scheduler shall allocate a TBS that can be carried by the maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower PRBs such that, the A-CSI request for A-CSI report multiplexing with PUSCH data shall not be dropped. The PRBs allocated to the VoNR user with active 5QI bearer, can exceed the value defined by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR, in case the number of PRBs given by minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci exceeds NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR, in which case if maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower defined is smaller than minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci, the PUSCH shall be scheduled without triggering the multiplexing of an A-CSI report.

For UEs configured with FR1 UL CA, beside doing the checks on Pcell, L2PS shall always do the above checks (see as well 5G_UP_ALG_23283_replaced([11196594](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDsvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_23288_replaced([11196619](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwETwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_23292_replaced([11196634](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwETxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))for UCI multiplexing in PUSCH on Scell in the earliest slot overlapping with the long PUCCH, no matter whether the UCI is finally multiplexed in PUSCH on Scell. UCI multiplexing in PUSCH for UL CA UE refers to 5G_UP_ALG_9538_replaced([11204208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwjb-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_3609_replaced([11159986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Rationale is that for FR1 UL CA, PUSCH are scheduled parallelly on Pcell and Scell, L2PS on Scell doesn’t know whether PUSCH is scheduled on Pcell before L2PS on Pcell notifies the scheduling result to Scell.

[Before CB013204-A] Details to the parameter can be found in 5G_L2_1136_replaced([11183158](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27hiIfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for minSupportedNumPrbsUl and in 5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci. [End CB013204-A]

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-5**  (ID: `11196682`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Multiplexing of UCI on PUSCH for UEs with voice service

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11196697`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 For VoNR users with active 5QI-1 bearer for voice service and NRCELL.actUlMinTbsForVoNR is set to TRUE and if either (the UE is not SAg capable) or (NRCELL.actUlSlotAgg is set to FALSE), then the number of PRBs allocated for initial PUSCH transmission shall not exceed the value given by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR if the calculated transport block size for the user falls below the configured NRCELL.ulMinTbsForVoNR. Note that the number of PUSCH PRBs may exceed the value defined by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR if UCI is multiplexed with PUSCH and the number of PRBs given by [Before CB013204-A]MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A] exceeds NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR. For this case the scheduler shall give precedence to [Before CB013204-A]MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci} [CB013204-A] MAX{rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))} [End CB013204-A] over NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR.

For VoNR users with active 5QI-1 bearer for voice service, if the UE is SAg capable and NRCELL.actUlSlotAgg is set to Enabled_VoNr then:

 If this is a 1x grant, the MCS/PRB combination is determined as if this was non-5QI1 data. I.e., there are no VoNR specific PRB limits. The determination of 1x, 2x, or 4x SAg is defined by 5G_UP_ALG_19882_replaced([11205071](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwnGVfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 If a 2x or 4x SAg grant is used, then the number of PRBs used will be set as defined in the requirements referenced above.

[Before CB013204-A] Details to the parameter can be found in 5G_L2_1136_replaced([11183158](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27hiIfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for minSupportedNumPrbsUl and in 5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci. [End CB013204-A]

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-6**  (ID: `11196703`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Multiplexing of UCI on PUSCH with the qam64LowSE table

---

**3.30.4.8.1.0-7.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11196708`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 If PUSCH is scheduled with qam64LowSE table, the multiplexing of UCI and PUSCH shall be supported [Before PR728485] if (N_CSI=0 or (N_CSI<=16 and N_AN<=9)) [PR728485] if minAllowedPushPrbWithUci <= rdMaxMinAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_24902_replaced([11209428](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwz6ofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End PR728485]. Depending on the UCI (HARQ A/N, CSI Part1 or/and CSI Part2) and the number of UCI bits, the number of required PRBs for an initial PUSCH transmission shall not be less than MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPushPrbWithUci}. The definition of the parameter minAllowedPuschPrbWithUci for UEs using the qam64LowSE table is specified in 5G_UP_ALG_6391_replaced([11197037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Rational: As minAllowedPushPrbWithUci with MCS0 assumption would be too large minAllowedPushPrbWithUci is not used here for getting MAX{minSupportedNumPrbsUl, minAllowedPushPrbWithUci} if PUSCH is scheduled with qam64LowSE table with larger CSI bits.

If PUSCH is scheduled with qamLowSE table and the UL scheduler is requested to schedule the UE with a p-CSI [Before PR728485] of if N_CSI>16 or (0<N_CSI<=16 and N_AN>9) [PR728485] if minAllowedPushPrbWithUci > rdMaxMinAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_24902_replaced([11209428](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwz6ofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End PR728485], the p-CSI multiplexing with PUSCH data shall be skipped so that the UCI is transferred via PUCCH.

If PUSCH is scheduled with qamLowSE table and an A-CSI [Before PR728485] N_CSI>16 or (0<N_CSI<=16 and N_AN>9) [PR728485] if minAllowedPushPrbWithUci > rdMaxMinAllowedPuschPrbWithUci (5G_UP_ALG_24902_replaced([11209428](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwz6ofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End PR728485] is requested, the PUSCH shall be scheduled without triggering the multiplexing of an A-CSI report.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-8 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 PUSCH and Long PUCCH transmission coexistence criteria (ID: 11196713)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11196723`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 [Before CB009854-B]

For FDD carrier and long PUCCH, for pCSI, no PUSCH transmissions shall be scheduled in slots, if the reference given in L1 DL HARQ reporting on PUSCH, 5G_UP_ALG_1082_replaced([11103916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn2L6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and CSI reporting on PUSCH for CSI part1, 5G_UP_ALG_1055_replaced([11103820](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn09zvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), is exceeded. The UCI bits for HARQ and CSI part1 are all considered independently.

[End CB009854-B]

[CB009854-D]

For TDD FR1 SCell configured with UL CA, no PUSCH transmission shall be scheduled in slots overlapping with PUCCH in which two bundled pCSI reports would be multiplexed, if L1 HW for the TDD FR1 SCell doesn’t support pCSI reports bundling according to 5G_UP_ALG_1057_replaced([11103824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn1k0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB009854-D]

If the UL scheduler foresees to allocate a PUSCH resource to a specific UE in slot n and this UE has already an F3 allocation in this slot, then decrement another F3 resource, rrmNumOfF3ForHarq -= 1.

If long PUCCH is configured (NRCELL.pucchModeSelect is 'longPucch') for on FDD or TDD FR1, no PUSCH transmissions for a specific UE shall be allocated on P(S)cell in slots, 

if rrmNumCsiPart1OnPusch resource is not available (<=0) and a periodic CSI resource is expected on PUSCH for this UE, or

if rrmNumOfF3ForHarq resource is not available (<=0) and a periodic CSI resource and HARQ resource (>= 3bit) is expected on PUSCH for this UE.

If a UE configured with UL CA and long PUCCH, no PUSCH transmissions for the UE shall be allocated on Scell in slots,

if rrmNumOfF3ForHarq resource is not available (<=0) and HARQ resource (>= 3bit) is expected on PUSCH for this UE, or

if {rrmNumCsiPart1OnPusch resource is not available (<=0) or rrmNumOfF3ForHarq resource is not available (<=0)} and a periodic CSI resource is expected on PUSCH for this UE, or

if rrmNumOfF3ForHarq resource is not available (<=1) and a periodic CSI resource and HARQ resource (>= 3bit) is expected on PUSCH for this UE.

Note:

In case a UE is using UCI on PUSCH with periodic CSI and HARQ feedback, which is originally allocated on F3, the L1 is counting this resource as two separate items. For original description refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2465_replaced([11116066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The bookkeeping is described in 5G_UP_ALG_2465_replaced([11116066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Only long PUCCH is supported for Scell configured with FR1 UL CA.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-9 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 A-CSI resources must be available for A-CSI eligible UEs (ID: 11196729)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11196735`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 If the aperiodic CSI is activated at cell level (actAperCsiCell set in the cell setup message) and the current slot is marked as eligible for A-CSI scheduling and k2aCsi is not defined in the slot’s context (see 5G_UP_ALG_2500_replaced([11116648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp5aX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2-PS understands that A-CSI scheduling could be performed in the current slot with k2 timing.

Otherwise, in case that A-CSI users are already scheduled for the current slot due to the execution of 5G_UP_ALG_4869_replaced([11196426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCeoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) in a previous UL scheduling, this requirement shall apply cumulatively.

If A-CSI is activated at cell level:

\- If the execution of 5G_UP_ALG_4869_replaced([11196426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCeoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) was not triggered in current slot (i.e. A-CSI scheduling was not performed with k2aCsi timing):

o L2-PS shall conclude that A-CSI shall be scheduled with k2 timing and A-CSI UE are sent to FD scheduler with current requirement’s procedures.

o In addition maximum number of UE that are allowed for A-CSI scheduler shall not exceed maxACsiOnPuschCapacity (see 5G_UP_ALG_6511_replaced([11159612](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKwx_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for definition). UEs eligible for A-CSI scheduling must have the A-CSI triggering eligibility event (UE is present in the list of UE eligible for A-CSI triggering, see 5G_UP_ALG_3512_replaced([11159392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktJiofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and must fulfill the A-CSI scheduling on PUSCH conditions in 5G_UP_ALG_3506_replaced([11159352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktI7mPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (implementation shall decide when the A-CSI eligibility is evaluated for the UEs in CS2).

o if maxACsiOnPuschCapacity is reached, UE could still be scheduled in the current slot but without A-CSI.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-10 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 PDCCH beam to be used for UE is not muted (ID: 11196742)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11196746`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 beam eligible for scheduling PDCCH for the UE on the carrier is not muted (see 5G_UP_ALG_2240_replaced([11113816](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpejkPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Note: This restricts adding UE only to these CS2 lists that corresponds to carrier where beam is not muted.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-11 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Initial transmission PRB allocation must meet minimum PRB requirements (ID: 11196751)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-11.0-4**  (ID: `11196773`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 For initial transmission UEs, scheduled PRBs for UL shall be no less than the minimal allowed PRBs (the allocated PRBs in above steps shall be updated if not fulfilled):

 When UL PTRS configured, minimal allowed PRB is minAllowedPuschPrbUlPtrs (see 5G_UP_ALG_6845_replaced([11197403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the details) and in addition if NRCELL.actUlMinTbsForVoNR is set to TRUE and if either (the UE is not SAg capable) or (NRCELL.actUlSlotAgg is set to FALSE) then for VoNR users with active [Before CB008118-C] 5QI-1[CB008118-C] 5QI1/65/66 [End CB008118-C] bearer for voice service to ensure a TBS that is greater than or equal to the configured UL minimum TBS given by NRCELL.ulMinTbsForVoNR as per the rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15554_replaced([11203613](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) the number of PRBs shall not exceed the value given by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR

Note that the PRBs allocated in the above scenario can exceed the value defined by NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR, in case the number of PRBs given by minAllowedPuschPrbUlPtrs exceed NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR, in which case the scheduler shall give precedence to minAllowedPuschPrbUlPtrs over NRCELL.numPuschPrbForMinTbsVoNR

 For VoNR users with active [Before CB008118-C] 5QI-1[CB008118-C] 5QI1/65/66 [End CB008118-C] bearer for voice service, if the UE is SAg capable and NRCELL.actUlSlotAgg is set to Enabled_VoNr, then it is possible that a 2x or a 4x SAg grant will be used. If a 2x or 4x SAg grant is selected and the number of PRBs used by the 2x or 4x SAg grant will be set as defined by 5G_UP_ALG_19882_replaced([11205071](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwnGVfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 For an FR1 UL CA UE which is in power split mode according to 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in case current cell is PCell and current slot is an Ul overlapping slot defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if for initial transmission, maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10883_replaced([11119896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is smaller than the minimal allowed PRBs defined above, the PUSCH transmission shall be skipped

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-12 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 PUSCH transmission after Re-establishment must not multiplex HARQ A/N (ID: 11196779)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-12.0-1**  (ID: `11196784`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 After Re-establishment succeeded the UE is without dedicated configuration (before the immediate reconfiguration procedure to dedicated configuration is completed) then if the UE has a PUCCH allocation for HARQ A/N in the targeted slot then PUSCH allocation of the UE for the same slot shall be avoided.

Note: This is valid for both, short- and long-, PUCCH configurations.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-13 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Scheduling decision for a UE with configured grant type2 (ID: 11196787)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-13.0-1**  (ID: `11196793`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 For a UE with configured grant type2, the allocation of PDCCH and PUSCH resources is performed according to the current UE state in the CG state machine:

\- The execution of TD scheduler shall trigger ‘TD-SCH’ event, if present, of the current UE state in the CG state machine (see 5G_UP_ALG_15099_replaced([11172972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * Note that each state could have a different behavior of the TD-SCH event

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-14 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Overload Control Limitation (ID: 11196799)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-14.0-1**  (ID: `11196802`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 [CNI-90896]When NRBTS.actFdmUeSkippingOlc is set to TRUE, [End CNI-90896] [Before CNI-82030-B] If UL-MU-MIMO disabled, [End CNI-82030-B] Overload control may limit the number of UEs considered for to-be-scheduled list, if it predicts that its processing capacity would be exceeded in a slot. In that case, it shall make sure that below conditions are satisfied.

  * At least rdMinUlSchedUesPerSlotInHighLoad (5G_UP_ALG_13381_replaced([11209025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwxeYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) UEs are selected for FD resource allocation i.e. added to to-be-scheduled list
  * All UL FD resources shall be distributed among the remaining selected UEs in to-be-scheduled list so that UL FD resources are not wasted.



Please refer to overload control defined in CP3/EFS for more details.

---

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-16 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Assign the UE to a PUSCH subarea (ID: 11196812)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-16.0-5**  (ID: `12748259`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 L2-PS shall keep track of the remaining resources in the BW during the process using PUSCH subareas as per 5G_UP_ALG_4876_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Allocate UEs to a PUSCH subarea if needed.

 For dedicated BWP retransmissions & msg5, allocate UE in PUSCH subarea mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_11420_replaced([11196526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDFrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If needed resources can fit in more than one PUSCH subarea, allocate the UE in the PUSCH subarea with least available resources.

 If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the larger BWP UE (see 5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be preferably allocated to a PUSCH subarea that will not overlap with smaller BWP resources, if possible. For example, a 1st BWP UE shall preferable be first allocated to 1st BWP exclusive resources, second to 2nd BWP exclusive resources, and third to 3rd BWP resources, if possible.

 For initial Tx UEs, if the given resources is equal to or greater than max(available resources in a PUSCH subarea), allocate UE in the PUSCH subarea with the most available resources. Then update max(available resources in a PUSCH subarea).

 Update the amount of remaining resources in BW and PUSCH subareas (if UE gets allocated to one) by deducting**:**

 For initial BWP transmission & retransmission UEs, the amount indicated in 5G_UP_ALG_11420_replaced([11196526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDFrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In the procedure to re-update to-be-scheduled list, for the virtual UEs which included at least one retransmission UE, the amount of needed resources for this virtual UE shall be the max needed resources among those retransmission UEs.

 For the retransmission UEs mentioned above, if they are paired in the initial transmission traffic with each other, only the PRB allocated for this virtual UE(A) shall be deducted.

 For initial transmission UEs deduct:

For a UE that is selected for CG overwriting (see 5G_UP_ALG_15617_replaced([11198720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwKaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on more PRBs than CG allocation, as determined at CG activation time (see 5G_UP_ALG_14664_replaced([11172802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or at CG modification time (see 5G_UP_ALG_15651_replaced([11172853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 1 + number of PRBs of CG allocation is deducted. If more PRBs are deducted and UE satisfies one of the conditions below, the number of PRBs deducted is increased accordingly.

For a UE that is selected for any other case, the following condition are evaluated to determine the expected resources

 If UCI is multiplexed in initial Tx of PUSCH, then, in the following, the needed resources are as determined in condition (7) above (in 5G_UP_ALG_4871_replaced([11196450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCepPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 if: UE is a candidate of srResp request class and the UE has a prioritised DC-GBR LCG: **min (max(available resources in a PUSCH subarea), needed resources to allocate SR payload, namely PayloadSr, see 5G_UP_ALG_12751_replaced([11203952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwiN0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**

 If SRB or 5QI5 DRB **with buffered data: min (max(available resources in a PUSCH subarea), needed SRB/5QI5 resources (5G_UP_ALG_3455_replaced([11153560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksnXIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (if msg5))).**

 Else if: Prioritised DC-GBR DRB with buffered data: **min (max(available resources in a PUSCH subarea), needed DC-GBR resources )**

 Else if: 5QI1 DRB and/or non-5QI1 GBR DRB with buffered data: **min (max(available resources in a PUSCH subarea), needed 5QI1 and/or non-5QI1 GBR resources ).**

Else if: NBR DRB with positive token bucket with buffered data: **min (max(available resources in a PUSCH subarea), needed NBR resources as per 5G_UP_ALG_22159_replaced([11199843](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

 Else: rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 In the procedure to re-update to-be-scheduled list, for virtual UEs which are composed by non-GBR initial transmission **(including NBR) UEs entirely deduct:**

 if at least one UE whose UCI is multiplexed in initial Tx of PUSCH, the needed resources are determined by the max value of rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **and the needed resources in condition (7) above.**

 For a UE belonging to NBR category drbTraffic, its needed FD resources are calculated as per 5G_UP_ALG_22159_replaced([11199843](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to satisfy its NBR bearer [Before PR846088] considering the PRB compensation factor due to MU-MIMO pairing (5G_UP_ ALG_9571)[End PR846088]. If UCI is multiplexed for that UE, the needed resources in condition (7) shall be added too. [Before PR846088] If such UE is scheduled with 64qamLowSE-Index table and its rrmUlProposedMcs<MCS6, its needed resources are determined by the max value of (sum(NBR requirement, UCI requirement), rrmNumPrbLowSEUl,**rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))).[End PR846088]**

 Else:**rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

 Update the amount of PRBs can not be used for MU candidated UEs:

 If the UEs are not non-GBR UEs or non-GBR re-transmission UEs **which are not paired in initial transmission, the PRBs allocation for them should be added to rrmPRBNumNotAvailableForMU. Note,** non-GBR UEs include both NBR configured non-GBR and other normal non-GBR UEs.****

 For the non-GBR re-transmission UE which is paired in initial transmission as virtual UE(A), and there are more than one UEs need to do the retransmission in the same virtual UE(A) , only the PRBs allocated for virtual UE(A) should be added to rrmPRBNumNotAvailableForMU.

For example: UE1 and UE2 are paired in the initial transmission as virtual UE(A), and the number of PRB allocated to virtual UE(A) is 50 PRBs, UE1 is 50 PRBs , UE2 is 40 PRBs, UE1 and UE2 both need to do the retransmission, only the PRBs allocation for virtual UE(A) should be added to rrmPRBNumNotAvailableForMU.

When NRBTS.actEnhRrcReconfUlPrbRandom is set to disable, PUSCH resource for UL force DCI format 0_0, it should be restricted by UL initial BWP size and UL dedicated BWP start position.

---

In FDD cell shared with LTE (DSS) [CB007372-AA] when NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-AA], allocate a PDCCH candidate for the DCI (start CCE is determined as in 5G_UP_ALG_4432_replaced([11170853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuAeTfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-19 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Determine MU MIMO resources remaining (ID: 11196874)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-19.0-1**  (ID: `11196879`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 [CB008360-A] L2RT shall define rrmPRBNumNotAvailableForMU to record the total PRB number which are not used for MU. It is initialized to 0 every slot. [End CB008360-A]

[CB008360-D] If NRCELL.actUlMuMimo = True, in below resource availability checking for initial transmission and retransmission, frequency resource reserved for each MU eligible UEs (5G_UP_ALG_9554_replaced([11146147](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksCvavvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be shared with all MU eligible UEs. It will increase number of candidates to be added into to-be-scheduled list even without enough frequency resource because these candidates could be multiplexed on spatial domain by using same frequency resources for PUSCH. For more information, please refer to CP3 requirement defined in 5G_L2_4282_replaced([11165013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25wnk_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

L2RT shall execute MU paring algorithm from rrmMaxNumUesFdmUl UEs in to-be-scheduled list. After paring algorithm, L2RT shall re-update to-be-scheduled list. [End CB008360-D]

[CB008360-A] - Update the amount of PRBs can not be used for MU candidated UEs:

[Before CB008360-D]

  * If the UEs are not non-GBR UEs or non-GBR re-transmission UEs which are not paired in initial transmission, the PRBs allocation for them should be added to rrmPRBNumNotAvailableForMU.



[CB008360-D]

  * If the UEs are not non-GBR UEs, the PRBs allocation for them should be added to rrmPRBNumNotAvailableForMU.



[End CB008360-D]

[CB008360-B] - For the non-GBR re-transmission UE which is paired in initial transmission as virtual UE(A), and there are more than one UEs need to do the retransmision in this virtual UE(A) , only the PRBs allocated for virtual UE(A) should be added to rrmPRBNumNotAvailableForMU .

  * For example : UE1 and UE2 are paired in the initial transmission as virtual UE(A),and the number of PRB allocated to virtual UE(A) is 50 PRBs, UE1 is 50 PRBs , UE2 is 40 PRBs, UE1 and UE2 both need to do the retransmission , only the PRBs allocation for virtual UE(A) should be added to rrmPRBNumNotAvailableForMU.[End CB008360-B]



[End CB008360-A]

###### 3.30.4.8.1.0-20 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Scheduling decision considering RU limitation (ID: 12493196)

**3.30.4.8.1.0-20.0-1**  (ID: `12493198`)

Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 When NRBTS/NRCELL.actIncreaseMaxULScheduleUE is enabled, the gNB DU shall [Before PR861610-26R2] maintain a count of unique SRS [CB013895-A-UPD001]or legacy refined [End CB013895-A-UPD001] beam IDs used by the selected UEs [PR861610-26R2] count the number of UEs on SRS or refined beams [End PR861610-26R2], based on the highest TD metric priority. When the count is equal to

[Before **CB013895-A-UPD004]**

16

[**CB013895-A-UPD004]**

  * if (NRCELL.actNrRim != 0 && (RI_state=1 or RI_state=2)) )
  * 15
  * else
  * 16



**[End CB013895-A-UPD004], then gNB DU shall attempt to select UEs based on the following conditions in the order mentioned below**

  * [Before PR861610-26R2]Select the next set of UEs based on the highest TD metric, which is either on the already selected SRS [CB013895-A-UPD001] or legacy refined [End CB013895-A-UPD001] beam or SSB beam. Note: This may lead to the violation of TD metric priority-based UE selection.[End PR861610-26R2]
  * [PR861610-26R2]Select the next set of UEs based on the highest TD metric, which are on SSB beam. Note: This may lead to the violation of TD metric priority-based UE selection. [End PR861610-26R2]
  * If NRBTS/NRCELL.allowFallbackFromSRSToSSBBeam is set to true, then gNB shall select UEs [CB013895-A-UPD001] on SRS or refined beam [End CB013895-A-UPD001] with initial transmission based on TD metric priority and forcibly fallback to SSB beam corresponding to the best SRS beam. Rationale: For UEs with re-transmission, the MCS correction offset will not be applied as the MCS should be of the initial Tx in case adaptive re-transmission is not enabled. Under some conditions, reserved MCS is used for adaptive retransmission.



This forcibly fallback to SSB beam is applied only for K2 UL slot for the reception.

Fixed MCS correction offset (rdMcsCorrOffsetFallBackToSsb (see [12516914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y2s-oRblEfCV0v_Ffc8sJw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))) shall be applied on rrmUlProposedMcs(see [11131894](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD3_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) when modulation order (Qm) is greater than 2.

If rrmUlProposedMcs - rdMcsCorrOffsetFallBackToSsb >= 0

rrmUlProposedMcs = rrmUlProposedMcs - rdMcsCorrOffsetFallBackToSsb

else

No MCS correction offset shall be applied.

else no UE shall be selected into to-be-scheduled-list.

For re-transmission of UE which has fall back to SSB beam for initial transmission, irrespective of retransmission is in SSB or SRS, gNB-DU shall ensure that the same MCS as initial Tx is used when reserved MCS is not considered.

NOTE 1: UEs on SSB beam shall not be considered for MU-MIMO pairing.
