If PUSCH resources available for a UE with nonzero normalized weight allows minimum allocation, a minimum allocation with respect to rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**or rdMinPRBsAllocForDrbPriorityPugHR for a DRB priority PUG works in high reliability mode([11199477](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SLcM4PvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**or any larger minimum allocations including UCI bits see 5G_UP_ALG_4871_replaced([11196450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCepPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be taken into account and be part a book-keeping process. So that minimum allocation is fulfilled and if possible allocation wrt scheduling weight is also fullfiled.****

On top of the above, for a UE that is selected for CG overwriting (see 5G_UP_ALG_15617_replaced([11198720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwKaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on more PRBs than CG allocation, as determined at CG activation time (see 5G_UP_ALG_14664_replaced([11172802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or at CG modification time (see 5G_UP_ALG_15651_replaced([11172853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the minimum allocation is X = 1 + number of PRBs of CG allocation. [Before PR847248] Please note that this minimum number of PRBs for CG overwriting should always be available as it’s reserved in the target subarea (see 5G_UP_ALG_11420_replaced([11196526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDFrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End PR847248]

Please note that this value needs to be updated once per stage/round. The available number of PUSCH resources in the first round for rrmFdResPerRoundUl does not take the pre-allocation for the needed min resources into account. They shall be taken care of within the bookkeeping process which in detail is defined by EFS/CP3 respectively development.

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall determine the number of layer PRBs consumed (**rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and use it to keep track of the used, as well as remaining layer PRB resources (**rrmNumUsedPuschLayerPrbPerSlot, **rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of all such pre-allocations.******

An example is depicted in 5G_UP_ALG_6555_replaced([11200357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

A UE is not given more than the maximum resources it can get (5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and should be excluded from any further resource giveaways if it has already acquired this many resource. **For a virtual UE, it may have been allocated FD resources in earlier step (Fr ex. NBR, see 5G_UP_ALG_22159_replaced([11199843](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). In that case, its required PRBs (5G_UP_ALG_9548_replaced([11147793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksHn8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) should be updated accordingly so that it doesn't get more FD resources than it requires.**

Each UE **with nonzero normalized weight** , aside from UEs from higher priority classes which have already received resources from bearers other than non-GBR bearers, should get at least the minimum of the following values before the normalized weights are taken into consideration (if enough resources are available):****

\- maximum number of resources it can get described in 5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

  * after allocating FD resources to a UE in each round, gNB-DU shall determine the number of layer PRBs consumed (**rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and use it to keep track of the used, as well as remaining layer PRB resources (**rrmNumUsedPuschLayerPrbPerSlot, **rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).******

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), for a virtual UE, the layer PRB consumed by the virtual UE shall be the sum of the layer PRBs consumed by each UE(i) in the virtual UE. The number of used/required layer PRBs for a given number of PRBs can be determined using the function numReqLayerPrb defined in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Provide also the rank of the UE as input to this function. In case of a virtual UE paired with a candidate UE group, the layer PRB consumption shall be individually calculated and summed up for each UE in the candidate group. For each UEs in the virtual UE, the number of PRBs to be considered as allocated shall be as indicated in 5G_UP_ALG_9064_replaced([11200416](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * In the case that while allocating FD resources to a UE in a round, the additional required layer PRB resources (can be calculated using **numReqLayerPrb described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than the available layer PRB resources, gNB-DU shall reduce the number of FD resources allocated to the UE such that the layer PRB restriction is satisfied (5G_UP_ALG_26661_replaced([11214618](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOxYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and above mentioned minimum requried PRBs are allocated.(The maximum usable FD resources based on the currently available layer PRB resources and the UEs rank can be calculated using **numReqFdPrb described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). If such an allocation is not possible, the UE shall be skipped.****




End If

If UCI is expected to be multiplexed in an initial PUSCH transmission then the minimum amount of FD resources assigned to a UE shall be as determined in 5G_UP_ALG_4871_replaced([11196450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCepPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If UL PTRS is configured, the minimal amount of FD resources assigned to a UE shall be at least minAllowedPuschPrbUlPtrs (see 5G_UP_ALG_6845_replaced([11197403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

In addition, aggregated resources given to the UEs which active BWP is not the largest BWP shall not be given more than the total number of available RBs in their active BWP. Distributed resources to not the largest **BWP UEs shall be scaled down in order to respect that constraint.**

End if

---

Note: If UE weight for UE u is equal to 0, [image-4][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression written in a blurry, dark font against a white background. The expression is "w_u^U".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-04231728.png[/image_path][/image-4]shall be set to a positive value far less than 1._

[image-5][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15743.004.png[/image_path][/image-5]UE scheduling weight of UE u multiplied by the FD weighted metric of the UE u, namely FdWeightedMetric[u,j,t]. For FdWeightedMetric description, see [12556782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EoDCQCgjEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Note: If UE weight for UE u is equal to 0, [image-7][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15743.004.png[/image_path][/image-7]shall be set to a positive value far less than 1.

[End CB014044-N]

[image-8][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15743.005.png[/image_path][/image-8] _normalized UE weight of UE u for non-GBR bearers._

If PUSCH resources are available, each UE **with nonzero PRB share: [image-9][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15743.006.png[/image_path][/image-9] shall get a minimum allocation and record it in the bookkeeping before WRR except the below UEs:**

• UEs from higher priority classes which have already received resources from bearers other than non-GBR bearers

• UEs that are selected for CG overwriting (see 5G_UP_ALG_15617_replaced([11198720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwKaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on more PRBs than CG allocation, as determined at CG activation time (see 5G_UP_ALG_14664_replaced([11172802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or at CG modification time (see 5G_UP_ALG_15651_replaced([11172853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with the minimum allocation: X = 1 + number of PRBs of CG allocation reserved in the target subarea (see 5G_UP_ALG_11420_replaced([11196526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDFrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If no resources have been reserved, UE that is a candidate for srResp request class shall get a minimum allocation, even though the PRB share: [image-10][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15743.006.png[/image_path][/image-10] is zero.

The minimum allocation is referred to as below:

  * The minimal amount of FD resources assigned to a UE shall be as determined in 5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or determined in 5G_UP_ALG_32367_replaced([11199477](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwOEwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) for DRB priority PUG transmission in high reliablity mode.



• If UCI is expected to be multiplexed in an initial PUSCH transmission then the minimum amount of FD resources assigned to a UE shall be as determined in 5G_UP_ALG_4871_replaced([11196450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCepPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * If UL PTRS is configured, the minimal amount of FD resources assigned to a UE shall be as determined in 5G_UP_ALG_6845_replaced([11197403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11200172`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Step-2: Sort UEs in WRR

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-8.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `13444084`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs 13444084: Assignment of the number of PRBs Let I be initialized as the set of all UEs that join the WRR.

[PR879026]

If rdCgOwPrioAlloc = true (see [12807678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_HxhEcaLAEfCkxIKMlo4L6w))

Re-assign the CG OW UEs to the current subareas with the largest fit first algorithm, assuming each CG OW UE needs PRBs equal to its minimum allocation. The subarea assigned to a CG OW UE at this step is called the pre-assigned subarea of the UE.

For each subarea k, compute the number of reserved PRBs rrmReservedPrbs_k as the sum of minimum allocation for the CG OW UEs pre-assigned to subarea k.

The largest fit first algorithm finds the subarea with the largest number of free PRBs considering the reservation of minimum allocation by CG OW UEs that have already been pre-assigned.

End If

[End PR879026]

If rdCgOwPrioAlloc = true (see [12807678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_HxhEcaLAEfCkxIKMlo4L6w)), then

Sort UEs in the list I as follows:

Sort all CG overwriting UEs (denoted by I^CG) in the set of all UEs I in increasing order of PRB_u^max/Y_u as given by the function below:  
I^CG = sortUeList(I^CG, PRB_u^max/Y_u)

Sort the other UEs (denoted by I^O) in the set I as follows:  
The list is first sorted in increasing order of the BWP ‘p’ and within each BWP ‘p’ in increasing order of PRB_u^max/Y_u as given by the function below:  
I^O = sortUeList(I^O, p, PRB_u^max/Y_u)

Form the sorted UE list I _by concatenating I^CG and I^O, i.e. I_ = I^CG||I^O.

Else 

Sort UEs in the list I as follows:

The list is first sorted in increasing order of the BWP ‘ _p’ and within each BWP ‘_ p’ in increasing order of [image-0][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15745.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]as given by the function below:**

[image-1][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15745.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]

End If

where:

For FdWeightedMetric description, see [12556782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EoDCQCgjEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Else

[image-23][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.021.png[/image_path][/image-23]UE weight of UE u.

rrmRemainingSubcellPrbs: the remaining subcell PRBs for the Non-GBR bearers of initial transmission UEs (available BBRM PRBs for the Non-GBR bearers of initial transmission UEs defined in 5G_UP_ALG_9132_replaced([11200876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwS9RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) - PRBs already allocated for Non-GBR bearers of initial transmission UEs)

end if

[PR879026]

if rdCgOwPrioAlloc = true and UE u is a CG OW UE

The reserved number of PRBs in the pre-assigned subarea k for UE u (rrmReservedPrbs_k) is decreased by the minimum allocation of UE u.

PRB_u = min(PRB_u, the remaining PRBs for non-GBR bearers of initial transmission UEs in subarea k for the largest BWP - rrmReservedPrbs_k)

Note: So far, a CG OW UE must use the largest BWP as its active BWP. If a CG OW UE could use a smaller BWP as its active BWP or CG OW UEs were not the first UEs to be allocated resources in WRR, algorithm should be adapted to consider PRB reservation for the combinations of subareas and BWPs.

end if

[End PR879026]

If UE u hasn't received any FD resources and [image-24][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.022.png[/image_path][/image-24] is below the minimum PRBs mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_32767_replaced([11200141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

UE u shall be skipped in the first iteration, but kept in the list and wait for FD resource allocation in the second iteration;

end if

In the second iteration:

[image-25][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.023.png[/image_path][/image-25]

[image-26][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.024.png[/image_path][/image-26]is determined in 5G_UP_ALG_23867_replaced([11199953](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRIGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If UE u is given more than the maximum resources it can get (5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

gNB-DU shall reduce [image-27][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.025.png[/image_path][/image-27] such that UE u is given the maximum resources it can get. **Note: If UE u has already received resources from bearers other than non-GBR bearers or the minimum PRBs mentioned in step-1 (5G_UP_ALG_32767_replaced([11200141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **[image-28][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.026.png[/image_path][/image-28] shall be at least 0, otherwise [image-29][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.027.png[/image_path][/image-29] shall not be below the minimum PRBs.****

end if

[CB014045-A]

If link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is enabled ([12472235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OeKtoA1aEfCuhewgqkUVKQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and UE is power limited ([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and if rdActUlPostWrrAllocOpt ( [12575755](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ReVSYS_dEfCRMdP0Nuo3Hg)) is True, gNB-DU shall perform local PRB optimization (specified in [12495965](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6HxRIBQ8EfCph-OiSyk16Q?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) right after the WRR has distributed resources to that UE, which can happen either within the first or second iteration above.

[PR861180]

If UE forgoes some PRBs in local PRB optimization, those PRBs shall be used during redistribution of left over resources round if required.

[End PR861180]

[End CB014045-A]

[PR879026]

if rdCgOwPrioAlloc = true and the UE is a CG OW UE, allocate PRBs to the UE in the pre-assigned PUSCH subarea.

[End PR879026] 

If there are multiple PUSCH subareas, allocate PRBs to the UE in the PUSCH subarea according to 5G_UP_ALG_5004_replaced([11200368](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The available resources in a PUSCH subarea shall be updated according to 5G_UP_ALG_15096_replaced([11196984](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGwD_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

After allocating FD resources to a UE, gNB-DU shall determine the number of layer PRBs consumed (**rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and use it to keep track of the used, as well as remaining layer PRB resources (**rrmNumUsedPuschLayerPrbPerSlot, **rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).******

For a virtual UE, the layer PRB consumed by the virtual UE shall be the sum of the layer PRBs consumed by each UE(i) in the virtual UE. The number of used/required layer PRBs for a given number of PRBs can be determined using the function numReqLayerPrb defined in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Provide also the rank of the UE as input to this function. In case of a virtual UE paired with a candidate UE group, the layer PRB consumption shall be individually calculated and summed up for each UE in the candidate group. For each UEs in the virtual UE, the number of PRBs to be considered as allocated shall be as indicated in 5G_UP_ALG_9064_replaced([11200416](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If the additional required layer PRB resources for the UE u (can be calculated using **numReqLayerPrb described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than the available layer PRB resources, gNB-DU shall reduce the number of FD resources allocated to the UE such that the layer PRB restriction is satisfied (5G_UP_ALG_26597_replaced([11214606](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and WRR algorithm shall be stopped on the remaining UEs. If the minimum required PRBs mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_32767_replaced([11200141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) can't be allocated, UE u shall be skipped.**

End if

If NRCELL.nrCellType is configured to xDL8UL and NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is set to true and NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 4 and slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and numAllocCellPrb granted by BBRM is larger than maxNumPrbLimitToUsePerUlBw (5G_UP_ALG_14781_replaced([11146479](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksEkkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

rrmRemainingSubcellPrbs is reduced by [image-30][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.028.png[/image_path][/image-30].

If the additional required subcell PRB resources for the Non-GBR bearers of initial transmission of UE u is greater than rrmRemainingSubcellPrbs, gNB-DU shall reduce the number of FD resources allocated to the UE such that the subcell PRB restriction is satisfied and WRR algorithm shall be stopped on the remaining UEs. If the minimum required PRBs mentioned above can't be allocated, UE u shall be skipped.

end if

N is reduced by [image-31][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.029.png[/image_path][/image-31], **note: Before performing the subtraction, [image-32][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.030.png[/image_path][/image-32] shall be updated accordingly based on the actually allocated PRBs for the UE u.**

Compute [image-33][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.031.png[/image_path][/image-33]for the next UE in the list **specified in 5G_UP_ALG_23867_replaced([11199953](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRIGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), with the updated _N**. Note: While computing, the UE u needs to be removed** from the list since this UE u has been served in this iteration and shall no longer join the WRR further._******

Compute [image-34][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.032.png[/image_path][/image-34]for the next UE in the list, with the updated remaining PRBs for this BWP and the other nested smaller BWPs.

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = true (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Compute [image-35][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.033.png[/image_path][/image-35]for the next UE in the list, with the updated rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot.

End if

If NRCELL.nrCellType is configured to xDL8UL and NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is set to true and NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 4 and slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and numAllocCellPrb granted by BBRM is larger than maxNumPrbLimitToUsePerUlBw (5G_UP_ALG_14781_replaced([11146479](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksEkkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Compute [image-36][image_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features, text, or patterns.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.034.png[/image_path][/image-36]for the next UE in the list, with the updated rrmRemainingSubcellPrbs.

End if

**Note:**

• The resources corresponding to all the minimum allocation reserved in step-1 (see 5G_UP_ALG_32767_replaced([11200141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be excluded while calculating N, [image-37][image_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15747.035.png[/image_path][/image-37], rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot and rrmRemainingSubcellPrbs.

  * While allocating PRBs to the UE u in a PUSCH subarea, the minimum allocation shall also be included if it’s reserved in step-1 (see 5G_UP_ALG_32767_replaced([11200141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).



End For

If there are still some UEs for which the minimum allocation is reserved in step-1 (see 5G_UP_ALG_32767_replaced([11200141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), but PRBs are not allocated in a PUSCH subarea

Allocate the minimum PRBs to these UEs in a PUSCH subarea.

End if

[PR861180]

If there are still some PRBs in PUSCH subarea(s) then resources redistribution round in each PUSCH sub-area shall be performed. It is required to ensure that UEs are not given same/similar number of PRBs in resources redistribution round which UE forgoes during PRB local optimization.

[End PR861180]

**Note:**

• After WRR, a UE that is assigned to a subarea should be allocated the aggregated resources equal to or higher than the minimum PRBs mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_32767_replaced([11200141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9**  (ID: `12493290`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **Exhaustive UL scheduling**

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `12546833`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **Overview**

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13404948`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Exhaustive UL scheduling Overview.

  * Exhaustive UL scheduling NIDD activation parameter is NRCELL-actExhaustiveScheduling, with enumeration value: “UL” or “DLAndUL”.
  * Exhaustive UL scheduling active status is related with R&D parameter. See [12493184](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_eI-rERN4EfCph-OiSyk16Q?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * Exhaustive UL scheduling is applied for [CB014699-F] critical nonGBR and/or non-critical [End CB014699-F] nonGBR or equivalent priority class UEs in CS2, it replaces the legacy WRR for non-GBR initial transmission in FDM. See [11199874](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [11199907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRIEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [11199901](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [11200101](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRIHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * to-be-scheduled UEs are sorted by time domain PF metric. See [12504449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_S71BkxT2EfCV0v_Ffc8sJw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * Exhaustive UL scheduling includes multiple rounds (see [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)):
  * Determine the expected number of PRBs and assign the number of PRBs on UE active BWP in round 1 and round 2.
  * Assign the number of PRBs on PUSCH subarea.
  * Assign the number of layer PRB resource.
  * round 3, allocating leftover PRBs in a subarea as per [12629898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_h1h_ADt9EfCYiuaHdt7wgQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * The actual assignment shall be not less than the minimum required number of PRBs ([12505429](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_O5mrARUyEfCV0v_Ffc8sJw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) of the UE.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-2**  (ID: `12504449`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **Sort UEs in exhaustive ULS**

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `13348548`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UE list for exhaustive UL scheduling is first sorted in increasing order of the BWP ‘p’ and within each BWP ‘p’ in decreasing order with TD scheduling PF metric.

For MU-MIMO UE, all paired UEs in a virtual UE are with the same BWP as implied by [11146147](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksCvavvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), that BWP is taken as the BWP of the virtual UE.

For MU-MIMO UE, its PF metric for exhaustive UL scheduling is defined hereafter. It is denoted as PFvirtual.

[CB015010-B] If NRCELL.actCarPoolLaneMuPairingES is set to 'disabled' or 'DL' [End CB015010-B]

When a virtual UE is constructed as normal pairing in [11145856](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksCIUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), the concept refers to [11355535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1OvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PFvirtual is the sum of PFUEof all UEs in the virtual UE.

[CB015010-B] Else,

When a virtual UE is constructed as normal pairing in [11145856](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksCIUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), the concept refers to [11355535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1OvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PFvirtual is given by [13348508](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZXVS5eoBEfCnwLcpJWh_Zw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

[End CB015010-B]

When a virtual UE is constructed by a root UE and a candidate UE group (see[11148139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksI2BPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), the concept refers to [11355544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1PPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PFvirtual = PFroot + PFgroup.

  * PFroot = PFUE of the root UE
  * For a candidate UE group, PFgroupis max PFUE of all UEs in the group.
  * for the beam group, PFgroupis calculated by first selecting the maximum PF metric among all UEs within each beam group. Then, it is determined by sum the PF across all beam groups.
  * [CB015010-B] If NRCELL.actCarPoolLaneMuPairingES is set to 'UL' or 'DLAndUl' then further PFvirtual shall be modified as described in [13348508](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZXVS5eoBEfCnwLcpJWh_Zw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End CB015010-B]



where:

  * PFUE is the PF metric for individual UE from SU-MIMO perspective, see [11195815](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv-0NPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-3**  (ID: `12703976`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Additional evaluation whether or not apply exhaustive UL scheduling

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13482605`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Before starting exhaustive UL scheduling, gNB shall do as below to evaluate whether or not to apply exhaustive UL scheduling in current TTI.

If rdEulsAdditionalConditionCheck ([12709984](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_l58-MWXkEfCwWbD4x7Iu-g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) is 0, then decision is to apply exhaustive UL scheduling 

If rdEulsAdditionalConditionCheck is 1, then gNB shall perform as below to get decision.

  * If the number of UEs in UL pre-scheduling list is NOT equal to the number of real UEs (refer note) in round 1 list, 
  * Decision is to apply exhaustive UL scheduling.
  * Else
  * remainingPrbs = PRBremaining
  * For each UE in round 1 list,
    * If PRBumax [Before PR883396] <= [PR883396] < [End PR883396] min(PRBunMCS, remainingPrbs),
    * stop evaluation, decision is to apply exhaustive UL scheduling.
    * motivation: as at least one UE's buffer can be drained out by exhaustive UL scheduling, then we decide to apply exhaustive UL scheduling.
    * Else
    * remainingPrbs = remainingPrbs - PRBunMCS
    * If remainingPrbs <= 0, exit for loop
  * If remainingPrbs > 0, 
    * Decision is to apply exhaustive UL scheduling,
  * Else
    * Decision is NOT to apply exhaustive UL scheduling.



Note:

  * A real UE is a non-virtual UE where if N paired UEs are present in a virtual UE then the number of real UEs is counted as N.
  * Pre-scheduling list contains only real UEs. Round 1 list may contain real UEs and virtual UEs if have.
  * This requirement is referred by [1199874](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). The decision of this requirement is utilized by [1199874](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).



Refer [12533660: Expected Number of PRBs per UE Using Exhaustive UL Scheduling](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for below items

  * round 1 list
  * PRBremaining
  * PRBumax
  * PRBunMCS

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-4**  (ID: `12533660`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Expected Number of PRBs per UE Using Exhaustive UL Scheduling

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `12636262`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs

|   
---|---  
The algorithm below describes multiple rounds FDM resource assignment algorithm in exhaustive UL scheduling. Scheduler level variables * UEs list for exhaustive UL scheduling: Sorted all UEs list, see [12504449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_S71BkxT2EfCV0v_Ffc8sJw) * PRBremaining: The remaining PRBs among all the PUSCH subarea(s) across the largest BWP, it represents the remaining PRBs of the cell. * rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot: See [11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) * [CB014965-B] rrmRemainingSubcellPrbs: the remaining subcell PRBs for the nonGBR bearers of initial transmission UEs. It is set to available BBRM PRBs for the Non-GBR bearers of initial transmission UEs defined in [11200876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwS9RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [End CB014965-B] Per UE variables * PRBuallocated: the number of PRBs allocated to UE during exhaustive scheduling. It is initialized to PRBuinitial. PRBuinitial can have a non-zero value if the UE has received resources from a bearer having a higher priority class. For UEs having only non-GBR bearers, PRBuinitial=0. * PRBuremaining,s,b : Remaining PRBs in PUSCH subarea 's' in the active BWP 'b' of UE u, with all the nested smaller BWPs. PUSCH subarea 's' is the PUSCH subarea assigned to UE as [11196812](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwFh6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). * PRBuremaining,b: Remaining PRBs in the active BWP 'b' of UE u, with all the nested smaller BWPs. This is equal to sum(PRBuremaining,s,b) over all the subareas 's' that are present inside the BWP 'b'. * PRBumax-subarea,b: The number of remaining PRBs of the PUSCH subarea with the most remaining PRBs in the active BWP 'b' of UE u. * PRBusecond max-subarea,b: The number of remaining PRBs of the PUSCH subarea with the second most remaining PRBs in the active BWP 'b' of UE u. If there is only one PUSCH subarea in BWP 'b', then this value is 0. * PRBumin: the minimum PRBs required by UE u, see [12505429](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_O5mrARUyEfCV0v_Ffc8sJw) * PRBumax: the maximum number of PRBs expected by UE u, see [12533720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_hm5CABywEfCQJ5daVHVkgg) * PRBunMCS: the maximum number of PRBs that can be used by UE u to attain a PHR of 0dB. See [12533667](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_yox4gBxqEfCQJ5daVHVkgg) * PRBuinitial: the number of PRBs UE 'u' has received before E-ULS algorithm. [CB014965-B] The above variables shall also be maintained per virtual UE if it exists [End CB014965-B] Algorithm for Exhaustive Scheduling: Round 1: To calculate the number of PRBs demanded from PSD aware perspective for each UE. Its output is PRBuR1. Set PRBuR1 = 0 for all UEs in Round 1 list. Round 1 list = UEs list for exhaustive UL scheduling Round 2 list = empty list [CB014965-B-UPD002] For each UE in round 1 list, * X = 0 * If the UE is selected for CG overwriting (see [11198720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwKaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) on more PRBs than CG allocation, as determined at CG activation time (see [11172802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) or at CG modification time (see [11172853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) + X = 1 + the number of PRBs of CG allocation reserved (see [11196526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDFrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) * else if the UE is srResp request class and PRBuinitial= 0 + X = the number of PRBs that can accommodate the SR response (PayloadSr, see [11203952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwiN0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and is no smaller than PRBumin * [CB014965-B-UPD003] * else if PRBuinitial > 0 and the UE is not pinned to a subarea, + X = PRBuinitial * [End CB014965-B-UPD003] * If X > 0 + [CB014965-B-UPD003] Denote this as prioritized PRB allocation request. It will be referred in subarea assignment and resource redistribution algorithm [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) for different handling. [End CB014965-B-UPD003] + Execute the subarea assignment and resource redistribution algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) with input the number of PRBs PRBuexpected= X. The output of the algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) is denoted as PRBupre-allocated + Based on the PRBupre-allocated,update - PRBuremaining,b in all BWPs, - PRBuremaining,s,b, PRBumax-subarea,b,PRBusecond max-subarea,b + [CB014965-B-UPD003] PRBuinitial = PRBupre-allocated [End CB014965-B-UPD003] + If PRBupre-allocated < X, - remove the UE from round 1 list. [End CB014965-B-UPD002] For each UE u in Round 1 list: * If PRBremaining= 0 then exit the algorithm. * Else, if (PRBuremaining,b = 0) OR (PRBuremaining,b < PRBumin ), then skip UE 'u' * Else, + PRBumax=PRBumax - PRBuinitial + PRBumax = max(PRBumax, PRBumin), this step ensures that PRBumax is not less than PRBumin + [PR852198-26R1] PRBunMCS=max(0,( PRBunMCS - PRBuinitial))[End PR852198-26R1] + PRBunMCS = min(PRBunMCS, PRBumax), ensure PRBunMCS in valid range. + PRBunMCS= max(PRBunMCS, PRBumin), ensure PRBunMCS in valid range. + [Before PR852198-26R1] PRBunMCS=max(0,( PRBunMCS - PRBuinitial))[End PR852198-26R1] + [PR857910-26R1] + Calculate PRButarget,R1 as [13238474](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gSQpQ7-yEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) . + PRButarget,R1 = max(PRButarget,R1 , PRBumin). Ensure PRButarget,R1 in valid range. + PRButarget,R1 = max(0,( PRButarget,R1 - PRBuinitial)). + [End PR857910-26R1] + [CB014965-B-UPD002] + If UE is already pin to a subarea, - [Before PR857910-26R1] - PRBuR1 = min(PRBumax , PRBunMCS, PRBuremaining,s,b) - [PR857910-26R1] - PRBuR1 = min(PRButarget,R1, PRBuremaining,s,b) - [End PR857910-26R1] - Execute the subarea resource redistribution algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) with input PRBuexpected=PRBuR1 [Before CB014965-B-UPD003] + PRBuinitial [End CB014965-B-UPD003]. The output of the algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) is PRBuallocated - Update PRBuremaining,b in all BWPs - For the largest BWP, PRBremaining = PRBremaining - PRBuallocated - If (PRBuR1 =PRBuallocated ) and ((PRBuR1 < PRBumax)and (PRBuremaining,s,b > 0)) * PRBuR1,allocated = PRBuallocated * Add UE to Round 2 + Else, + [End CB014965-B-UPD002] - [Before PR857910-26R1] - PRBuR1 = min(PRBumax , PRBunMCS, PRBuremaining,b, PRBumax-subarea,b) - [PR857910-26R1] - PRBuR1 = min(PRButarget,R1, PRBuremaining,b, PRBuremaining,s,b) - [End PR857910-26R1] - If (PRBuR1=PRBumax)OR (PRBuR1 = PRBumax-subarea,b) * Execute the subarea assignment and resource redistribution algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) with input PRBuexpected=PRBuR1 [Before CB014965-B-UPD003] + PRBuinitial [End CB014965-B-UPD003]. The output of the algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) is PRBuallocated * Based on PRBuallocated, update PRBuremaining,b in all BWPs * Based on PRBuallocated, find the subarea within BWP 'b' with the largest possible contiguous allocation among the available PRBs and computePRBumax-subarea,b * Based on PRBuallocated, find the subarea within BWP 'b' with the second largest possible contiguous allocation among the available PRBs and computePRBusecond max-subarea,b * [CB014965-B-UPD003] For the largest BWP, PRBremaining = PRBremaining - PRBuR1[End CB014965-B-UPD003] - Else, if (PRBuR1<PRBumax)AND (PRBusecond max-subarea,b< PRBuR1 < PRBumax-subarea,b) * Execute the subarea assignment and resource redistribution algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) with input PRBuexpected=PRBuR1 [Before CB014965-B-UPD003] + PRBuinitial [End CB014965-B-UPD003]. The output of the algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) is PRBuR1,allocated. * Based on PRBuR1,allocatedupdate PRBuremaining,b in all BWPs * Based on PRBuR1,allocated find the subarea within BWP 'b' with the largest possible contiguous allocation among the available PRBs and computePRBumax-subarea,b * Based on PRBuR1,allocated find the subarea within BWP 'b' with the second largest possible contiguous allocation among the available PRBs and computePRBusecond max-subarea,b * [CB014965-B-UPD003] For the largest BWP, PRBremaining = PRBremaining - PRBuR1[End CB014965-B-UPD003] * Add UE to Round 2 - Else * Update PRBuremaining,b in all BWPs * For the largest BWP, PRBremaining = PRBremaining - PRBuR1 * Add UE to Round 2 End Round 1 Round 2: After excluding the total PRBuR1, if there are remaining PRBs, round 2 distributes the remaining PRBs in UE scheduling weight proportion. Its output is PRBuR2. Based on PRBuR1 allocated to each UE u in round 1, PRBremaining is updated. Round 2 list is sorted in increasing order of the size of UE active BWP ‘p’ and within each BWP ‘p’ in increasing order of (PRBumax,R2 / Yu), where * PRBumax,R2 = PRBumax - (PRBuR1 + PRBuinitial). For UEs that already got pinned to a subarea in round 1, PRBumax,R2 = PRBumax - PRBuR1,allocated * Yu = wu / wsum, where + wsum= sum of scheduling weights of UEs entering into round 2. + wu is UE scheduling weight for nonGBR bearers defined in [11199933](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRIFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). If Wu is equal to 0, Wu shall be set to a positive value far less than 1. + [CB014965-B] For calculating the scheduling weight of a virtual UE, refer to [11147872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksHn9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [End CB014965-B] + Note: Yu shall be computed since it does not change from its value in the beginning of the iteration * If there are multiple UEs ‘u’ within BWP ‘b’ that has the same value of PRBumax,R2, then those UEs are sorted in the increasing order of (PRBumax,R2)/Yu For each UE in sorted Round 2 list: * If PRBremaining = 0 or PRBuremaining,b = 0 , + [CB014965-B-UPD002] If UE still is not pinned to a subarea in round 1, [End CB014965-B-UPD002] - Execute the subarea assignment and resource redistribution algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) with input PRBuexpected=PRBuR1 [Before CB014965-B-UPD003] + PRBuinitial [End CB014965-B-UPD003]. The output of the algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) is PRBuallocated * Else, + **PRBuR2= min(PRBumax,R2, ceil((wu / wsum,remaining)_PRBremaining), ceil((wu / wusum,b)_PRBuremaining,b)) - where wusum,b: is the sum of scheduling weights of UEs belong to the active BWP 'b' of UE 'u' and all BWPs nested within 'b'. This calculation shall only consider UEs for which PRBumax,R2 >0\. - where wusum,remaining: is the sum of scheduling weights of remaining UEs. This calculation shall only consider UEs for which PRBumax,R2>0\. - For UE 'u' execute the subarea assignment and resource redistribution algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) with input PRBuexpected=PRBuR1 + [Before CB014965-B-UPD003] PRBuinitial +[End CB014965-B-UPD003] PRBuR2. __For UEs that already got pinned to a subarea in round 1, PRBuexpected= [Before CB014965-B-UPD003] PRBuR1,allocated +[End CB014965-B-UPD003] PRBuR2._ *The output of the algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) is PRBuallocated_***** * [CB014965-B-UPD002] If the subarea assignment and resource redistribution algorithm in [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw) is executed for the UE in round 2, then [End CB014965-B-UPD002] based on PRBuallocated, + - Update PRBuremaining,b in all BWPs which are equal to or larger in size than BWP 'b' - Update PRBuremaining,b in all BWPs which are smaller in size than BWP 'b' - For the largest BWP, PRBremaining = PRBremaining - PRBuallocated * Remove UE 'u' from the list of UEs that are maintained for resource allocation in BWP 'b'. * Re-calculate wusum,b and wusum based on current UEs in Round 2 list. This calculation shall only be done for UEs in round 2 for which PRBumax,R2>0 End Round 2 |   
|
