**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-5**  (ID: `12543746`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Subarea Assignment and Redistribution

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `12774589`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs From [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg), for each UE ‘u’, we get PRBuexpected

[Before CB014045-CA]For each UE,

[CB014045-CA]

PRBudelta = 0

If link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is enabled ([12472235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OeKtoA1aEfCuhewgqkUVKQ)) and UE is power limited ([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and rdActUlPostWrrAllocOpt ( [12575755](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ReVSYS_dEfCRMdP0Nuo3Hg)) is True and (the request is from round 2 of [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and (UE is not a virtual UE or UE is a virtual UE with single UE),

{

  * gNB-DU shall perform local optimization as [12495965](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6HxRIBQ8EfCph-OiSyk16Q), 
  * If the UE is not pinned to a subarea
    * PRBuexpected is used as input for PRB_PreOptimization.
    * PRBuallocated,assigned,b = 0
  * If the UE is already assigned to a subarea 's'
    * min(PRBuexpected, PRBuremaining,assigned,b)+PRBuallocated,assigned,b is used as input for PRB_PreOptimization. 
    * PRBuallocated,assigned,b: already allocated number of PRBs in the assigned subarea on UE 'u' active BWP 'b'
    * PRBuremaining,assigned,b: remaining number of PRBs in the assigned subarea on UE 'u' active BWP 'b'.
    * Note: PRBuexpected is the number of PRBs requested to extend in the pinned subarea. Hence, we need to add the already assigned PRBs in the pinned subarea when build input for PRB_PreOptimization.
  * The output of local optimization is PRB_Optimized.
  * If PRB_Optimized >= PRBuallocated,assigned,b, the output of local optimization in [12495965](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6HxRIBQ8EfCph-OiSyk16Q) shall be used as below to adjust PRBuexpected
  * PRBudelta = PRB_PreOptimization - PRB_Optimized
  * PRBuexpected = PRB_Optimized - PRBuallocated,assigned,b
  * If PRB_Optimized < PRBuallocated,assigned,b, the output of local optimization in [12495965](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6HxRIBQ8EfCph-OiSyk16Q) shall not be used to adjust PRBuexpected
  * PRBuexpected = PRB_PreOptimization



}

[End CB014045-CA]

  * If the UE is already assigned to a subarea 's'
  * PRBuallocated = min(PRBuexpected, PRBuremaining,assigned,b)
    * PRBuremaining,assigned,b: remaining number of PRBs in the assigned subarea on UE 'u' active BWP 'b'
  * The available resources in a PUSCH subarea shall be updated with consideration PRBuallocated .
  * Else, // UE is not pinned to a subarea yet.
  * If request from the prioritized PRB allocation specified in [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg) and the number of dedicated BWP per cell ([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) > 1 and the UE is not the smallest BWP UE (see [11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ,
    * The UE shall be preferably allocated to a PUSCH subarea that will not overlap with smaller BWP resources, if possible. For example, a 1st BWP UE shall preferable be first allocated to 1st BWP exclusive resources, second to 2nd BWP exclusive resources, and third to 3rd BWP resources, if possible.
    * PRBuallocated = min(PRBuexpected, PRBuremaining,assigned,b)
    * The available resources in a PUSCH subarea shall be updated
  * else, 
    * Choose a subarea 'k' within the active BWP 'b' of UE 'u' such that (PRBuremaining,k,b - PRBuexpected) has the smallest non-negative value. 
    * PRBuallocated=PRBuexpected
    * The available resources in a PUSCH subarea shall be updated
    * If there are no subareas 'k' within the active BWP 'b' of UE 'u' such that (PRBuremaining,k,b - PRBuexpected) is non-negative, then choose the subarea 'k' for which the absolute value of (PRBuremaining,k,b - PRBuexpected) is minimum,
    * PRBuallocated=PRBuremaining,k,b
    * The available resources in a PUSCH subarea shall be updated.
  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE 
  * After allocating FD resources to a UE, gNB-DU shall determine the number of layer PRBs consumed (rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and use it to keep track of the used, as well as remaining layer PRB resources (rrmNumUsedPuschLayerPrbPerSlot, rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
  * For a virtual UE, the layer PRB consumed by the virtual UE shall be the sum of the layer PRBs consumed by each UE(i) in the virtual UE. The number of used/required layer PRBs for a given number of PRBs can be determined using the function numReqLayerPrb defined in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Provide also the rank of the UE as input to this function. In case of a virtual UE paired with a candidate UE or a beam group, the layer PRB consumption shall be individually calculated and summed up for each UE in the candidate group or the beam group. For each UEs in the virtual UE, the number of PRBs to be considered as allocated shall be as indicated in 5G_UP_ALG_9064_replaced([11200416](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * If the used additional required layer PRB resources for the UE is greater than the available layer PRB resources, gNB-DU shall reduce the number of FD resources allocated to the UE such that the layer PRB restriction is satisfied ([11214606](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the main procedure shall be stopped on the remaining UEs and do cleanup.
  * If NRCELL.nrCellType is configured to xDL8UL and NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is set to true and NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 4 and slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and numAllocCellPrb granted by BBRM is larger than maxNumPrbLimitToUsePerUlBw (5G_UP_ALG_14781_replaced([11146479](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksEkkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * rrmRemainingSubcellPrbs is reduced by alphau * PRBuallocated
  * If the additional required subcell PRB resources for the Non-GBR bearers of initial transmission of UE u is greater than rrmRemainingSubcellPrbs, gNB-DU shall reduce the number of FD resources allocated to the UE such that the subcell PRB restriction is satisfied and WRR algorithm shall be stopped on the remaining UEs. If the minimum required PRBs mentioned above can't be allocated, UE u shall be skipped.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-6**  (ID: `12629898`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Round 3: Allocating leftover PRBs in a Subarea

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `12763474`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs This section is applicable if there are still unused PRBs available after executing the algorithm in [12533660: Expected Number of PRBs per UE Using Exhaustive UL Scheduling](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [12543746: Subarea Assignment and Redistribution](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Refer [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for the variables used in this requirement.

PRBumax,total: the maximum number of PRBs expected by UE u, see [12533720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_hm5CABywEfCQJ5daVHVkgg)

[CB014045-CA] PRBudelta : see [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [End CB014045-CA]

  * If there are subareas with unused PRBs
  * Refer to the sorted list of UEs which have received resources in [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [12543746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__-uPACGFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). These UEs are sorted in the increasing order of their BWP sizes and within a BWP are sorted in the order in which they were assigned to their corresponding subareas
    * If there are available layer and subcell-PRBs (gNB-DU shall check the layer/subcell PRBs only if the conditions for checking layer/subcell PRBs are satisfied, else the check for this condition is not needed)
    * For the first UE in the sorted list, if there are unused PRBs in its subarea 's' within its BWP 'b' [CB014045-CA] and PRBuremaining,s,b > PRBudelta and PRBuallocated< PRBumax-total[End CB014045-CA], then update its PRBuallocated as
      * PRBuallocated = min(PRBumax,total, PRBuallocated+PRBuremaining,s,b)
      * Update the remaining layer and subcell PRBs and the subarea where the UE was allocated
      * [CB014045-CA]If PRBudelta> 0, recalculate the MCS for PRBuallocated. [End CB014045-CA]
    * Remove the UE from the list
    * Exit the algorithm if there are no remaining layer or subcell PRBs or there are no subareas with unused PRBs, else move to the next UE.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-7**  (ID: `12505429`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **Minimum number of PRBs required in exhaustive UL scheduling**

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `12636290`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs This requirement defines the minimum number of PRBs required by UE in exhaustive UL scheduling.

[CB014965-B] For MU-MIMO UE, see [12546438](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_RtUGoSMFEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [End CB014965-B]

For SU-MIMO, see hereafter. 

For below cases, minimum required PRBs is 0

  * Case1: UEs from higher priority classes which have already received resources from bearers other than non-GBR bearers.
  * Case2: UEs that are selected for CG overwriting (see [11198720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwKaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) on more PRBs than CG allocation, as determined at CG activation time (see [11172802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) or at CG modification time (see [11172853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) with the minimum allocation: X = 1 + number of PRBs of CG allocation reserved in the target subarea (see [11196526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDFrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))



For the other cases, the minimum required PRBs = max(A, B, C)

  * A: The minimal required PRBs as determined in [11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * B: The minimum required PRBs as determined in [11196450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCepPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [11196591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDsuvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) if UCI is expected to be multiplexed in an initial PUSCH transmission.
  * C: The minimal required PRBs as determined in [11197403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) if UL PTRS is configured.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-8**  (ID: `12546438`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **Minimum number of PRBs required in exhaustive UL scheduling for MU-MIMO UE**

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12546439`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Given a virtual UE vu, its minimum number of PRBs required in exhaustive UL scheduling is denoted as PRBvumin.

When a virtual UE is constructed as normal pairing in [11145856](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksCIUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), the concept refers to [11355535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1OvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PRBvumin is max PRBumin of all UEs in the virtual UE.

When a virtual UE is constructed by a root UE and a candidate UE group (see[11148139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksI2BPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), the concept refers to [11355544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1PPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PRBvumin is the maximum value of PRBvuroot,min and PRBvugroup,min.

  * PRBvuroot,min = PRBumin of root UE 'u'
  * For a candidate UE group, PRBvugroup,minis sum of PRBjmin for all UEs 'j' such that 'j' belongs to the candidate group of virtual UE vu
  * [CB008235-D-UPD003] For a beam group, PRBvugroup,minis determined in two steps: 
  * First, for each beam group, calculate the beam group(k)'s minimum PRB by summing the minimum number of PRBs allocated to each UE within this beam group(j). 
  * Then, among all beam groups, select the maximum value of thesebeam group's minimum PRBs decided in last step.[End CB008235-D-UPD003]



where:

  * PRBumin is the minimum number of PRBs required in exhaustive UL scheduling for UE 'u' from SU-MIMO perspective. see [12505429](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_O5mrARUyEfCV0v_Ffc8sJw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-9**  (ID: `12533720`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **Maximum number of PRBs expected in exhaustive UL scheduling**

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-9.0-2**  (ID: `12623178`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs This requirement defines the maximum number of PRBs expected in exhaustive UL scheduling. 

For SU-MIMO UE 'u', it is denoted PRBumax within this requirement. It is defined as [11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [11201086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwULYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). 

[CB014965-B]

For a MU-MIMO UE, the maximum number of PRBs expected in exhaustive UL scheduling is denoted as PRBvumax, where vu denotes the virtual UE.

When a virtual UE is constructed as normal pairing in [11145856](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksCIUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), the concept refers to [11355535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1OvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PRBvumax is max PRBkmax of all UEs 'k' in the virtual UE vu.

When a virtual UE is constructed by a root UE and a candidate UE group (see[11148139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksI2BPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), the concept refers to [11355544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1PPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PRBvumax is max of PRBvuroot,max and PRBvugroup,max.

  * PRBvuroot,max = PRBimax of the root UE 'i' in vu
  * For a candidate UE group, PRBvugroup,maxis sum of PRBjmax U for all UEs 'j' in the candidate group for vu.



[End CB014965-B]

  * [CB008235-D-UPD003]
  * For a beam group, PRBvugroup,maxis decided by the following steps. 
  * First, for each beam group(k), compute the total number of PRBs by summing the PRBs over all of UEs within the same beam group(k).
  * Then, among all beam groups, select the maximum number of PRBs and denote it as N.
  * If N exceeds the maximum number of PRBs available for PUSCH, update N to that maximum available value.
  * Finally, set PRBvugroup,max = N.
  * [End CB008235-D-UPD003]

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-10**  (ID: `13238474`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Target number of PRBs expected in Round 1

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `13238484`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs This requirement defines the target number of PRBs expected in exhaustive UL scheduling round 1 ([12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). It is denoted as PRBuetarget,R1.

For SU-MIMO UE 'u', PRButarget,R1 = min(PRBumax, PRBunMCS) 

Where:

  * PRBumax: see[11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [11201086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwULYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * PRBunMCS: see[12533667](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_yox4gBxqEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)



For a MU-MIMO UE (virtual UE) 'vu', 

  * When a virtual UE is constructed as normal pairing in [11145856](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksCIUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) (the concept refers to [11355535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1OvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), PRBvutarget,R1is minimum of PRBktarget,R1 of all UEs 'k' in the virtual UE vu.
  * When a virtual UE is constructed by a root UE and a candidate UE group (see [11148139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksI2BPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), the concept refers to [11355544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1PPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), PRBvutarget,R1 = min(PRBvuroot,target,R1 , PRBvucand_group,target,R1).
  * PRBvuroot,target,R1 = PRBitarget,R1of the root UE 'i' in vu
  * For a candidate UE group, PRBvucand_group,target,R1is sum of PRBjtarget,R1 for all UEs 'j' in the candidate group for vu.

  * For a beam group paring (the concept refers to [11355544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1PPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), PRBvutarget,R1is decided by the following steps. 

  * First, for each beam group(k), compute PRBvugroup(k),target,R1, which is sum of PRBjtarget,R1 for all UEs 'j' in the group(k).
  * Then, N = minimum of PRBvugroup(k),target,R1 of all beam group(k) of vu.
  * N = min(N, the maximum number of PRBs available for PUSCH)
  * Finally, set PRBvutarget,R1 = N.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-11**  (ID: `12533667`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **Number of PRBs associated with 0dB PH (power headroom)**

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-11.0-2**  (ID: `12636295`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs This requirement defines the number of PRBs associated with 0dB PH (power headroom). It is referred by exhaustive UL scheduling as PRBunMCS for UE 'u' in [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). It is taken as the maximum number of PRBs associated with the max MCS can be achieved under UE radio condition.

[CB014965-B] For MU-MIMO UE, see [12540123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qUr-ACDhEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). [End CB014965-B]

For SU-MIMO UE, it is denoted as rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh.

[Before PR860523-26R1]

rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh = floor( 10^ ((rrmPhr[i,j,tPHR] + rdEulsPrbOffset0dBPhr )/ 10)) * rrmNumPuschPrb[i,j,tPHR])

[PR860523-26R1]

rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh = floor( 10^ ((rrmPhr[i,j,tPHR] + eulsOffsetToPh0dB)/ 10)) * rrmNumPuschPrb[i,j,tPHR])

[End PR860523-26R1]

where:

  * i: Index of the UE
  * j: Index of the carrier
  * tPHR: Time (UL slot) the PHR is received last
  * rrmNumPuschPrb[i,j,tPHR]: Number of PUSCH PRBs allocated for the UE in the slot where PHR is received.
  * rrmPhr[i,j,tPHR]: Received Power Headroom Report
  * [Before PR860523-26R1]
  * [Before CB014965-B-UPD002] rdEulsPrbOffset0dBPhr (defined in [12565115](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DyQrQCu8EfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [CB014965-B-UPD002] rdEulsPrbOffset0dBPhrFddFr1 (defined in [12565115](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DyQrQCu8EfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for FDD, rdEulsPrbOffset0dBPhrTddFr1 (defined in [12703926](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-1E10F7PEfCLrcnPCspVyQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for TDD FR1 [End CB014965-B-UPD002]: Offset used modifying rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh to account for any channel irregularities
  * [PR860523-26R1]
  * eulsOffsetToPh0dB: NIDD parameter NRCELL.eulsOffsetToPh0dB
  * [End PR860523-26R1]



If NRCELL-actExhaustiveScheduling is “UL” or “DLAndUL”, then rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh shall be calculated with reception of each PHR and is valid until the next valid and in sequence PHR is received. PHR reports, which are received out of sequence due to HARQ retransmissions, are obsolete for rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh calculation.

rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh shall be set to the number of PRBs of cell bandwidth before PHR is received.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-12**  (ID: `12540123`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **Number of PRBs associated with 0dB PH for MU-MIMO UE**

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-3.0-9.0-12.0-1**  (ID: `12540124`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs This requirement defines the concept of the number of PRBs associated with 0dB PH for MU-MIMO UE. It is denoted as rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPhMuMimo. 

When a virtual UE is constructed normal pairing as in [11145856](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksCIUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), the concept refers to [11355535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1OvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPhMuMimo is max rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh of all UEs in the virtual UE.

When a virtual UE vu is constructed by a root UE and a candidate UE group (see[11148139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksI2BPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), the concept refers to [11355544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucR1PPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPhMuMimo is max value of PRBvuroot and PRBvugroup.

  * PRBvuroot,nMCS = root UE rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh
  * For a candidate UE group, PRBvugroupis sum of rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh for all UEs in the group.
  * [CB008235-D-UPD003] If at least one beam group is included in this virtual UE vu,PRBvugroup is defined as the maximum total PRB among all beam groups, where each beam group’s total PRB is the sum of rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh assigned to all UEs in that group. [End CB008235-D-UPD003]



where:

  * rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh: see [12533667](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_yox4gBxqEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)



rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPhMuMimo shall be calculated based on need from exhaustive UL scheduling defined in [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-4**  (ID: `11200325`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Weighted Round Robin algorithm for initial transmission Non-GBR UE

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11200351`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs 11200351: Assignment of the number of PRBs **In this requirement, all UEs should be** virtual UEs if it satisfies the requirement in 5G_UP_ALG_8852_replaced([11146317](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksD9g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and schedule weights shall be the virtual UE' schedule weight(5G_UP_ALG_9548_replaced([11147793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksHn8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), or UEs if it doesn't satisfy the requirement in 5G_UP_ALG_8852_replaced([11146317](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksD9g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The Weighted Round Robin (WRR) algorithm has following input values:  The number of UEs **and virtual** UEs** _*  Normalized scheduling weight (NSW)_ *(5G_UP_ALG_4999_replaced([11199901](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and 5G_UP_ALG_9548_replaced([11147793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksHn8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**  The maximum allocation for possible per UE (dependent on buffer-status and proposed max PRB allocation value from LA etc, see 5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  The minimum allocation for the UE **_*[CNI-127997]_**_If_ _NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg != LegacyRange_lowComplexityWrr and NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg !=__ExtendedRange_lowComplexityWrr_** __**_[End CNI-127997]_**_The step-size rrmFdResPerRoundUl (5G_UP_ALG_4999_replaced([11199901](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) _**_[CNI-127997]_**_If_ *NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg != LegacyRange_lowComplexityWrr and NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg != **ExtendedRange_lowComplexityWrr** _*_**_[End CNI-127997]_**_The basic idea of the WRR is depicted below in figure 5G_UP_ALG_5002_replaced([11200325](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-1. The maximum value of normalized weight of all UEs _*and virtual UEs defines the number of rounds (Nrounds) the WRR has to take.** _N_ rounds _= max(_ NSW _UEi) for all UEs_ _and_ _virtual UEs i_** _*_**_The step-size (rrmFdResPerRoundUl) defines the amount of PRBs a UE or a virtual UE is to be scheduled each time the algorithm choses this UE or_ _virtual UE as long this additional allocation is needed with respect to the needed/supported allocation of this UE or virtual UE. (Please note that in case of expected UCI bits being piggybacked, the first allocation might be slightly differently, 5G_UP_ALG_4999_replaced([11199901](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). This allocation is then subtracted from the available resources. The normalized weight of a UE determines how often this UE is chosen.__[image-0][image_desc]The image displays a circular diagram illustrating a scheduling process for User Equipments (UEs) across three rounds. The diagram is divided into eight segments, each representing a UE, labeled UE1 through UE8. The segments are colored differently to indicate their normalized scheduling weights. *__UE1_ _is yellow, representing a normalized scheduling weight of 3. *__UE4, UE5, and UE7_ _are green, representing a normalized scheduling weight of 2. *__UE2, UE3, UE6, and UE8_ _are grey, representing a normalized scheduling weight of 1. The scheduling process is described in three rounds: *__First Round:__All UEs are scheduled. *__Second Round:__UEs with a normalized scheduling weight greater than or equal to 2 are scheduled. This includes UE1 (weight 3) and UE4, UE5, UE7 (weight 2). *__Third Round:__UEs with a normalized scheduling weight greater than or equal to 3 are scheduled. This includes only UE1 (weight 3). The diagram also shows a "Random Start Point" indicated by an arrow pointing to UE1. Curved arrows connect the UEs in a cyclical manner, suggesting a potential flow or interaction between them. A yellow outer circle encloses the entire diagram. The text extracted from the image is: 3rd Round, UEs with normalized schedulingweight >=3 are scheduled (here only UE1 is scheduled) Random Start Point First Round, everybody gets scheduled 2nd Round, UEs with normalized schedulingweight >=2 are scheduled Grey UEs normalized scheduling weight = 1 (UE2, UE3, UE6, UE8) Green UEs normalized scheduling weight = 2 (UE4, UE5, UE7) Yellow UEs normalized scheduling weight = 3 (UE1)[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15750.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] [image-1][image_desc]The image is a bar chart with a black background and blue bars. The x-axis is labeled "UE Number" and ranges from 1 to 8. The y-axis is labeled "xtimes mmmFoRes PorRoundu" and ranges from 0 to 3. The bars represent the following values: \- UE Number 1: 3 \- UE Number 2: 1 \- UE Number 3: 1 \- UE Number 4: 2 \- UE Number 5: 2 \- UE Number 6: 1 \- UE Number 7: 2 \- UE Number 8: 1[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15750.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] Figure 5G_UP_ALG_5002_replaced([11200325](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-1: Example for the WRR- algorithm In the example pictured in figure 5G_UP_ALG_5002_replaced([11200325](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-1 we have 8 virtual UEs, belonging either to normalized scheduling weight (NSW) 1, 2 or 3. As a result virtual UE1 (NSW=3) gets three times rrmFdResPerRoundUl resources (ideally) as virtual UE2 who has NSW=1. The algorithm stops if either all the resources are distributed or if Nrounds loops were executed. Please note that last virtual UE being scheduled might get the residual free resources if rrmFdResPerRoundUl cannot be provided. Additionally, if a virtual UE has reached its maximum amount of resources dependent on its buffer status or the maximum amount of PRBs it supports, it is taken out of the scheduling 5G_UP_ALG_9548_replaced([11147793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksHn8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). After the WRR algorithm is finished in case of multiple PUSCH sub-areas 5G_UP_ALG_5004_replaced([11200368](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is executed or otherwise 5G_UP_ALG_5007_replaced([11200389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). _**_[CNI-127997]_**_else Allocating PRBs to a UE or virtual UE in a PUSCH subarea is performed during resource assignment specified in 5G_UP_ALG_32596_replaced([11200136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). After WRR algorithm specified in 5G_UP_ALG_32596_replaced([11200136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) stops, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_5007_replaced([11200389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for allocating unused PRBs. end if _**_[End CNI-127997]_** * In addition , all the UEs in one virtual UEs has the same PRB number and same PRB position. File: WRR_PUSCH_Resource_Alloc.pptx Folder:

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-5**  (ID: `11200357`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Scheduling Example for the WRR and multiple Rounds

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11200363`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Example1: UE0: SW1, Min Allocation=3 PRBs, UE1: SW=3, Min Allocation=6 PRBs, 23 PRBs to allocate |  |  |   
|  |  |   
| ue_0 | ue_1 |   
min required prbs | 3 | 6 | <\-- depends on uci bits  
R1 | 2 | 0 | prbsPerRound = min(1, floor(23 / (1 + 3))) = 5 //  
|  | 4 | <\-- resourcesToDistribute = prbsPerRound > minPrbs ? prbsPerRound - minPrbs: 0  
|  | 5 | Update minPrbs  
R2 | 1 | 1 | <\-- prbsPerRound = min(1, floor(3 / (1 + 3))) = 1 // 1. re-calculate prbsPerRound, 2. changing the red part to 1  
|  | 1 |   
total | 6 | 17 | ue_0 : ue_1 = 6 : 17, expected  
|  |  |   
|  |  |   
Example2: UE0: SW1, Min Allocation=7 PRBs, UE1: SW=3, Min Allocation=3, 23 PRBs to allocate |  |  |   
|  |  |   
| ue_0 | ue_1 |   
min required prbs | 7 | 3 | <\-- depends on uci bits  
R1 | 0 | 2 | prbsPerRound = min(1, floor(23 / (1 + 3))) = 5 //  
|  | 5 | <\-- resourcesToDistribute = prbsPerRound > minPrbs ? prbsPerRound - minPrbs: 0  
|  | 5 | Update minPrbs  
R2 | 0 | 1 | <\-- prbsPerRound = min(1, floor(1 / (1 + 3))) = 1 // 1. re-calculate prbsPerRound, 2. changing the red part to 1  
|  |  |   
total | 7 | 16 | ue_0 : ue_1 = 7: 16, expected due to min allocation

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-6**  (ID: `11200368`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs For multi PUSCH areas

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-6.0-5**  (ID: `13322856`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs For multiple PUSCH subareas: **If a UE** or a virtual UE **is given as many resources as or more resources than the maximum available resources in a PUSCH subarea for the BWP to be considered for the UE allocation (see 5G_UP_ALG_4879_replaced([11196950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGwCPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):******

1- [PR863105-26R2] If rdCgOwPrioAlloc = False (see [12807678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_HxhEcaLAEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), [End PR863105-26R2] Give the UE or the virtual UE exactly that maximum amount of resources and allocate the UE or the virtual UE **to the corresponding PUSCH subarea**.

[PR863105-26R2] Else, give the UE or the virtual UE exactly that maximum amount of resources

End If

The PUSCH subarea shall not be considered in the counting of maximum amount of resources available for a UE or a virtual UE.

[End PR863105-26R2]

UE or the virtual UE **shall be excluded from any further resource giveaways.**

2- Excess resources are returned to the pool of free resources for re-distribution to other UEs **or other virtual UEs.**

3- Update the maximum available resources in a PUSCH subarea for any BWP. Check if another UE or virtual UE is already given more than this new value. If yes, repeat step 1.

4- For the virtual UE(A) constructed by the UE group (5G_UP_ALG_9690_replaced([11148139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksI2BPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or beam group (5G_UP_ALG_29211_replaced([11149207](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksMgcvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if at least one NBR UE is involved in beam group(i) and the total sum of `numberOfDistributedResources` ([12549048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jCe0QSQZEfCNjfqfyUlvmw)) over all UEs in this beam group(i) exceeds the available PRBs (which is defined as the maximum PUSCH PRB across all subareas), L2RT shall distribute the resources according to [12553426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EXqIACUREfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9); Otherwise L2RT shall distribute resources according to [11200922](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwS9SvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

5- For the SU-MIMO UE, if the maximum available resources in a PUSCH subarea for the BWP can’t even satisfy the minimum number of PRBs for this UE, L2RT shall skip to schedule. If rdCgOwPrioAlloc = True (see [12807678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_HxhEcaLAEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), this should not happen for UEs selected for CG overwriting, because such UEs are prioritized in resource distribution (see [11199874](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). 

[PR881855]

6- If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), If the number of cell PRBs allocated to a paired UE to a virtual UE during the inner loop was reduced successfully, gNB-DU shall update the number of cell PRBs and layer PRBs consumed (**rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and use it to keep track of the used cell PRB and layer PRBs, as well as remaining layer PRB resources (**rrmNumUsedPuschLayerPrbPerSlot, **rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of all such pre-allocations.******

[End PR881855]  


**Note:**

• If gNB is using exhaustive scheduling in uplink for ([11199874](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), 

Allocating PRBs to a UE or virtual UE in a PUSCH subarea is performed during resource assignment specified in [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

• Else, If **NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg = LegacyRange_lowComplexityWrr** **or ExtendedRange_lowComplexityWrr**

Allocating PRBs to a UE or virtual UE in a PUSCH subarea is performed during resource assignment specified in 5G_UP_ALG_32596_replaced([11200136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[PR863105-26R2]

  * The above algorithm ensures that under the condition rdCgOwPrioAlloc = True, a UE or a virtual UE that is allocated the same amount of resources as the maximum available resources in a PUSCH subarea shall not be pre-assigned to the subarea. This guarantees that CG overwriting UEs of small allocation shall be prioritized in sub-area assignment and all CG overwriting UEs shall be assigned to subareas which still have enough free resources for the required minimum allocation, as CG UEs must be scheduled in the current slot ([11199874](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).



[End PR863105-26R2]

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-7**  (ID: `11200389`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs The algorithm stops and the output of the algorithm

---

**3.30.6.1.0-20.0-7.0-4**  (ID: `11200410`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs **[CB014965-A] If gNB performs exhaustive UL scheduling as ([11199874](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), [12533660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_96eogRxlEfCQJ5daVHVkgg)) in current slot, then the algorithm defined in this requirement shall be skipped. **[End CB014965-A]****

The algorithm stops if either:

  * all UEs with initial transmission have been allocated the maximum amount of resources they can get (5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * or all the available resources have been allocated.

  * or all available Layer PRB resources have been allocated, in case slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE **(5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**

  * or all available subcell resources have been allocated as per 5G_UP_ALG_9132_replaced([11200876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwS9RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).




**[CNI-127997]**

> If **NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg = LegacyRange_lowComplexityWrr** or NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg = ExtendedRange_lowComplexityWrr****

After WRR algorithm specified in 5G_UP_ALG_32596_replaced([11200136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) stops, there is a possibility that some PRBs are unused which can be distributed to the most deserving candidate. The deserving candidates are sorted as in 5G_UP_ALG_32769_replaced([11200172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvKfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). gNB-DU shall assign these unused PRBs to the top ranked UE that has not yet reached maximum required PRBs (see 5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), in the case that while assigning unused PRBs to a UE, the additional required layer PRB resources are greater than the available layer PRB resources, gNB-DU shall reduce the number of FD resources allocated to the UE such that the layer PRB restriction is satisfied, and the assignment shall be stopped for any further remaining UEs.

else

**[End CNI-127997]**

If there are still UEs not allocated to a PUSCH subarea at the end of resource distribution then

**\- Starting with the UEs to be allocated in the smallest BWP**

  * For the UE with the most resources to be allocated in the considered BWP:

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * Determine the number of PRBs available for use with this UE using the function "numReqFdRb" defined in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by providing the UEs rank as an input.

  * The number of PRBs determined above shall be used as the maximum required PRBs for the UE in the further steps.

  * If the UE is given as many resources as or more resources than the maximum available resources in a PUSCH subarea for the considered BWP:

  * Give the UE exactly that maximum amount of resources and allocate the UE to the corresponding PUSCH subarea.

  * Else

  * Allocate the UE to the PUSCH subarea with the least PRBs available for the considered BWP just above the needed resources.

  * Update the maximum available resources in a PUSCH subarea for any BWP and find the next UE with most resources to be allocated in the considered BWP. If no more UEs are to be allocated in the considered BWP, check the UEs to be allocated in the next smallest BWP

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * Update the remaining layer PRBs after allocating the resources to the UE.

  * Repeat until all UEs are allocated to a PUSCH subarea.




End if

The output of the algorithm is the amount of resources (PRBs) each initial transmission UE will get from the available resources (for all bearers) **and a mapping between UEs and each PUSCH subarea.**

If UCI is expected to be multiplexed in an initial PUSCH transmission then the minimum amount of FD resources assigned to a UE shall be as determined in 5G_UP_ALG_4871_replaced([11196450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCepPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) condition (7).

Note: The UEs above shall also include the virutal UEs.

The expression is written in a dark font on a light background. The expression is "N_{vUE(A)}^{FDAlloc}". The subscript "vUE(A)" is below and to the right of the "N", and the superscript "FDAlloc" is above and to the right of the "N".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.002.png[/image_path][/image-7]≥ the total number of distributed PRBs ([12549048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jCe0QSQZEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) in the dedicated MU-MIMO layer i, gNB shall follow requirement [11200922](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwS9SvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9); \+ Else, after gNB completes step1 in requirement [11200922](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwS9SvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), gNB shall drop certain UEs based on [12794577](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IG4YI5eWEfC7Wp-sWxcfJw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)before executing next step in [11200922](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwS9SvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). * Case 2: For MU-MIMO layer i, if [CB014699-E] critical nonGBR UE doesn't exist and [End CB014699-E] at least one non-GBR UE on this layer has NBR category: \+ If [image-8][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written in a dark font on a light background. The expression is "N_{vUE(A)}^{FDAlloc}". The subscript "vUE(A)" is below and to the right of the "N", and the superscript "FDAlloc" is above and to the right of the "N".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.002.png[/image_path][/image-8]≥ the total number of distributed PRBs ([12549048)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jCe0QSQZEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) in the dedicated MU-MIMO layer i, gNB shall follow requirement [11200922](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwS9SvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9); \+ Else, gNB shall follow requirement [12553426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EXqIACUREfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/bi_exqiacurefcnjfqfyulvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9") [CB014699-E] * Case 3: For MU-MIMO layer i, if there is at least one critical non-GBR UE: \+ If [image-9][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written in a dark font on a light background. The expression is "N_{vUE(A)}^{FDAlloc}". The subscript "vUE(A)" is below and to the right of the "N", and the superscript "FDAlloc" is above and to the right of the "N".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.002.png[/image_path][/image-9]≥ the total PRB number required by critical nonGBR UEs in the dedicated MU-MIMO layer i, gNB shall allocate required PRBs to critical nonGBR UEs, and the remaining resource is allocated to non-critical nonGBR UEs with/without NBR category according to above case 1 or case 2 respectively while the FD allocation PRB number for virtual UE(A) is replaced as[image-10][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is: $N_{vUE(A)}^{FDAlloc} - \sum_{i} \alpha_i * N_{UE(i)}^{req}$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/046fea35-b28f-4245-bd5b-4707722aa880.png[/image_path][/image-10] where i is the index of critical nonGBR UE and other parameters are same as defined above; \+ Else, gNB shall allocate the remaining resource is allocated among critical nonGBR UE(s) follow requirement [13424191](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_f_lCgRjCEfGX7t-UNMeXGQ); [End CB014699-E] After the PRB allocation in the above all procedures are done for each UE in the virtual UE, L2RT shall perform [13317259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_V9GzktAqEfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) to allocate PRBs for DFT-s-OFDM UEs within the Candidate Group or within a Beam Group The starting PRB index [image-11][image_desc]The image contains the text "StartPrbUE(i)". The text is in a dark color against a light background. The font is a sans-serif font. The text is slightly blurred.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.009.png[/image_path][/image-11] of UE(i) is as following: [image-12][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is: StartPrb$_{UE(i)}$ = StartPrb$_{UE(i-1)}$ + N$_{UE(i-1)}^{sch}$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.010.png[/image_path][/image-12], where [image-13][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is "NschUE(i-1)". The "sch" is a superscript to the "N", and "UE" is a subscript to the "N". The "(i-1)" is also a subscript to the "N".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.011.png[/image_path][/image-13] is the scheduled PRB number of UE(i-1) which is calculated in the above description. NOTE: * For the starting PRB position of the 1st UE in the candidate UE group, it shall be aligned with the starting PRB position of the virtual UE. Otherwise if root UE paired with normal UEs (each MU-MIMO layer contains at most one UE) 1\. If all UEs within the virtual UE are CP-OFDM UEs, then the number of PRBs for each UE(i), which shall be reported to the UE via DCI and notified to gNB L1, shall be calculated as follows: [image-14][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is: $N_{UE(i)}^{sch} = \min(\alpha_i * N_{UE(i)}^{req}, N_{UE(A)}^{NFDAlloc})$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.012.png[/image_path][/image-14] , where * [image-15][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is "N req UE(i)". The "req" is a superscript to the "N", and "UE(i)" is a subscript to the "N".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.013.png[/image_path][/image-15] is the required PRB number for UE(i) (see 5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_5016_replaced([11201086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwULYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), * [image-16][image_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression $N_{vUE(A)}^{FDAlloc}$. The text is rendered in a mathematical font with subscripts and superscripts. The background is white and the text is black with a subtle shadow effect.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.014.png[/image_path][/image-16] is the FD allocation PRB number for virtual UE(A) * [image-17][image_desc]The image is a blurry, low-resolution close-up of a logo. The logo appears to be a stylized representation of the letters "Q" and "i". The "Q" is formed by a circle with a tail, and the "i" is a vertical line with a dot above it. The colors in the logo are a mix of blue, yellow, and brown, with some white highlights. The overall impression is that of a modern, abstract design.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15768.015.png[/image_path][/image-17] is the compensation factor refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9571_replaced([11148009](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksI2APvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 2\. If all UEs within the virtual UE are DFT-s-OFDM UEs, then the number of PRBs for each UE(i) shall be decided as follows: Nue(i) = max {n | n <= NschUE(i), 12_n = 2a3b5c}, where NschUE(i)is the PRB number allocation for UE(i). 3\. If the UEs within the virtual UE are mixed waveform UEs, then for DFT-s-OFDM UEs, the PRB number shall satisfy the same rule above. For CP-OFDM UEs, there are no limitations. After the PRB allocation in the above all procedures are done for each UE in the virtual UE, L2RT shall perform [13317259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_V9GzktAqEfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) to allocate PRBs for DFT-s-OFDM UEs. End **NOTE:** * For re-transmission UE, which is scheduled with the MCS of the initial transmission , the scheduled PRB number for this UE in re-transmission shall be equal to the scheduled PRB number in initial transmission traffic with the same harq process ID . * For a retransmission using a reserved MCS, the needed amount of PRB for the adaptive retransmission is given by 5G_UP_ALG_11970_replaced([11202476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwdVX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), after allocating FD resources to each UE in the virtual UE (including UEs that are part of a candidate UE group), gNB-DU shall determine the number of layer PRBs consumed (**rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and use it to keep track of the used, as well as remaining layer PRB resources (**rrmNumUsedPuschLayerPrbPerSlot, **rrmRemainingPuschLayerPrbPerSlot described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).****_* In the case that while allocating FD resources to a UE, the additional required layer PRB resources (can be calculated using_ *numReqLayerPrb described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than the available layer PRB resources, gNB-DU shall reduce the number of FD resources allocated to the UE such that the layer PRB restriction is satisfied (5G_UP_ALG_26661_replaced([11214618](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOxYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).(The maximum usable FD resources based on the currently available layer PRB resources and the UEs rank can be calculated using **numReqFdPrb described in 5G_UP_ALG_26582_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The remaining UEs in the virtual UE shall be skipped.**** If the UE under consideration is a reTx UE and it requires more layer PRBs than what is currently available, such a UE shall also be skipped.
