#### 3.30.6.1.0-29 Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL GBR Load for Radio Admission Control (RAC) (ID: 11201171)

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-1**  (ID: `11201176`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL VoNR PRB Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11201204`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall provide a VoNR UL PRB load indication to C-Plane as follows except the SDL cells:

Activation: GBR Admission Control mode = 1; where

\- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 1)

Metric:

-Scope: per cell

-Units: percent

-Definition:

  * avgGbrPrbLoad(T) =Floor[ nPrb_used(T) / nPrb_usable(T)] ; where:

  * nPrb_used(T) = number of PRBs assigned for PUSCH Transport blocks that include 5QI-1 GBR bearers, up to time instant T




IF slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

  * nPrb_usable(T) = the number of potential Usable PRB for PUSCH for any DRB up to time instant T. The amount of potential PUSCH PRBs per slot is determined from the number of maximum potential PUSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr (5G_UP_ALG_13373_replaced([11201352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PUSCH allocation in that slot;



ELSE

  * nPrb_usable(T) = number of PRBs usable by L2-PS for PUSCH for any DRB, up to time instant T



END

Report:

  * Reported load: avgGbrPrbLoad(T)



\- Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

  * Using GBR PRB load report field existing prior to 22R3. Second GBR PRB load report field (new in 22R3) is set to 0%



Exceptions:

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 0 or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 1: see 5G_UP_ALG_8172_replaced([11201209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUycfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * If there are no GBR bearers, avgGbrPrbLoad(T) = 0%

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.

  * PRBs not available for PUSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”

  * If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

  * nPrb_usable(T) = number of PRBs available per slot for PUSCH of ith , where i ϵ {n-1, n} and is the index for smallest dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the value of nPrb_usable(T) of the ith BWP is determined from the maximum number of potential PUSCH PRB per slot of the ith BWP is determined from the maximum number of potential PUSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr_i (5G_UP_ALG_13373_replaced([11201352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PUSCH allocation in that slot;

  * nPrb_used(T) = number of PRBs assigned for PUSCH Transport blocks which are in the ith BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {n-1, n} and is the index for smallest dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  
NOTE: Not the active BWP of the UE (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is considered here but if allocated resources reside in the smallest BWP.




Initializations:

  * avgGbrPrbLoad(T) is reset to 0% at start of every measurement period T



Inputs:

  * T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval



Notes:

  * When GBR Admission Control mode = 1: PRB load report is for VoNR only (5QI-1). Intent is to maintain existing PRB load report method as is, even after introduction of CB008379. For DL GBR PRB load reporting which includes all GBR 5QIs (including 5QI-1), see 5G_UP_ALG_8172_replaced([11201209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUycfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * For PRB allocations for transport blocks with mixed traffic types, a proportional scheme is used for deriving nPrb_used(t).

  * nPrb_used(t) can be considered equivalent to the amount of FD resources needed to empty the 5QI1 bearer buffered data (see 5G_UP_ALG_15400_replaced([11199776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwP5-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * nPrb_usable(t) can be considered as the number of PRBs available per slot for PUSCH, in the same manner as available PRBs for PUSCH derived for PM counters

  * If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

  * nPrb_usable(t) can be considered as the number of PRBs available per slot for PUSCH of the ith BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {n-1, n} and is the index for smallest dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * nPrb_used(T) = number of PRBs assigned for PUSCH Transport blocks which are in the ith BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {n-1, n} and is the index for smallest dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP.  
NOTE: Not the active BWP of the UE (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is considered here but if allocated resources reside in the smallest BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * The PRBs shall be weighted equally, not taking into account the number of PDSCH symbols in different slots.

  * 5QI-1 will always be by itself in a LCG. All other GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG separate from LCG for 5QI-1




If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), nPrb_usable shall be determined by considering that the maximum number of PRBs available for use per UL slot is restricted to the number of usable PRBs granted to UL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6500_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When the parameter NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc [CB013151-C] and/or NRCELL.actDynUlResAllocPhase2 is/are[END CB013151-C] set to 'true', the allocable number of PUSCH PRB per slot may vary; however, the value calculated for nPrb_usable_i(t) should not change and should be still restricted to the #PRB of the PUSCH region without considering the #PRB allocable to PUSCH which are part of the [Before CB013151-C] pCSI [CB013151-C] whole [End CB013151-C] PUCCH area..

Note: L2-PS shall not provide the VoNR UL PRB load indication to C-Plane in case of SDL cells.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-2**  (ID: `11201209`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL GBR PRB Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-2.0-8**  (ID: `13387355`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs gNB-DU shall provide a GBR [CB014699-C] and Critical GBR [End CB014699-C] UL PRB load indication to C-Plane as follows except the SDL cells:

Activation: **GBR Admission Control mode = 2; where**

  * GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 2)



Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell

  * Units: percent

  * Base:




**\- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**

  * For ith BWP, where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}:

  * GbrPrbLoad_i (t) =Floor [ nPrb_used_i(t) / nPrb_usable_i(t) ]; where:

  * nPrb_used_i(t) = number of PRBs within the ith and **(i+k)th** dedicated BWP assigned for PUSCH transport blocks not corresponding to a Configured Grant (CG) **that include any GBR bearer, where k ϵ {1, …, n}** ****




\- nPrb_used_i(t) is incremented by the quantity Q = X + Y, where:

  * X = SUM of CG RBs for TBS of the UEs with CG mapped to a GBR DRB and with CG occasion in the current slot

  * Y = cgGbrPrbShareTotal corresponding to the accumulated GBR share from non GBR CG PRBs for the UEs configured with GBR DRB (see 5G_UP_ALG_23338_replaced([11173429](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuSyK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Once used, cgGbrPrbShareTotal is reset to zero.

  * i corresponds to the large BWP




IF slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * nPrb_usable_i(t) = the number of potential Usable PRB for PUSCH for any DRB per sot and is determined from the number of maximum number of potential PUSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr_i (5G_UP_ALG_13373_replaced([11201352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PUSCH allocation in that slot;



ELSE

  * nPrb_usable_i(t) = number of PRBs within the ith dedicated BWP usable for PUSCH for any DRB



END

  * For nth BWP (Smallest), only if NRCELL.actPowerSavingBwp == False:



\- GbrPrbLoad_n(t)=Floor [ nPrb_used_n(t) / nPrb_usable_n(t) ] ; where:

  * nPrb_used_n(t) = number of PRBs within the **nth dedicated BWP assigned for PUSCH transport blocks that include any GBR bearer,** only if UE only supports n**th** dedicated BWP** _*_** *

  * nPrb_usable_n(t) = number of PRBs within the nth dedicated BWP usable by for PUSCH for any DRB.

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), nPrb_usable_n(t) is the number of potential Usable PRB for PUSCH for any DRB per sot and is determined from the number of maximum number of potential PUSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr_i (5G_UP_ALG_13373_replaced([11201352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PUSCH allocation in that slot;




\- ELSE

  * GbrPrbLoad1 (t) =Floor [ nPrb_used_1(t) / nPrb_usable_1(t) ]; where:

  * nPrb_used_1(t) = number of PRBs within the **dedicated BWP assigned for PUSCH transport blocks that include any GBR bearer**




If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

  * nPrb_usable_1(t) = the number of potential Usable PRB for PUSCH for any DRB per sot and is determined from the number of maximum potential PUSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr (5G_UP_ALG_13373_replaced([11201352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PUSCH allocation in that slot;



ELSE

  * nPrb_usable_1(t) = number of PRBs within the dedicated BWP usable for PUSCH for any DRB



END

\- Where: t refers to scheduled slot

  * For a UE for which a SR response grant was scheduled with DRB priority in the current slot, i.e. UE entered scheduler with SR response scheduling state SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UE PRBs contribution to nPrb_used_1(t) or nPrb_used_n(t) shall be scaled with (i.e multiplied with) racWeightInSrGrant as indicated in 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).



-Average:

  * avgGbrPrbLoad_n(t) = (1/Tprb) * GbrPrbLoad_n (t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgGbrPrbLoad_n(t−1)

  * If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

  * avgGbrPrbLoad_i(t) = (1/Tprb) * GbrPrbLoad_i (t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgGbrPrbLoad_i(t−1)

  * Where: Tprb= time constant for filter

  * Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n}, if NRCELL.actPowerSavingBwp == False. Otherwise where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}




Reported Load:

  * Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

  * avgGbrPrbLoad1(T) = the latest valueof avgGbrPrbLoad1(t) prior to T

  * Using GBR PRB load report field existing prior to 22R3.

  * avgGbrPrbLoad2(T) = the latest valueof avgGbrPrbLoad2(t) prior to T

  * Using Second GBR PRB load report field (new in 22R3)

  * If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then set to avgGbrPrbLoad_n(T), else set to 0%




Exceptions:

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 0 or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 1: see 5G_UP_ALG_5021_replaced([11201176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwULavvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * If there are no GBR bearers, both avgGbrPrbLoad1(T) and avgGbrPrbLoad2(T) are set to 0%

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.

  * PRBs not available for PUSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”




Inputs:

  * T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval

  * Tprb can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_8168_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4364_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))




Notes:

  * Including any GBR bearer**(all GBR 5QIs, including 5QI1/65/66) [CB014699-C] and any critical GBR bearer**(all critical GBR 5QIs, including critical 5QI1/65/66) [End CB014699-C] for nPrb_used_x above means PRBs assigned with any GBR related scheduling class priority (i.e. no check for token bucket (positive or negative) excluding congestion deprioritized GBR [CB014699-C] and/or excluding congestion deprioritized critical GBR [End CB014699-C] which is scheduled as non-GBR).****

  * When GBR Admission Control mode = 1: PRB load report is for VoNR(5QI-1/65/66) [CB014699-C] and critical VoNR (5QI-1/65/66) [End CB014699-C] only. Intent is to maintain existing PRB load report method as is, even after introduction of CB008379. For UL GBR PRB load reporting which includes all GBR 5QIs (including 5QI-1), see 5G_UP_ALG_5021_replaced([11201176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwULavvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * 5QI-1 will always be by itself in a LCG. All other GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG separate from LCG for 5QI-1




If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), nPrb_usable shall consider that the maximum number of PRBs available per slot for PUSCH on the cell level is limited to the total number of usable PRBs granted to UL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6500_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When the parameter NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc **and/or NRCELL.actDynUlResAllocPhase2 is/are set to 'true', the allocable number of PUSCH PRB per slot may vary; however, the value calculated for nPrb_usable_i(t) should not change and should be still restricted to the #PRB of the PUSCH region without considering the #PRB allocable to PUSCH which are part of the whole** PUCCH area.****

**Note: L2-PS shall not provide the GBR UL PRB load indication to C-Plane in case of SDL cells**.****

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-3**  (ID: `11201259`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL VoNR Time Domain Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11201274`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs { Requirement Refactoring } This requirement is superseded in 24R3 by refactoring under PR764832. It is replaced by 5G_UP_ALG_28379_replaced([11201301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZgvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),5G_UP_ALG_28364_replaced([11201311](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),5G_UP_ALG_28365_replaced([11201327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). { Requirement Refactoring }

L2-PS shall provide a VoNR UL time domain load indication that, in case that NRCELL.actUlCgType2 is set to True, shall include the non GBR CG time domains load, to C-Plane as follows:

Activation: GBR Admission Control mode = 1; where

\- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 1)

Metrics:

-Base:

\- Scope: per cell

\- Units: percent

[Before PR737898]

\- GbrAllocations(P) =Floor[ nAllocations_made(P) / nAllocations_usable(P) ]; where:

[PR737898]

\- GbrAllocations(P) =Round[(nAllocations_made(P) *100) / nAllocations_usable(P) ]; where:

[End PR737898]

\- nAllocations_made(P) = 

[Before PR726507]

(number of allocations by L2-PS for PUSCH transport blocks that include 5QI-1 bearers, up to period P)

[PR726507]

(number of allocations by L2-PS for PUSCH transport blocks that include 5QI-1 bearers scheduled at voipTraffic priority, up to period P)

  * rdRacDeprioritizedWeight * (number of allocations by L2-PS for PUSCH transport blocks that include 5QI-1 bearers scheduled at deprioritizedVoip priority, up to period P)



[End PR726507]

  * (number of non GBR Configured Grant (CG) allocations, i.e. CG UEs in a firing state



(see 5G_UP_ALG_15099_replaced([11172972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with the CG profile associated to a non GBR DRB, up to period P)

\- nAllocations_usable(P) = number of allocations usable by L2-PS for PUSCH for any DRB, up to time period P

  * Where:



P = 40 ms (fixed)

[PR726507]

rdRacDeprioritizedWeight is defined by 5G_UP_ALG_25047_replaced([11209467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwz6p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End PR726507]

-Average:

\- Scope: per cell

\- Units: percent

\- avgGbrAllocations(T) = Average[ CurrentGbrAllocations(P) ] over period T

\- average is restricted to fully completed periods P within report interval T. Any incomplete period P is included in average for next report interval

  * Reported load: avgGbrAllocations(T)



\- Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

Exceptions:

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 0 or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 2: see 5G_UP_ALG_8174_replaced([11201280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * If there are no GBR bearers or no non GBR CG UEs, avgGbrAllocations(T) = 0%

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.




Initializations:

  * avgGbrAllocations(T) is reset to 0% at start of every measurement period T



Inputs:

  * T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval



Notes:

  * When GBR Admission Control mode = 1: time domain load report is for VoNR only (5QI-1) that, in case that NRCELL.actUlCgType2 is set to True, shall include the CG time domains load. Intent is to maintain existing PRB load report method as is, even after introduction of CB008379. For UL GBR time domain load reporting which includes all GBR 5QIs (including 5QI-1), see 5G_UP_ALG_8174_replaced([11201280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * 5QI-1 will always be by itself in a LCG. All other GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG separate from LCG for 5QI-1




When scheduled UE pooling is enabled (scheUePoolingAllowed (5G_RAN_OP_1938_replaced([11692648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_D3n1Y_9nEe-D3seUwaI0tg))) is set to 'true'),

  * nAllocations_usable shall consider that the maximum number of scheduled PUSCH UE available per slot is limited by the number of scheduled PUSCH UE assigned by the BBRM and this number may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6363_replaced([11210707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw6BQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).



When NRBTS.actSchedFairnessUlOlc is set to TRUE:

  * nAllocations_usable shall consider that the maximum number of scheduled PUSCH UE available per slot is limited by UL overload control in loaded situations and this may change every slot (5G_UP_ALG_19733_replaced([11215990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxWtNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))



Note: rationale to include non GBR CG load in the same report is that total time domain load = GBR time domain load + non GBR CG time domain load drives the RAC decision for VoNR.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-4**  (ID: `11201280`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL GBR Time Domain Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11201296`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs { Requirement Refactoring } This requirement is superseded in 24R3 by refactoring under PR764832. It is replaced by 5G_UP_ALG_28379_replaced([11201301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZgvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),5G_UP_ALG_28364_replaced([11201311](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),5G_UP_ALG_28365_replaced([11201327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). { Requirement Refactoring }

L2-PS shall provide a GBR UL time domain load indication that, in case that NRCELL.actUlCgType2 is set to True, shall include the non GBR CG time domains load, to C-Plane as follows:

Activation: GBR Admission Control mode = 2; where

\- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 2)

Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell

  * Units: percent




-Base:

[Before PR737898]

\- GbrAllocations(P) =Floor[ nAllocations_made(P) / nAllocations_usable(P) ]; where:

[PR737898]

\- GbrAllocations(P) =Round[(nAllocations_made(P)*100) / nAllocations_usable(P) ]; where:

[End PR737898]

\- nAllocations_made(P) = 

[Before PR726507]

(number of allocations by L2-PS for PUSCH transport blocks that include GBR bearers, up to period P)

[PR726507]

(number of allocations by L2-PS for PUSCH transport blocks that include GBR bearers scheduled at voipTraffic or gbrTraffic priority, up to period P)

  * rdRacDeprioritizedWeight * (number of allocations by L2-PS for PUSCH transport blocks that include GBR bearers scheduled at deprioritizedVoip or deprioritizedGbr priority, up to period P)



[End PR726507]

  * (number of non GBR Configured Grant (CG) allocations, i.e. CG UEs in a firing state (see 5G_UP_ALG_15099_replaced([11172972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with the CG profile associated to a non GBR DRB, up to period P)



\- nAllocations_usable(P) = number of allocations usable by L2-PS for PUSCH for any DRB, up to time period P

  * Where:



P = 68 ms (fixed)

[PR726507]

rdRacDeprioritizedWeight is defined by 5G_UP_ALG_25047_replaced([11209467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwz6p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End PR726507]

-Average:

\- avgGbrTdLoadInd(P) = ( 1/Ttdli) *GbrAllocations (P) + ( 1−( 1/Ttdli) ) * avgGbrTdLoadInd(P−1) ; where

\- Ttdli= time constant for filter

  * Reported load:



\- Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

\- avgGbrTdLoadInd(T) = is the latest value of avgGbrTdLoadInd (P) prior to T

Exceptions:

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 0 or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 1: see 5G_UP_ALG_5024_replaced([11201259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * If there are no GBR bearers or no non GBR CG UEs, avgGbrAllocations(T) = 0%

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.




Inputs:

  * T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval

  * Ttdli can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_8170_replaced([11183221](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see R&D parameter rdGbrTdLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4365_replaced([11188269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))




Notes:

  * When GBR Admission Control mode = 2: time domain load report is for all GBR 5QIs (including 5QI-1) that, in case that NRCELL.actUlCgType2 is set to True, shall include the non GBR CG time domains load. For UL GBR time domain load reporting which VoNR specific, see 5G_UP_ALG_5024_replaced([11201259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * GBR time domain load is per cell, so it reflects slot utilization over all configured dedicated BWPs

  * 5QI-1 will always be by itself in a LCG. All other GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG separate from LCG for 5QI-1




When NRBTS.actSchedFairnessUlOlc is set to TRUE:

  * nAllocations_usable shall consider that the maximum number of scheduled PUSCH UE available per slot is limited by UL overload control in loaded situations and this may change every slot (5G_UP_ALG_19733_replaced([11215990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxWtNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))



Note: rationale to include non GBR CG load in the same report is that total time domain load = GBR time domain load + non GBR time domain load drives the RAC decision for VoNR.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-5**  (ID: `11201301`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Time Domain Load Monitoring for UL GBR RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11201305`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs { Requirement Refactoring } This requirement is part of a refactoring of 5G_UP_ALG_5024_replaced([11201259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_8174_replaced([11201280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for clarification and easier updating, done as part of PR764832. Majority of the text reflects unmodified legacy behavior. Requirements 5G_UP_ALG_5024_replaced([11201259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_8174_replaced([11201280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are combined into this requirement.{ Requirement Refactoring }

The gNB-DU shall periodically report an UL Time Domain (TD) load due to VoNR traffic as defined below.

Inputs:

  * Activation: NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl
  * Load report interval, T: NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod
  * Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current Load report interval.
  * Load Evaluation Interval, P: 68 ms (fixed)
  * VoNR scheduling class (priority) for UE entry in CS2 list: voipTraffic or deprioritizedVoip
  * Number of non GBR Configured Grant (CG) allocations, i.e. CG UEs in a firing state: defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15099_replaced([11172972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))



Algorithm:

  * Load Reporting
  * Scope: cell; Periodicity: at end of each Load report interval
  * Content:
  * If NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl=1:
  * avgGbrAllocations(T) = Average[ GbrAllocations(P) ] where:
  * Average[ GbrAllocations(P) ] is restricted to fully completed Load Evaluation Intervals P within current = Load Evaluation Interval T. Any incomplete period P is included in average for next Load report interval.
  * Else If NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 2
  * avgGbrAllocations(T) = avgGbrTdLoadInd(P), sampled at the end of Load report interval, T
  * avgGbrTdLoadInd(P) = ( 1/rrmGbrTdLoadfilterPer) * GbrAllocations(P) + ( 1−( 1/ rrmGbrTdLoadfilterPer) ) * avgGbrTdLoadInd(P−1) ; where
  * GbrAllocations(P) as defined below
  * rrmGbrTdLoadfilterPer = filter constant. Could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties: Range= 5...100; Step size= 5; Default= 20 (see R&D parameter rdGbrTdLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4365_replaced([11188269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * Format
  * Units: percent
  * Resolution: Specified at EFS level, 1% recommended at SFS level
  * Initializations:
  * avgGbrAllocations(T) is reset to 0% at start of every Load report interval T
  * Load derivation:
  * If cell has no configured VoNR DRBs:
  * Load: GbrAllocations(P) = 0
  * Else
  * If NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl is not equal to 0 (not disabled) and NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod > 0 , then (GBR RAC is enabled and used by L3 for GBR DRB admissions):
  * Load: GbrAllocations(P) =Round[(nAllocations_made(P) *100) / nAllocations_available_gbr (P) ]; where:
  * nAllocations_made(P) and nAllocations_usable(P) are both evaluated over UL slots with available PUSCH, within the Load Evaluation Interval P
  * nAllocations_made(P) is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_28364_replaced([11201311](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * nAllocations_available_gbr(P) is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_28365_replaced([11201327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * Else
  * Load is irrelevant: GbrAllocations(P) = 0 (or an invalid value)



Outputs:

  * avgGbrAllocations(T)



Notes:

  * NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl =1 activates the legacy VoNR Radio Admission Control (RAC) function introduced by the commercial VoNR feature CB006112
  * When NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl =1: UL TD Load monitoring is meant for VoNR (5QI-1) admission request handling at L3
  * If NRCELL.actUlCgType2=true, the reported UL TD Load is modified to include nonGBR CG load to enhance the VoNR admission request handling at CP
  * CB008379 (additional GBR Services) modified VoNR RAC to include monitoring utilization of both VoNR and nonVoNR GBR services; hence referred to as GBR RAC. It is enabled by NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl =2. See 5G_UP_ALG_8174_replaced([11201280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl =0 disabled GBR RAC at both L2 and L3 (L3 does not consider radio resource utilization in GBR DRB admission decision)
  * Output is reported to L3 within a periodic UL GBR TD load report message, with period = Load report interval, T

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-6**  (ID: `11201311`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Deriving Time Domain Usage for UL GBR RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11201321`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs The gNB-DU shall calculate the number of GBR allocations made during the specified evaluation interval as defined below.

Inputs:

  * Activation: NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl
  * Configured Grants feature activation: NRCELL.actUlCgType2
  * Load report interval: NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod
  * Load Evaluation Interval, P : 68 ms (fixed)
  * VoNR scheduling class (priority) for UE entry in CS2 list: voipTraffic or deprioritizedVoip
  * GBR scheduling class (priority) for UE entry in CS2 list: gbrTraffic or deprioritizedGbr
  * R&D parameters:
  * rdRacDeprioritizedWeight: defined by 5G_UP_ALG_25047_replaced([11209467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwz6p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))



Output:

  * nAllocations_made(P) = Sum over evaluation period P of both GBR allocations and Number of non-GBR Configured Grant (CG) allocations; where:
  * GBR allocations
  * If NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 1: VoNR only
  * GBR allocations = [number of allocations for PUSCH transport blocks that include 5QI-1 bearers scheduled at voipTraffic priority] + rdRacDeprioritizedWeight * [number of allocations for PUSCH transport blocks that include 5QI-1 bearers scheduled at deprioritizedVoip priority]
  * If NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 2: VoNR + nonVoNR
  * GBR allocations = [number of allocations for PUSCH transport blocks that include GBR bearers scheduled at voipTraffic or gbrTraffic priority] + rdRacDeprioritizedWeight * [number of allocations for PUSCH transport blocks that include GBR bearers scheduled at deprioritizedVoip or deprioritizedGbr priority]
  * **[CB013961-B] A UE for which an SR response grant was scheduled with DRB priority in the current slot, i.e. UE entered scheduler with SR response scheduling state SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), is not counted to GBR allocations in case that bufferCorrSrSchedFailure (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) was equal to PayloadSr. **[End CB013961-B]****
  * **[CB008600-E-UPD001]



In case delay critical services is enabled (NRBTS.NRCELL.actDcGbrService=true) and the scheduled transport block contains allocations for both GBR and DC-GBR bearers, nAllocations_made(P) should not be increased both here for GBR and correspondingly in ([11201404](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWAl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for DC-GBR. This is to avoid that when adding the DC-GBR TD reported load to the GBR TD reported load, the resulting TD overall GBR load considered by the RAC reflects twice the actual allocations. 

In these cases, the scheduler request class driving the TD scheduling determines whether nAllocations_made(P) for GBR should be increased (TD scheduling from voipTraffic or gbrTraffic priority) or whether nAllocations_made (P) in ([11201404](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWAl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for DC-GBR should be increased (TD scheduling from dcGbrTraffic priority). In case of TD scheduling from deprioritizedGbr priority, as both deprioritized GBR and deprioritized DC-GBR data have the same priority, it is possible to increase both the nAllocations_made(P) for GBR and the nAllocations_made(P) for DC-GBR in ([11201404](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWAl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), with a contribution equal to rdRacDeprioritizedWeight for each of them (assuming default value of rdRacDeprioritizedWeight equal to 0.5, this would total 1 full allocation of overall GBR traffic)

**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]** ** * Number of non-GBR Configured Grant (CG) allocations = number of non GBR Configured Grant (CG) allocations, i.e. CG UEs in a firing state (see 5G_UP_ALG_15099_replaced([11172972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with the CG profile associated to a non GBR DRB

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-7**  (ID: `11201327`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Deriving Time Domain Capacity for UL GBR RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11201336`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs The gNB-DU shall calculate the total number of available allocations during the specified evaluation interval as defined below.

**{NOTE: The changes below associated with PR764832 are no longer automatically enabled by NIDD default or a Migration rule due to PR779568/PR779350/PR779452/PR779309. The PR764832 changes are still available by manually setting NRCELL.actGbrRacTdEnhResourcePriority = true}**

Inputs:

  * Activation: NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl
  * Overload control (OLC) activation: NRBTS.actSchedFairnessUlOlc
  * Scheduled UE per TTI pooling: scheUePoolingAllowed, refer to 5G_RAN_OP_1938_replaced([11692648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_D3n1Y_9nEe-D3seUwaI0tg))
  * NRCELL.actGbrRacTdEnhResourcePriority
  * Load report interval: NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod
  * Load Evaluation Interval, P : 68 ms (fixed)
  * VoNR scheduling class (priority) for UE entry in CS2 list: voipTraffic



Algorithm:

  * Determining TD allocations available for GBR over Load Evaluation Interval, P:
  * If NRCELL.actGbrRacTdEnhResourcePriority = true:
  * nAllocations_available_gbr(P) = nAllocations_available_total(P) – ( rrmAvgAllocationsHighPriority(P) )
  * Else:
  * nAllocations_available_gbr(P) = nAllocations_available_total(P); Where:
  * nAllocations_available_gbr(P) > 0
  * TD Resources available for any allocation:
  * nAllocations_available_total(P) = number of allocations usable by L2-PS for PUSCH for any reason plus/minus additional dynamic/semi-static adjustments, where these adjustments are:
  * UE Pooling: If scheUePoolingAllowed (5G_RAN_OP_1938_replaced([11692648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_D3n1Y_9nEe-D3seUwaI0tg))) = true:
  * Adjustment for the maximum number of scheduled PUSCH UE available per slot as assigned by the BBRM. This number may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6363_replaced([11210707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw6BQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
  * Overload Control (OLC):
  * If NRBTS.actSchedFairnessUlOlc = true:
  * Adjustment for the maximum number of scheduled PUSCH UE available per slot as limited by UL overload control in loaded situations. This may change every slot (5G_UP_ALG_19777_replaced([11215910](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxWGJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * Estimated TD Resources available for GBR allocation:
  * rrmAvgAllocationsHighPriority(P) = sum of all UL grants made during Load Evaluation Interval, P with priority greater than gbrTraffic and number of PRBs allocated for GBR = 0; with the following exceptions:
  * Grants already counted in deriving TD usage for UL GBR RAC (in 5G_UP_ALG_28364_replaced([11201311](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * Examples:
  * CG grants have higher prioritythan initial transmission GBR and are included in TD usage, so not counted in the adjustment for TD Capacity
  * SR and SRB grants with GBR PRBs (5QI-1 or nonVoNR GBR) = 0 are counted in the adjustment
  * **[CB013961-B] SR grants counted in the adjustment also comprise the SR response grants scheduled with DRB priority in the current slot, i.e. UE entered scheduler with SR response scheduling state SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), in case that bufferCorrSrSchedFailure (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) was equal to PayloadSr.**
  * Note: current requirement execution in case that NRCELL.actGbrRacTdEnhResourcePriority = true looks dead spec/code. PDL rule applicable to NRCELL.actGbrRacTdEnhResourcePriority enforces NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = false when NRCELL.actGbrRacTdEnhResourcePriority = true. But when NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = false, RAC procedueres, including current requirement, are not executed. **[End CB013961-B]**
  * GBR HARQ re-transmissions are included in TD usage, so not counted in the adjustment
  * Grants with priority between GBR and deprioritized GBR priority are not counted in the adjustment



Output:

  * nAllocations_available_gbr(P)



**Notes:**

 Over Load Control (OLC) can trigger “skipping” of UEs in FD and/or FDM scheduling due to lack of time to complete scheduling activities for a slot (see 5G_UP_ALG_.19726). L2-PS should not consider skipped UEs when deriving rrmAvgAllocationsHighPriority(P)

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-8**  (ID: `11201341`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL GBR Time Domain Load Update due to GBR Scheduling Congestion

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11201346`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall update the GBR UL time domain load indication to C-Plane, based on GBR scheduling congestion, as follows:

Activation: GBR Admission Control mode = 2 AND GBR Congestion Detection = 1 ; where

\- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 2)

\- GBR Congestion Detection is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.gbrCongDetectionRac = true)

Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell

  * Base:




\- gbrSchedBlock (t) = 1 ; If at least one CS2 member with High Priority GBR data (Positive Token Bucket) can not be scheduled in slot t, for any reason

\- gbrSchedBlock (t) = 0 ; otherwise

\- Where: t the considered slot

  * Average:



\- avgGbrBlockCnt(t) = (1/Tgbrld) * gbrSchedBlock(t) + (1−(1/Tgbrld)) * avgGbrBlockCnt(t−1)

\- Where: Tgbrld= time constant for filter

  * Congestion State Management:

  * gbrCongestionState = 00 (No Congestion):




\- If avgGbrBlockCnt(t) > gbrCongestionLimit:

\- Increment gbrCongestHystCounter by 1

\- Set gbrCongestionState = 01

\- ElseIf avgGbrBlockCnt(t) <= gbrCongestionLimit:

\- No action

  * gbrCongestionState = 01 (Pre Congestion):



\- If avgGbrBlockCnt(t) > gbrCongestionLimit:

\- Increment gbrCongestHystCounter by 1

\- ElseIf avgGbrBlockCnt(t) <= gbrCongestionLimit:

\- Set gbrCongestionState = 00

\- Set gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

\- If gbrCongestHystCounter => gbrCongestionCntThresh

\- Set gbrCongestionState = 10

\- Set gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

  * gbrCongestionState = 10 (Congestion):



\- If avgGbrBlockCnt(t) < gbrNonCongestionLimit; where = gbrCongestionLimit * gbrCongestionHystFactor :

\- Increment gbrCongestHystCounter by 1

\- Set gbrCongestionState = 11

\- ElseIf avgGbrBlockCnt(t) >= gbrNonCongestionLimit

\- No action

  * gbrCongestionState = 11 (Pre Return to No Congestion):



\- If avgGbrBlockCnt(t) < gbrNonCongestionLimit;

\- Increment gbrCongestHystCounter by 1

\- ElseIf avgGbrBlockCnt(t) >= gbrNonCongestionLimit

\- Set gbrCongestionState = 10

\- Set gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

\- If gbrCongestHystCounter => gbrCongestionCntThresh

\- Set gbrCongestionState = 00

\- Set gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

Report:

\- Set avgGbrTdLoadInd(T) = 100% if gbrCongestionState at T = 10 or 11, else set avgGbrTdLoadInd(T) as derived in 5G_UP_ALG_8174_replaced([11201280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Exceptions:

\- gbrSchedBlock (t)= 0 if no GBR UE in CS2 list

\- If NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl is not equal to 2 OR If NRCELL.gbrCongDetectionRac = false, then GBR UL time domain load indication is not updated due to scheduling congestion

Initializations:

\- gbrSchedBlock(init) = 0; avgGbrBlockCnt(init) = 0; gbrCongestionState = 0; gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

Inputs:

  * T = RAC GBR load reporting period provided by C-Plane at cell setup 

  * Tgbrld can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_8168_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for Tprb (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4364_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * gbrCongestionLimit (see R&D parameter rdGbrCongestionLimit in 5G_L2_4367_replaced([11188282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYB_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gbrCongestionHystFactor (see R&D parameter rdGbrCongestionHystFactor in 5G_L2_4368_replaced([11188287](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYCPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and gbrCongestionCntThresh (see R&D parameter rdGbrCongestionCntThresh in 5G_L2_4369_replaced([11188294](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYCfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) could be a R&D parameters, as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_8176_replaced([11183242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))




Notes:

  * A GBR scheduling congestion state (gbrCongestionState = 1) is reached when avgGbrBlockCnt is above a threshold (gbrCongestionLimit) for "N" consecutive times (gbrCongestionCntThresh)

  * Exit from a GBR scheduling congestion state (gbrCongestionState = 1) is reached when avgGbrBlockCnt is below a threshold (gbrNonCongestionLimit) for "N" consecutive times (gbrCongestionCntThresh)

  * GBR scheduling congestion detection is a safeguard for GBR RAC by overriding derived GBR Time Domain load report with 100% when GBR scheduling blocks are detected. GBR Time Domain load report is based on a configured slot resource capacity based on max FDM UEs per slot; but that may not reflect PDCCH capacity or other TD scheduling blocking.

  * 5QI-1 will always be by itself in a LCG. All other GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG separate from LCG for 5QI-1

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-9**  (ID: `11201352`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Maximum Number of Potential PUSCH PRBs for GBR Load Monitoring with PRB Pooling

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-9.0-2**  (ID: `11201361`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs With PRB pooling, the total number of PRBs within the cell BW may not always be available for use by 5G L2PS. For the GBR PRB Load monitoring, the total maximum number of potential PRBs that shall be considered available for PUSCH are given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr and it is determined from the total number of potential uasble PRB amount per cell, bbrmUsableCellPrb provied by the BBRM (5G_UP_ALG_12402_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as below:

[CB012605-D]

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = FALSE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[End CB012605-D]

If n > 1, the number of BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

  * for the ith BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {1,2.. n} is the index of the dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr_i (t) = min {bbrmUsableCellPrb - numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch(t), rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp(i)},




Else

  * bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr (t) = min {bbrmUsableCellPrb - numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch(t), rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp},



End

[CB012605-D]

Else

[CB012605-E]

If n > 1, the number of BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

  * for the ith BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {1,2.. n} is the index of the dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr_i (t) = min {max{0, (bbrmUsableCellPrb - numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch(t))}, rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp(i)},




Else

[End CB012605-E]

  * bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr (t) = min {max{0, (bbrmUsableCellPrb - numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch(t))}, rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp},



[CB012605-E]

End

[End CB012605-E]

End

[End CB012605-D]

where :

  * t : UL slot
  * brmUsableCellPrb is provided by the BBRM every pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_12402_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
  * numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch as defiend in 5G_UP_ALG_4876_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp (5G_UP_ALG_4974_replaced([11199486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwOEw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
  * Note: for multiple BWP, it is given separately per BWP

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-10**  (ID: `11201367`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs SAg GBR PRB Utilization for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11201373`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2 PS shall consider UL Slot Aggregation repetitions as defined below when deriving number of PRBs used by PUSCH DRBs for GBR RAC load reporting.

Consideration:

  * When a UE is in TP Enabled::SAG On state (see 5G_UP_ALG_18906_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
  * The number of PRBs used, per UE GBR allocation, is multiplied by the number of repetitions (1,2, or 4) as identified by the TDRA field of the corresponding DCI 0_1 grant and per the definition within the TDRA table defined by 5G_UP_ALG_18908_replaced([11204846](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4N_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19346_replaced([11205160](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwntZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))



Applicability:

  * GBR Admission Control mode = 1: see 5G_UP_ALG_5021_replaced([11201176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwULavvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * GBR Admission Control mode = 2: see 5G_UP_ALG_8172_replaced([11201209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUycfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-11**  (ID: `11201378`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs SAg GBR Time Domain Utilization for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-29.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `11201381`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2 PS shall consider UL Slot Aggregation repetitions as defined below when deriving time domain resources used by PUSCH DRBs for GBR RAC load reporting.

Consideration:

  * When a UE is in TP Enabled::SAG On state (see 5G_UP_ALG_18906_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
  * The number of Time Domain resources used, is multiplied by the number of repetitions (1,2, or 4) as identified by the TDRA field of the corresponding DCI 0_1 grant and per the definition within the TDRA table defined by 5G_UP_ALG_18908_replaced([11204846](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4N_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19346_replaced([11205160](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwntZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))



Applicability:

  * GBR Admission Control mode = 1: see 5G_UP_ALG_5024_replaced([11201259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * GBR Admission Control mode = 2: see 5G_UP_ALG_8174_replaced([11201280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

#### 3.30.6.1.0-30 Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL DC-GBR Load for Radio Admission Control (RAC) (ID: 11201386)

**3.30.6.1.0-30.0-1**  (ID: `11201392`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL DC-GBR PRB Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-30.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11201397`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall provide **DC-GBR and GBR UL PRB load indication to C-Plane as follows except the SDL cells:**

Activation: **GBR Admission Control mode = [Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3[CB008600-E-UPD001]2 and Delay critical GBR services is enabled[End CB008600-E-UPD001]; where**

  * GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = **[Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3**[CB008600-E-UPD001]2****

  * Delay critical GBR services is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration NRBTS.NRCELL.actDcGbrservice=true)**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]**




Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell

  * Units: percent

  * Base:

  * DcGbrPrbLoad_1(t) =Floor [ nPrb_used_1(t) / nPrb_usable_1(t) ]; where:

  * nPrb_used_1(t) = number of PRBs within the **dedicated BWP assigned for PUSCH transport blocks that include any DC-GBR bearer (including PUSCH scheduling for DC-GBR and UL grant for SR Resp for DC-GBR.)**




**[CB008600-F]- nPrb_used1(t) is incremented by the quantity Q = X + Y, where:**

  * X = SUM of CG RBs for TBS of the UEs with CG mapped to a DC-GBR DRB and with CG occasion in the current slot

  * Y = cgDcGbrPrbShareTotal corresponding to the accumulated DC-GBR share from non GBR CG PRBs for the UEs configured with DC-GBR DRB (see 5G_UP_ALG_32331_replaced([11173437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuTZMPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Once used, cgDcGbrPrbShareTotal is reset to zero.**[End CB008600-F]**




If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

  * nPrb_usable_1(t) = the number of potential Usable PRB for PUSCH for any DRB per sot and is determined from the number of maximum potential PUSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForDcGbr (5G_UP_ALG_31807_replaced([11201422](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWAm_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PUSCH allocation in that slot;



ELSE

  * nPrb_usable_1(t) = number of PRBs within the dedicated BWP usable for PUSCH for any DRB



END

\- Where: t refers to scheduled slot

-Average:

  * avgDcGbrPrbLoad_1(t) = (1/Tprb) * DcGbrPrbLoad_1 (t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgDcGbrPrbLoad_1(t−1)

  * Where: Tprb= time constant for filter




Rationale:Only large BWP support DC-GBR

Reported Load:

  * Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

  * avgDcGbrPrbLoad_1(T) = the latest valueof avgDcGbrPrbLoad_1(t) prior to T




Exceptions:

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 0,1,2 **[CB008600-E-UPD001]and** Delay-critical GBR services is disabled **[End CB008600-E-UPD001] or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this DC-GBR Load monitoring** ****

  * If there are no DC-GBR bearers, avgDcGbrPrbLoad(T) is set to 0%

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.

  * PRBs not available for PUSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”




Inputs:

  * T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval

  * Tprb can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_8168_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4364_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))




Notes:

  * Including **any DC-GBR bearer for nPrb_used_1 above means PRBs assigned with any scheduling class priority**

  * When GBR Admission Control mode = **[Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3**[CB008600-E-UPD001] 2 and**Delay-critical GBR services is enabled**[End CB008600-E-UPD001] : provide DC-GBR and GBR UL PRB load reports to C-Plane. **[CB008600-E-UPD001] When GBR Admission Control mode = 2 and** Delay-critical GBR services is disabled : provide GBR UL PRB load reports to C-Plane.**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]****_*_** *****




DC-GBR PRB load report is for all DC-GBR 5QIs. GBR PRB load (avgDcGbrPrbLoad) report is for all GBR 5QIs (including VONR and non-VONR GBR 5QIs).

For UL VONR and non-VONR GBR PRB load report (avgGbrPrbLoad), it shall be same as that for GBR Admission Control mode = 2 Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_8172_replaced([11201209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUycfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * All DC-GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG.



If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), nPrb_usable shall consider that the maximum number of PRBs available per slot for PUSCH on the cell level is limited to the total number of usable PRBs granted to UL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6500_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When the parameter NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc is set to 'true', the number of allocable PUSCH PRB per slot may vary; however, the value calculated for nPrb_usable_i(t) should not change and should be still restricted to the #PRB of the PUSCH region without considering the #PRB allocable to PUSCH which are part of the pCSI PUCCH area.

**Note: L2-PS shall not provide the DC-GBR UL PRB load indication to C-Plane in case of SDL cells**.****

---

**3.30.6.1.0-30.0-2**  (ID: `11201404`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL DC-GBR Time Domain Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-30.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11201406`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall provide a **DC-GBR and** GBR UL time domain load indication to C-Plane as follows:****

Activation: **GBR Admission Control mode = [Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3[CB008600-E-UPD001]2 and Delay critical GBR services is enabled[End CB008600-E-UPD001]; where**

\- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = **[Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3**[CB008600-E-UPD001]2)****

\- Delay critical GBR services is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration NRBTS.NRCELL.actDcGbrservice=true)**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]**

Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell

  * Units: percent




-Base:

\- DcGbrAllocations(P) =Floor[ nAllocations_made(P) / nAllocations_usable(P) ]; where:

\- nAllocations_made(P) = number of allocations by L2-PS for PUSCH transport blocks that include DC-GBR bearers(including PUSCH scheduling for DC-GBR and UL grant for SR Resp for DC-GBR.) [CB008600-F-UPD001] or corresponding to configured grants (CG) for UEs with a CG occasion in the targeted PUSCH slot, if the CG profile is mapped to DC-GBR DRB [End CB008600-F-UPD001], up to period P

In case of nAllocations_made(P) coming from deprioritized DC-GBR bearers or srResp with default PayloadSr (i.e. MDBV token bucket negative or UL GFBR over AW exceeded), count these nAllocations_made(P) with a weight equal to rdRacDeprioritizedWeight (default=0.5)

\- nAllocations_usable(P) = number of allocations usable by L2-PS for PUSCH for any DRB, up to time period P(considering additional semi-static/dynamic adjustments based on e.g. UE pooling and overload control if activated; refer to nAllocations_available_total (P) in 5G_UP_ALG_28365_replaced([11201327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

-Average:

\- avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(P) = ( 1/Ttdli) *DcGbrAllocations (P) + ( 1−( 1/Ttdli) ) * avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(P−1) ; where

\- Ttdli= time constant for filter

  * Where: P = 40 ms (fixed)

  * Reported load:




\- Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

\- avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(T) = is the latest value of avgDcGbrTdLoadInd (P) prior to T

Exceptions:

  * For GBR Admission Control mode = 0,1,2**[CB008600-E-UPD001]** Delay-critical GBR services is disabled **[End CB008600-E-UPD001] or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring** ****

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.




Inputs:

  * T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval

  * Ttdli can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_8170_replaced([11183221](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see R&D parameter rdGbrTdLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4365_replaced([11188269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))




Notes:

  * When GBR Admission Control mode = **[Before CB008600-E-UPD001] 3**[CB008600-E-UPD001]2 and Delay critical GBR services is enabled**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]:provide** DC-GBR and GBR UL time domain load reports to C-Plane. **[CB008600-E-UPD001] When GBR Admission Control mode = 2 and** Delay-critical GBR services is disabled : provide GBR UL time domain load reports to C-Plane.**[End CB008600-E-UPD001] DC-GBR time domain load report is for all DC-GBR 5QIs. GBR time domain load (avgGbrTdLoadInd) report is for all GBR 5QIs which VoNR and non-VONR specific. For UL GBR time domain load(avgGbrTdLoadInd) reporting for VoNR and non-VONR specific, it shall be the same as that for GBR Admission Control mode = 2 Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_8174_replaced([11201280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUyffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))****_*_** *****

  * GBR time domain load is per cell, so it reflects slot utilization over all configured dedicated BWPs

  * All DC-GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-30.0-3**  (ID: `11201412`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL DC-GBR Time Domain Load Update due to DC-GBR Scheduling Congestion

---

**3.30.6.1.0-30.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11201417`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall update the **DC-GBR UL time domain load indication to C-Plane, based on DC-GBR scheduling congestion, as follows:**

Activation: **GBR Admission Control mode = [Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3 [CB008600-E-UPD001]2[End CB008600-E-UPD001] AND GBR Congestion Detection = 1[CB008600-E-UPD001] and Delay-critical GBR services**(NRBTS/NRCELL/actDcGbrService) = true [End CB008600-E-UPD001];; where****

\- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = **[Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3**[CB008600-E-UPD001]2**[End CB008600-E-UPD001])** ****

\- GBR Congestion Detection is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.gbrCongDetectionRac = true)

**[CB008600-E-UPD001] - Delay-critical GBR services is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actdcGbrService = true)**[EndCB008600-E-UPD001]****

Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell

  * Base:




\- DcgbrSchedBlock (t) = 1 ; If at least one CS2 member with High Priority DC-GBR data (Positive Token Bucket) can not be scheduled in slot t, for any reason

\- DcgbrSchedBlock (t) = 0 ; otherwise

\- Where: t the considered slot

  * Average:



\- avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) = (1/Tgbrld) * DcgbrSchedBlock(t) + (1−(1/Tgbrld)) * avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t−1)

\- Where: Tgbrld= time constant for filter

  * Congestion State Management:

  * DcgbrCongestionState = 00 (No Congestion):




\- If avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) > DcgbrCongestionLimit:

\- Increment DcgbrCongestHystCounter by 1

\- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 01

\- ElseIf avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) <= DcgbrCongestionLimit:

\- No action

  * DcgbrCongestionState = 01 (Pre Congestion):



\- If avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) > DcgbrCongestionLimit:

\- Increment DcgbrCongestHystCounter by 1

\- ElseIf avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) <= DcgbrCongestionLimit:

\- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 00

\- Set DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

\- If DcgbrCongestHystCounter => DcgbrCongestionCntThresh

\- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 10

\- Set DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

  * DcgbrCongestionState = 10 (Congestion):



\- If avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) < DcgbrNonCongestionLimit; where = DcgbrCongestionLimit * DcgbrCongestionHystFactor :

\- Increment DcgbrCongestHystCounter by 1

\- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 11

\- ElseIf avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) >= DcgbrNonCongestionLimit

\- No action

  * DcgbrCongestionState = 11 (Pre Return to No Congestion):



\- If avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) < DcgbrNonCongestionLimit;

\- Increment DcgbrCongestHystCounter by 1

\- ElseIf avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) >= DcgbrNonCongestionLimit

\- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 10

\- Set DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

\- If DcgbrCongestHystCounter => DcgbrCongestionCntThresh

\- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 00

\- Set DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

Report:

\- Set avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(T) = 100% if DcgbrCongestionState at T = 10 or 11, else set avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(T) as derived in 5G_UP_ALG_31803_replaced([11201404](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWAl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Exceptions:

\- DcgbrSchedBlock (t)= 0 if no DC-GBR UE in CS2 list

\- If NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl is not equal to**[Before CB008600-E-UPD001] 3**[ CB008600-E-UPD001]2 or actdcGbrService=false**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]OR If NRCELL.gbrCongDetectionRac = false, then** DC-GBR UL time domain load indication is not updated due to scheduling congestion** _*_** *

Initializations:

\- DcgbrSchedBlock(init) = 0; avgDcGbrBlockCnt(init) = 0; DcgbrCongestionState = 0; DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

Inputs:

  * T = RAC DC-GBR load reporting period provided by C-Plane at cell setup 

  * Tgbrld can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_30857_replaced([11183283](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for Tprb (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4364_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * DcgbrCongestionLimit, DcgbrCongestionHystFactor, and DcgbrCongestionCntThresh could be a R&D parameters, as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32489_replaced([11183303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJtw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))




Notes:

  * A DC-GBR scheduling congestion state (gbrCongestionState = 1) is reached when avgDcGbrBlockCnt is above a threshold (DcgbrCongestionLimit) for "N" consecutive times (DcgbrCongestionCntThresh)

  * Exit from a DC-GBR scheduling congestion state (DcgbrCongestionState = 1) is reached when avgDcGbrBlockCnt is below a threshold (DcgbrNonCongestionLimit) for "N" consecutive times (DcgbrCongestionCntThresh)

  * DC-GBR scheduling congestion detection is a safeguard for DC-GBR RAC by overriding derived DC-GBR Time Domain load report with 100% when DC-GBR scheduling blocks are detected. DC-GBR Time Domain load report is based on a configured slot resource capacity based on max FDM UEs per slot; but that may not reflect PDCCH capacity or other TD scheduling blocking.

  * 5QI-1 will always be by itself in a LCG. All non-VoNR GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG separate from LCG for 5QI-1. DC-GBR 5QIs will always be by themselves in a LCG separate from for 5QI-1 and non-VoNR GBR 5Qis

---

**3.30.6.1.0-30.0-4**  (ID: `11201422`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Maximum Number of Potential PUSCH PRBs for DC-GBR Load Monitoring with PRB Pooling

---

**3.30.6.1.0-30.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11201427`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs With PRB pooling, the total number of PRBs within the cell BW may not always be available for use by 5G L2PS. For the DC-GBR PRB Load monitoring, the total maximum number of potential PRBs that shall be considered available for PUSCH are given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForDcGbr and it is determined from the total number of potential uasble PRB amount per cell, bbrmUsableCellPrb provied by the BBRM (5G_UP_ALG_12402_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as below:

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = FALSE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If n > 1, the number of BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

  * for the ith BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i is the index of the large BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForDcGbr_i (t) = min {bbrmUsableCellPrb - numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch(t), rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp(i)},




Else

  * bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForDcGbr (t) = min {bbrmUsableCellPrb - numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch(t), rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp},



End

Else

If n > 1, the number of BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

  * for the ith BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1813_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i is the index of the large BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForDcGbr_i (t) = min {max{0, (bbrmUsableCellPrb - numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch(t))}, rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp(i)},




Else

  * bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForDcGbr (t) = min {max{0, (bbrmUsableCellPrb - numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch(t))}, rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp},



End

End

where :

  * t : UL slot
  * brmUsableCellPrb is provided by the BBRM every pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_12402_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
  * numPrbToBeAllocatedForPucch as defiend in 5G_UP_ALG_4876_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp (5G_UP_ALG_4974_replaced([11199486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwOEw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
  * Note: for multiple BWP, it is given separately per BWP

---

#### 3.30.6.1.0-31 Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL non-GBR PRB Load associated to Configured Grant Type2 active UEs for Radio Admission Control (RAC) (ID: 11201433)

**3.30.6.1.0-31.0-1**  (ID: `11201437`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL non-GBR PRB Load associated to Configured Grant Type2 active UEs for RAC

---

**3.30.6.1.0-31.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11201455`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs For UEs with Configured Grant(CG) Type2 activated, L2-PS shall provide a CG non-GBR PRB load indication **[CB008250-F] if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), per PLMN in addition to per cell **[End CB008250-F] to C-Plane, measured by only considering the PRBs allocated to CG and only for the CG profiles associated to non GBR bearers, as follows:****

Activation:

  * Cumulatively NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = **1 or 2 and NRCELL.actUlCgType2 = True**



Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell; **[CB008250-F], and per PLMN, if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));**[End CB008250-F]****

  * Units: percent

  * Base:




cgNonGbrTbsTotal(t) = SUM of CG TBS (see 5G_UP_ALG_14664_replaced([11172802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/ 5G_UP_ALG_15651_replaced([11172853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuOgufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of non GBR UEs, with CG occasion in the current slot. **[CB008250-F] If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), per cell and per PLMN. **[End CB008250-F]****

  * cgNonGbrPrbLoad (t) =Floor [ nCgNonGbrPrb_used(t) / nPrb_usable(t) ]; where:

  * nCgNonGbrPrb_used(t) = number of PRBs allocated to CG activated UEs, and corresponding to a CG profile mapped to a non GBR DRB. It only counts the PRBs associated to UEs with CG occasion in the slot as allocated via CG activation DCI. That is, it counts the potential PRBs of the CG pattern in the slot, irrespective of the fact that some CG occasions could be overwritten by DG grant. **[CB008250-F] If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), nCgNonGbrPrb_used(t) is counted per cell and per PLMN.**[End CB008250-F]****

  * If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = **1**

  * nCgNonGbrPrb_used(t) shall only consider the PRBs located in overlapping region of the BWPs i, where i ϵ {n-1, n} and is not the PS BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are considered.




\- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = **1**

  * nPrb_usable(t) = number of PRBs available per slot for PUSCH of ith BWP, where i ϵ {n-1, n} and is the index for smallest dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G_UP_ALG_1811_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * Else

  * nPrb_usable(t) = number of PRBs within the dedicated BWP usable for PUSCH for any DRB

  * t refers to scheduled slot




**_*[CB008250-F]_** *

**_*- If PLMN-aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), nPrb_usable(t) is counted per PLMN in_***

addition to per cell/ per BWP.**[End CB008250-F]**

-Average:

  * avgNPrb_usable(t) = (1/Tprb) * nPrb_usable (t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgNPrb_usable (t−1)



-avgCgNonGbrBitrate(t) = (1/Tprb) *cgNonGbrTbsTotal (t) + (1−(1/Tprb))deltaNumOfSlots * avgCgNonGbrBitrate (t−1)

  * Where deltaNumOfSolots represents the number of slots since the previous update of the avgCgNonGbrBitrate

  * avgCgNonGbrPrbLoad(t) = (1/Tprb) * cgNonGbrPrbLoad (t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgCgNonGbrPrbLoad(t−1)

  * Where: Tprb= time constant for filter (see below)




**[CB008250-F]**

**If PLMN-aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), avgNPrb_usable(t), avgCgNonGbrBitrate(t), and avgCgNonGbrPrbLoad(t) are reported per cell and per PLMN.**

**[End CB008250-F]**

**[CB008250-F] If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the average number of usable PRBs per PLMN shall be computed from the product of the average number of usable PRB per cell to NRPLMNSHARE.targetShare (see 5G_UP_ALG_7385_replaced([11188019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcot_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). **[End CB008250-F]****

Reported Load:

  * Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

  * avgCgNonGbrPrbLoad(T) = the latest value of avgCgNonGbrPrbLoad(t) prior to T

  * average non GBR bitrate in bps = 2u * avgCgNonGbrBitrate(T) , where avgCgNonGbrBitrate(T) represents the latest value of avgCgNonGbrBitrate(t) prior to T




Stored for internal calculations (see 5G_UP_ALG_17873_replaced([11173250](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuSLFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

  * avgNPrb_usable(T) = the latest value of avgNPrb_usable(t) prior to T



**[CB008250-F]**

If the PLMN-aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), avgNPrb_usable(T) is stored per cell and per PLMN for internal calculation (see 5G_UP_ALG_17873_replaced([11173250](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuSLFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**[End CB008250-F]**

Exceptions:

  * If there are no non-GBR bearers, avgCgNonGbrPrbLoad is set to 0%

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.

  * PRBs not available for PUSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”




Inputs:

  * T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval

  * Tprb can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_8168_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4364_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (FDD) nPrb_usable shall consider that the maximum number of PRBs available per slot for PUSCH on the cell level is limited to the total number of usable PRBs granted to UL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6500_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed is set to 'true' (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (TDD) **nPrb_usable is the number of potential Usable PRB for PUSCH for any DRB per slot and is determined from the number of maximum number of potential PUSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPuschPrbForGbr (5G_UP_ALG_13373_replaced([11201352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwVZjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PUSCH allocation in that slot;.**




In case of multiple BWPs, nPrb_usable shall be calculated for each BWP.

Note:
