  * averaging is performed and reported for the same period T as consider for UL GBR PRB Load Monitoring for RAC (see 5G_UP_ALG_8172_replaced([11201209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUycfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

#### 3.30.6.1.0-32 Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL load for LB-HO (ID: 13314452)

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-1**  (ID: `13387651`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL nonGBR Load Report

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13314453`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL nonGBR Load

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13314454`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs When NRBTS.actLoadReportingDuCu= TRUE, for every cell with NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT_PROFILE.loadMeasList that contains UL nonGBR load component, the gNB-DU shall monitor and report the UL nonGBR PUSCH load according to the following procedure.

Inputs and Parameters:

  * bbPoolingPeriod: The periodicity of UL nonGBR PUSCH load monitoring. It shall be equal to the BB pooling period defined by `NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriod` for TDD FR1 and `NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriodFdd` for FDD FR1.
  * configBitRateUl [Bits/sec]: The minimum nonGBR configured bit rate per UE, defined by the operator-configurable NIDD parameter `NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT_PROFILE.configBitRateUL`.
  * rdNonGbrPxschLoadFilterCoeff: The filter coefficient for exponential smoothing.(see [13314430: rdNonGbrPxschLoadFilterCoeff](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kLgMR87HEfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
  * cbrDataVolPerPoolingPeriod [bits]: The minimum nonGBR data volume that shall be expected to be supported per UE within the sampling window. It shall be equal to the product of 'configBitRateUl' [in bits/sec] and 'bbPoolingPeriod' [in sec].
  * Note, It shall be taken care in EFS that the units are aligned among multiple used parameters to match the variable ranges (Either kbps and msecs or bps and sec and so on).



Algorithm:

  * At every bbPoolingPeriod interval t, the gNB-DU shall perform the following steps:

  * The gNB-DU shall calculate the instantaneous nonGBR PUSCH load, `instNonGbrPuschLoad(t)`, for the cell as described in [13314455: Calculation of Instantaneous UL nonGBR Load](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EtO8pc7JEfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

  * The gNB-DU shall update the exponentially smoothed average load, `avgNonGbrPuschLoad`. The new value, `avgNonGbrPuschLoad(t)`, shall be calculated as:

    * `avgNonGbrPuschLoad(t)=``rdNonGbrPxschLoadFilterCoeff * instNonGbrPuschLoad(t) + ((1 - rdNonGbrPxschLoadFilterCoeff) * avgNonGbrPuschLoad(t-1))`



Output:

  * The gNB-DU shall report the latest value of the average nonGBR PUSCH load, `avgNonGbrPuschLoad` with a periodicity of 500 msecs and used in [12879686: Process non GBR load samples](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2xRCxbPGEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) where the nonGBR load report is further processed and sent to LRM-CU, as needed (see [12884517: Expiry of common heartbeat periodic Reporting timer](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mpDFFLVSEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).



Notes:

  * Any change in configuration parameters shall be applied at the beginning of the next bbPoolingPeriod.
  * At startup or when the feature is first activated, the `avgNonGbrPuschLoad` for the first completed bbPoolingPeriod interval shall be set to the calculated `instNonGbrPuschLoad` for that duration, as no historical data is available.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13314455`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Calculation of Instantaneous UL nonGBR Load

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13314456`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs When NRBTS.actLoadReportingDuCu= TRUE, for every cell with NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT_PROFILE.loadMeasList that contains UL nonGBR load component, each BB pooling period t, gNB-DU shall calculate the instantaneous nonGBR PUSCH load (instNonGbrPuschLoad). The calculation shall be performed as follows:

`instNonGbrPuschLoad = 100 * min(cbrDataVolPerPoolingPeriod * numActiveUes * 1/cellSpectralEff , prbDemandNonGbrPerPoolingPeriod) / totalAvailPrbsPerPoolingPeriod`

with:

  * cbrDataVolPerPoolingPeriod [bits]: The minimum nonGBR data volume that is supported per active UE in the cell within the BB pooling period. Please refer to [13314453: Monitoring of UL nonGBR Load](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EtO8o87JEfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for calculation
  * numActiveUEs: The number of unique UEs considered active for nonGBR service during the BB pooling period. A UE shall be considered an active UE if, at any point of time within the BB pooling period, one of the below conditions is met:

  * The gNB has non-zero data for a Logical Channel Group (LCG) containing nonGBR DRB(s) in its buffer housekeeping.

  * The gNB received nonGBR DRB data from the UE on the UL PUSCH. This may occur when a UE sends data using proactive or SR-based scheduling grants.
  * prbDemandNonGbrPerPoolingPeriod: The cumulative PRB demand as required for the nonGBR service of the cell in the next bbPoolingPeriod. It shall be computed as `prbDemandNonGbr * totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod`. Please refer to [11212148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for prbDemandNonGbr and totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod calculations.
  * cellSpectralEff [bits/PRB]: The UL cell spectral efficiency defined as the average number of bits per UL PRB. The cellSpectralEff calculated from [11212148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) shall be converted to bits/Prb and used for the computation here.
  * totalAvailPrbsPerPoolingPeriod: The total number of available PRBs for PUSCH scheduling within the last BB pooling period, summed over all slots within that period. For this calculation:

  * In a slot, the PRBs available for PUSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall be computed as in [11196884: Estimation of available bandwidth](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

  * When BB PRB pooling functionality is enabled (see [11372722: PRB baseband pooling concept](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ud-eXPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), BB pooling might restrict the PRBs available for scheduling in the cell.
  * As an exception to the above, PRBs that are unavailable for PUSCH user data allocation due to slot blanking (e.g., from high temperature) shall be considered "available".

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-2**  (ID: `13387656`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL PDCCH Load Report

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13387657`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL PDCCH Load

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13387658`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs When NRBTS.actLoadReporting= TRUE, for each cell with NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT_PROFILE.loadMeasList that contains UL PDCCH load component, the gNB-DU shall monitor and report the UL PDCCH load according to the following procedure.

Inputs and Parameters:

  * periodicPdcchEvalInterval: The periodicity of the PDCCH slot pattern evaluation interval. See [11169000: Overview](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt0RBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)
  * rdPdcchLoadFilterCoeff: The filter coefficient for exponential smoothing.(see [13387057: rdPdcchLoadFilterCoeff](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IJTFwAIMEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA))



Algorithm:

  * At every periodicPdcchEvalInterval t, the gNB-DU shall perform the following steps:

  * The gNB-DU shall calculate the instantaneous UL PDCCH load, `instUlPdcchLoad(t)`, for the cell as described in [13387659: Calculation of Instantaneous UL PDCCH Load](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_rcb_pAKCEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

  * The gNB-DU shall update the exponentially smoothed average load, `avgUlPdcchLoad`. The new value, `avgUlPdcchLoad(t)`, shall be calculated as:

    * `avgUlPdcchLoad(t)=``rdPdcchLoadFilterCoeff * instUlPdcchLoad(t) + ((1 - rdPdcchLoadFilterCoeff) * avgUlPdcchLoad(t-1))`



Output:

  * The gNB-DU shall report the latest value of the average UL PDCCH load, `avgUlPdcchLoad` with a periodicity of 500 msecs and used in [12879686: Process non GBR load samples](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2xRCxbPGEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) where the UL PDCCH load report is further processed and sent to LRM-CU, as needed (see [12884517: Expiry of common heartbeat periodic Reporting timer](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mpDFFLVSEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).



Notes:

  * At startup or when the feature is first activated, the `avgUlPdcchLoad` for the first completed periodicPdcchEvalInterval shall be set to the calculated `instUlPdcchLoad` for that duration, as no historical data is available.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13387659`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Calculation of Instantaneous UL PDCCH Load

---

**3.30.6.1.0-32.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13387660`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs When NRBTS.actLoadReportingDuCu= TRUE), for each cell with NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT_PROFILE.loadMeasList contains UL PDCCH load component, each periodicPdcchEvalInterval, gNB-DU shall calculate the instantaneous UL PDCCH load sample (instUlPdcchLoad) as below:

`instUlPdcchLoad = 100 * usedCcesUl/availCcesUl`

with:

  * usedCcesUl: The gNB-DU shall calculate this as the sum of CCEs used for UL scheduling within the UE specific search space(s) of any BWP configured in the cell. The gNB-DU shall calculate this sum over all UL scheduling slots (valid k2) within the last `periodicPdcchEvalInterval`(see [11169000: Overview](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt0RBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)). If NRCELL-actPdcchPowerBoost is enabled, if the UE is scheduled with downgraded aggregation level (AL), its used CCE shall be considered based on hypothetical CCEs which were originally needed without the downgraded AL. Additionally. in a given UL scheduling slot, if UE in dedicated BWP (including PS BWP), is blocked from UL scheduling due to unavailability of PDCCH resources, then all the CCEs available for UL scheduling in the dedicated coreset associated with the BWP of the UE shall be considered in used CCEs in the slot.
  * availCcesUl: The gNB-DU shall calculate this as the sum of available CCEs over all UL scheduling slots (valid k2) within the last `periodicPdcchEvalInterval`. For a given UL scheduling slot, the gNB-DU shall calculate the number of available CCEs as the sum of `availCcesInCurrentPdcchPattern` and `cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols`, determined as follows:

  * availCcesInCurrentPdcchPattern: The base number of available CCEs is the union of total CCEs available for UL scheduling within the UE specific search space(s) of any BWP configured in the cell, according to the current active PDCCH slot pattern (see [11168909: PDCCH Slot Pattern](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzp8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)). The CCEs prempted in the user specific spaces due to their usage in common search spaces (For ex. SIB, paging, RACH, see [11171067: Start CCE selection](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuBFXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall be subtracted from the available CCEs calculation.

  * cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols: This value depends on the number of symbols used for PDCCH in the current PDCCH pattern for each of BWPs:

    * If the current used PDCCH slot pattern has reduced the PDCCH symbol usage due to lower load, the gNB-DU shall consider the additional possible CCEs in the unused/free PDCCH symbols configured within the UE specific search spaces of BWPs but not allocated in the current PDCCH slot pattern.

    * If the slot contains only UL scheduling, the gNB-DU shall consider all of those CCEs as available.

    * Else (the slot contains both UL and DL scheduling possibilities), the gNB-DU shall consider only a share of those CCEs, namely `(1-rdDlShareOfUnallocCces)`, as available for UL. Pls refer [13387640: rdDlShareOfUnallocCces](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gbnzEQKBEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for rdDlShareOfUnallocCces definition.
    * Otherwise (if the PDCCH slot pattern has not reduced PDCCH symbols for any of BWPs), the gNB-DU shall set `cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols` to 0.
    * When PRB pooling is enabled (slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true'), the available CCEs in PDCCH symbols might be impacted (see [11169929: PDCCH Capacity Re-Evaluation with PRB Pooling](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and the corresponding unavailable CCEs shall be reduced from availCcesInCurrentPdcchPattern and cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols, if any. While reducing from cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols, the reduction shall be done proportionally according to `(1-rdDlShareOfUnallocCces)`
    * Note: It is possible that CCEs of a coreset mapped to the UE specific search spaces of multiple BWPs can partly, fully, or not at all overlap with each other. The gNB-DU shall not count a single CCE that is shared among multiple search spaces of BWPs more than once in the `availCcesUl` and `usedCcesUl` calculation.

---

#### 3.30.6.1.0-33 Assignment of the number of PRBs UL NBR congestion control (ID: 11201460)

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-1**  (ID: `11201465`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL NBR congestion control suspension during scheduler processing overload

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11201468`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0, HwVariant is not ABIL, and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G_UP_ALG_31301_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the value set for **activation threshold of rdNominalBitrateOlcUlPerCent (See 5G_UP_ALG_31841_replaced([11216990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxcMwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) then, gNB-DU shall skip the following actions for UL NBR congestion control for the NBR category bearers, since all the NBR category users shall be deprioritised in bulk. When the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G_UP_ALG_31301_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is below the value set for **deactivation threshold of rdNominalBitrateOlcUlPerCent (See 5G_UP_ALG_31841_replaced([11216990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxcMwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then gNB-DU shall resume the UL NBR congestion control activities.****

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2**  (ID: `11201474`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs PUSCH NBR Congestion Control

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11201478`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of PUSCH NBR load per Cell

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11201482`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs NBR Cell Load Monitoring

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11201496`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs gNB shall monitor the PUSCH resource used for NBR bearers and used for NBR congestion control

Activation: NBR feature and PUSCH congestion control is activated inthe cell

(NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE & NRCELL.nbrPuschCongHandling = TRUE)

Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell.

  * Units: percent

  * Base:

  * IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

  * For ith BWP, where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n}:




\- NbrPrbLoadUL(i, t) = nPrb_used(i, t) / nPrb_usable(i, t), where:

\- nPrb_used(i, t) = number of PRBs within ith dedicated BWP assigned for PUSCH transport blocks that include NBR category bearer(NBR configured Non-GBR bearers which have positive token bucket and not deprioritized, see 5G_UP_ALG_4178_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of UEs irrespective of their active BWP.

\- nPrb_used(i, t) = number of PRBs within the ith and (i+k)th dedicated BWP assigned for PUSCH transport blocks that include NBR category bearer(NBR configured Non-GBR bearers which have positive token bucket and not deprioritized, see 5G_UP_ALG_4178_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where k ϵ {1, …, n-i}.

\- nPrb_usable(i, t) = number of PRBs within the ith dedicated BWP usable for PUSCH for any DRB

  * ELSE



\- NbrPrbLoadUL(t) = nPrb_used(t) / nPrb_usable(t), where:

\- nPrb_used(t) = number of PRBs assigned for PUSCH transport blocks that include NBR category bearer(NBR configured Non-GBR bearers which have positive token bucket and not deprioritized, see 5G_UP_ALG_4178_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

\- nPrb_usable(t) = number of PRBs usable for PUSCH for any DRB

  * END



[CB013961-B]- For a UE for which a SR response grant was scheduled with DRB priority in the current slot, i.e. UE entered scheduler with SR response scheduling state SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UE contribution to nPrb_used(t) or nPrb_used_n(i,t) shall be scaled with (i.e multiplied with) racWeightInSrGrant as indicated in 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).. [End CB013961-B]

If UL MU-MIMO is activated (NRCELL.actUlMuMimo = True) in the cell, nPrb_used contribution from each of NBR bearer UEs shall be computed as described in 5G_UP_ALG_29555_replaced([11201501](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWnq_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

\- Where: t refers to scheduled slot

-Average:

\- avgNbrUlPrbLoad(t) = (1/Tprb) * NbrUlPrbLoad(t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgNbrUlPrbLoad(t−1)

\- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

\- avgNbrUlPrbLoad(i, t) = (1/Tprb) * NbrUlPrbLoad(i, t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgNbrUlPrbLoad(i, t−1)

\- Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n} and n refers to the number of dedicated BWP per cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

\- Where: Tprb= time constant for filter. Tprb could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

\- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200 (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4364_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Reported Load:

  * Using periodic PUSCH NBR PRB load for congestion detection



\- avgNbrPrbLoadUL(T) = the latest value of avgNbrPrbLoadUL(t) prior to T,

\- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

\- avgNbrPrbLoadUL(i, T) = the latest value of avgNbrPrbLoadUL(i, t) prior to T

\- Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n} and n refers to the number of dedicated BWP per cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

where:

\- T refers to end of NBR congestion detection period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current congestion detection interval.

Exceptions:

  * For NRCELL.nbrPuschCongHandling = FALSE or NBR congestion detection period NRCELL.congDetectPeriod = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this NBR Load monitoring

  * If there are no NBR configured bearers, the avgNbrPrbLoad(T) is set to 0%

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.

  * PRBs not available for PUSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”




Notes:

with PRB pooling (if slowPrbPoolingAllowed (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))), nPrb_usable shall consider that the maximum number of PRBs available per slot for PUSCH on the cell level is limited to the total number of usable PRBs granted to UL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6500_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When the parameter NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc is set to 'true', the number of allocable PUSCH PRB per slot may vary; however, the value calculated for nPrb_usable_i(t) should not change and should be still restricted to the #PRB of the PUSCH region without considering the #PRB allocable to PUSCH which are part of the pCSI PUCCH area.

  * For PRB allocations for transport blocks with mixed traffic types, a proportional scheme is used for deriving nPrb_used(t).

  * The PRBs shall be weighted equally, not taking into account the number of PUSCH symbols in different slots.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11201501`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Interaction with UL MU-MIMO

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11201507`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs If UL MU-MIMO is activated (NRCELL.actUlMuMimo = True), the PRBs allocated to NBR bearer UEs can be shared with other nonGBR UEs spatially and hence the NBR PUSCH PRB cell load calculation (see 5G_UP_ALG_29554_replaced([11201482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWnqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall take that into account and the NBR PRB load shall be reduced proportionally as below.

For NBR UEs which are not paired in a virtual UE, the NBR FD resources allocated to them as described in 5G_UP_ALG_22159_replaced([11199843](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be directly considered in the nPrb_used in their corresponding dedicated BWP.

For a NBR UE i, spatially paired, the number of NBR FD resources that shall be considered in nPrb_used calculation for their NBR bearers, namely rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes(i), in their corresponding BWP shall be computed as follows:

layerNbrPrbAllocUe(i) = Number of FD resources considered as NBR resources required for the NBR UE i within the virtual UE during the calculation of NBR FD resources for the virtual UE (see 5G_UP_ALG_22159_replaced([11199843](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

rrmSpatialShareOfUeInVirtualUe = layerNumUeInVirtualUe(i)/layerNumVirtualUe

rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes(i) = layerNbrPrbAllocUe(i) * rrmSpatialShareOfUeInVirtualUe

where:

layerNumVirtualUe is the total number of PUSCH layers of all paired UEs in virtual UE, refer to [11147973](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksIO-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

layerNumUeInVirtualUe(i) is the number of PUSCH layers of the UE i in the virtual UE [CB008235-D] if there is no beam group involved in virtual UE;   
if the beam groups are involved in virtual UE, the number of PUSCH layers of the beam group is the maximum number of layer of UEs in this beam group. [End CB008235-D]

Example:

  * Let one NBR UE (UE_A) be paired with noNGBR UE(UE_B) in a virtual UE with both UEs occupying 2 spatial layers and the NBR PRB required for UE_A including MU-PRB compensation factor be 30 PRBs . Hence, 30 PRBs will be reserved as NBR PRB required for the virtual UE as described in 5G_UP_ALG_22159_replaced([11199843](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In this case, the rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes for UE_A = 30*0.5 = 15 PRBs.
  * Let NBR UE(UE_A) be paried with candidate UE group ( NBR UE_B, nonGBR UE_C) in a virtual UE with both UEs (UE_A and candidate group) occupying 2 spatial layers and the NBR PRB required for UE_A including MU-PRB compensation factor be 50 PRBs and for UE_B, it be 10 PRBs. Hence, 50 PRBs will be reserved as NBR PRB required for virtual UE as described in 5G_UP_ALG_22159_replaced([11199843](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In this case, the rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes for UE_A = 50 _0.5 = 25 PRBs and for UE_B, it shall be 10_ 0.5=5 PRBs.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11201512`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs PUSCH congestion detection due to NBR overload

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11201524`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs gNB shall support the NBR PUSCH congestion detection mechanism on the cell in FR1 TDD and FDD.

\- Activation: NBR feature and PUSCH congestion control is activated in the cell

(NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE & NRCELL.nbrPuschCongHandling = TRUE)

\- Scope: NBR PUSCH congestion shall be detected

IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

\- Per dedicated BWP i.e. 'n' independent PUSCH congestion detection mechanism per cell.

Note, there can be more than one dedicated BWP configured per cell. Power saving BWP is considered a dedicated BWP and NBR PDSCH congestion detection shall also be performed for power saving BWP.

ELSE

\- per cell.

IF enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

\- per resource group and per dedicated BWP(s) in this cell.

\- Input:

 NBR PUSCH congestion detection per dedicated BWP **requires the following inputs:**

\- per dedicated BWP **periodic average PUSCH GBR PRB load avgGbrPrbLoad_n(T) refers to 5G_UP_ALG_8172_replaced([11201209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwUycfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **[Before CB008118-CB] Note, when NRCELL.actPowerSavingBWP = TRUE, as the GBR PRB load is not available for PS BWP, avgGbrPrbLoad(T) for PS BWP shall be considered 0. **[End CB008118-CB]** ****

\- per dedicated BWP **periodic average PUSCH NBR PRB load avgNbrPrbLoadUL(i, T) refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22645_replaced([11201478](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWnp_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Amount of available resources for dynamic scheduling on PUSCH according to 5G_UP_ALG_4970_replaced([11199433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNduvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **[CB008250-C] or if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[End CB008250-C] NBR PUSCH congestion detection per resource group requires the following inputs:****

\- Resource Group periodic average UL load avgNbrRGLoadUL_i(T), the latest value of rrmRGAvgLoadUL_i(t) **prior to T,**

where:

  * rrmRGAvgLoadUL(t) refer to 5G_UP_ALG_24886_replaced([11207865](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

  * i refer to each configured Resource Group.

  * T refers to end of NBR congestion detection period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current congestion detection interval.




 Amount of available resources for dynamic scheduling on PUSCH according to 5G_UP_ALG_4970_replaced([11199433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNduvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 PUSCH GBR+NBR congestion limit: marks a certain maximum percentage of PUSCH resources to be utilized for GBR+NBR as defined by NIDD parameter NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit. It shall consider the maximum percentage of PUSCH resources can be utilized for GBR+NBR by Resource Group is calculated by NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit and Resource Group Target Share. **[CB008250-C] if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), Resource Group Target Shareas is computed dynamically, i.e., rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_31505_replaced([11206598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), else **[End CB008250-C] Resource Group Target share is set to _dynamic resource group target share rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare as defined in (5G_UP_ALG_28672_replaced([11207717](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM8_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))._****

 PUSCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor (R&D configurable; proposal: range 0.7..1.0, step 0.01, default 0.9, e.g., rdUlsNbrPrbCongHyst (5G_UP_ALG_23880_replaced([11209403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwzTnfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))).

 PUSCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit as product of the PUSCH GBR+NBR load limit and the PUSCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor.

\- Congestion Detection:

If any following conditions are fulfilled, the NBR PUSCH congestion is detected, otherwise congestion is not considered detected:

 any dedicated BWP periodic average PUSCH GBR PRB load avgGbrPrbLoad_n(T) + PUSCH NBR PRB load avgNbrPrbLoadUL(i, T) exceeds the PUSCH GBR+NBR congestion limit.

 If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[CB008250-C] or if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[End CB008250-C], any Resource Group i in the cell has its periodic average UL load rrmRGAvgLoadUL_i(T) (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_24886_replaced([11207865](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) exceeding the PUSCH GBR+NBR congestion limit.****

 For rrmRGAvgLoadUL_i(T) which is calculated by PUSCH resources to be utilized for GBR+NBR by RG and RG target share, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_24886_replaced([11207865](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * **[CB008118-CB] If both NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit and NRCELL.maxGBRTrafficLimit is exceeded during PUSCH congestion detection, trigger GBR congestion control (refer 5G_UP_ALG_31361_replaced([11201715](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwYc2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ) firstly and then NBR congestion control in case GBR congestion is resolved and NBR congestion is still detected. It purpose to avoid overlapping of GBR and NBR congestion control. **[End CB008118-CB]****



[CB008250-B-UPD002] Note that when the PLMN aware scheduler is activated for the cell ([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) _GBR congestion limit takes the value of_ maxGBRTrafficLimit_L2PS (**[12704521S](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oy0TEGCREfCLrcnPCspVyQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) ).[End CB008250-B-UPD002] 

As soon as NBR PUSCH congestion is detected on any dedicated BWP or at least one of the Resource Groups in the cell, the congestion handling shall be performed according to 5G_UP_ALG_22609_replaced([11201529](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOsfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

\- Congestion Resolved:

If following conditions are fulfilled, the NBR PUSCH congestion is resolved, otherwise congestion is not considered resolved:

 largest dedicated BWPperiodic average PUSCH GBR PRB load avgGbrPrbLoad(T) + PUSCH NBR PRB load avgNbrPrbLoadUL(T) drops below the PUSCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit.

When NBR congestion is resolved, the de-prioritized NBR LCGs return to normal NBR scheduling according to 5G_UP_ALG_24098_replaced([11201546](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOtPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If PUSCH GBR+NBR load is detected to further increase, (per cell or per Resource Group in the cell) , additional LCGs with NBR bearers shall be selected for de-prioritization accordingly.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11201529`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs NBR LCG/UE de-prioritization in UL congestion

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `13320102`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs When NBR PUSCH congestion is detected on any dedicated BWP or Resource Groups in the cell, gNB shall deprioritize NBR bearer(s) or UE(s) as following:

 If a UE has the NBR DRB as the DRB with the highest priority (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and UE is waiting to be scheduled for SR response grant with DRB priority, i.e. its SR response scheduling state is set to SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT (see 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then this UE and its NBR DRB shall not be deprioritized.

 The LCGs with NBR bearers shall be selected to de-prioritize from Cell **each** dedicated BWP or Resource Groups in the cell which are detected congestion (5G_UP_ALG_22616_replaced([11201512](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWnrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).****

  * If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), as the NBR congestion control mechanism is performed per dedicated BWP, it is possible that congestion might be detected in one BWP but not in the other and so on. If NBR congestion is detected in multiple BWPs, NBR LCG selection for deprioritize shall be performed starting from smallest to the largest BWP so that the predicted NBR load reduction resulting from LCG de-prioritization in smaller BWP can already be considered in the larger BWP as the smaller BWPs are always nested within the larger BWP.



**\- If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the congestion handling of NBR deprioritization selection shall be performed for each congested Resource Group in the cell and congested cell. The selection of NBR LCGs/UEs to be deprioritized/~~reprioritized~~ shall be performed from each Resource Group firstly, and then check if more NBR LCGs/UEs still need to be deprioritized/~~reprioritized~~ for NBR congested cell (or largest dedicated BWP) after considering the previous NBR deprioritization/~~reprioritization~~ handling per each congested Resource Group. **If no resource group congestion is detected, the NBR LCGs/UEs to be de-prioritized shall be selected per cell or dedicated BWPs. An NBR LCG/UE is associated with a RG if it contains at least one NBR DRB belonging to the RG. An NBR DRB is a DRB of NBR category, see definition at 5G_UP_ALG_4794_replaced([11194709](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv24YfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).****

 As many LCGs with NBR bearers shall be selected such that sum of the NBR PUSCH resource utilization of the selected bearers (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_24096_replaced([11201565](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is larger than or equal to the excess of the PUSCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit per dedicated BWP or Resource Groups in the cell. The rationale of deprioritize NBR load to the load hysteresis limit is to avoid ping-ping congestion happen.

 The UL NBR LCGs/UEs to be de-prioritized and excluded from scheduling are determined in order of the following criteria and step (criteria and tie break are identical for PUSCH and PDCCH congestion detection):

Step1: LCGs of UEs in power limitation

Step2: Then from higher to lower LCG/UE priority value based on the NRCELL.congWeightAlg selection:

  * If the NRCELL.congWeightAlg = ''priorityLevel ', the bearer congestion priority is based on the NRBTS/NRDRB.priorityLevel configured value for the bearer, the lower priority values indicate higher priority

  * If the NRCELL.congWeightAlg = 'arpPrioPerVul', the bearer congestion priority is based on the ARP priority configured for the bearers(refer to 5G_CP_IF_NTW_5886_replaced([11408282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__GmynPvmEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). First the bearers with ARP vulnerability "preemptable" are prioritized in order of the ARP priority, then the bearers with ARP vulnerability "not preemptable" also in order of ARP priority.

  * LCG priority value is equal to the lowest priority value among all NBR bearers within the LCG

  * UE priority value is equal to the lowest priority value among all NBR bearers within the UE.




Step3: Then from higher to lower PUSCH NBR resource utilisation of an LCG for PUSCH Congestion Control (see 5G_UP_ALG_24096_replaced([11201565](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), OR higher to lower PDCCH NBR resource utilization of a UE for PDCCH Congestion Control (see 5G_UP_ALG_22905_replaced([11201589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOvfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Step4: Then in random order.

This selection only needs be performed for congested dedicated BWP(s) or Resource Groups in the cell **when NBR PUSCH/PDCCH congestion is detected or when there is any load level changes following this detection, additional LCGs/UEs need to be de-prioritized or some de-prioritized LCGs/UEs need to be removed from the de-prioritized list. It is left to entity level/implementation to define which exact procedure has the least complexity (e.g., triggered search, managed sorted lists, etc).**

The de-prioritisation shall be performed on LCG basis in case of PUSCH congestion and nd be performed on UE basis in case of PDCCH congestion.

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the UL NBR LCG/UE considered here for NBR de-prioritization shall only be among UEs with active BWP same as BWP in which congestion is detected.

[CB013244-SR-B-UPD001]UE is not considered for de-prioritization if the UE is in the "inactive BWP" like during the UL BWP scanning procedure (see [11111313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).[End CB013244-SR-B-UPD001]

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11201546`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs PUSCH NBR congestion reprioritization

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11201550`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs [CB008227-DA_UPD001]

gNB shall select as many deprioritized NBR bearer(s) or UE(s) as possible back to NBR scheduling when NBR PUSCH congestion is resolved (refer 5G_UP_ALG_22616_replaced([11201512](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWnrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The re-prioritisation shall be performed with following conditions met and on LCG basis which containing NB bearers:

  * For each dedicated BWP[CB008709-H-UPD005] AND each Resource Groups in the cell [End CB008709-H-UPD005] the average PUSCH NBR PRB load plus estimated load of reprioritize bearer(s) (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_24096_replaced([11201565](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which belongs to them would not exceed PUSCH GBR+NBR congestion limit.



After reprioritization, the gNB shall update the average PUSCH NBR PRB load of each dedicated BWP [CB008709-H-UPD005] or each Resource Groups in the cell [End CB008709-H-UPD005] with the estimated load of the reprioritized LCG(s) which belongs to.

The priority of NBR LCG to be reprioritized are as following:

1: The congestion priority value based on the NRCELL.congWeightAlg selection (same as de-prioritization step1 defined in 5G_UP_ALG_22609_replaced([11201529](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOsfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

2: If value is same in step 1, NBR PUSCH PRB load (5G_UP_ALG_24096_replaced([11201565](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in increasing order.

[End CB008227-DA_UPD001]

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `11201555`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of PUSCH resource utilisation per NBR bearer

!PLEASE notice this item is replaced by 5G_UP_ALG_24096_replaced([11201565](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11201560`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs The average PUSCH resource utilisation of NBR bearers shall be monitored by the gNB at the LCG level. The monitoring function shall be applied to all LCGs containing NBR bearers (referred to as an NBR LCG).

  * The number of PRBs which are utilised by the NBR LCG for the instantaneously transferred user data shall be evaluated based on the proportion of the data volume for the NBR LCG to the overall data volume of the UE received at the gNB. For that purpose, the data volume shall be measured for the NBR LCG after MAC demultiplexing. The measured data volume shall be increased by the size of the MAC header received with each transport block.
  * This can be expressed by the following equation

  * Base:




\- PrbNbrUl(i,m,t) = [RNBR,UL,i,m(t) / TBS_UL(t) ]* PrbUl(i,t), where:

i: index of the UE with an NBR LCG.

m: index of the NBR LCG.

t: specifies the subframe the transport block is sent.

RNBR,UL,i,m(t): Data volume of all NBR bearers on LCG m inclusive overhead of the MAC header sent to UE i at time t.

PrbUl(i,t) The overall number of PRBs used for UE i in subframe t for all bearers

TBSUL,i(t): UL TBS of UE i at time t which is equal to the sum of the TBS of the transmitted codeword.

  * Average:



The average duty part PUSCH resource allocation of a NBR LCG is then calculated via an exponential filter on subframe basis

avgPrbNbrUl(i,m,t) = (1/Tprb) * PrbNbrUl(i,m,t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgPrbNbrUl(i,m,t−1)

with

i index of the considered UE

m index of the NBR LCG

t considered subframe

PrbNbrUl(i,m,t) as calculated above

Tprb could be a R&D parameter constant for the averaging function, with the following suggested properties:

\- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200 (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4364_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

For TTIs when the scheduler does not allocate PUSCH resources to UE i for the duty part traffic belonging to NBR LCG m AND if there is no retransmission scheduled for UE i, PrbNbrUl(i,m,t) shall be set to 0.

For TTIs when there is retransmission scheduled for UE i, PrbNbrUl(i,m,t) is not calculated which means the average PRB allocation of the NBR LCG will not be updated. Since the number of PRBs used by the NBR LCG in the retransmission is probably not easily calculated, we make the assumption that in such TTIs the number of PRBs used for retransmitting NBR data is equal to the average. So the average PRB allocation is not updated.For TTIs when the scheduler does not expect to receive an UL transmission from UE i, PrbNbrUl(i,m,t) shall be set to 0.

For TTIs when the UL transmission is expected but not received correctly by the gNB, PrbNbrUl(i,m,t) is not calculated which means the average PRB allocation of the NBR LCG will not be updated. Since the number of PRBs used by an NBR LCG can't be calculated if the UL transmission is not received correctly, it is assumed that in such TTIs the number of PRBs used is equal to the average. Therefore, there is no need to update the average PRB allocation.

For TTIs when the NBR LCG is de-prioritized as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_22609_replaced([11201529](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOsfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PrbNbrUl(i,m,t) is not calculated which means the average PRB allocation of the NBR bearer will not be updated. An exception to this is if in a certain TTI a deprioritized NBR LCG is given an allocation and if the housekeeping function (5G_UP_ALG_5114_replaced([11203638](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for the NBR LCG presumes an empty transmission buffer OR if token bucket variable rrmNbrTokenBucketi,LCG,m for the NBR LCG (5G_UP_ALG_22263_replaced([11196334](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwB3jfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is <= 0, then the filter is updated for all TTIs since the filter was last updated.

[CB008227-E] Whenever the UE i switches its active BWP, average PUSCH resource utilization for all its NBR LCGs m, avgPrbNbrUl(i,m) shall be re-initialized to 0. [End CB008227-E]

Note: PUSCH resource usage figures for NBR LCGs will be used for congestion detection in scheduling.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-6**  (ID: `11201565`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Estimation PUSCH PRB load per NBR bearer for deprioritization and reprioritization

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-2.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11201569`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs gNB shall estimate average PUSCH PRB load of NBR UE at LCG level, that will be used for PUSCH congestion de-prioritization and re-prioritization on FR1 TDD and FDD cell.

The monitoring function shall be applied to all LCGs containing NBR bearers (referred to as an NBR LCG).

Activation: NBR feature and PUSCH congestion control are activated (NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE & NRCELL.nbrPuschCongHandling = TRUE)

Metrics:

  * Scope: per NBR LCG(refer to LCGs containing NBR bearers)

  * The instantaneous UL NBR UE spectrum efficency is calculated at every slot t:




InstUeUlSE(i,t) =TbsUl(i,t) / PrbUl(i,t),

where:

i: index of the UE with an NBR bearer.

t: slot of UE is scheduled for PUSCH.

PrbUl(i,t): The overall number of PUSCH PRBs used for UE i in slot t for all bearers

TbsUl(i,t): UL TBS of UE i at slot t which is equal to the sum of the TBS of the transmitted codeword(s)

  * If the UE is not scheduled in a slot with UL transmission, the calculation shall not update.

  * The average UL NBR UE spectrum efficency is then calculated via an exponential filter on slot basis.




avgUeUlSE(i,t) = (1/Tprb) * InstUeUlSE(i,t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgUeUlSE(i, t−1),

where

i: index of the UE with an NBR bearer.

t: slot of UE is scheduled for PUSCH.

Tprb: R&D parameter constant for the averaging function, with the following suggested properties:

\- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200 (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4364_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

InstUeUlSE(i,t): as calculated above

  * The PUSCH PRB load per NBR LCG k is calculated when PUSCH NBR congestion is detected or resolved (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22616_replaced([11201512](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwWnrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))



\- NbrUlPrbLoad(i,m)= ∑k nbrUl(i,k) /avgUeUlSE(i,T)* normalization_factor,

where:

i: index of the UE with an NBR bearer.

k: index of the NBR bearer belong to UE i.

T: slot of congestion is detected or resolved.

∑k nbrUl(i,k): derive from the NBR setting (NRBTS/NRDRB_MAC.nbrUl) of the NBR bearers k for UE i belongs to LCG m with unit [bps]

avgUeUlSE(i, T): the latest value of avgUeUlSE(t) when congestion is detected or resolved.

normalization_factor: Normalization based on the total number of UL slot per second (see 5G_UP_54_replaced([11346921](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubIls_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD and 5G_UP_77_replaced([11347090](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz0_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for DSS).

Exceptions:

  * For nbrPuschCongHandling = FALSE or NBR congestion detection period NRCELL.congDetectPeriod = 0, gNB no need to perform this NBR Load calculation.



Note: The PUSCH PRB load per NBR LCG calculation needs only be performed when NBR PUSCH congestion is detected or resloved OR when any cell NBR load changes that trigger additional UEs need to be de-prioritized/re-prioritized. It is left to entity level/implementation to define which exact procedure has the least complexity (e.g., triggered search, managed sorted lists, etc).

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-3**  (ID: `11201575`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL PDCCH NBR Congestion Control

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11201579`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL PDCCH NBR Load

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11201584`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall monitor the PDCCH resources (CCEs) used for scheduling the prioritized (i.e. having positive NBR token bucket) UL NBR bearers configured in a given cell which is eventually used to detect UL NBR congestion on PDCCH channel.

This requirement is applicable only for FR1(both TDD and FDD). The rationale is that there is no benefit in executing PDCCH congestion control algorithm in FR2 without FDM & dynamic PDCCH.

Activation: DL PDCCH NBR congestion control is activated (NRCELL.nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl = TRUE).

Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell.

  * Unit: percent

  * Base:

  * IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

  * For ith BWP, where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n}:




\- NbrUlPdcchLoad (i, t) = nCCE_used(i, t) / nCCE_usable(i, t), where:

\- nCCE_used(i, t) = number of CCEs within ith dedicated BWP allocated for PDCCH (UL grant) for UE(s) with highest eligible priority class = drbTraffic and scheduling PUSCH transport block for data from their prioritized (NBR positive token bucket) NBR bearer irrespective of their active BWP, otherwise, it shall be 0.

\- nCCE_usable(i, t) = number of CCEs available for UL NR scheduling within the ith dedicated BWP.

  * ELSE

  * NbrUlPdcchLoad(t) = nCCE_used(t) / nCCE_usable(t), where:




\- nCCE_used(t) = number of CCEs allocated for PDCCH (UL grant) for UE(s) with highest eligible priority class = drbTraffic and scheduling PUSCH transport block having data from its prioritized (NBR positive token bucket) NBR bearer, otherwise, it shall be 0.

\- nCCE_usable(t) = number of CCEs available for UL NR scheduling.

  * END



\- Where: t refers to scheduled slot

Notes for nCCE_usable calculation:

  * nCCE_usable shall calculate the number of CCEs available for UL scheduling in any given slot.
  * The construction of coreset and PDCCH slot pattern for a given cell is explained in 5G_UP_ALG_11211_replaced([11168405](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktv_kfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G_UP_ALG_3958_replaced([11168909](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzp8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and split of CCEs, if any, between UL/DL is explained in 5G_UP_ALG_3955_replaced([11169860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6Xp_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) which can be used to calculate nCCE_usable.
  * The pre-empted CCEs (5G_UP_ALG_4032_replaced([11169907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in the available CCEs, if any, shall be considered in nCCE_usable.
  * With PRB pooling (if slowPrbPoolingAllowed (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 'true'), the nCCE_usable shall consider the number of CCEs that can be used is limited by the total amount of usable PRB allocated to DL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6960_replaced([11169929](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  * Average:




\- avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(t) = (1/Tprb) * NbrUlPdcchLoad(t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) * avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(t−1)

\- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

\- avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(i, t) = (1/filterCoefficient) * NbrUlPdcchLoad(i, t) + (1−(1/filterCoefficient)) * avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(i, t−1)

\- Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n} and n refers to the number of dedicated BWP per cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

\- Where: filterCoefficient could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

\- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200 (see R&D parameter rdGbrCongestFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4366_replaced([11188276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * Periodic Load:



At the end of every NBR congestion detection period T (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod): 

\- avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(T) = the latest value of avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(t) prior to T

\- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

\- avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(i, T) = the latest value of avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(i, t) prior to T

\- Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n} and n refers to the number of dedicated BWP per cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

which is used as NBR UL PDCCH congestion control mechanism described in 5G_UP_ALG_22725_replaced([11183487](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK76_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Exceptions:

  * For NRCELL.nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl = FALSE or NBR congestion detection period NRCELL.congDetectPeriod = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this NBR UL PDCCH Load monitoring

  * If there are no NBR configured bearers, the avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(T) is set to 0%

  * Slots without any CCEs available for UL NR PDCCH (PDCCH for UL grant) shall be skipped.




Notes:

With PRB pooling (if slowPrbPoolingAllowed (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 'true'), the nCCE_usable shall consider the number of CCEs that can be used is limited by the total amount of usable PRB allocated to DL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_6960_replaced([11169929](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11201589`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL PDCCH resource usage per NBR UE

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11201594`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall monitor the PDCCH resource (CCEs) used by UEs for scheduling the prioritized (i.e. having positive NBR token bucket) LCGs containing NBR bearers which is eventually used to de-prioritise those NBR UEs during PDCCH congestion control based on their NBR PDCCH resource usage.

This requirement is applicable only for FR1(both TDD and FDD). The rationale is that there is no benefit in executing PDCCH congestion control algorithm in FR2 without FDM & dynamic PDCCH.

Activation: DL PDCCH NBR congestion control is activated (NRCELL.nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl = TRUE).

Metrics:

  * Scope: per UE

  * Unit: CCEs




Base:

\- usedCCEsNbrUl(i, t) = number of CCEs allocated for PDCCH (UL grant) for UE i with highest priority class = drbTraffic and scheduling PUSCH data for LCG containing positive NBR token bucket, otherwise, it shall be 0.

\- Where:

i refers index of the UE

t refers to the scheduled slot

  * Average:



The average PDCCH CCE utilization be the UE i to schedule NBR data is then calculated via an exponential filter every UL scheduling slot t

\- avgUsedCCEsNbrUl(i,t) = (1/filterCoefficient) * usedCCEsNbrUl(i,t) + (1−(1/filterCoefficient)) * avgUsedCCEsNbrUl(i,t−1)

filterCoefficient could be a R&D parameter constant for the averaging function, with the following suggested properties:

\- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200 (see R&D parameter rdGbrCongestFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4366_replaced([11188276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * Periodic Load:



At the end of every NBR congestion detection period T (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod): 

\- avgUsedCCEsNbrUl(i, T) = the latest value of avgUsedCCEsNbrUl(i) prior to T

which is used as NBR UL PDCCH congestion control mechanism described in 5G_UP_ALG_22725_replaced([11183487](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK76_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Exceptions:

  * For NRCELL.nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl = FALSE or NBR congestion detection period NRCELL.congDetectPeriod = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this NBR UL PDCCH Load monitoring

  * Slots without any CCEs available for UL NR PDCCH (PDCCH for UL grant) shall be skipped.

  * The exponential filter is updated UL slot (see above) or only when UE is scheduled. In later case, the filter update shall also be done in that slot for all missing UL NR slots (considering zero load in those slots) since the filter was last updated so that the UE NBR load is not artificially seen higher. It is left to entity level/implementation to define which manner has the least complexity.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11201601`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL PDCCH Congestion Detection

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-3.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11201609`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall support the NBR UL PDCCH congestion detection mechanism

This requirement is applicable only for FR1(both TDD and FDD). The rationale is that there is no benefit in executing PDCCH congestion control algorithm in FR2 without FDM & dynamic PDCCH.

Activation: DL PDCCH NBR congestion control is activated (NRCELL.nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl = TRUE).

Scope:

\- per cell.

IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

\- Per dedicated BWP i.e. _'n' independent PDCCH congestion detection mechanism per cell. Note, there can be more than one dedicated BWP configured per cell. Power saving BWP is considered a dedicated BWP and NBR PDCCH congestion detection shall also be performed for power saving BWP._

ELSE

\- per cell.

Trigger: Once every NBR congestion detection period (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod)

NBR UL PDCCH congestion detection requires the following inputs:

  * periodic average UL PDCCH CCE utilization for UEs scheduling its GBR & prioritized(positive NBR token bucket) NBR LCGs/bearers in the cell,
  * for NBR UL PDCCH CCE load, namely avgNbrUlPdcchLoad(T) refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22903_replaced([11201579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * for GBR UL PDCCH CCE load, namely avgGbrUlPdcchLoad(T) **[Before CB008118-CB] shall be considered 0 (see note below)**[CB008118-CB] refer to 5G_UP_ALG_31356_replaced([11201693](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwYc1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **[End CB008118-CB]** ****
  * PDCCH GBR+NBR congestion limit: marks a certain maximum percentage of PDCCH resources to be utilized for GBR+NBR as defined by NIDD parameter _NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit._
  * UL PDCCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor (R&D parameter rdPdcchNbrCceCongHyst, see 5G_UP_ALG_23320_replaced([11193626](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvuVh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
  * UL PDCCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit as product of the PDCCH GBR+NBR limit and the PDCCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor



Once every NBR congestion detection period (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod):

NBR DL PDCCH congestion is detected if the periodic average UL PDCCH GBR+NBR load exceeds the NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit, **otherwise congestion is not considered detected.**

As soon as NBR PDSCH congestion is detected, the following handling shall apply:

  * UEs configured with NBR bearers shall be selected for de-prioritization in scheduling
  * Criteria for NBR UE selection is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_22609_replaced([11201529](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwXOsfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * As many NBR UEs shall be selected such that sum of the UL-PDCCH CCE utilisation of the selected UEs for scheduling its NBR LCGs/bearers is larger or equal to the excess of the PDCCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit.
  * All NBR bearers of the de-prioritized NBR UEs shall be considered as normal non-GBR traffic (NBR configuration is ignored even if their corresponding LCG have positive NBR token bucket) and shall be treated as normal nonGBR category in scheduling is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_4794_replaced([11194709](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv24YfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).



NBR PDCCH congestion is considered to be resolved if the average PDCCH GBR+NBR load drops below the PDCCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit, otherwise congestion is not considered resolved.

When NBR congestion is resolved, all de-prioritized NBR UEs will return to normal NBR scheduling. In other words, the set of de-prioritized NBR UEs is emptied.

If PDCCH GBR+NBR load further increases, additional NBR UEs shall be selected for de-prioritization and according handling shall apply in scheduling.

Note: If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as the NBR congestion control mechanism is per dedicated BWP, it is possible that congestion might be detected in one BWP but not in the other and so on.

**[Before CB008118-CB]**

Note: As per NIDD description, _maxNbrTrafficLimit represents the cumulative load limit of both GBR+NBR. However, since GBR PDCCH load montioring is not available till now, for PDCCH channel, avgGbrUlPdcchLoad is considered 0 which results in maxNbrTrafficLimit limiting only NBR load. This will result in over-utilization of PDCCH resources for GBR+NBR and the number of PDCCH CCEs available for nonGBR traffic might be quite low. In extreme situations (depending on configuration and load), all the available CCEs might be utlilized for GBR+NBR traffic resulting in no PDCCH resources available for nonGBR traffic. This current behaviour can be corrected once GBR congestion control is introduced in future release and thereby also including the GBR PDCCH load here in the calculation._

**[CB008118-CB]**

Note: As per NIDD description, maxNbrTrafficLimit represents the combine load limit of both GBR+NBR. Congestion is detected, if the periodic average UL PDCCH GBR+NBR load exceeds the NRCELL/maxNbrTrafficLimit. For GBR PDCCH(UL) load montioring(refer 5G_UP_ALG_31354_replaced([11201675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwYc0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Monitoring and counting of GBR PDCCH load shall be included into UL GBR PDCCH load. L2-PS shall monitor the PDCCH resources (CCEs) used for scheduling the prioritized (i.e. having positive GBR token bucket) UL GBR bearers configured in a given cell. GBR traffic (including MC-GBR & DC-GBR) should not be greater than NRCELL.maxGBRTrafficLimit. GBR congestion control shall be triggered when total PDCCH(UL) load of GBR exceeds the congestion limit: NRCELL.maxGBRTrafficLimit.

**[End CB008118-CB]**

[CB008250-B-UPD002] Note that when the PLMN aware scheduler is activated for the cell ([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) _GBR congestion limit takes the value of_ maxGBRTrafficLimit_L2PS (**[12704521S](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oy0TEGCREfCLrcnPCspVyQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) ).[End CB008250-B-UPD002]

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4**  (ID: `11201615`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL NBR time domain congestion control (Descope from CB008227)

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11201621`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL Time Domain NBR load

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11201626`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall monitor the NBR UL time domain load and used for NBR congestion control

This requirement only applies to FR2 TDD SA mode.

Activation: NBR congestion control is activated for UL (NRCELL.nbrPuschCongHandling = TRUE or nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl= TRUE or nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl= TRUE)

Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell

  * Units: percent




Base:

\- NbrUlAllocations(P) = nAllocations_made(P) / nAllocations_usable(P), where:

\- nAllocations_made(P) = number of allocations by L2-PS for PUSCH transport blocks that include any NBR category bearer(NBR configured Non-GBR bearers which have positive token bucket, see 5G_UP_ALG_22375_replaced([11196368](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCemfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , over the period P

\- nAllocations_usable(P) = number of allocations usable by L2-PS for PUSCH for any DRB over the period P, rrmMaxNumUesFdmUl * # of available slot in the period P. For FR2, the rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl =1

\- P = 100 ms (fixed)

-Average:

\- avgNbrUlTdLoad(P) = ( 1/Ttdli ) *NbrUlAllocations (P) + ( 1−( 1/Ttdli ) ) * avgNbrUlTdLoad(P−1) ; where

\- Ttdli = time constant for filter (number of P intervals), could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties; - Range= 5...100; Step size= 5; Default= 20 (see R&D parameter rdGbrTdLoadFilterCoeff in 5G_L2_4365_replaced([11188269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * Reported load:



\- Using periodic NBR Time domain load for congestion detection, with period = T

\- avgNbUlTdLoad(T) = is the latest value of avgNbrUlTdLoad (P) prior to T

\- T refers to end of NBR congestion detection period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current congestion detection interval

Exceptions:

  * If all NBR congestion control is deactivated for UL (nbrPuschCongHandling = FALSE, nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl= FALSE, nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl= FALSE), or NBR congestion detection period congDetectPeriod = 0, L2-PS does not need to perform this NBR Load monitoring

  * If there are no NBR bearers, avgNbrTdLoadInd(T) = 0%

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.




Notes:

  * NBR time domain load is per cell, so it reflects slot utilization over all configured dedicated BWPs

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11201631`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs NBR UL time domain congestion detection

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11201637`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall support the NBR UL time domain congestion detection mechanism

This requirement only applies to FR2 TDD SA mode.

Activation: NBR congestion control is activated for UL (NRCELL.nbrPuschCongHandling = TRUE or nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl= TRUE or nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl= TRUE)

NBR UL time domain congestion detection requires the following inputs:

  * periodic average NBR UL time domain load bearers in the cell: avgNbrTdLoadInd(T) refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22810_replaced([11201621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1xPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * PUSCH NBR congestion limit: marks a certain maximum percentage of PUSCH resource allocation utilization for NBR as defined by NIDD parameter NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit
  * UL time domain NBR congestion hysteresis: R&D configurable; proposal: range 0.7..1.0, step 0.01, default 0.9, e.g., rdUlsTdCongHyst.
  * UL Time domain NBR congestion hysteresis limit: as product of the UL Time domain NBR congestion limit and the UL time domain congestion hysteresis factor.



NBR UL time domain congestion is detected if the received periodic average PUSCH NBR Time domain load exceeds the NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit.

As soon as NBR UL time domain congestion is detected, the following handling shall apply:

  * NBR LCGs shall be selected for de-prioritization in scheduling
  * Criteria for NBR bearer selection is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_23224_replaced([11201640](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1yPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * Then Compute UL time domain resource utilisation NBR UE is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_22938_replaced([11201650](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1yvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * As many NBR UE shall be selected such that sum of the NBR UL time domain resource utilisation of the selected UE(s) is larger or equal to the excess of the UL NBR time domain load hysteresis limit.
  * Deprioritize NBR category UE shall be treated as normal nonGBR UE in scheduling is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_4178_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * [CB008227-DA_UPD001]Reset the average TD load avgNbrTdLoadInd(P) (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22810_replaced([11201621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1xPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to latest estimated value when deprioritization is performed[End CB008227-DA_UPD001]



NBR PUSCH congestion is considered to be resolved if the average UL time domain NBR load drops below the PUSCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit.

[Before CB008227-DA_UPD001]

When NBR congestion is resolved, all de-prioritized NBR LCGs return to normal NBR scheduling. In other words, the set of de-prioritized NBR LCGs is emptied.

[CB008227-DA_UPD001]

When NBR congestion is resolved,the NBR LCGs return to normal NBR scheduling according to 5G_UP_ALG_23548_replaced([11201659](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1zPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End CB008227-DA_UPD001]

If PUSCH GBR+NBR load further increases, additional NBR LCGs shall be selected for de-prioritization and according handling shall apply in scheduling.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11201640`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs NBR UE prioritization in UL Time domain congestion

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11201645`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs The UL NBR UEs to be de-prioritized and excluded from NBR scheduling list are determined in order of the following criteria:

 LCGs of UEs in power limitation

 From higher to lower congestion priority value based on the NRCELL.congWeightAlg selection:

  * If the NRCELL.congWeightAlg = ''priorityLevel ', the NBR bearer congestion priority is based on the NRBTS/NRDRB.priorityLevel configured value for the bearer, the lower priority values indicate higher priority.

  * If the NRCELL.congWeightAlg = 'arpPrioPerVul', the bearer congestion priority is based on the ARP priority configured for the bearers(refer to 5G_CP_IF_NTW_5886_replaced([11408282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__GmynPvmEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). First the bearers with ARP vulnerability "preemptable" are prioritized in order of the ARP priority, then the bearers with ARP vulnerability "not preemptable" also in order of ARP priority.

  * The LCG priority value is equal to the lowest priority value among all NBR bearers within the LCG

  * UE priority value is equal to the lowest priority value among all NBR bearers within the UE.




 Then from: higher to lower UL time domain load per NBR UE (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22935_replaced([11183537](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvLi9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 Then in random order.

This selection needs only be performed when NBR UL time domain congestion is detected or when following this detection as load level changes, additional UEs need to be de-prioritized. It is left to entity level/implementation to define which exact procedure has the least complexity (e.g., triggered search, managed sorted lists, etc).

The de-prioritisation shall be performed on UE basis in case of NBR Time domian congestion.

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `11201650`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs Monitoring of UL Time domain load per NBR UE

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11201655`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs L2-PS shall compute UL time domain resource utilisation per NBR UE that used for UL time domain congestion de-prioritization.

This requirement only applies to FR2 TDD SA mode.

Activation: NBR congestion control is activated for UL (NRCELL.nbrPuschCongHandling = TRUE or nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl= TRUE or nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl= TRUE)

Metrics:

  * Scope: per UE with NBR LCG(s)

  * Units: percent




This can be expressed in the following equation

NbrTdLoad_i(t) = ∑k nbrUl[i,k] / [ ∑j maxTbsOnCarrier(i, j)* NumUlSlotPerSecond] ,

where:

i: index of the UE with NBR LCG.

j: index of carrier

k: index of the NBR LCG.

t: specifies the subframe the transport block is sent.

∑k nbrDl[i,k] The sum of the NBR setting (NRBTS/NRDRB_MAC.nbrDl) for all NBR LCGs UE having.

maxTbsOnCarrier(j): max num PRBs usable for PUSCH for any DRB, while MCS and rank are the ones that are selected for the UE on carrier j

Note:

  * If all NBR congestion control is deactivated for UL (nbrPuschCongHandling = FALSE, nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl= FALSE, nbrPdcchCongHandlingUl= FALSE), or NBR congestion detection period congDetectPeriod = 0, L2-PS does not need to perform this NBR Load monitoring

  * Slots without any PUSCH available shall be skipped.

  * Initial transmission as well as retransmission need to be considered to determine a LCG's NBR resource utilisation.

  * If transmission is blocked in PDCCH LA, this also needs to be considered to determine NBR TD resource utilisation

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-5**  (ID: `11201659`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs UL NBR congestion reprioritization

---

**3.30.6.1.0-33.0-4.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11201663`)

Assignment of the number of PRBs [CB008227-DA_UPD001]

L2-PS shall support the deprioritized NBR UEs controllable reprioritize to NBR scheduling when NBR time domain congestion is resolved.

The reprioritization should consider the candidate UEs which are deprioritized to nonGBR in 5G_UP_ALG_22835_replaced([11201631](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1xvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and sort the candidate UEs in order of increasing TD load from lower to higher, and select as many UEs to be reprioritized such that the sum of aggregate NBR time domain load still below the congestion threshold.

It can be expressed in the following steps:

Aggregate cell NBR UL TD load = The NBR UL time domain load avgNbrUlTdLoad (P) which latest detected (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22810_replaced([11201621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1xPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Sort the candidate NBR UEs which from lower to higher of DL time domain load calculated in 5G_UP_ALG_22938_replaced([11201650](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1yvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For UE in the candidate list as per sorted order,

If (aggregate cell NBR UL TD load + TD load of next candidate UE) < congestion threshold;

Convert next candidate UE from non-GBR to NBR

Aggregate cell NBR TD load += TD load of next candidate UE

Else

break

End

  * Set the average UL cell NBR TD load avgNbrUlTdLoad(P) (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22810_replaced([11201621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwX1xPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) equal to the last estimated value of above 'Aggregate UL cell NBR TD load'.



[End CB008227-DA_UPD001]

---

#### 3.30.6.1.1 UL GBR congestion control

##### 3.30.6.1.1.1 UL PDCCH GBR Congestion Control

###### 3.30.6.1.1.1.0-1 UL PDCCH GBR Congestion Control Monitoring of UL GBR  PDCCH  Load (ID: 11201675)

**3.30.6.1.1.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13399831`)

UL PDCCH GBR Congestion Control gNB-DU shall monitor the PDCCH resources (CCEs) used for scheduling the prioritized (i.e. having positive GBR token bucket) UL GBR bearers configured in a given cell which is eventually used to perform UL GBR congestion control based on PDCCH channel.

This requirement is applicable only for FR1(both TDD and FDD). The rationale is that there is no benefit in executing PDCCH congestion control algorithm in FR2 without FDM & dynamic PDCCH.

Activation: GBR feature and UL PDCCH GBR congestion control is activated (NRCELL.actNonVoNRGBRService = True & NRCELL.gbrPdcchCongHandlingUl = TRUE) in the cell.

Metrics:

  * Scope: per cell.

  * Unit: percent




Base:

IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G_UP_ALG_8240_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

  * GbrUlPdcchLoad (i, t) = nCCE_used(i, t) / nCCE_usable(i, t), where:

  * For ith dedicated BWP, where i ϵ {2, …, n}:




\- nCCE_used(i, t) = number of CCEs within ith dedicated BWP allocated for PDCCH (UL grant) for UE(s) with highest eligible priority class = [CB014699-D] criticalVoipTraffic, criticalGbrTraffic & [End CB014699-D] VoipTraffic and gbrTraffic and scheduling PUSCH transport block containing data from their prioritized (GBR positive token bucket) GBR bearer irrespective of their active BWP, otherwise, it shall be 0.

  * if NRCELL.actDcGbrService = TRUE:

  * nCCE_used(i, t) = number of CCEs within ith dedicated BWP allocated for PDCCH (UL grant) for UE(s) with highest eligible priority class = [CB014699-D] criticalVoipTraffic, criticalGbrTraffic & [End CB014699-D] VoipTraffic, gbrTraffic and dcGbrTraffic and scheduling PUSCH transport block containing data from their prioritized GBR bearer (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_8040_replaced([11194687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv2RYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or prioritized DC-GBR (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_31011_replaced([11194661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv2RXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) irrespective of their active BWP, otherwise, it shall be 0.




**\- nCCE_usable(i, t) = number of CCEs available for UL NR scheduling within the ith dedicated BWP.**

  * For ith dedicated BWP, where i= 1 (largest BWP):
