**[**

Where

  * stepSize = 4
  * randomStep = ( ( rrmScheduledXSfn +1 + pciSmall ) * primeLarge ) mod ( roundup(rrmRemainingPrb div stepSize) + 1 )
  * rrmScheduledXSfn is the extended SFN as defined in 5G_L2_233_replaced([11148538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24RZ2fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * primeLarge = 997 (A prime number larger than rrmRemainingPrb)
  * pciSmall = (physCellId mod 24) + 1



[PR840715]

  * If rdActPrbAllocOptForFr1CCA (see [12698005](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qkqXM1yLEfCPFofqMEsORA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is equal to true



[End PR840715]

  * StartPrbIntraBandULCAUpperSub_i is the start PRB for FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE with current cell as upper sub-band serving cell in bwp_i and the PUSCH subarea.
  * StartPrbIntraBandULCALowerSub_i is the start PRB for FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE with current cell as lower sub-band serving cell in bwp_i and the PUSCH subarea.



[PR840715]

  * else

  * StartPrbIntraBandULCAUpperSub_i is the start PRB for FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE with current cell as upper sub-band serving cell, which transmission buffer in UL is split between PCell and SCell (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in bwp_i and the PUSCH subarea.

  * StartPrbIntraBandULCALowerSub_i is the start PRB for FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE with current cell as lower sub-band serving cell, which transmission buffer in UL is split between PCell and SCell (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in bwp_i and the PUSCH subarea.

  * Endif




[End PR840715]

c) If cell-specific randomization is enabled and NRBTS.actFdmScheduling is set to FALSE (cell specific shall not be used in the presence of multiple UEs)

o PUSCH BW is divided into X sections:

 X = 5, for BW with 80 PRBs or more

 X = 3, for BW with less than 80 PRBs

o Section used is determined by: usedSection = (physCellId + 7) mod X

o PUSCH allocation is centered in the chosen section

o If number of needed PRBs are more than number of PRBs in a section

 startprb = rrmFirstAvailablePrb, if physCellId mod 2 = 0

 startprb = rrmFirstAvailablePrb + rrmRemainingPrb – needed PRBs +1, if physCellId mod 2 = 1

##### 3.30.6.2.2.0-5 Start PRB randomization for PUSCH Initializations when calculating a random startPrb in the presence of MPRaware UE(s) (ID: 11201911)

**3.30.6.2.2.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11201920`)

Start PRB randomization for PUSCH If

  * rdMprActive = 1 (or 2 for SA, see definition in 5G_L2_1371_replaced([11185224](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wysPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and
  * rdMprActiveFddTdd = 1 (Tdd, see 5G_L2_1372_replaced([11185228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wysfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and
  * rbStartLow <= rbStartHigh



when scheduling single UE per slot or reTx of msg3:

the random start PRB value shall be selected from values between rbStartLow and rbStartHigh instead. [PR681669-23R2] Set rrmFirstAvailablePrb = max {rrmFirstAvailablePrb , rbStartLow} & adjust rrmRemainingPrb if rrmFirstAvailablePrb has changed. [END PR681669-23R2]

Where:

  * rbStartLow = max{1, floor[numPrbs/2]}
  * rbStartHigh = rrmMaxNumPuschPrb [PR681669-23R2] of the active BWP of the UE [END PR681669-23R2] – rbStartLow - numPrbs



when scheduling multiple UEs per slot, do the following before calculating the random startPRB:

  * For the first UE in the list [PR681669-23R2] of the active BWP of the UE [END PR681669-23R2] :
  * if it is MPRaware & rrmRemainingPrb >= rbStartLow :



Set rrmFirstAvailablePrb = max {rrmFirstAvailablePrb , rbStartLow}

& adjust rrmRemainingPrb if rrmFirstAvailablePrb has changed.

  * For the last UE in the list[PR681669-23R2] of the active BWP of the UE, if it is not the powersaving BWP [END PR681669-23R2] :
  * if it is MPRaware & rrmRemainingPrb >= rbStartLow



Set rrmRemainingPrb = rrmRemainingPrb - rbStartLow

Note that rbStartLow and rbStartHigh are a UE specific value based on the allocated number of PRBs

---

##### 3.30.6.2.2.0-6 Start PRB randomization for PUSCH Start PRB for UEs in virtual UE (ID: 11201926)

**3.30.6.2.2.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11201939`)

Start PRB randomization for PUSCH 11201939: Start PRB randomization for PUSCH If a candidate UE group (see 5G_UP_ALG_9690_replaced([11148139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksI2BPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) paired with root UE, the start PRB for UEs which are included in a candidate UE group refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9064_replaced([11200416](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) , otherwise the UEs which are included in the same virtual UE will have the same starting PRB position as the virtual UE. [PR790132] If UE(i) in vUE(A) will be descoped from vUE(A) due to CPU load or other reasons, L2RT shall re-fill the startPRB for the other UEs in different layers in order to make sure that the startPRB in different layers are the same. Here is one exmaple, UE0 is root UE in the 1st layer and UE1, UE2 and UE3 are FDMs in the 3rd layer. If UE1 will be descoped due to CPU load issues, L2RT shall re-fill startPRB of UE2 and UE3 to make sure that the startPRB of the first UE in each layer is the same. [image-0][image_desc]The image displays a comparison of resource allocation for DMRS ports before and after a change, likely in a telecommunications context. The comparison is presented in a grid format, resembling a spreadsheet. **Left Side: "Before"** This section shows the initial allocation. * **Columns:** Labeled "DMRS port" with numerical headers 0, 1, 2, and 3. * **Rows:** Labeled "PRB" (Physical Resource Block) with numbers 0 through 10. **Resource Allocation (Before):** * **DMRS port 0:** Occupies PRBs 0 through 10, colored green, and labeled "UE0". * **DMRS port 1:** No allocation shown. * **DMRS port 2:** * PRB 1 is allocated to "UE1" (yellow). * PRBs 4-6 are allocated to "UE2" (light blue). * PRBs 7-10 are allocated to "UE3" (light green). * **DMRS port 3:** No allocation shown. **Right Side: "After"** This section shows the allocation after a change, indicated by a blue arrow pointing from the "Before" section to the "After" section. * **Columns:** Labeled "DMRS port" with numerical headers 0, 1, 2, and 3. * **Rows:** Labeled "PRB" with numbers 0 through 10. **Resource Allocation (After):** * **DMRS port 0:** Occupies PRBs 0 through 10, colored green, and labeled "UE0". This allocation remains unchanged. * **DMRS port 1:** No allocation shown. * **DMRS port 2:** * PRBs 1-2 are allocated to "UE2" (light blue). * PRBs 4-6 are allocated to "UE3" (light green). * **DMRS port 3:** No allocation shown. **Key Changes Observed:** * "UE1" which was allocated to PRB 1 on DMRS port 2 in the "Before" state is no longer present in the "After" state. * "UE2" has moved from PRBs 4-6 on DMRS port 2 to PRBs 1-2 on DMRS port 2. * "UE3" has moved from PRBs 7-10 on DMRS port 2 to PRBs 4-6 on DMRS port 2. The table representation of the "Before" state is:

### 3.30.6.3 UL resource assignment for 5G UEs with carrier aggregation

### 3.30.6.3-1 UL resource assignment for 5G UEs with carrier aggregation

#### 3.30.6.3-1.0-1 UL resource assignment for 5G UEs with carrier aggregation [CB014044-L] If [Before CB014044-L-UPD004] NRCELL.actBestNList [CB014044-L-UPD004] NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.actBestNList [End CB014044-L-UPD004] is set to UL or DL_UL, Post scheduling, follow below algorithm to create Best NK list. [CB014044-O] If the slice aware scheduler for uplink is activated for the cell (see 11278970 ) and if the current slot is the end of virtual slot in slice volume control adaptations (see 11206793 ), then the creation of Best NK list shall be done after the execution of slice volume control to have the latest rrmRGWeight which shall be applicable for the next slot. [End CB014044-O] Best NK List · Best NK List only contains non-GBR initial transmission UEs with few high metric N UEs and few high buffer K UEs, selected from CS1 list. · BestNKListUlSize = averageCs1ListMaxSize * [Before CB014044-L-UPD004] ulBestNListRatio[CB014044-L-UPD004] NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.ulBestNListRatio [End CB014044-L-UPD004] (gNB-Du shall estimate the maximum possible CS1 size for the next scheduling slot.) · Best NK List contains N ("BestNKListSize (UL) - K") UEs with high PF metrics and K UEs with highest remaining bytes in buffer selected from CS1 list. [CB014044-L-UPD004] Activating BestKList (UL): NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.actBestKList is set to UL or DL_UL. [End CB014044-L-UPD004] · BestKRatio (UL): [Before CB014044-L-UPD004] is an R&amp;D parameter, rdUlHighBuffBestKRatio (see 12548725 ),[CB014044-L-UPD004] NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.ulBestKListRatio [End CB014044-L-UPD004] which is used to calculate the number of high buffer K UEs in Best NK List. · Number of K UEs = max (1, BestKRatio (UL) * BestNKListSize (UL)) Post scheduling, update PF metrics ( 11195809 defines the PF metric to be used if NRCELL.actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is set to true) of UEs, which are picked for scheduling in this slot and still with data remaining in the buffer. Step 1: Select "K" non-GBR UEs of largest BWP with highest remaining bytes in the buffer from CS1 list and add these UEs to the end of Best NK List. [CB014044-O] Note: If the slice aware scheduler for uplink is activated for the cell (see 11278970 ), the gNB-DU shall exclude the bufferedBytes in non-GBR DRBs and deprioritized GBR/DC-GBR DRBs of a resource group (RG) with 0 RG weight (rrmRGWeight = 0, see 11207350 ) in the remaining bytes calculation. [End CB014044-O] Step 2: Select “BestNKListSize (UL) -K” non-GBR UEs with highest PF metric from CS1 list and add it to Best NK List after sorting in PF metric order. If UEs are no longer eligible because they are fully drained with no more data in buffer, then such UEs shall not be added to Best NK List. Same UE shall not be picked in above step 1 and 2. This updated list becomes the new Best NK List for the next slot. [End CB014044-L] (ID: 12550708)

#### 3.30.6.3.0-2 UL resource assignment for 5G UEs with carrier aggregation FDD - TDD FR1 UL CA with power limitation (ID: 11201953)

**3.30.6.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11201962`)

UL resource assignment for 5G UEs with carrier aggregation For [Before CB009169-AB] FDD - TDD [End CB009169-AB] FR1 UL CA UE, UE TX power control/split refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10870_replaced([11119474](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqKgH_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

### 3.30.7 Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request

#### 3.30.7.0-1 Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request Configuration of srsSlotOffset (ID: 11201972)

**3.30.7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11201977`)

Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request srsSlotOffset is an offset in number of slots between the triggering DCI and the actual transmission of SRS, which is sent to UE via RRC message (5G_CP_IF_RRC_5286_replaced([11362984](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wZm6B_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The gNB-DU shall determine srsSlotOffset as below.

If PDCCH muting for RIM DL Mitigation is triggered (see 5G_UP_ALG_25887_replaced([11160930](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktQ3afvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rrmK2min (see 5G_UP_ALG_2484_replaced([11116264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp2XB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is equal to 2:

· srsSlotOffset for periodic SRS shall be temporarily shifted to 3 for the duration of the PDCCH muting (see 5G_UP_ALG_28078_replaced([11163631](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

· if rimDynamicSrsSlotOffsetEnabled is equal to 1 (see 5G_L2_IF_2293_replaced([10969964](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UgHyvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), srsSlotOffset for aperiodic SRS for the UEs setup during PDCCH muting shall be set to 3. (see 5G_UP_ALG_28081_replaced([11163642](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Else

srsSlotOffset = rrmK2min

---

#### 3.30.7.0-2 Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request Aperiodic SRS request and trigger condition (ID: 11201982)

**3.30.7.0-2.0-10**  (ID: `13454196`)

Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request 5G-L2-PS shall request an aperiodic SRS transmission if:

 A request is pending for a scheduled UE as per 5G_UP_ALG_3249_replaced([11140429](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_SfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and

 Slot timing indication k2 corresponds to UE SRS aperiodic timing transmission as per 5G_UP_ALG_2425_replaced([11115806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and

 UL slots have no PRACH configuration (SRS transmission shall be avoided in UL slots with PRACH configuration).

 For FDD, the slot is a "reserved SRS" slot as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2536_replaced([11117398](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-57vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Only the amount of PRBs available for PUSCH(5G_UP_ALG_4876_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in the UL slot is large enough to fit the configured SRS BW, if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note: UL grant from the BBRM restricts the total number of usable PRB available in the UL slot(5G_UP_ALG_6500_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 It is not a DCI Format 0_1 for a CG activation or modification.

 For UL Tx switching UE in FDD PCell or FDD SCell, the slot is not UL overlapping slot (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_15046_replaced([11197899](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwH-K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 For FR1 inter-band 2CC or 3CC UL CA with 3Tx, when power of UL CA is less than power of FDD or TDD FR1 band + 3db, aperiodic SRS shall only be triggered in odd uplink slot in TDD FR1 CC and shall be skipped in first 5ms when rank changes from 2 to 1.

Note: When rank changes from 2 to 1 or rank 1 is used initially, TDD FR1 CC shall inform FDD CC to mute the overlapped uplink symbol, referring to 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When rank changes from 1 to 2, TDD FR1 CC shall inform FDD CC to stop muting the overlapped uplink symbol.

 For:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)  
UL CA without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), when rank changes from 2 to 1 on TDD SCell or buffer split status in UL for this TDD SCell changes from "stop split" to "start split" (see 5G_UP_ALG_10516_replaced([11122476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or codebook usage P-SRS is reconfigured to A-SRS on TDD SCell, aperiodic SRS shall be requested on TDD SCell after there is no retransmission which corresponding initial transmission has more symbols than the symbols mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) on PCell.

**Note:**

  * For:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or 
  * FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)  
UL CA UE which is not a single Tx UE on TDD SCell and doesn't indicate pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)):
  * In case any of the below conditions meets, TDD SCell shall inform PCell to mute the overlapped uplink symbol (see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When rank changes from 1 to 2 on TDD SCell, or A-SRS is reconfigured to codebook usage P-SRS on TDD SCell, TDD SCell shall inform PCell to stop muting the overlapped uplink symbol.
  * In case UE is configured with A-SRS on TDD SCell, when rank changes from 2 to 1 on TDD SCell or rank1 is initialized for PUSCH transmission on TDD SCell after SCell activation.
  * When codebook usage P-SRS is reconfigured to A-SRS and rank is 1 on TDD SCell.

  * In case any of the below conditions meets, PCell shall inform TDD SCell to request aperiodic SRS transmission after there is no retransmission which corresponding initial transmission has more symbols than the symbols mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) on PCell.

  * In case UE is configured with A-SRS on TDD SCell, when rank changes from 2 to 1 on TDD SCell or rank1 is initialized for PUSCH transmission on TDD SCell after SCell activation or (buffer split status in UL for this TDD SCell changes from "stop split" to "start split" and PCell is required to mute the overlapped uplink symbol (see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))).
  * When codebook usage P-SRS is reconfigured to A-SRS and rank is 1 on TDD SCell.

  * For: 

  * FR1 intra-band contiguous 2CC UL CA UE or 
  * FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE,  
A-SRS shall be skipped in the first 5ms on PCell, when rank changes from 2 to 1 on PCell.



If more than one to-be-scheduled UE (UEs to be forwarded to FD, see 5G_UP_ALG_4871_replaced([11196450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCepPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) has a pending SRS request, choose the UE with the highest TD metric.

If SRS transmission is requested, 5G-L2-PS shall:

If NRCELL.actPusch12Sb10MhzFddLongPucch is true and carrier is FDD carrier with 10 MHz UL bandwidth, not shared with LTE, with long PUCCH configured, and PUSCH mapping type B is used,

\- keep 12 symbols PUSCH allocation (symbol 0 - 11) and use symbol 12 for SRS

Else.

\- shorten PUSCH allocation by one symbol and replace it with SRS (see 5G_UP_ALG_2424_replaced([11115802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to determine corresponding SLIV and 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for details on procedure). 

\- **For CA, shorten initTx PUSCH allocation of a UE by one symbol in all carriers if:**

\- SRS is pending on least one CC (current_k2 = srsSlotOffset & UE is in CS2 list with rank=1), srsSlotOffset is determined in 5G_UP_ALG_31545_replaced([11201972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_27958_replaced([11163627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), OR 5G_UP_ALG_30161_replaced([11163658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoaPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

\- reTx on N symbols is pending (with rank=2) on any CC.

**[CB014067-C] For TX switching UE, "all carriers" refers to the carriers actively transmitting in the given slot.**[End CB014067-C]****

Otherwise, initTx PUSCH allocation is only shortnened for CCs with rank=1

If SRS transmission is triggered, 5G-L2-PS shall:

\- send a SRS receive request to L1-UL as per 5G_L2_13080_replaced([11180649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27OAKPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- For CA, SRS receive request is only sent if UE has no pending reTx PUSCH overlapping with SRS on any CC,

\- If A-CSI already scheduled over the SRS OFDM symbol(s) in the current slot (see 5G_UP_ALG_7025_replaced([11202255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwcHNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), SRS triggering is skipped and L2-PS shall update rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi as follows:

rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi = rdAlphaASrsBlockingRate * rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi + (1- rdAlphaASrsBlockingRate)* instASrsBlocking, Where:

rdAlphaASrsBlockingRate is defined as software parameter with default value 0.7, range 0 … 1, step 0.1

rdAlphaASrsBlockingRate is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_33211_replaced([11209739](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw1v0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

instASrsBlocking = 1

rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi is initialized to value 1

5G-L2-PS shall send the SRS receive request to L1-UL even UE is DRX sleep, in case the aperiodic SRS request have been send to UE in DCI while UE is not DRX sleep.

L2-PS shall compute rrmASrsSchedulingRate as follows:

rrmASrsSchedulingRate = rdAlphaASrsSchedulingRate * rrmASrsSchedulingRate + (1- rdAlphaASrsSchedulingRate)* instASrsRequest, Where:

rdAlphaASrsSchedulingRate is defined as software parameter with default value 0.9, range 0 … 1, step 0.1 (see 5G_UP_ALG_33213_replaced([11209750](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw1v1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

instASrsRequest = 1 if SRS is requested (see definition for "requested" below) for at least 1 UE otherwise instASrsRequest = 0

rrmASrsSchedulingRate is initialized to value 1

Note: Usage of the term “request” here does not necessarily indicate a triggering of SRS transmission via the “SRS request” field in the UL DCI. “Request” is used in the sense of “wish”

---

#### 3.30.7.0-3 Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request Number of PUSCH symbols for initial and re-transmissions (executed after UE selection on each carrier) (ID: 11202027)

**3.30.7.0-3.0-12**  (ID: `13470483`)

Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request 13470483: Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request Input of this algorithm is the list of selected UE for UL scheduling on a carrier (only one UE when FDM OFF, list of UEs when FDM is ON, see 5G_UP_ALG_4871_replaced([11196450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCepPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**For both TDD and FDD:**

It is assumed in the following that a PUSCH transmission is, if possible, performed over N symbols if no A-SRS is requested and over (N-y) symbols if A-SRS is requested.

**For FDD:**

If short PUCCH is configured, N=13, y=1.

The supported SLIVs are:

· SLIV 41: 13 symbols for PUSCH, without aSRS

· SLIV 55: 12 symbols for PUSCH, with aSRS 

If long PUCCH is configured (NRCELL.pucchModeSelect is 'longPucch'), N=14, y is given as below:

If NRCELL.puschMappingType == 'TypeB' and NRCELL.actHighSpeedCell == false

y=2

Else

y=1

End

The supported SLIVs are:

· SLIV 27: 14 symbols for PUSCH without aSRS,

· SLIV 41: 13 symbols for PUSCH with y=1, when

  * PUSCH is scheduled with aSRS, or

  * with aperiodic SRS configured for FR1 inter-band 2CC or 3CC UL CA with 3Tx when




** PUSCH is scheduled for UL CA UE while UL slot is overlapped with TDD UL slot with periodic SRS configured or with aperiodic SRS configured for FR1 inter-band 2CC UL CA with 3Tx when

*** UE does not support parallelTxSRS-PUCCH-PUSCH for FDD PCell in case of FDD+TDD CA or for FDD SCell in case of TDD+FDD CA or FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell).

· SLIV 55: 12 symbols for

  * PUSCH with y=2, when



** PUSCH is scheduled with aSRS, or

** with aperiodic SRS configured for FR1 inter-band 2CC or 3CC UL CA with 3Tx when

*** [image-3][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible objects, text, or features.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15982.004.png[/image_path][/image-3](refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10873_replaced\(\[11119621\]\(https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ\)\)) is less than [image-4][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15982.005.png[/image_path][/image-4]which [image-5][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible objects, text, or features.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_15982.006.png[/image_path][/image-5]refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10873_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD PCell in case of FDD+TDD CA or for FDD SCell in case of TDD+FDD CA . or

*** UE does not support parallelTxSRS-PUCCH-PUSCH for FDD PCell in case of FDD+TDD CA or for FDD SCell in case of TDD+FDD CA or FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell).

· SLIV 27 or 41 or 55 ~~or 69~~ for FDD PCell or SCell in FR1 UL CA (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_29933_replaced([11202287](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwcHPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) 

· SLIV 27 or 41 or 55 or 69 or 53 or 67 or 81 for UL Tx switching option 1 (switchedUL) UE in FDD SCell or FDD PCell (refer to 5G_UP_11397_replaced([11356891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_JfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), this is decided based on the relative position of TDD UL slot and FDD UL slot, and the position of TDD P-SRS and FDD A-SRS.

If the slot offset of periodic SRS is changed in user modification, 5G-L2-PS shall consider both legacy and new SRS slot offsets during the transient phase to decide the SLIV. 

For FDD + TDD FR1 2CC UL CA with 3Tx, PUSCH with slot type 29(SLIV=41) or slot type 32(SLIV=55) mentioned above shall still be transmitted on FDD PCell to avoid overlapping with A-SRS on TDD FR1 SCell in the first 5ms after transmission buffer split in UL is stopped(see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) due to message delay from PCell to SCell. For FDD + TDD FR1 2CC UL CA with 3Tx, reTx PUSCH on FDD (no matter as PCell or SCell) overlapping with A-SRS on TDD FR1 shall not be scheduled, if the reTx PUSCH symbol length is less than iniTx PUSCH symbol length when adaptive retransmission is deactivated.

If NRCELL.actPusch12Sb10MhzFddLongPucch is true and carrier is FDD carrier with 10 MHz UL bandwidth, not shared with LTE, with long PUCCH configured, and PUSCH mapping type B is used, then slots with and without SRS offer 12 symbols for PUSCH.

**For TDD:**

In 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2526_replaced([11297475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqHT4PvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), it will be specified whether UL fragmentation for Uplane packets is enabled or disabled over the fronthaul interface.

· If UL fragmentation is enabled or ( NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList contains "Mixed PUSCH" and UE is identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconfiguration%2f9&componenturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2frm-projects%2f_euvego3ree-rl47x_rccmw%2fcomponents%2f_evmaio3ree-rl47x_rccmw")))

**[Before CB013712-A]Note: SLIV 41 (PUSCH with 13 symbols) for type B is not supported by ABIL due to L1 limitation. UL fragmentation and adaptive DMRS does not support ABIL, then SLIV 41 can be still used.**[End CB013712-A] The slots without SRS offer N=14 symbols for PUSCH whereas slots with SRS offer **13 symbols for PUSCH. Hence, y=0 for slots without SRS and y=1 for slots with SRS. Thus, as per 5G_UP_ALG_2415_replaced([11115737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpxehPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the supported SLIVs are******

· SLIV 27: N=14 symbols for PUSCH, without SRS (y=0)

· SLIV 41: N=13 symbols for PUSCH, y=1 symbol for SRS or used on PCell where UL fragmentation is enabled for  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)   
UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and (puschMappingType Type A is configured or UL fragmentation is enabled on TDD SCell ) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rank1 is used on TDD SCell (note1),  
or used on TDD UL serving cell where UL fragmentation is enabled for:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)  
UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case (puschMappingType Type A is configured or UL fragmentation is enabled on both PCell and TDD SCell ) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

· SLIV 55: N=12 symbols for PUSCH, used on PCell where UL fragmentation is enabled for:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)   
UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and (puschMappingType Type B is configured and UL fragmentation is disabled on TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rank1 is used on TDD SCell   
or used on UL serving cell where UL fragmentation is enabled for:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)  
UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case puschMappingType Type B is configured and UL fragmentation is disabled on PCell or TDD SCell, and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

· Else if UL fragmentation is disabled and ( NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList does not contain "Mixed PUSCH" or UE is not identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconfiguration%2f9&componenturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2frm-projects%2f_euvego3ree-rl47x_rccmw%2fcomponents%2f_evmaio3ree-rl47x_rccmw"))

If long PUCCH is configured. then slots without SRS offer N=14 symbols for PUSCH, whereas slots with SRS offer **12 symbols for PUSCH when PUSCH mapping type B is configured, or 13 symbol for PUSCH when PUSCH mapping type A is configured**. Hence, y = 2 when PUSCH mapping type B is configured, and y=1 when PUSCH mapping type A is configured. For both the mapping types, N = 14 if long PUCCH is configured.****

Thus, as per 5G_UP_ALG_2415_replaced([11115737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpxehPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the supported SLIVs are  


· SLIV 27: N=14 symbols for PUSCH, without SRS (y=0)

· SLIV 41: N=13 symbols for PUSCH, y=1 symbol for SRS or used on PCell where UL fragmentation is disabled for:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)   
UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and (puschMappingType Type A is configured or UL fragmentation is enabled on TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rank1 is used on TDD SCell   
or used on UL serving cell where UL fragmentation is disabled for:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)   
UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case (puschMappingType Type A is configured or UL fragmentation is enabled on both PCell and TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

· SLIV 55: PUSCH with 12 symbols (0-11), and SRS on symbol 12 or used on PCell where UL fragmentation is disabled for:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)  
UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and (puschMappingType Type B is configured and UL fragmentation is disabled on TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rank1 is used on TDDSCell   
or used on UL serving cell where UL fragmentation is disabled for:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)  
UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case puschMappingType Type B is configured and UL fragmentation is disabled on PCell or TDD SCell, and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

· SLIV 69: PUSCH with 11 symbols, y=1 symbol for SRS, and 2 symbols for short PUCCH

For:  
\- FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)   
UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rank1 is used on TDD SCell:

· Retransmission shall be still transmitted with the same symbols as initial transmission if initial transmission has more than the symbols mentioned in above. **Rationale: There may be ongoing retransmission which corresponding initial transmission has more than the symbols mentioned in above, right after rank changes from 2 to 1 on TDD SCell, or buffer split status in UL for this TDD SCell changes from "stop split" to "start split" (see 5G_UP_ALG_10516_replaced([11122476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Only after the retransmission is done, A-SRS can be requested on TDD SCell to avoid overlapping with PUSCH on PCell (see 5G_UP_ALG_5057_replaced([11201982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

· PUSCH with PUSCH SLIV 41 (S=0, L=13) or 55 (S=0, L=12) mentioned in above shall be still transmitted on PCell to avoid overlapping with A-SRS on TDD SCell in the first 5ms after transmission buffer split in UL is stopped (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) due to message delay from PCell to SCell.

For:

  * FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or   
\- FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell)  
UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)):



· If the condition for UL buffer split is met (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), initial transmission shall be transmitted with symbols required during buffer split (see above) on PCell, and retransmission shall be still transmitted with the same symbols as initial transmission on PCell, if initial transmission has more than the symbols required during buffer split (see above). Only after the retransmission transmitted with more than the symbols required during buffer split is done, PCell notifies TDD SCell for buffer split. **Rationale: For the UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts, PUSCH is transmitted with shortened symbols during buffer split on two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see above) to achieve the same starting PUSCH symbol and PUSCH symbol length between PCell and TDD SCell required by the UE.**

· PUSCH with PUSCH SLIV 41 (S=0, L=13) or 55 (S=0, L=12) mentioned in above shall be still transmitted on PCell, in the first 5ms after transmission buffer split in UL is stopped (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) due to message delay from PCell to TDD SCell. If retransmission can continue on TDD SCell (see [11122476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), PUSCH with PUSCH SLIV 41 (S=0, L=13) or 55 (S=0, L=12) mentioned in above shall be transmitted on PCell until retransmission is done on TDD SCell.

**For Both TDD and FDD:**

For CA, number of PUSCH symbols can be shortened (from N symbols to (N-y) symbols) or SRS muted as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_5057_replaced([11201982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

For the algorithm, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_5065_replaced([11202229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwcHMPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

For Scheduling with k2aCsi timing, see 5G_UP_ALG_7025_replaced([11202255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwcHNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 

For configured grant type2 activation, computation shall assume that SRS is configured/scheduled in the target slot. The initial transmissions and retransmissions for CG are done with the TDRA used in the configured grant type2 activation.

---

#### 3.30.7.0-4 Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request Loop over UEs in the list (ID: 11202229)

**3.30.7.0-4.0-6**  (ID: `13238592`)

Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request IF (at least one UE in the list is in reTx (see Note 3) **or msg3** _with N PUSCH symbols or at least one UL Tx switching UE in FDD cell list is in reTx and with PUSCH symbols smaller than iniTx if SRS is trigger)_ ****

// SRS cannot be scheduled on this slot for any UE, since _N PUSCH symbols are forced by reTx_ _or msg3_ **

\- iniTx UEs in the list with rank 2 transmissions (SM2) and singleTx UEs are scheduled using _N PUSCH symbols, while those with rank 1 transmissions (SM1) are scheduled using_(N-y) PUSCH symbols with SRS muted [PR858592] Rational: SRS symbol of rank 1 UE is muted to prevent the blocking of future aSRS UEs. [End PR858592]**

\- reTx UEs in the list are scheduled using iniTx _(N-y) PUSCH symbols with SRS muted, or_ N PUSCH symbols).**

\- UL Tx switching UE in FDD cell: iniTx PUSCH symbols is set according to 5G_UP_11397_replaced([11356891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_JfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **reTx PUSCH symbols is the same as iniTx.**

\- For TDD FR1 + TDD FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE, if PUSCH is required to be shortened in current serving cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)[)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), PUSCH shall be scheduled with the shortened symbols according to 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)[)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). 

// even if current_k2 allows SRS

ELSE IF ((no UE in the list is in reTx **or msg3 _with N PUSCH symbols) && (no UL Tx switching UE in FDD cell list is in reTx and with PUSCH symbols smaller than iniTx if SRS is trigger) && (current_k2 == srsSlotOffset)) && (at least one of the UEs in the list requested SRS)_**

// SRS scheduled, since _N PUSCH symbols are not required, current_k2 compatible with SRS, and a UE in the list requests it._

\- UE selected in 5G_UP_ALG_5057_replaced([11201982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is scheduled using _(N-y) PUSCH symbols with SRS._

\- All other UEs in the list are scheduled using _(N-y) PUSCH symbols with SRS muted._

**\- UL Tx switching UE in FDD cell: iniTx PUSCH symbols is set according to 5G_UP_11397_replaced([11356891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_JfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **reTx PUSCH symbols is the same as iniTx.****

\- For TDD FR1 + TDD FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE, if PUSCH symbols required to be shortened in current serving cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))) are less than (N-y), PUSCH shall be scheduled with less than (N-y) symbols (see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) for the shortened PUSCH symbols), otherwise, PUSCH shall be scheduled with (N-y) symbols. 

ELSE

// SRS cannot be scheduled, since (current_k2 != srsSlotOffset) or SRS is not required in the first place.

\- iniTx UEs in the list with rank 2 transmissions (SM2) and singleTx UEs are scheduled using _N PUSCH symbols, while those with rank 1 transmissions (SM1) are scheduled using_(N-y) PUSCH symbols with SRS muted**

\- reTx UEs in the list are scheduled using iniTx (N-y) _PUSCH symbols with SRS muted, or_ N PUSCH symbols).**

\- UL Tx switching UE in FDD cell: iniTx PUSCH symbols is set according to 5G_UP_11397_replaced([11356891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_JfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **reTx PUSCH symbols is the same as iniTx if adaptive retransmission is deactivated or current_k2 == srsSlotOffset, otherwise reTx PUSCH symbols is set according to 5G_UP_11397_replaced([11356891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_JfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

\- For TDD FR1 + TDD FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE, if PUSCH is required to be shortened in current serving cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)[)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), PUSCH shall be scheduled with the shortened symbols according to 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)[)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). 

END

For CA, number of PUSCH symbols can be shortened (from N symbols to (N-y) symbols) or SRS muted as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_5057_replaced([11201982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note that there is no restriction if NRCELL.actPusch12Sb10MhzFddLongPucch is true and carrier is FDD carrier with 10 MHz UL bandwidth, not shared with LTE, with long PUCCH configured, and PUSCH mapping type B is used, as transmissions with and without SRS are scheduled with 12 PUSCH symbols.

Legend:

SLIV with N and (N-y) PUSCH symbols are defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2424_replaced([11115802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

“SMx” is short for “x layer spatial multiplexing transmission”.

“singleTx” is short for “single layer transmission with one physical antenna”.

“iniTx” is short for “initial transmission or fresh transmission”.

“reTx” is short for “re-transmission after failed HARQ”.

“srsSlotOffset” is short for the RRC parameter “srsResourceSet > resourceType > aperiodic > slotOffset”, which is determined in 5G_UP_ALG_31545_replaced([11201972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_27958_replaced([11163627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), **5G_UP_ALG_30161_replaced([11163658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoaPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

SRS triggered -> (“SRS request” in UL DCI = 01) and UE transmits SRS on _Nth OFDM symbols starting from first PUSCH symbol._

SRS muted -> (“SRS request” in UL DCI = 00) and UE does not transmit anything on _Nth OFDM symbols starting from first PUSCH symbol._

Notes:

  1. It is possible to pair/mix PUSCH transmission with N and (N-y) symbols in MU-MIMO, if we mute SRS symbol _on Nth symbol starting from first PUSCH symbol._

  2. Depending on which slot of the fixed UL/DL slot pattern (chosen repeating every 2 radio frames) we are currently transmitting, the k2 value possible for scheduling next PUSCH is restricted to current_k2.

  3. For UEs with 2x or 4x PUSCH slot aggregation (SAg) reTx with N PUSCH symbols, SRS cannot be scheduled if any of the SAg reTx repetitions overlap the SRS slot.

#### 3.30.7.0-5 Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request Number of PUSCH symbols for initial transmission with A-CSI and k2aCsi timing (ID: 11202255)

**3.30.7.0-5.0-5**  (ID: `13461852`)

Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request Assuming DCI time N.

I[Before CB013330-A-UPD003]t[CB013330-A-UPD003]f[End CB013330-A-UPD003] cellTechnology is TDD and at least one UE is selected for scheduling with aperiodic CSI (A-CSI) request with k2aCsi timing:

\- If N+k2Acsi is potential SRS slot (i.2. cell k2 = srsSlotOffset, see 5G_UP_ALG_2425_replaced([11115806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_L2_146_replaced([11144047](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_233xNPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_27958_replaced([11163627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**,** 5G_UP_ALG_30161_replaced([11163658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktaoaPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) AND (rrmASrsSchedulingRate > rdASrsSchedulingThr OR rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi > rdASrsBlockingDueToAcsiThr )****

o Limit the PUSCH time domain allocation with respect for SRS potential triggering as specified in 5G_UP_ALG_5057_replaced([11201982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))[CB013330-A-UPD003], if any of below condition is true,

  * K2Rim is none.

  * K2Rim is not none and there exists a valid SLIV for SRS scheduling. [End CB013330-A-UPD003]​​​​​




o For TDD FR1 + TDD FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE, if PUSCH symbols required to be shortened on PCell (see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))) are less than the PUSCH symbols with respect for SRS potential triggering: (N-y) (see 5G_UP_ALG_5065_replaced([11202229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwcHMPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) for N-y), PUSCH shall be scheduled with the shortened symbols according to 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) on PCell, otherwise, PUSCH shall be scheduled with (N-y) symbols on PCell. 

o if rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi > rdASrsBlockingDueToAcsiThr

rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi = rdAlphaASrsBlockingRate * rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi

else

o Consider all the available OFDM symbols, in accordance to the slot format, for PUSCH scheduling.

o For TDD FR1 + TDD FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA UE, if PUSCH is required to be shortened on PCell (see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))), PUSCH shall be scheduled with the shortened symbols according to 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) on PCell.

\- rdASrsSchedulingThr shall be defined as software parameter with default value 0.7, range 0…1, step 0.1

\- rdASrsBlockingDueToAcsiThr shall be defined as software parameter with default value 0.1, range 0…1, step 0.1

**\- rdAlphaASrsBlockingRate is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_33211_replaced([11209739](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw1v0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**

\- rdASrsSchedulingThr is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_33215_replaced([11209765](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw1v1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- See 5G_UP_ALG_5057_replaced([11201982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5GvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for rrmASrsSchedulingRate and rrmASrsBlockingRateDueToACsi definition.
