#### 3.30.18.1.0-3 Resource Partition Volume Control Skip Algorithm Execution (ID: 11205843)

**3.30.18.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11205857`)

Resource Partition Volume Control The following logic is performed only when enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB008250-AA] or PLMN aware scheduler is activated (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB008250-AA] for a cell.

If the number of PRBs available for the slice aware scheduler [CB008250-AA] or the PLMN aware scheduler [End CB008250-AA] in slot t is less than or equal to 0 (rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) <= 0) (see 5G_UP_ALG_23256_replaced([11207913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwt0AvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then the enhanced SVC algorithm [CB008250-AA] or the PVC algorithm [End CB008250-AA] execution for slot t shall be skipped. At the time, rrmRGAvgHighShare_i(t), rrmRGAvgLowShare_i(t), rrmRGAvgShare_i(t) and rrmRGWeight_i(t) are set to the corresponding values of slot t-1, for every RG i. [CB008250-AA] If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), rrmPlmnAvgHighShare_p(t), rrmPlmnAvgShare_p(t) shall keep the corresponding values of slot t-1 for every PLMN p. [End CB008250-AA]

---

#### 3.30.18.1.0-4 Resource Partition Volume Control RG Weight Update with PI Control (ID: 11205864)

**3.30.18.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11205899`)

Resource Partition Volume Control 11205899: Resource Partition Volume Control RG weight update with PI control for RG j shall be done by executing the function rgWeightUpdateWithPiControl(j). RG weight is updated according to PI (proportional-integral) control law. The set-point of the PI control is the expected target share (including both high and low priority traffic) for RG j, rrmRGExpTargetShare_j(t). The I-term in PI control is limited within [-rdEnhSvcPiPGainUL, rdEnhSvcPiPGainUL], to avoid integral windup. Function rgWeightUpdateWithPiControl(j) [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a stylized font. The equation is: rrmRGDeltaj (t) = rrmRGExpTargetShare; (t) - rrmRGAvgShare」(t)[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16341.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] [image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is: `rrmkRgjtermj = rrmkRgjtermj + rdEnhSvePtlGainUL · rrmkRGdeltaj(t)`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16341.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] If [image-2][image_desc]The image contains blurry text. The text appears to be "rrrmR glterm, > rdEnhSvePtPGain UI".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16341.003.png[/image_path][/image-2] [image-3][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is: $rrrmRglterm_j = rdEnhSvcPtPGainUL$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16341.004.png[/image_path][/image-3] End If If [image-4][image_desc]The image contains the following text: rrrnRg lterm, < -rdEnhSvcPVPGainUL[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16341.005.png[/image_path][/image-4] [image-5][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, stylized font. The equation appears to be: `rrrrRgltermj = -râEnhSvcPvPGainUL`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16341.006.png[/image_path][/image-5] End If [image-6][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a stylized font. The formula is: rrmRGWeightⱼ(t) = max {rrmRGExpLowTargetShareⱼ(t) + rdEnhSvcPiPGainUL · rrmRGDeltaⱼ(t) + rrmRgItermⱼ, rrmRGExpLowTargetShareⱼ(t)/rdRGTinyWeightReciUL}[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16341.007.png[/image_path][/image-6] End Notations: * rrmRGWeight_j(t): RG weight computed for RG j at slot t * rrmRGExpTargetShare_j(t): the expected target share (including both high and low priority traffic) for RG j, computed at slot t. If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), see 5G_UP_ALG_31220_replaced([11206541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), else see 5G_UP_ALG_23167_replaced([11207350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). * rrmRGAvgShare_j(t): average resource share of RG j at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) * rrmRGDelta_j(t): the difference between rrmRGExpTargetShare_j(t) and rrmRGAvgShare_j(t). * rdEnhSvcPiPGainUL: R&D parameter, the integral gain of PI control used in the PVC algorithm, see 5G_UP_ALG_29761_replaced([11209329](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwzTkPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). * rdEnhSvcPiIGainUL: R&D parameter, the integral gain of PI control used in the PVC algorithm, see 5G_UP_ALG_29656_replaced([11209341](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwzTkvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). * rdRGTinyWeightReciUL: R&D parameter, the reciprocal of tiny RG weight for UL, to avoid cell resource waste, see 5G_UP_ALG_29661_replaced([11209353](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwzTlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). * rrmRgIterm_j: the integral term of PI control for RG j. If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), see 5G_UP_ALG_31220_replaced([11206541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), else see 5G_UP_ALG_23167_replaced([11207350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). * rrmRGExpLowTargetShare_j(t): the expected low priority traffic target share for RG j, computed at slot t. If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), see 5G_UP_ALG_31437_replaced([11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), else see 5G_UP_ALG_23157_replaced([11206914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.30.18.2 PLMN Aware Scheduler

#### 3.30.18.2.0-1 PLMN Aware Scheduler Introduction (ID: 11205914)

**3.30.18.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11205921`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall be aware of the available PLMNs and their target shares. For each PLMN, gNB-DU shall be aware of the RGs under the PLMN, their quotas, and the UEs/DRBs belonging to each **RG.**

UL PLMN aware scheduler is only supported for FR1 (both TDD and FDD).

gNB-DU shall obtain the following info during cell setup (& cell reconfig):

  * The number of configured PLMNs and their IDs
  * The number of resource groups (RGs) and theirs IDs
  * The target share for each PLMN _p (0 < _rrmPlmnTargetShare__p <= 1.0, 0 means 0% and 1.0 means 100%)._**
  * The prioritized minimum quota and maximum quota for each RG.
  * Whether resource sharing is allowed between PLMNs of the cell (_rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing = True/False)._



where

_rrmPlmnTargetShare__ p: The target share of PLMN _p, it is the target percentage of cell resources for PLMN aware scheduler that is allocated to a PLMN. It is set to NIDD parameter_ NRBTS/NRPLMNSHARE_PROFILE/NRPLMNSHARE.targetShare.****

_rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing: Whether resource sharing is allowed between PLMNs of the cell. It is set to NIDD parameter_ NRBTS/NRPLMNSHARE_PROFILE/allowPlmnToShareResources.**

The RG quotas are defined in 5G_UP_ALG_23115_replaced([11206740](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**[CB012238-C] If QoS fairness aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB(NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = False),**[End CB012238-C]****

using the provided RG quotas, gNB-DU shall calculate for each RG the target share (see 5G_UP_ALG_23119_replaced([11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the cell level maximum quota (see 5G_UP_ALG_31409_replaced([11205924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

**[CB012238-C] else, using both provided RG quotas and RG average total scheduling weights (see 5G_UP_ALG_33092_replaced([11208558](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwvCJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall calculate for each RG the target share using the QoS fairness target share computation algorithm (see 5G_UP_ALG_33087_replaced([11208531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwvCJPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **and the cell level maximum quota (see 5G_UP_ALG_31409_replaced([11205924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). **[End CB012238-C]** ****

To achieve the target share, gNB-DU shall update the RG weight for all RGs after each PVC algorithm execution (see 5G_UP_ALG_31220_replaced([11206541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). PVC algorithm is executed once per slot.

The enhanced SVC algorithm (5G_UP_ALG_23499_replaced([11189521](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not be executed if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Other parts of UL scheduler work in the same way as for the enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G_UP_ALG_23114_replaced([11206734](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) unless specified otherwise.

---

#### 3.30.18.2.0-2 PLMN Aware Scheduler Cell Level Maximum Quota of a RG (ID: 11205924)

**3.30.18.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11205931`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler For each RG j (RG j belongs to PLMN p), L2PS shall compute the cell level maximum quota rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j which is the maximum resources that the RG is allowed to use in average, measured in the percentage of cell resources available to PLMN aware scheduler. 0 <= rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j <= 1.0.

If rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing = True (see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j = rrmRGMaxQuota_j (see 5G_UP_ALG_23115_replaced([11206740](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Else

rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j = rrmRGMaxQuota_j * rrmPlmnTargetShare_p (see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

End If

The rationale is that if PLMN resource sharing is allowed, the max percentage of cell resources that a RG can use is equal to the max quota of the RG, otherwise, it is equal to the product of the max quota of the RG and the PLMN target share.

---

#### 3.30.18.2.0-3 PLMN Aware Scheduler Cell Level Target Share of a RG (ID: 11205939)

**3.30.18.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11205944`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler For each RG j (RG j belongs to PLMN p), L2PS shall compute the cell level target share rrmCellLevelTargetShare_j which is the expected resources that the RG shall get in average, measured in the percentage of cell resources available to PLMN aware scheduler, assuming each RG in the cell has full buffer traffic. 0 <= rrmCellLevelTargetShare_j <= 1.0.

rrmCellLevelTargetShare_j = rrmRGTargetShare_j * rrmPlmnTargetShare_p.

Notations:

rrmPlmnTargetShare_p: target share of PLMN p, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRGTargetShare_j: target share of RG j, see 5G_UP_ALG_23119_replaced([11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 3.30.18.2.0-4 PLMN Aware Scheduler PLMN Volume Control (PVC) (ID: 11205950)

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11205957`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler Algorithm of PVC

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11205964`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2PS shall compute an RG weight for each RG in the cell with the PVC algorithm at the end of each UL slot.

The PVC algorithm consists of the following steps:

**[CB012238-C]**

  * If QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB(NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True), computation of target shares of all RGs of each PLMN, assuming each PLMN has 100% of resource, according to 5G_UP_ALG_33087_replaced([11208531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwvCJPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [PR839489] To compute target share of RG j, the input param---set of RGs S shall be set to all RGs of the PLMN to which RG j belongs. [End PR839489] The target share of RG j is stored at rrmRGTargetShare_j.



**[End CB012238-C]**

**[Before CB012238-C-UPD001]**

**[CB008250-C]**

  * computation of dynamic target shares for non-empty buffer RGs (see 5G_UP_ALG_31505_replaced([11206598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used for RG load computation (see 5G_UP_ALG_24886_replaced([11207865](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for NBR congestion control per RG.



**[End CB008250-C]**

**[End CB012238-C-UPD001]**

  * computation of the low priority traffic target share for RGs of all PLMNs (see 5G_UP_ALG_31437_replaced([11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * computation of temporary target share of PLMNs and RGs assuming each RG has full buffer low priority traffic (see 5G_UP_ALG_31111_replaced([11206276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The computed values will be used as thresholds to determine low buffer traffic state of PLMNs and RGs.
  * determination of low buffer traffic states of PLMNs [Before PR841286] and RGs [End PR841286] (see 5G_UP_ALG_31326_replaced([11206473](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [Before PR841286] and 5G_UP_ALG_23173_replaced([11205541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End PR841286]). If resource sharing among PLMNs is allowed, the unused resources of low buffer PLMNs are shared by other PLMNs in proportional to their target shares. The unused resources of low buffer RGs of a PLMN are shared by other RGs of the PLMN.
  * computation of low priority traffic target shares for RGs of all PLMNs based on the following inputs (see 5G_UP_ALG_31437_replaced([11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))): 1) low buffer traffic state of PLMNs and RGs (see 5G_UP_ALG_31326_replaced([11206473](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and [Before PR841286] 5G_UP_ALG_23173_replaced([11205541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [PR841286] [12712180](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_8jbYsmblEfCwWbD4x7Iu-g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End PR841286]), 2) PLMN and RG target shares (see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 3) RG cell level maximum quotas (see 5G_UP_ALG_31409_replaced([11205924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 4) whether resource sharing is allowed among PLMNs (5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and 5) the average resource usage of PLMNs and RGs for high priority and low priority traffic (see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
  * feedback control based on the low priority traffic target share (see 5G_UP_ALG_31220_replaced([11206541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). This step updates the RG weight of each RG of the cell.



**[CB012238-C-UPD001]**

**[CB008250-C]**

  * computation of dynamic target shares for non-empty buffer RGs (see 5G_UP_ALG_31505_replaced([11206598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used for RG load computation (see 5G_UP_ALG_24886_replaced([11207865](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for NBR congestion control per RG.



**[End CB008250-C]**

**_*[End CB012238-C-UPD001]_** *

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11205971`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler Computation of low priority traffic target shares for RGs of all PLMNs

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11206063`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler 11206063: PLMN Aware Scheduler This step computes the low priority traffic target shares for RGs of all PLMNs. The procedure is listed as follows. The current slot is denoted _t._ Output: the expected low priority traffic target share rrmRGExpLowTargetShare_j(t) for each RG _j_ // compute the temporary target shares of all PLMNs and RGs, assuming that each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and the measured average high priority traffic. The computed values serve as thresholds for PLMN and RG low buffer state check. Execute computeFullBufferTempTargetShares(), defined at 5G_UP_ALG_31111_replaced([11206276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [Before PR841286] // compute the low buffer traffic state for all RGs Execute computeLowBufferStateForRGs(), defined at 5G_UP_ALG_23173_replaced([11205541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [PR841286] // whether low buffer state of any PLMN or RG is changed in this algorithm execution rrmLowbufStateChanged = False [End PR841286] // compute the low buffer traffic state for all PLMNs Execute computeLowBufferStateForPLMNs(), defined at 5G_UP_ALG_31326_replaced([11206473](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Make a list _P that contains all PLMNs in the cell._ Make for each PLMN _p a list [image-0][image_desc]The image contains the text "Sp" in a stylized font. The letters are rendered with a gradient effect, transitioning from a warm orange-brown at the bottom left to a cool blue at the top right. The letters are composed of small, pixelated squares, giving them a digital or mosaic appearance. The background is white, and the text is enclosed within a black border.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16353.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] that contains all RGs of the PLMN._ Initialize the remaining quota to be 100%, _R = 1.0._ R0 = R. // Find all PLMNs that are in the low buffer state. Set the expected low priority traffic target share to a high value for all RGs of each low buffer PLMN. Remove all low buffer PLMNs. The temporary target shares of other PLMNs are increased in proportion to their target shares. For each PLMN [image-1][image_desc]The image contains the text "p ∈ P". The text is set against a white background, and there is a black border around the entire image.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16353.006.png[/image_path][/image-19] Execute computeExpLowTargetSharesForRGsOfPLMN(_p), defined at 5G_UP_ALG_31449_replaced([11206072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))_ End For [PR841286] If (rrmLowbufStateChanged = True) For each RG j in the cell rrmRgIterm_j(t) = 0 End For End If [End PR841286] Notations: rrmRGExpLowTargetShare_j(t): the expected low priority traffic target share for RG j, computed at slot t. computeFullBufferTempTargetShares(): compute the temporary target shares of all PLMNs and RGs, assuming that each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and the actual high priority traffic, see 5G_UP_ALG_31111_replaced([11206276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). computeLowBufferStateForRGs(): compute the low buffer traffic state for all RGs, see 5G_UP_ALG_23173_replaced([11205541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). computeLowBufferStateForPLMNs(): compute the low buffer traffic state for all PLMNs, see 5G_UP_ALG_31326_replaced([11206473](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). P: the set of PLMNs in the cell, whose temporary target share hasn’t been computed. S_p: the set of RGs of PLMN p. R: remaining quota, 0 <= R <= 1.0 R0: initial quota, 0 <= R0 <= 1.0 hasLowBufferPLMN(p): whether PLMN p is in the low buffer traffic state, see 5G_UP_ALG_31326_replaced([11206473](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmPlmnAvgShare_p(t): average resource share of PLMN p at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j: cell level maximum quota of RG j, see 5G_UP_ALG_31409_replaced([11205924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG j at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rdRGMinLowShareUL: R&D parameter, minimum resource share given to an RG for its low priority traffic, see 5G_UP_ALG_23170_replaced([11209263](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwyshfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmPlmnTargetShare_p: The target share of PLMN p, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmPlmnTempTargetShare_p(t): The computed temporary target share of PLMN p at slot t. rrmPlmnAvgHighShare_p(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of PLMN p at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing: whether PLMN resource sharing is allowed or not, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). computeExpLowTargetSharesForRGsOfPLMN(_p): compute the low priority target share for all RGs of PLMN p, see 5G_UP_ALG_31449_replaced([11206072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))._ [PR841286] rrmLowbufStateChanged: whether low buffer state of any PLMN or RG is changed in this algorithm execution. The variable is also used/changed in other requirements. rrmRgIterm_j: the integral term of PI control for RG j, see [11206541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). rrmRGLowBufSlot_j(t): whether RG j has passed the per-slot low buffer state check in slot t, see [12712180](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_8jbYsmblEfCwWbD4x7Iu-g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). rrmRGLowBufferState_j: where RG j is in low buffer state, see [12712180](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_8jbYsmblEfCwWbD4x7Iu-g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End PR841286]

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11206072`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler Computation of low priority traffic target shares for RGs of a PLMN

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11206264`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler 11206264: PLMN Aware Scheduler This function computeExpLowTargetSharesForRGsOfPLMN(_p) computes the low priority traffic target share for all RGs of a PLMN_ p, which is a PLMN that has neither low buffer traffic nor larger high priority traffic than the temporary target share.**The procedure is listed as follows. The current slot is denoted _t._ Output: the expected low priority traffic target share rrmRGExpLowTargetShare_j(t) for each RG _j of PLMN_ p.** [PR841286] //Compute low buffer state for all RGs of PLMN p Execute computeLowBufferRGStateForPlmn(p) as per [12712180](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_8jbYsmblEfCwWbD4x7Iu-g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End PR841286] // initialize the resource available for all RGs of the PLMN to be equal to the temporary PLMN target share. [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, light-colored font on a white background. The equation is: $R_p = rrmPlmnTargetShare_p(t)$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16355.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] // Find all RGs in the PLMN that have low buffer traffic. Set the expected low priority traffic target share of all identified RGs to a high value. Remove all identified RGs. [image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is: $f = \frac{R_p}{\sum_{\text{each } RG \in S_p} \text{rrmRGTtargetShare}_k}$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16355.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] rrmExistLowBufferRGs = False For each RG [image-2][image_desc]The image contains the text "j ∈ Sₚ". The text is blurry and has a colorful halo effect.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16355.003.png[/image_path][/image-2] [image-3][image_desc]The image contains text that appears to be a variable assignment in a programming context. The text is blurry and difficult to read with certainty, but it seems to be:`rrmRG DynamicTargetShare = rrmRG TargetShare`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16355.004.png[/image_path][/image-3] [image-4][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a sans-serif font. The formula is: rrmRG Exp LowTargetShare; (t) = max{rrmRGTempTargetShare; rrmRG AvgHighShare; (t), rdRGM inLowShareUL}[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16355.028.png[/image_path][/image-42] End For Notations: rrmPlmnTempTargetShare_p(t): The temporary target share of PLMN p at slot t, it is computed in 5G_UP_ALG_31437_replaced([11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). R_p: remaining quota for PLMN p, 0 <= R_p <= 1.0. S_p: the set of RGs of PLMN p, whose low priority traffic target share hasn’t been computed. rrmRGTargetShare_j: target share of RG j, see 5G_UP_ALG_23119_replaced([11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmExistLowBufferRGs: if at least one RG is in low-buffer state for the PLMN, the value is True. rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_j: The dynamic target share computed for an RG j _in S_p_ according to 5G_UP_ALG_28239_replaced([11206837](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**rrmRGTempTargetShare_j: temporary target share (including both high priority and low priority traffic) for RG j rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j: cell level maximum quota of RG j, see 5G_UP_ALG_31409_replaced([11205924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). hasLowBuffer(j): whether RG j is in the low buffer traffic state, see 5G_UP_ALG_23173_replaced([11205541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmRGAvgShare_j(t): average resource share of RG _j at slot_ t, see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).** rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG _j at slot_ t, see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).** rrmRGExpLowTargetShare_j(t): the expected low priority traffic target share for RG j, computed at slot t. rdRGMinLowShareUL: R&D parameter, minimum resource share given to an RG for its low priority traffic, see 5G_UP_ALG_23170_replaced([11209263](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwyshfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `11206276`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler Compute temporary target share of PLMNs and RGs assuming each RG has full buffer low priority traffic

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11206465`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler 11206465: PLMN Aware Scheduler This procedure computes the temporary target shares of all PLMNs and RGs, assuming that each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and actual (current) high priority traffic. These temporary target shares are stored in variables rrmPLMNFullBufferTempTargetShare_p for every PLMN p, rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare_j for every RG j, which will be used later for low buffer state check. The procedure is listed as follows. The current slot is denoted t. Function computeFullBufferTempTargetShares() Make a list P that contains all configured PLMNs in the cell. Make for each PLMN [image-0][image_desc]The image is a close-up, blurry, and abstract representation of a person's face, possibly a woman, with a focus on the eye area. The colors are muted, with shades of beige, brown, and white, and there are hints of blue and orange. The lighting creates a soft, diffused effect, with highlights and shadows that add depth and dimension. The overall impression is one of a dreamlike or ethereal quality, with the features of the face blending into one another. The image is highly stylized and artistic, with a focus on form and color rather than precise detail.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16357.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] a list [image-1][image_desc]The image contains the text "Sp" in a stylized font. Initialize the remaining quota to be equal to 100%, R = 1.0. // initialize full buffer temporary target share of each PLMN to the PLMN target share of the cell resource. For each PLMN [image-2][image_desc]The image contains the text "p ∈ P". The text is in a sans-serif font and appears to be rendered in a way that gives it a slightly metallic or iridescent sheen, with colors ranging from blue to orange and yellow. The letters are capitalized and lowercase, with the lowercase "p" on the left, followed by the symbol "∈" (element of), and then the uppercase "P" on the right. The text is set against a white background, and there is a black border around the entire image.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16357.003.png[/image_path][/image-2] [image-3][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a stylized font. The equation is: `rmmPfullBuf f erTempT ar getSharep = R · rmmPT ar getSharep`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16357.004.png[/image_path][/image-3] End For // Find all PLMNs for which the average resource usage for high priority traffic is larger than the full buffer temporary PLMN target share. Set the full buffer temporary target share to the average resource usage for high priority traffic, for all RGs of such a PLMN. Remove all identified PLMNs. The full buffer temporary target shares of other PLMNs are decreased in proportion to their PLMN target shares. This process runs continuously until all PLMNs satisfying the condition are removed. While (True) For each PLMN [image-4][image_desc]The image contains the text "p ∈ P". The formula is: $rrmRGF_{fullBuf} for TempTargetShare_j = \frac{rrmRGTargetShare_j}{\sum_{k \in R} rrmRGTargetShare_k}$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16357.024.png[/image_path][/image-42] End If End For Else Break End If End While End For End Function Notations: P: the set of PLMNs in the cell, whose temporary target shares under full buffer low priority traffic condition haven’t been computed. S_p: the set of RGs of the PLMN p, whose temporary target shares under full buffer low priority traffic condition haven’t been computed. R: remaining quota, 0 <= R <= 1.0 R_p: remaining quota for PLMN p, 0<=R_p<=1.0 rrmPlmnFullBufferTempTargetShare_p: temporary target share (including both high priority and low priority traffic) for PLMN p, assuming each PLMN has full buffer low priority traffic and the actual high priority traffic. rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare_j: temporary target share (including both high priority and low priority traffic) for RG j, assuming each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and the actual high priority traffic. rrmPlmnTargetShare_p: target share of PLMN p, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmRGTargetShare_j: target share of RG j, see 5G_UP_ALG_23119_replaced([11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) rrmRGMaxQuota_j: maximum quota of RG j rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j: maximum quota of RG j measured in terms of cell resource, see 5G_UP_ALG_31409_replaced([11205924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmPlmnAvgHighShare_p(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of PLMN p at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG j at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) rrmPlmnAvgShare_p(t): average resource share for PLMN p at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmRGAvgShare_j(t): average resource share of RG j at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing: whether PLMN resource sharing is allowed or not. The value is True or False, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-5**  (ID: `11206473`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler Determine Low Buffer Traffic States of PLMNs

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11206534`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler 11206534: PLMN Aware Scheduler The low buffer traffic state check for PLMNs is similar to that for RGs. To decide the low buffer traffic states of all PLMNs, gNB-DU needs to execute computeLowBufferStateForPLMNs() after executing computeFullBufferTempTargetShares(). A PLMN p is considered to have low buffer traffic, i.e. hasLowBufferPLMN(p) _= True, if either of the following two conditions has been satisfied in the past rdMinLowBufferSlotsUL slots. Once both conditions are unsatisfied, the PLMN is considered not to have low buffer traffic, i.e. hasLowBufferPLMN(p)_ = False.**a) rrmPlmnFullBufferTempTargetShare_p for PLMN p is equal to 0 and no resource is assigned to PLMN p in the slot. b) rrmPlmnFullBufferTempTargetShare_p for PLMN p is greater than 0 and the average resource share of PLMN p rrmPlmnAvgShare_p(t) is below rdAvgShareToleranceUL * rrmPlmnFullBufferTempTargetShare_p in the slot. hasLowBufferPLMN(p) returns the current low buffer traffic state of PLMN _p._//After executing computeLowBufferStateForPLMNs(),_ rrmPlmnLowBufferState_p stores the low buffer state of PLMN _p. rrmPlmnLowBufferState_p = True, if PLMN_ p is in low buffer state._** [image-0][image_desc]The image contains the text "rrrm PlmmLowBufferStatep". The text is in a dark color against a light, slightly blurred background. The letters are mostly clear, but some are slightly distorted or have a slight blur. The word "rrrm" appears at the beginning, followed by "PlmmLowBufferStatep".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16359.001.png[/image_path][/image-0], for every PLMN _p_ // compute the low buffer traffic state for all PLMNs. The states are stored in _rrmPlmnLowBufferState_ Function computeLowBufferStateForPLMNs() Make a list _P that contains all PLMNs in the cell._ For each PLMN [image-1][image_desc]The image contains the text "p ∈ P". The text is in a sans-serif font and appears to be rendered in a way that gives it a slightly metallic or iridescent sheen, with colors ranging from blue to orange and yellow. The letters are capitalized and lowercase, with the lowercase "p" on the left, followed by the symbol "∈" (element of), and then the uppercase "P" on the right. The text is set against a white background, and there is a black border around the entire image.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16359.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] If ([image-2][image_desc]The image contains the following text: `rmmPlmFulBafferrTempTargetSharep ≤ 0 and rmmPlmnstSharep(t) ≤ 0`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16359.003.png[/image_path][/image-2]) or ([image-3][image_desc]The image contains blurry text. The expression is: t' ∈ [t - rdMinLowBuf, N_slotsUL + 1, t].[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16359.009.png[/image_path][/image-8]) [image-9][image_desc]The image contains the text "rrm P'mnLowBufferState = False". The text is slightly blurry and appears to be in a dark color against a light background.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16359.011.png[/image_path][/image-10] End If [PR841286] If (PLMN p has rrmPlmnLowBufferState_p changed from true to false or from false to true) rrmLowbufStateChanged = True End If [End PR841286] End For End Function Output: return True, if PLMN _p is in low buffer traffic state, Otherwise, return False_ Function hasLowBufferPLMN(p) Return [image-11][image_desc]The image contains the text "rrrm PlmmLowBufferStatep". The text is in a dark color against a light, slightly blurred background. The letters are mostly clear, but some are slightly distorted or have a slight blur. The word "rrrm" appears at the beginning, followed by "PlmmLowBufferStatep".[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16359.012.png[/image_path][/image-11] End Function Notations: rrmPlmnAvgShare_p(t): Average resource share for PLMN _p at slot_ t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**rdAvgShareToleranceUL: R &D parameter, the tolerance level for checking average resource share for an RG, see 5G_UP_ALG_23175_replaced([11209276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwysh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rdMinLowBufferSlotsUL: R&D parameter, the minimum number of consecutive slots for low buffer traffic state checking, see 5G_UP_ALG_23179_replaced([11209290](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwysifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmPlmnLowBufSlot_p(t): whether PLMN _p has passed low buffer state check _for slot_ t._** rrmPlmnLowBufferState_p: current low buffer traffic state of PLMN _p_ rrmPlmnFullBufferTempTargetShare_p: temporary target share (including both high priority and low priority traffic) for PLMN _p, assuming each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and the actual high priority traffic, see 5G_UP_ALG_31111_replaced([11206276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))._ rrmPlmnInstShare_p(t): the instantaneous resource share used by PLMN p in slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [PR841286] rrmLowbufStateChanged: whether low buffer state of any PLMN or RG is changed in this algorithm execution, see [11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End PR841286]

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-6**  (ID: `12712180`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler Determine Low Buffer Traffic States of All RGs of a PLMN

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12712181`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler To decide the low buffer traffic states of all RGs of a non-low-buffer PLMN p, gNB-DU shall execute computeLowBufferRGStateForPlmn(p). 

Precondition for determining low buffer states of all RGs of a PLMN p:

  * Full buffer temporary target shares of the RGs of PLMN p are computed per [11206276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
  * Temporary target share for PLMN p has been computed per [11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).



computeLowBufferRGStateForPlmn(p) first computes the per-slot low buffer state (rrmRGLowBufSlot_j(t)) of each RG j in PLMN p. rrmRGLowBufSlot_j(t) is initialized to false and the threshold for low buffer check (rrmLowbufThres_j) is initialized to full buffer temporary target share (rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare_j), for each RG j in PLMN p.

The following step is kept performing on all remaining RGs of PLMN p until none of the RG can pass the per-slot low buffer state check. It recursively find all per-slot low buffer RGs of PLMN p. rrmRGLowBufSlot_j(t) of RG j is set to true, if either of the following two conditions has been satisfied:

  * The threshold for low buffer state check for RG j (rrmLowbufThres_j) is equal to 0 and no resource has been assigned to RG j in the slot (rrmRGInstShare_j(t) = 0).
  * rrmLowbufThres_j for RG j is greater than 0 and the average resource share of RG j rrmRGAvgShare_j(t) is below rdAvgShareToleranceUL * rrmLowbufThres_j in the slot.



All per-slot low buffer RGs (rrmRGLowBufSlot_j(t) = true) are removed from the list, and the threshold (rrmLowbufThres) of the remaining RGs are updated considering the resources available for PLMN p, the average resource share for high priority traffic (rrmRGAvgHighShare), cell level max quota (rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota) and the resource sharing according to dynamic target shares.

An RG j is considered to have low buffer traffic, i.e. hasLowBuffer(j) = True, if RG j has passed the per-slot low buffer state check (rrmRGLowBufSlot_j(t) = True) in the past rdMinLowBufferSlotsUL slots. Otherwise, the RG is considered not to have low buffer traffic, i.e. hasLowBuffer(j) = False.

rrmRGLowBufferState_j, for every RG j in the cell.

Function computeLowBufferRGStateForPlmn(p)

R_p = rrmPlmnTempTargetShare_p(t)

//Initialize threshold for low buffer state check and per-slot low buffer state of each RG

For each RG j in PLMN p

rrmLowbufThres_j = rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare_j

rrmRGLowBufSlot_j = False

End For

Make a copy of all RGs of PLMN p, denoted as S_p

While (True)

Found = False

For each RG j in S_p

If [(rrmLowbufThres_j <= 0) and (rrmRGInstShare_j(t) <= 0)] or [rrmRGAvgShare_j(t) < rdAvgShareToleranceUL * rrmLowbufThres_j]

// RG j is identified as low buffer RG

rrmRGLowBufSlot_j = True

R_p = R_p - rrmRGAvgShare_j(t)

Found = True

Remove RG j from S_p

End If

End For

If (Found = True) and (S_p is not empty)

//Update the threshold for low buffer state check of all RGs in S_p

Compute dynamic target share for the set of RGs S_p according to [11206837](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_3RzbgPvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The dynamic target share of an RG j is saved in rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_j.

D = sum(rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_j), for all RG j in S_p

If (m_j = rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t) / max[rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_j * R_p / D, 10^(-6)] > 1 for at least one RG j in S_p)

//Sorting S_p in order to process RGs with relatively higher rrmRGAvgHighShare earlier.

Sort S_p in the descending order of m_j for each RG j

End If

R = R_p

For each RG j in S_p

If (D <= 0) or (R <= 0)

rrmLowbufThres_j = rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t)

Else

rrmLowbufThres_j = max{rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_j * R / D, rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t)}

End If

//rrmLowbufThres is upper bounded by max{rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t), rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j}

rrmLowbufThres_j = min{max{rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t), rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j}, rrmLowbufThres_j}

D = D - rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_j

R = R - rrmLowbufThres_j

End For

Else

//None of the RG is S_p is in per-slot low buffer state.

Break While

End If

End While

For each RG j in PLMN p

If (t < rdMinLowBufferSlotsUL) or (rrmRGLowBufSlot_j(t’) is false for any slot t’ in [t – rdMinLowBufferSlotsUL+1, t])

rrmRGLowBufferState_j = False

Else

rrmRGLowBufferState_j = True

End If

//If at least one RG has changed low buffer state, rrmLowbufStateChanged is set to true.

If (RG j has rrmRGLowBufferState_j changed from true to false or from false to true)

rrmLowbufStateChanged = True

End If

End For

End Function

Output: low buffer traffic state of RG j. Return true, if RG j is in low buffer traffic state, Otherwise, return False

Function hasLowBuffer(j)

Return rrmRGLowBufferState_j

End Function

Notations:

rrmPlmnTempTargetShare_p(t): The computed temporary target share of PLMN p at slot t, see [11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmLowbufThres_j: the threshold for low buffer state check for RG j.

rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare_j: temporary target share (including both high priority and low priority traffic) for RG j, assuming each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and the actual high priority traffic, see [11206276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

rrmRGLowBufSlot_j(t): whether RG j has passed the per-slot low buffer state check in slot t.

rrmRGInstShare_j(t): the instantaneous resource share used by RG j in slot t, see [11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGAvgShare_j(t): average resource share of RG j at slot t, see [11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rdAvgShareToleranceUL: R&D parameter, the tolerance level for checking average resource share for an RG, see [11209276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwysh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_j: The dynamic target share computed for an RG j in S_p according to [11206837](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG j at slot t, see [11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j: cell level maximum quota of RG j, see [11205924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rdMinLowBufferSlotsUL: R&D parameter, the minimum number of consecutive slots for low buffer traffic state checking, see [11209290](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwysifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

R_p: remaining resources for PLMN p after deducting average usage of per-slot low buffer RGs.

R: resources available for RGs of PLMN p whose rrmLowbufThres haven’t been updated. R is initialized to R_p.

D: the sum of dynamic target shares (rrmRGDynamicTargetShare) of RGs of PLMN p whose rrmLowbufThres haven’t been updated. D is initialized to the sum of rrmRGDynamicTargetShare of all RGs (S_p) that are not yet identified as per-slot low buffer RG.

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-7**  (ID: `11206541`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler Feedback control based on RG low priority target shares

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11206591`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler 11206591: PLMN Aware Scheduler After the low priority traffic target share is computed for each RG (see 5G_UP_ALG_31437_replaced([11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU applies proportional-integral feedback control to compute the RG weight for each RG.

In addition, under the condition that resource sharing is not allowed for a PLMN, RG weight of each RG of the PLMN is set to 0 if the average PLMN resource usage is above a given threshold.

The procedure is listed as follows. The current slot is denoted t.

Output: the RG weight rrmRGWeight_j(t) for each RG j

Initialization after RG j is created. I-term of PI control is initialized to 0.

For each configured RG j in the cell

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "rrmRgltermj(t) = 0". The text is in a light color against a white background.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

End For

The following shall be executed for every run of PVC algorithm.

For each PLMN p in the cell

// If resource sharing among PLMNs is not allowed and the measured average resource used by the PLMN is higher than the PLMN target share by a certain degree, then the PLMN weight is set to 0; otherwise, the PLMN weight is set to 1.

If ([image-1][image_desc]The image contains text that reads "rrrmAllowPlmnResourcesSharing = False". The text is blurry and difficult to read.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]) and [image-2][image_desc]The image contains a single line of mathematical text. The text is: (rrmPlmnAvgShare,(t) > max{rrmPlmnTargetShare, + rdPlmnTargetShareToleranceUL,rrmPlmnAvgHighShare,(t)))[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.003.png[/image_path][/image-2]

[image-3][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, stylized font. The equation appears to be: `rrrrPmnmWeightμ(t) = 0` The characters are not clearly defined, and some letters are difficult to distinguish. The overall impression is of a handwritten or distorted mathematical expression.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.004.png[/image_path][/image-3]

Else

[image-4][image_desc]The image contains the following text: rrrnPmnlWeightµ(t) = 1[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.005.png[/image_path][/image-4]

End If

For each configured RG j in PLMN p

// If a RG has average usage above the cell level max quota or the PLMN to which it belongs has zero weight, then RG weight is set to 0. Else if a RG has low buffer traffic or the PLMN to which it belongs has low buffer traffic, then the RG weight is set to a high value, so that the RG and the PLMN can attain the target share when high traffic demand comes. Otherwise, the RG weight is updated according to PI control.

If ([image-5][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is written in a blurry, light-colored font on a white background. The equation reads: $r r r m P l m n W e i g h t_{\mu}(t) = 0$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.006.png[/image_path][/image-5]) or ([image-6][image_desc]The image contains the following text: rrmRG AvgShare(t) > rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.007.png[/image_path][/image-6])

[image-7][image_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "rrrmRGWeightj(t) = 0". The text is blurry and difficult to read.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.008.png[/image_path][/image-7]

Else if (hasLowBuffer(j) = True) or (hasLowBufferPLMN(p) = True)

[image-8][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a blurry, stylized font. The formula appears to be: `rrnıR G weight(t) = (2 · rdEnkSvcPıPGainUL + 1) · rdLowBıj RıWeight.AmplıfıerUL`[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.009.png[/image_path][/image-8] 

Else

[image-9][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a light blue font against a white background. The formula is: rrmRGExpTargetShare;(t) = min (rrmRGExpLowTargetShare;(t) + rrmRGAvgHighShare; (t), rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota;} The formula appears to be defining a variable `rrmRGExpTargetShare` at time `t` as the minimum of two expressions. The first expression is the sum of `rrmRGExpLowTargetShare` at time `t` and `rrmRGAvgHighShare` at time `t`. The second expression is `rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota`.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16361.010.png[/image_path][/image-9]

// RG weight is updated with PI control.

Execute rgWeightUpdateWithPiControl(j)

End If

End For

End For

If RG j has RG weight equal to 0, then no resource will be allocated to initial transmissions of nonGBR and deprioritized GBR DRBs of RG j in the following UL grants until the RG weight becomes positive. However, resources can be allocated to initial transmissions and retransmissions of GBR DRBs, or to retransmissions of nonGBR DRBs of RG j even if the RG weight is equal to 0.

Notations:

rrmRGWeight_j(t): RG weight computed for RG j at slot t

rrmPlmnTargetShare_p: target share of PLMN p, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRGExpTargetShare_j(t): the expected target share (including both high and low priority traffic) for RG j, computed at slot t

rrmRGExpLowTargetShare_j(t): the expected low priority traffic target share for RG j, computed at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31437_replaced([11205971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRGAvgHighShare_j(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG j at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

rrmPlmnAvgHighShare_p(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of PLMN p at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota_j: maximum quota of RG j measured in terms of cell resource, see 5G_UP_ALG_31409_replaced([11205924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRGAvgShare_j(t): average resource share of RG j at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

rrmPlmnAvgShare_p(t): average resource share for PLMN p at slot t, see 5G_UP_ALG_31468_replaced([11206708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing: whether PLMN resource sharing is allowed or not. The value is True or False, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRgIterm_j: the integral term of PI control for RG j.

rdEnhSvcPiPGainUL: R&D parameter, the integral gain of PI control used in the PVC algorithm, see 5G_UP_ALG_29761_replaced([11209329](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwzTkPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

hasLowBuffer(j): returns the current low buffer traffic state of RG j, see 5G_UP_ALG_23173_replaced([11205541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

hasLowBufferPLMN(p): returns the current low buffer traffic state of PLMN p, see 5G_UP_ALG_31326_replaced([11206473](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwrXxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rdPlmnTargetShareToleranceUL: R&D parameter, tolerance of the overshoot of average usage of a PLMN when resource sharing is not allowed for the PLMN, see 5G_UP_ALG_31221_replaced([11209608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0hvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

rrmPlmnWeight_p(t): PLMN weight of PLMN p at slot t.

rdLowBufferRgWeightAmplifierUL: this R&D parameter is used in PVC algorithm when PI control is enabled to increase the chance that DRBs of a low buffer RG get scheduled, so that the RG can get its target share when enough traffic will be available, see 5G_UP_ALG_31193_replaced([11209594](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw0hvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rgWeightUpdateWithPiControl(j): the function that updates RG Weight with PI Control for RG j, see 5G_UP_ALG_32119_replaced([11205864](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqws_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The rationale behind setting RG weight of a low buffer RG to a static high value is to avoid PI control for the RG, because it may be impossible to attain the target share due to the low buffer traffic demand. Setting a high RG weight has the advantage to let the RG quickly attain the target share when high traffic demand comes.

---

**3.30.18.2.0-4.0-8**  (ID: `11206598`)

Function computeNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShares()

For each PLMN _p in_ P**

For each PLMN _p in_ P**

If (rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing = True)

[image-6][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, italicized font. Notations:

rrmNonempBufRGs_p: the set of non-empty buffer RGs of PLMN p.

rrmRecompRGTargetShare_k: recomputed target share of non-empty buffer RG k. To improve performance, it is only computed when necessary.

rrmNonempBufPlmnTargetShare_p: the expected resources allocated to a non-empty buffer PLMN p.

rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare_k: dynamic target share for non-empty buffer RG k, considering resources usable by the PLMN.

computeNonempBufRGs(p): compute the set of non-empty buffer RGs of PLMN p, see 5G_UP_ALG_28674_replaced([11205741](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqJq_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing: whether PLMN resource sharing is allowed or not. The value is True or False, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmPlmnTargetShare_p: target share of PLMN _p, see 5G_UP_ALG_31403_replaced([11205914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwqwtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))._

[CB012238-C-UPD001]

rrmRGTargetShare_j: target share of RG j, see [11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_3HNVEPvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). 

rrmExistEmptyBufferRGs_p: whether any of the RGs in PLMN p is in empty buffer state, see [11205741](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ytwokfvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_j: dynamic target share of RG j, see [11206914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

rrmEmptyBufferRGsLowBufferRGsMatch_p: whether the set of empty buffer RGs match exactly the set of low buffer RGs in PLMN p, see [11205741](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ytwokfvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

[End CB012238-C-UPD001]

---

#### 3.30.18.2.0-5 PLMN Aware Scheduler PRB Bookkeeping (ID: 11206704)

**3.30.18.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11206708`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler PLMN Resource Share Bookkeeping

---

**3.30.18.2.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11206727`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler 11206727: PLMN Aware Scheduler After the resource allocation in each slot, if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and available PRBs for SAS is greater than 0 (rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) > 0, see 5G_UP_ALG_23256_replaced([11207913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwt0AvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the instantaneous and average PLMN resource share shall be updated for each PLMN.

Instantaneous PLMN resource share shall be updated after instantaneous RG resource shares are updated for all RGs of the PLMN. Average PLMN resource share shall be updated after average RG resource shares are updated for all RGs of the PLMN (see 5G_UP_ALG_23262_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

L2PS shall compute the instantaneous resource share of PLMN p at slot t rrmPlmnInstShare_p(t) as the sum of the instantaneous resource share of all RGs of PLMN p:

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is: $rrmPlmnInstShare_p(t) = \sum_{each RG j \in PLMN p} rrmRGInstShare_j(t)$ This formula appears to define the "rrmPlmnInstShare" at time "t" for a specific PLMN "p" as the sum of "rrmRGInstShare" for each Radio Group (RG) "j" within that PLMN.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16366.001.png[/image_path][/image-0].

L2PS shall compute the average resource share of PLMN p at slot t rrmPlmnAvgShare_p(t) as the sum of the average resource share of all RGs of PLMN p:

[image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is: $rrm PLMN AvgShare_p(t) = \sum_{each RG j \in PLMN p} rrm RG AvgShare_j(t)$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16366.002.png[/image_path][/image-1].

L2PS shall compute the average resource share for high priority traffic of PLMN p at slot t rrmPlmnAvgHighShare_p(t) as the sum of the average resource share for high priority traffic of all RGs of PLMN p:

[image-2][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is: $rrmPlmnAvgHighShare_e (t) = \sum_{each RG j \in PLMN_p} rrmRGAvgHighShare_j (t)$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16366.003.png[/image_path][/image-2].

---

### 3.30.18.3 Slice Aware Scheduler

#### 3.30.18.3.0-1 Slice Aware Scheduler Introduction (ID: 11206740)

**3.30.18.3.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13492872`)

Slice Aware Scheduler If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall be aware of the available configured RGs, their quotas, and the DRBs belonging to each **configured** RG for a cell.****

UL slice aware scheduler is only supported for FR1 (both TDD and FDD).

gNB-DU shall obtain the following info during cell setup (& cell reconfig):

  * The number of configured PLMNs & their IDs
  * The number of resource groups (RGs) and theirs IDs



The prioritized minimum quota and maximum quota for each RG (_rrmRGMinQuota and_ rrmRGMaxQuota: 0 <= _rrmRGMinQuota <=1.0 and 0 < _rrmRGMaxQuota <=1.0. 0 means 0% and 1.0 means 100%).****

where:

_rrmRGMinQuota: The minimum percentage of cell resources for slice aware scheduler that is allocated to a resource group. It is set to NIDD parameter NRBTS/NRRESOURCEGROUP_PROFILE/NRRESOURCEGROUP.minQuota._

_rrmRGMaxQuota: The maximum percentage of cell resources for slice aware scheduler that is allocated to a resource group. It is set to NIDD parameter NRBTS/NRRESOURCEGROUP_PROFILE/NRRESOURCEGROUP.maxQuota._

_If an RG has an average usage higher than rrmRGMaxQuota, then it will not be scheduled until the average usage goes below rrmRGMaxQuota._

[CB016273-A]

If intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), the intent throughput for each RG (rrmIntentTput, 0 <= rrmIntentTput <= 62,500,000 bytes/sec)

where

rrmIntentTput: The intent throughput that is the average throughput per nonGBR UE measured in bytes/sec for a resource group.

[End CB016273-A]

An RG is mapped to one or more SA slices, or to one or more NSA resource groups (PLMN or SPID NSA resource groups), or to one or more SA slices and one or more NSA resource groups.

Using the provided quotas, gNB-DU shall calculate for each configured RG a target share (see 5G_UP_ALG_23119_replaced([11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

To achieve the target share, gNB-DU shall compute an RG weight (see 5G_UP_ALG_23167_replaced([11207350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwsl7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for each RG at the end of each UL slot.

gNB-DU shall use RG weights in the following parts of the UL scheduler:

  * UEs selection for CS1 (see 5G_UP_ALG_4825_replaced([11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * UE selection, by altering the PF metric (see 5G_UP_ALG_4851_replaced([11195815](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv-0NPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * Resource allocation for initial non-GBR Tx and initial deprioritized GBR/DC-GBR Tx (outer WRR) (see 5G_UP_ALG_4999_replaced([11199901](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * Estimate throughput for UL CA data split (see 5G_UP_ALG_9492_replaced([11204535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

#### 3.30.18.3.0-2 Slice Aware Scheduler Rationale of Slice Aware Scheduler (ID: 11206759)

**3.30.18.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11206772`)

Slice Aware Scheduler Slice aware scheduler aims to make each RG stabilize at its target share (5G_UP_ALG_23119_replaced([11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if possible. Moreover, it aims to avoid that any RG uses more resources than its maximum quota. To achieve both goals, slice aware scheduler continuously controls the resources assigned to low priority traffic of each RG -- initTx of nonGBR (drbTraffic) and deprioritized GBR[CB008600-F]/DC-GBR[End CB008600-F] (deprioritizedGbr).

---

#### 3.30.18.3.0-3 Slice Aware Scheduler DRB to Resource Group Mapping (ID: 11206779)

**3.30.18.3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11206785`)

Slice Aware Scheduler The rationale of the table below is the following: the assignment of a DRB to an RG only happens once in the lifetime of the DRB and is permanent. If a DRB is not assigned to any RG, then this DRB is handled by the default RG at that time. The default RG can be identified by the PLMN ID and whether the UE is an SA or NSA UE.

The following table shall be used for the mapping of DRB to Resource Group.  
  
---  
Upon DRB addition, newly added DRB is assigned to RG based on its UE's identifier (SNSSAI, SPID and/or PLMN) according to the latest configuration (see 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12122_replaced([11288167](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RcPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  
In runtime, if UE's DRB is not assigned to any RG then it is handled by default RG according to current configuration.  
If UE's DRB is assigned to RG which does not exist any longer, then it is handled by default RG according to current configuration.  
|   
---|---  
Scenario | Existing DRBs  
Feature enabling in the runtime | 1\. For the first time enabling the feature: DRBs were not assigned to any RG. They are handled within default RG pointed by the current configuration. 2. When the feature was enabled previously and there are some DRBs with assigned RG: a) then such DRBs are handled with the assigned RG if this RG still exists in the current configuration. b) or if this RG is not present anymore in current configuration, then such DRBs are handled within default RG pointed by the current configuration.  
Default RG change | 1\. DRBs not assigned to any RG will be handled within newly pointed 'default RG' by the current configuration. 2. Also, DRBs assigned to RG which does not exist in the current configuration will be handled within newly pointed 'default RG' by the current configuration. 3. However, change of the default RG does not change existing RG assignment to DRBs. This means DRBs continue to be handled within already assigned RG.  
RG removal | 1\. DRBs assigned to RG which has been removed will be handled within 'default RG' pointed by the current configuration. 2. However, if the removed RG was pointed as 'default RG', it entails 'default RG change' scenario.  
RG addition | 1\. If the feature had been enabled previously and there are some DRBs which are assigned to that newly created RG then such DRBs are handled within this RG.

---

#### 3.30.18.3.0-4 Slice Aware Scheduler Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC) (ID: 11206793)

**3.30.18.3.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11206799`)

Slice Aware Scheduler RG Target Share Computed for All Configured RGs

---

**3.30.18.3.0-4.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13493076`)

Slice Aware Scheduler If at least one of these is activated:

  * Enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * PLMN aware scheduler (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))



AND

  * QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = False)



, a target share for every configured RG _i is calculated based on the provided quotas as follows:_

If every configured **RG _i satisfies that its min quota is equal to its max quota rrmRGMinQuota_i = rrmRGMaxQuota_i (see 5G_UP_ALG_23115_replaced([11206740](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), equivalently [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is: $\sum_{j} (\text{rrmRGMaxQuota}_j - \text{rrmRGMinQuota}_j) = 0$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16379.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] then_**

for every configured **RG** _i, its target share is set equal to its min quota, rrmRGTargetShare_i = rrmRGMinQuota_i._

Else

[image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is for `rrmRGTargetShare_i` and is defined as the minimum of `rrmRGMaxQuota_i` and a more complex expression. This expression involves `rrmRGMinQuota_i`, a fraction, and a term multiplied by `(1.0 - sum of rrmRGMinQuota_j)`. The fraction has `rrmRGMaxQuota_i - rrmRGMinQuota_i` in the numerator and the sum of `rrmRGMaxQuota_j - rrmRGMinQuota_j` in the denominator.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_16379.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]

where

  * [image-2][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical symbol that appears to be a summation sign followed by the Greek letter 'v' and the letter 'j'. The summation sign is large and bold, with a gradient effect. The 'v' and 'j' are smaller and appear to be subscripts to the summation sign. The overall image is a close-up of this mathematical notation.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_14534.007.png[/image_path][/image-2]: if PLMN aware scheduler is activated ([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), summation over all RGs of the PLMN to which RG i belongs; otherwise, summation over all RGs of the cell



Else if at least one of these is activated:

  * Enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * PLMN aware scheduler (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))



AND

  * QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True),



[CB016273-A]

AND

  * Intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = False),



[End CB016273-A]

a target share for every configured RG i is calculated according to 5G_UP_ALG_33087_replaced([11208531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwvCJPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 

[CB016273-A]

Else if at least one of these is activated:

  * Enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * PLMN aware scheduler (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))



AND

  * QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True),



AND

  * Intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True),



a target share for every configured RG i is calculated according to [13492570](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ch0buEPDEfGy8ZlFziQwLA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). 

[End CB016273-A]​​​​​​​

To compute target share of RG j, if PLMN aware scheduler is activated, the input param---set of RGs S shall be set to all RGs of the PLMN to which RG j belongs; otherwise, S shall be set to all RGs of the cell.

---

**3.30.18.3.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11206837`)

Slice Aware Scheduler RG Dynamic Target Share Computed for a Set of RGs

---

**3.30.18.3.0-4.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `13493649`)

Slice Aware Scheduler Given a set of configured RGs _S (_ S is a subset of all configure RGs of the cell), if enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12233_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_16121_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), a dynamic target share for every RG _i in_ S can be computed in the same way as in 5G_UP_ALG_23119_replaced([11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), except that the computation of dynamic target share is performed over the set _S while the computation of target share (5G_UP_ALG_23119_replaced([11206799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwr-2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is performed over the set of all configured RGs. The computed dynamic target share for an RG _i in _S is denoted as_ rrmRGDynamicTargetShare_{i, S}.**_*_** *

Note, if QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True) [CB016273-A] and intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = False) [End CB016273-A], dynamic target shares shall be computed according to 5G_UP_ALG_33087_replaced([11208531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwvCJPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [CB016273-A] If QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB(NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True) and intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), dynamic target shares shall be computed according to [13492570](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ch0buEPDEfGy8ZlFziQwLA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End CB016273-A]

---
