## 3.30.21 UL CoMP (Co-ordinated Multiplepoint)

### 3.30.21.1 UL CoMP Basic

#### 3.30.21.1.0-1 UL CoMP Basic Overview for UL CoMP Basic (ID: 12740784)

**3.30.21.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12740785`)

UL CoMP Basic Refer 5G UP System Level [12763061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gSJKEIOREfCOGMMH109ICw), [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw) for UL CoMP Basic concept, terms and configuration.

This requirement describes the overview of the UL CoMP Basic functionality at gNB-DU L2.

  * UL CoMP Basic functionality is described from serving cell point of view.
  * A serving cell shall get following UL CoMP configuration from "5G CP Entity Architecture and Algorithms" [12747666](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_d73Ik39GEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * rrmUlCompCandSubcellList: the candidate cell UL subcell id list.
  * NRBTS.NRULCOMPBASIC.minHelperSinrThr
  * NRBTS.NRULCOMPBASIC.maxSrvHelperSinrOffsetThr
  * See[12795649: Reception of UL CoMP Configuration](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_S7OcUpgWEfC7Wp-sWxcfJw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for more details.
  * A serving cell shall perform UL CoMP Basic functionality only when rrmUlCompCandSubcellList is not empty. This is referred as "UL CoMP is active".
  * A serving cell shall perform UL CoMP Basic functionality on a per slot UL scheduler basis as below.
  * A serving cell shall perform UL CoMP Basic functionality after the serving cell allocates the frequency PRB [11201742: FD Resource allocation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for all UEs in a slot.
  * A serving cell shall perform UL CoMP Basic functionality according to follow steps
    * 1) A serving cell selects UEs(s) for UL CoMP Basic PUSCH data reception. See [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
    * 2) A serving cell selects UEs(s) for UL CoMP Basic SINR measurement. See [12742860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pHagAHyeEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
    * Note: A UE cannot be selected for 1) and 2) at the same time.
    * 3) A serving cell sends PUSCH Receive Request to 5G-L1-UL for the UL CoMP decision from 1) and 2). See [12742863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6OPBknyfEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
    * 4) If fronthaul type is eCPRI, a serving cell sends UL CoMP Request to 5G-L1-UL. See [12743522](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iE3SYXziEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
    * 5) A serving cell receives PUSCH Receive Response from 5G-L1-UL and process the SINR measurement results corresponding to the requests in 3), see[12744772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Or2Jpn1uEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [12742905](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_c_FJUnyrEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
    * For both UL CoMP PUSCH data reception and UL CoMP SINR measurement, the response is the SINR measurement result.
  * A serving cell shall manage UE context for UL CoMP Basic as [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * [CB008465-TBD] See [12765560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_r8dl3Yb3EfCrqOdGJPoCRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for interworking. [End CB008465-TBD]

---

#### 3.30.21.1.0-2 UL CoMP Basic Reception of UL CoMP Configuration (ID: 12795649)

**3.30.21.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12796767`)

UL CoMP Basic Upon cell setup, serving cell shall initiate UL CoMP configuration

  * rrmUlCompCandSubcellList: set to an empty list.
  * NRBTS.NRULCOMPBASIC.minHelperSinrThr: set to an invalid value. (the largest value of the data type to store it)
  * NRBTS.NRULCOMPBASIC.maxSrvHelperSinrOffsetThr: set to an invalid value. (the smallest value of the data type to store it)



Upon reception UL CoMP configuration from "5G CP Entity Architecture and Algorithms" [12747666](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_d73Ik39GEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), 

  * Serving cell shall overwrite the stored value by the received value.
  * Serving cell shall sort rrmUlCompCandSubcellList by UL subcell id in increasing order.
  * [CB008465-H]
  * Comparing old and new rrmUlCompCandSubcellList, if one or more candidate cells are deleted, serving cell shall performed actions upon candidate cell deletion in [12785858: Manage per UE context for UL CoMP](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * If the number of candidate cells becomes less in new rrmUlCompCandSubcellList, serving cell shall performed actions upon candidate cell list shrink in [12785858: Manage per UE context for UL CoMP](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * [End CB008465-H]

---

#### 3.30.21.1.0-3 UL CoMP Basic Interworking (ID: 12765560)

**3.30.21.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12765564`)

UL CoMP Basic UL CoMP interworking with ULS (UL Scheduler) and BBRM

---

**3.30.21.1.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12780728`)

UL CoMP Basic UL CoMP is part of ULS task and it is performed after FD allocation, that is, frequency PRB allocation is completed.

UL CoMP function provides below information to BBRM:

  * Item1. The number of UE eligible for UL CoMP PUSCH data reception per slot. See [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * Item2. The number of UE eligible for UL CoMP SINR measurement per slot. See [12742860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pHagAHyeEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * Item3. The number of PRBs scheduled for UL CoMP PUSCH data reception per slot. See [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).



BBRM provides UL CoMP function below information.

  * The number of PRBs dedicate for UL CoMP purpose, with Item3 above as input to calculate this information. See [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [12707005](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ySTVQmJSEfC3KtQ77je1xA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).



BBRM calculates the number of UE can be scheduled per slot with additional input Item1 and Item2 (See [12747325](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3O8DQH8uEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [12747360](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-8Yvx38xEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). The result is used by ULS FDM to determine the maximum number of UE can be FDMed in UL (See [11199273](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwMPmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). After the FD, the remaining number of UEs can be used for UL CoMP purpose. See [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

---

#### 3.30.21.1.0-4 UL CoMP Basic Manage per UE context for UL CoMP (ID: 12785858)

**3.30.21.1.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `12796788`)

UL CoMP Basic This requirement is described from serving cell point of view.

A serving cell shall maintain following UE context for each UE u for UL CoMP basic functionality. 

  * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv: 
  * The long-term average pre-equalized SINR for the serving cell for UE u.
  * It is updated by exponential filtering the L1 instantaneous short-term pre-equalized SINR for serving cell for UE e, see [12742945](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_WjT3YXy5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9),[12744772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Or2Jpn1uEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * It is supervised by the timer defined by the R&D parameter rdSinrExpiryTime (see 5G_L2_1029 [11186254](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) for basic reliability, and rdSinrExpiryTimeHR (see [11138651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krgj6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for high reliability. 
    * If the timer is expired, rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv shall be re-initiated.
  * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper: 
  * The long-term average pre-equalized SINR for the helper cell for UE u under the serving cell.
  * If it is a valid value, then UE u is a candidate UE for selecting UE for UL CoMP PUSCH data reception, see [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * If it is a invalid value, then UE u is a candidate UE for selecting UE for UL CoMP SINR measurement, see [12742860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pHagAHyeEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu: 
  * The UL CoMP helper cell UL subcell id for UE u.
  * If it is a valid value and a candidate cell UL subcell id is equal to it, then the candidate cell is not considered in UL CoMP SINR measurement, see [12742860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pHagAHyeEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * rrmUlCompHelperTimeru: 
  * The timer associated with rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper and rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu.
  * Upon expiring, rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper and rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu shall be re-initiated.
  * Timer length is defined by the R&D parameter rdSinrExpiryTime (see 5G_L2_1029 [11186254](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) for basic reliability, and rdSinrExpiryTimeHR (see [11138651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krgj6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for high reliability.
  * rrmStarttIndexOnUlCompCandSubcellListu: 
  * The index on rrmUlCompCandSubcellList ([12740784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_PBhWcXv0EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for UE u.
  * It indicates the starting candidate cell. It makes SINR measurement is performed on candidate cells in a round-robin way for UE u, see [12742860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pHagAHyeEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).



Initialization:

  * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv: set to a value indicated invalid.
  * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper: set to a value indicated invalid.
  * rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu: set to a value indicated invalid.
  * rrmUlCompHelperTimeru: not start.
  * rrmStartIndexOnUlCompCandsSubcellListu: set to 0.



Events impact rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu, rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper, rrmUlCompHelperTimeru

  * Upon reception L1 instantaneous short-term pre-equalized SINR for one or more candidate cells for UE u ([12744772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Or2Jpn1uEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),
  * Serving cell shall perform helper cell determination as [12742905](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_c_FJUnyrEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for UE u.
  * If a helper cell is determined, then 

    * set rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu to helper cell UL subcell id.
    * Set rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper as [12742945](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_WjT3YXy5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
    * start timer rrmUlCompHelperTimeru .
  * Upon reception L1 instantaneous short-term pre-equalized SINR for the helper cell for UE u ([12744772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Or2Jpn1uEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),

  * If received value is valid, then
    * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper shall be updated by exponential filtering the received value, see [12742945](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_WjT3YXy5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
    * restart timer rrmUlCompHelperTimeru
  * Else
    * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper shall be re-initiated.
    * no change to rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu and rrmUlCompHelperTimeru.



[CB008465-H]

Upon candidate cell deletion event in [12795649: Reception of UL CoMP Configuration](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_S7OcUpgWEfC7Wp-sWxcfJw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), if rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu is a to-be-deleted candidate cell, then serving cell shall re-initiate:

  * rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu
  * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper
  * timer rrmUlCompHelperTimeru .



If the number of candidate cells is shrinked in [12795649: Reception of UL CoMP Configuration](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_S7OcUpgWEfC7Wp-sWxcfJw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), serving cell shall adjust rrmStarttIndexOnUlCompCandSubcellListu to a valid index based on need. 

[End CB008465-H]

---

#### 3.30.21.1.0-5 UL CoMP Basic Select UE(s) for UL CoMP Basic PUSCH data reception (ID: 12740825)

**3.30.21.1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12740826`)

UL CoMP Basic A serving cell shall select UE(s) for UL CoMP Basic PUSCH data reception as algorithm below. Refer to [12740784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_PBhWcXv0EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for the position and context of this algorithm in whole UL CoMP Basic overview.

Serving cell level variables

  * remainingPRBULCoMP: The remaining number of PRBs for UL CoMP.
  * UETTIremaining: The remaining number of UE/TTI resource in current slot.
  * UE_list_ULCoMP_PUSCH_Data_Reception: The output of the algorithm, store the UEs selected for UL CoMP PUSCH data reception. It is initiated to empty upon execution of this algorithm.



Per UE variables

  * PRBuallocated: the number of PRBs allocated to UE u in FD allocation ([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv: the long-term average pre-equalized SINR for the serving cell self for UE u. See [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper: the long-term average pre-equalized SINR for helper cell for UE u under the serving cell. See [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu: the UL CoMP helper cell UL subcell id for UE u. See [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)



Per slot UL scheduler action 

  * Serving cell shall perform following steps after gNB-DU allocates the PRB resource in frequency domain for all UEs (See [11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
  * remainingPRBULCoMP= The number of unallocated PRBs after [11201742: FD Resource allocation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * UETTIremaining = rrmMaxNumUesFdmUl - the number of UEs allocated with PRBs in [11201742: FD Resource allocation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * rrmMaxNumUesFdmUl: see [11199273](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwMPmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * Candidate_UE_list is built as below:
  * Candidate UE(s) shall satisfy all of following conditions:
    * the UE already gets PRB allocation in serving cell FD allocation ([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
    * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv is a valid value ([12742945](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_WjT3YXy5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
    * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv< rdMaxSrvAvgPreEqSinrForUlCompBasic ([12744731](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_LcUxEH1XEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
    * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelperis a valid value.
  * Candidate UE(s) are sorted by rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv in increasing order.
  * For each UE u in Candidate_UE_list 
  * If rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper > NRBTS.NRULCOMPBASIC.minhelperSinrThr and rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv – rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper < NRBTS.NRULCOMPBASIC.maxSrvHelperSinrOffsetThr
    * If UETTIremaining > 0 and PRBremaining,ULCoMP >= PRBuallocated
    * the UE u is selected for UL CoMP PUSCH data reception with the candidate cell c as helper cell.
      * put UE u into UE_list_ULCoMP_PUSCH_Data_Reception
    * remainingPRBULCoMP = remainingPRBULCoMP - PRBuallocated
    * UETTIremaining = UETTIremaining - 1



Output

  * UE_list_ULCoMP_PUSCH_Data_Reception
  * For each UE u in UE_list_ULCoMP_PUSCH_Data_Reception, rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu ([12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) is the helper cell selected for PUSCH data reception for the scheduled slot.

---

#### 3.30.21.1.0-6 UL CoMP Basic Select UE(s) for UL CoMP Basic SINR Measurement (ID: 12742860)

**3.30.21.1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12742861`)

UL CoMP Basic A serving cell shall select UE(s) for UL CoMP SINR Measurement as algorithm below. Refer [12740784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_PBhWcXv0EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for the position and context of this algorithm in whole UL CoMP Basic overview.

Serving cell level variables

  * reamainingPRBULCoMP: The remaining number of PRBs for UL CoMP after selecting UE(s) for UL CoMP PUSCH data reception (see [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
  * UETTIremaining: The remaining number of UE/TTI resource in current slot after selecting UE(s) for UL CoMP PUSCH data reception (see [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
  * UE_list_ULCoMP_SINR_Measurement: The output of the algorithm, store the UEs selected for UL CoMP SINR measurement. It is initiated to empty upon execution of this algorithm.
  * rrmUlCompCandSubCellList: candidate cell UL subcell id list. See [12740784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_PBhWcXv0EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).



Per UE variables

  * PRBuallocated: the number of PRBs allocated to UE u in FD allocation ([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * CellListuCandSinrMeas: the cell list, which stores the candidate cell(s) selected for SINR measurement for UE u. It is initiated to empty upon execution of this algorithm.
  * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv: the long-term average pre-equalized SINR for the serving cell self for UE u. See [12742905](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_c_FJUnyrEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper: the long-term average pre-equalized SINR for the helper cell for UE u under the serving cell. See [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu: the UL CoMP helper cell UL subcell id for UE u. See [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * rrmStartIndexOnUlCompCandSubcellListu: index on rrmUlCompCandSubcellList ([12740784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_PBhWcXv0EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for UE u.



Per TTI UL scheduler action 

  * Serving cell select UE(s) for UL CoMP SINR measurement after selecting UE(s) for UL CoMP data reception (see [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
  * remainingPRBULCoMP is the value after [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * UETTIremaining is the value after [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * Candidate_UE_list is built as below:
  * Candidate UE(s) shall satisfy all of following conditions:
    * the UE already gets PRB allocation in serving cell FD allocation ([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
    * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv is a valid value ([12742945](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_WjT3YXy5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
    * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv< rdMaxSrvAvgPreEqSinrForUlCompBasic ([12744731)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_LcUxEH1XEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
    * rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper: is an invalid value.
  * Candidate UE(s) are sorted by rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv in increasing order.
  * For each UE u in Candidate_UE_list
  * start_index = rrmStartIndexOnUlCompCandSubcellListu
  * Start from start_index to traverse each candidate cell c in rrmUlCompCandSubCellList,
    * If candidate cell c is equal to rrmUlCompHelperSubcellu, then skip candidate cell c.
    * If UETTIremaining > 0 and remainingPRBULCoMP >= PRBuallocated,
    * the UE u is selected for UL CoMP SINR measurement with the candidate cell c.
      * put UE u to UE_list_ULCoMP_SINR_Measurement
      * put the candidate cell c to CellListuCandSinrMeas
    * remainingPRBULCoMP = remainingPRBULCoMP - PRBuallocated
    * UETTIremaining = UETTIremaining - 1
    * rrmStartIndexOnUlCompCandSubcellListu is set to next index in rrmUlCompCandSubCellList. 
      * Example: rrmUlCompCandSubcellList is an array with 0-based index, then rrmStartIndexOnUlCompCandSubcellListu = (rrmStartIndexOnUlCompCandSubcellListu + 1) mod (length of rrmUlCompCandSubcellList).



Output

  * UE_list_ULCoMP_SINR_Measurement.
  * For each UE u in UE_list_ULCoMP_SINR_Measurement, CellListuCandSinrMeas is the candidate cell(s) selected for UL CoMP SINR measurement for the scheduled slot.

---

#### 3.30.21.1.0-7 UL CoMP Basic SINR Exponential Filtering for UL CoMP (ID: 12742945)

**3.30.21.1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `12742946`)

UL CoMP Basic The serving cell shall compute the long-term average pre-equalized SINR upon reception of an instantaneous L1 short-term pre-equalized SINR measurement for serving cell / helper cell ([12748020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9USZoH9qEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [12744772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Or2Jpn1uEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Input:

  * instAvgPreEqSinrusrv or instAvgPreEqSinruhelper from ([12748020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9USZoH9qEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [12744772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Or2Jpn1uEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
  * instAvgPreEqSinrusrv : instantaneous L1 short-term pre-equalized SINR measurement for serving cell for UE u.
  * instAvgPreEqSinruhelper : instantaneous L1 short-term pre-equalized SINR measurement for helper cell for UE u.
  * In generalization, it is denoted as instSinr.



Output:

  * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrvor rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper : the long term average pre-equalized SINR for serving cell or helper cell for UE u. 
  * It is denoted as longTermSinr below.



Procedure:

  * longTermSinr(0) = instSinr(0)
  * longTermSinr for the first transmission is equal to the first received instSinr.
  * longTermSinr(t) = a * instSinr(t) + (1-a) * longTermSinr(k)
  * a = max((t-k) / N, 1) Note: if t-k > N, then a = 1.
  * t: the PUSCH slot corresponding to instSinr.
  * k: the PUSCH slot of the last PUSCH transmission, which is the last longTermSinr value.
  * N: filter window length. It is defined by a R&D parameter rdAvgPreEqSinrUlFilterConst, see [12744729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_8qIMQH1PEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)



Exception handling:

  * If input instSinr is an invalid value, then
  * longTermSinr(t) shall be set to an invalid value.
  * Upon reception of a next valid instSinr, longTermSinr(t) is handled as t=0.
  * If longTermSinr(k) is an invalid value, then longTermSinr(t) is handled as t=0.



Initialization:

  * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrvand rrmAvgPreEqSinruhelper shall be initiated to a value indicates invalid value before the first time to executed this algorithm (so called before t=0).

---

#### 3.30.21.1.0-8 UL CoMP Basic Determination helper cell for UL CoMP Baisc (ID: 12742905)

**3.30.21.1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12742906`)

UL CoMP Basic The serving cell shall determine helper cell for UE u upon reception of an instantaneous L1 short-term SINR measurement for candidate cells for UE u ([12748020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9USZoH9qEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [12744772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Or2Jpn1uEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Input:

  * instAvgPreEqSinrListu: instantaneous L1 short-term SINR measurement for candidate cells for UE u.
  * instAvgPreEqSinrListu can include one or more items, each item is corresponding to a candidate cell.
  * Each item is denoted as instAvgPreEqSinrucand,c: instantaneous L1 short-term SINR measurement for candidate cell c for UE u..
  * rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv: the long-term average pre-equalized SINR for the serving cell self for UE u. See [12785858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OxYpwJEeEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)



Procedure:

  * For each instAvgPreEqSinrucand,c in instAvgPreEqSinrListu
  * If instAvgPreEqSinrucand,c > NRBTS.NRULCOMPBASIC.minhelperSinrThr and rrmAvgPreEqSinrusrv – instAvgPreEqSinrucand,c < NRBTS.NRULCOMPBASIC.maxSrvHelperSinrOffsetThr, then cand cell c is eligible for helper cell.
  * If there are one or more than one candidate cells eligible for helper cell, 
  * select the candidate cell c with the largest instAvgPreEqSinrucand,c as the helper cell.
  * Else
  * no candidate cell is eligible as as the helper cell.

---

#### 3.30.21.1.0-9 UL CoMP Basic UL CoMP Request to 5G-L1-UL (ID: 12743522)

**3.30.21.1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `12743523`)

UL CoMP Basic If fronthaul type is eCPRI, gNB-DU (5G-L2-PS) shall sends UL CoMP Request to 5G-L1-UL. 

UL CoMP Request shall include SFN and slot of the to be received PUSCH.

From the output of UL CoMP UE selection for Data reception and SINR measurement ([12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9),[12742860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pHagAHyeEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), gNB-DU shall build:

  * a UL subcell list: which includes all UL subcell ids which are selected as helper cell or/and candidate cell for SINR measurement.



For each UL subcell determined above, 

  * For each UE which selects the UL subcell as either helper cell or candidate cell for SINR measurement ([12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9),[12742860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pHagAHyeEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), UL CoMP request shall include following items:
  * startSymbol: Starting symbol of PUSCH
  * numOfPuschSymbols: Number of symbols used for PUSCH transmission (including DMRS).
  * startPrb: First PRB of the grant allocated to UE.
  * numOfPrb: Number of PRB allocated to UE.
  * numCeAxcIndex: Number of ceAxcIndex that are valid for this grant’s request.
  * ceAxcIndex: Set of eAxC indices to be used for the given channel/signal reception for this grant on eCPRI Fronthaul.
  * patternId: beam patternIds to be used for given channel/signal reception for this grant, and the eCPRI control message generation.
  * All above per UE/grant items are copies of the grant-level information from PUSCH Receive Request sent to 5G-L1-UL for the UE on the serving cell.

---

## 3.30.22 R&amp;D parameters

### 3.30.22.0-1 R&amp;D parameters rdUlProactiveEnableForLTEOnlyMode (ID: 11208948)

**3.30.22.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11208967`)

R&D parameters [Before CB013728-A]

Defines whether to enable the proactive UL scheduling while UE UL work in "LTEOnly" mode while UL dynamic switch is enabled.

Value range: 0...1

Default value: 0

Unit: NA

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in: 5G_UP_ALG_4835_replaced([11195251](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv6izfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note: With proactive scheduling in UL is disabled while UE in UlSplitWorkMode equal to LteOnly(introduced by PR581599), the RTT of ping will be some longer while UE with CDRX enabled. Some customer still want the short RTT of ping, so RAD parameter rdUlProactiveEnableForLTEOnlyMode (5G_UP_ALG_8547_replaced([11208948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kww3V_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is introduced to disabled the fix in PR581599. If new NIDD parameter is introduced in later release with same functionality and this RAD parameter shall be discarded.

[End CB013728-A]

---

### 3.30.22.0-5 R&amp;D parameters rdMinUlSchedUesPerSlotInHighLoad (ID: 11209025)

**3.30.22.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11209032`)

R&D parameters Defines the minimum guaranteed number of UEs to be scheduled in a slot in UL under high load situations, when FDM enabled.

Value range: 0, ……., 50

Default value: 1

Step size: 1

Unit: -

Online modifiable: No

Performance Impact: -

Used in: 5G_UP_ALG_13163_replaced([11196799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwFh5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Trigger for deletion: Never

Owner: ranjith.1.ponnusamy@nokia.com

Please note that number of UEs scheduled in any given slot will not be greater than rrmMaxNumUesFdmUl (see 5G_UP_ALG_10654_replaced([11199273](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwMPmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) though rdMinUlSchedUesPerSlotInHighLoad is set to higher value.

### 3.30.22.0-6 R&amp;D parameters rdBbrmGbrLoadReportOverbookingFactor (ID: 11209039)

**3.30.22.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11209047`)

R&D parameters The parameter rdBbrmGbrLoadReportOverbookingFactor is used in the computation of an additinal potential PRB share of for a cell from the L1 pool. The value provides the allowed overbooking of the potential free capacity of the L1 pool among the cells in the pool.

Value range: 0...1

Default value: 1

Unit: -

Online modifiable: No

Step Size: 0.1

Specified in: 5G_UP_ALG_12402_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.30.22.0-7 R&amp;D parameters rdUlMinTbs (ID: 11209054)

**3.30.22.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `12741246`)

R&D parameters [Before PR846547]

The parameter rdMinTbsLowSE is used in indicating the UL minimum TBS size when UE is scheduled with qam64LowSE-Index table.

[PR846547]

The parameter is renamed to rdUlMinTbs for generic use ( not specific for qam64LowSE-Index table) in indicating the UL minimum TBS size

[End PR846547]

Value range: 0...1000

Default value: 88

Unit: bits

Online modifiable: No

Step Size: 1

Note that the default values (88 bits) comes from the legacy behavior in UL for 64QAM-Index table, i.e, the TBS is 88 bits under the condition that the min PRB number for each UE ( minSupportedNumPrbsUl, defined in 5G_L2_1136_replaced([11183158](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27hiIfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ) is 3PRB with MCS0

Specified in: 5G_UP_ALG_17299_replaced([11132066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krEfCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.30.22.0-8 R&amp;D parameters rdTcpBoostPugInitialDelay (ID: 11209069)

**3.30.22.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11209076`)

R&D parameters The parameter rdTcpBoostPugInitialDelay specifies the delay that the UL scheduler shall wait between the time that the the first DL grant was sent to a UE for the start of a new TCP data flow and before the first TCP boost proactive uplink grant will be sent to the UE.

[Before PR705370]

Value range: 2...20

Default value: 5

[PR705370]

Value range: 1...20

Default value: 1

[End PR705370]

Unit: ms

Online modifiable: No

Step Size: 1

Specified in: 5G_UP_ALG_16877_replaced([11195491](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8X-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

R&D parameters The parameter rdCutOffMcsAdaptiveReTx64Qam defines the Cutt-Off MCS for adaptive retransmission if the 64QAM MCS index table is used. The adaptive retransmission is only allowed if the initial transmission used a MCS lower or equal to the rdCutOffMcsAdaptiveReTx64Qam.

Value range: 0...28

Default value: 28

Unit: N/A

Online modifiable: No

Step Size: 1

Value range: 0 … 32

Default value: 20

Unit: -

step size: 1

### 3.30.22.0-51 R&amp;D parameters rdULDataArrivalEstBasedOnSr (ID: 11209632)

**3.30.22.0-51.0-1**  (ID: `11209642`)

R&D parameters The R&D parameter acts as a control parameter to tune the estimate of arrival of the data in UE buffers when positive SR is received from the UE. The large the value, the more conservative the estimation is (i.e. it is assumed that data arrived at the UE around the time of previous SR occasion), whereas a value closer to 0 assumes that data arrived at the UE around the time of the received SR slot.

Value range: [0, 1]

Default value: 0.5

Step size: 0.1

Online modifiable: No

Specified in: 5G_UP_ALG_30956_replaced([11196073](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwACXvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.30.22.0-53 R&amp;D parameters rdUlReTxLimitTdLteConfig0Loki (ID: 11209665)

**3.30.22.0-53.0-1**  (ID: `11209669`)

R&D parameters This parameter defines the maximum number of bits that can be scheduled for retransmission in certain UL slots (sum of TBS of all UEs that are scheduled for reTx) on "Loki" L1 HW variant.

The value shall be used only when the the cell is configured with TD-LTE frame structure using tdLteConfig0

Value range: 0..10^6

Default value: 92000

Step size: 1

Online modifiable: Yes

Specified in: 5G_UP_ALG_31720_replaced([11197665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwH-IfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note : The value is calculated based on estimations from L1. Loki can support reTx on some UL slots only upto 23% of the maximum TBS. Max TBS assumed for this calculation : 400000 bits

---

### 3.30.22.0-54 R&amp;D parameters rdUlReTxLimitTdLteConfig0 (ID: 11209676)

**3.30.22.0-54.0-1**  (ID: `11209682`)

R&D parameters This parameter defines the maximum number of bits that can be scheduled for retransmission in certain UL slots (sum of TBS of all UEs that are scheduled for reTx) on L1 HW variant other than "Loki".

The value shall be used only when the the cell is configured with TD-LTE frame structure using tdLteConfig0

Value range: 0..10^6

Default value: 100000

Step size: 1

Online modifiable: Yes

Specified in: 5G_UP_ALG_31720_replaced([11197665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwH-IfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note : The value is calculated based on estimations from L1. Thor can support reTx on some UL slots only upto 25% of the maximum TBS. Max TBS assumed for this calculation : 400000 bits

### 3.30.22.0-68 R&amp;D parameters rdUlSchLowBufferMaxPenalty (ID: 12548625)

**3.30.22.0-68.0-1**  (ID: `12548626`)

R&D parameters The R&D parameter defines a penalty factor for low buffer UEs.

Value range: 0,...,100

Default value: 90

Unit: -

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in [12549822](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xSpfgCQfEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Rationale: The R&D parameter modifies the PF metric. It might reduce it significantly by the factor (1 - rdUlSchLowBufferMaxPenalty/100.0). This does not allow low buffer UEs to dominate the PF scheduler and shall guarantee a higher PRB utilization and less MCS downgrading if actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is activated.

---

### 3.30.22.0-69 R&amp;D parameters rdUlSchLowBufferFdmAssumption (ID: 12548629)

**3.30.22.0-69.0-1**  (ID: `12548633`)

R&D parameters The R&D parameter defines an assumption for the number of low buffer UEs to be ready for being scheduled.

Value range: 0,...,100

Default value: 4

Unit: -

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in [12549822](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xSpfgCQfEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Rationale: The R&D parameter modifies the PF metric and reduces it wrt low buffer UEs. This does not allow low buffer UEs to dominate the PF scheduler and shall guarantee a higher PRB utilization and less MCS downgrading if actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is activated.

---

### 3.30.22.0-70 R&amp;D parameters rdUlSchLowBufferReinitPenalty (ID: 12548642)

**3.30.22.0-70.0-1**  (ID: `12548646`)

R&D parameters The R&D parameter defines a penalty factor for low buffer UEs in case of re-initialization.

Value range: 0,...,100

Default value: 0

Unit: -

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in [12549822](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xSpfgCQfEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Rationale: The R&D parameter modifies the PF metric. It might reduce it significantly by the factor (1 -rdUlSchLowBufferReinitPenalty/100.0) in case of re-initialization of the average data rate. This does not allow low buffer UEs to dominate the PF scheduler and shall guarantee a higher PRB utilization and less MCS downgrading if actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is activated.

### 3.30.22.0-71 R&amp;D parameters rdUlSchLowBufferFilterConst (ID: 12548655)

Default value: 8

Unit: -

Online modifiable: No

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in [12549822](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xSpfgCQfEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Rationale: This R&D parameter is part of a set of parameters to modify the PF metric. It might reduce the PF term significantly by the factor (1 -rdUlSchLowBufferTbTxPenalty/100.0) for the a-posteriori downgraded UL data rate. This does not allow low buffer UEs to dominate the PF scheduler and shall guarantee a higher PRB utilization and less MCS downgrading if actUlSchLowBufferOptimization is activated.

### 3.30.22.0-78 R&amp;D parameters rdEulsPrbOffset0dBPhrFddFr1 ~~rdEulsPrbOffset0dBPhr~~ (ID: 12565115)

**3.30.22.0-78.0-2**  (ID: `12703928`)

R&D parameters The R&D parameter defines offset which is included in rrmNumPuschPrbWith0dBPh to account for any channel irregularities when PRB allocation is done in the UL for exhaustive scheduling. This parameter is only applicable for FR1 [CB014965-B-UPD002] FDD [End CB014965-B-UPD002]. 

Value range: [Before PR847824-26R1] -40 to +40 [PR847824-26R1] 0 (-40.0) ... 800 (40.0) [End PR847824-26R1]  
Default value: [Before PR847824-26R1][Before PR849252-26R1] 15 [PR849252-26R1] 12 [End PR849252-26R1] [PR847824-26R1] 520 (12.0) [End PR847824-26R1]  
Unit: dB  
Online modifiable: Yes  
Step size: [Before PR847824-26R1] 0.1 [PR847824-26R1] 1 (0.1) [End PR847824-26R1]

Performance impact: The maximum PRBs that shall be can attain a 0dB PHR is modified by this parameter.

Used in: [12533667](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_yox4gBxqEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

Trigger for deletion: Performance is verified later in the field test

[Before CB014965-B-UPD002] NOTE: Parameter renamed from rdEulsPrbOffset0dBPhr to rdEulsPrbOffset0dBPhrFddFr1 [End CB014965-B-UPD002]

### 3.30.22.0-86 R&amp;D parameters rdCgOwPrioAlloc (ID: 12807678)

**3.30.22.0-86.0-1**  (ID: `12807679`)

R&D parameters Description: If this RD parameter is configured to True, CG overwriting UEs with small allocation are first considered for PUSCH subarea assignment, so that these UEs get at least the required minimum allocation.

It is not recommended to set this RD parameter to false, as it may cause the problem that there is no PUSCH subarea big enough for the minimum allocation of a CG overwriting UE.

Value range: 0 (False), 1(True)

Step size: 1

Default value: 1 (True)

Unit: -

Online modifiable: No

Used in: [11199874](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), [11199953](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRIGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), [11200368](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
